1:1.text: Ko innde Alla puЙ—Й—orat-mi janngude Kur'aana o, mi wallinoo Mo mi barkinora e jantaade innde Makko. Basmala o na renndini inЙ—e Alla tati he inЙ—e Makko moЖҙЖҙe Й—e, Й—een ngoni: 1- "Alla" woni: deweteeЙ—o e goonga, ko ndee Й“uri heeraade e inЙ—e Alla ToowЙ—o o, hay gooto innirtaake nde so wonaa Kanko Mbo senaande woodani. 2- "Arrahmaanu" woni: jooma yurmeende yaajnde. Kanko tigi woni Arrahmaanu. 3- "Arrahiimu": jooma yurmeende jokkunde yottiinde. O yurmoo mbo O welaa e tagoore Makko, goonЙ—inЙ“e e jeyaaЙ“e Makko na tawee heen.

1:2.text: Denndaangal nooneeji jettirЙ—i e sifaaji teddungal e timmal ko Kanko tan woodani alanaa tanaa Makko; sabu ko Kanko woni Joomiraawo tagЙ—o Pewjanoowo kala huunde. "aalamiin" keewal "aalam" woni kala ko wonaa Alla ToowЙ—o o.

1:3.text: Yettude Alla toowЙ—o o caggal yettude Mo e aaye jawtuЙ—o o.

1:4.text: Mawninde Alla ToowЙ—o o sabu wonde Ko Joma kala ko woni e Гұalngu darnga, tawde fittaandu alaa ko joganii goЙ—Й—o. te "Гұalngu njoЙ“di": Гұalngu yoЙ“eede e hiiseede.

1:5.text: Ko Aan tan min keerinani dewe e Й—oftaare, min ndenndintaa Ma e tanaa MaaЙ—a, ko Aan tan min mballintoo e kala geЙ—e amen, moЖҙЖҙere fof woni ko e junngo Maa, alaa balloowo so wonaa Aan.

1:6.text: Tinndin min laawol pooccingol, ndewnaa min e maggol, tabitinaa min heen, ЖҒeydanaa min peewal. "Laawol pooccingol" woni laawol laaЙ“tungol ngol ooГұaaki, ngool woni Lislaam mbo Alla neliri Muhammad- jam e kisal Alla yo won e makko-

1:7.text: Laawol Й“een jeyaaЙ“e Maa Й“e neeminir-Й—aa peewal; wano AnnabaaЙ“e Й“e, e gooЕӢЙ—uЙ“e Й“e, e sahodinЙ“e Й“e, e moЖҙЖҙuЙ“e Й“e, kamЙ“e ngoni wondiiЙ“e moЖҙЖҙuЙ“e, wonaa laawol tikkanaaЙ“e annduЙ“e goonga te Й“e ndewaani Й—um, wano yahudu en, wonaa kadi laawol majjiraaЙ“e goonga mbo Й“e donki yiitude sabu yeebagol maЙ“Й“e Й—aЙ“Й“itde goonga haa yiita mo wano nasaara en.

2:1.text: {Alif} ko gootal e alkule udditiraaЙ—e yoga e cimooje Alkur'aan o, ko alkule Й—e ngalaa maanaa e jaati majje, si Й—e jantaama kanje tan wano (alif, ba, ta, ekn) kono eЙ—e njogii ГұeeГұal e nafoore; sabu alaa ko woni nder Kur'aan ko alal tinndinoore, na jeyaa e tinndinooje majje: joopaade ronkande oo Kur'aan gonirЙ—o e Й—ee alkule Й—e Й“e nganndi eЙ“e Й—e kaala; Й—uum waЙ—i Kur'aana teddunde nde na heewi janteede Й“aawo majje, bano Й—um woniri e ndee simoore.

2:2.text: Oon Kur'aana tedduЙ—o sikke alaa e makko, wonaa e jippagol mo, wonaa e konngol e maanaa makko, ko nde haala Alla, feewnooka hulЙ“e Й“e faade e laawol jottinowol e Makko.

2:3.text: ЖҒeen goonЙ—inooЙ“e mbirniindi, Й—uum woni kala ko anndirtaake co'irЙ—i te wirnii en, e ko Alla daali maa ko nelaaЙ—o maaki, wano Гұalngu wattan, kamЙ“e tigi ГұiiЙ“nata juulde wano Alla yamiri nde e sarЙ—iiji mayre, e jookli e baЙ—Й—iiЙ—i e sunnaaji mayre, kamЙ“e ngoni rokkirooЙ“e e ko Alla yeЙ—i Й“e, e yaltinde ko waЙ—Й—ii, wano asakal, maa ko waЙ—Й—aaki wano dokkal sadak; joortaade heen baraaji Alla, kamЙ“e ngoni gooЕӢЙ—inЙ“e wahyu mbo Alla jippini dow maa -Aan Annabi - jippinaaЙ—o kadi dow kala AnnabaaЙ“e (jkw) adiiЙ“e ma, kamЙ“e gooЕӢЙ—inЙ“e - e yananeede - laakara e baraaji e lette gonЙ—e heen.

2:5.text: ЖҒeen siforiiЙ“e Й—ii sifaaji waawЙ“e jokkude laawol peewal, kamЙ“e ngoni daЙ—ooЙ“e e aduna e laakara, Й“e keЙ“a ko Й“e njoortinoo Й“e ndaЙ—a e ko Й“e kulnoo.

2:6.text: Pellet Й“een Й“e konngol Alla jojji e mum en caggal iimaan hoЙ“e ndooni e majjere mum en e canndalaagal mum en jeertinde Й“e e waasde jeertinde fof ina fota e nun en.

2:7.text: Sabu Alla muЙ“Й“i Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e O uddidi Й—e e bonЙ—i majje, O muЙ“Й“i nanЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й“e nanirtaa goonga no mbo foti jaЙ“ireede Й—oftoree, O waЙ—i ommboode e ji'irЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й“e nji'ataa goonga o te embo feeГұi, maa Й“e keЙ“ lette mawЙ—e to laakara.

2:8.text: Na woodi fedde e yimЙ“e sikkooЙ“e ko goonЙ—inЙ“e, Й“e kaala Й—um e Й—emЙ—e maЙ“Й“e sabu hulande nguurndam e jawle maЙ“Й“e, tawa eЙ“e cuuЙ—i keefeeru.

2:9.text: ЖҒe cikkat e majjere mum en Й“e kodoto Alla e goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e, e peГұГұina goonЙ—ingo Й“e cuuЙ—a keefeeru, tawa noon ko ko'e maЙ“Й“e tan Й“e kodata, tawa Й“e tinaani Й—um, sabu Alla ToowЙ—o O Mbo anndi ko Й“uri suuЙ—aade, O humpiti goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“en sifaaji e ngonka Й“een tigi.

2:10.text: Sabaabu mum ko Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—e sikkitii, Alla Й“eydani Й“e sikkitaare, njoЙ“di fof fawii ko golle mum, maa Й“e pawe lette muusЙ—e to Й“uri luggu e jayngol, sabu ko Й“e penani Alla e yimЙ“e Й“e, e yiddude Й“e ko Muhammadu (jkm) addi ko.

2:11.text: So Й“e kaЙ—aama bonnirde leydi ndi keefeeru e bakkatuuji e goЙ—Й—i, Й“e caloo Й“e cikka ko kamЙ“e tigi ngoni moЖҙЖҙuЙ“e moЖҙЖҙinooЙ“e.

2:12.text: Tawa noon ko kamЙ“e tigi ngoni bonnooЙ“e, kono tan Й“e tinataa Й—uum, Й“e tinataa ko golle maЙ“Й“e Й—e tigi ngoni bonnere.

2:13.text: Si Й“e njamiraama goonЙ—inde wano koreeji Muhammadu (jkm) ngoonЙ—inirnoo; Й“e nootora yeddugol e jalkitgol, Й“e mbi'a: mbela miЙ—en ngoonЙ—ina wano goonЙ—inal Й—aayЙ“e Й“e?! tawa ko kamЙ“e tigi ngoni wemmbaaЙ“e. Kono tan eЙ“e majjaa Й—um.

2:14.text: So Й“e kawrii e Й“een goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e mbi'a: min njaЙ“ii ko ngoonЙ—in-Й—on ko, Й“e mbi'a noon sabu hulde goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e, si Й“e njahii Й“e njeewdii e hooreeЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“ee, Й“e teentinana Й“e tabital e jokkude Й“e, e wiide Й“e: ko onon min ngondi e laawol mon, kono tan miЙ—en peГұГұinana goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“en jaЙ“de amen, min njala Й“e min njalkita.

2:15.text: Alla jalkita Й“e sabu ko Й“e njalkiti goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e, Й—um wona njoЙ“di golle maЙ“Й“e, Й—uum waЙ—i O Гұaawira Й“e he aduna wano juulЙ“e Й“e, kono to laakara O yoЙ“ira Й“e keefeeru e naafikaagu maЙ“Й“e, ko noon kadi O muГұana Й“e haa Й“e Й“eydoo majjude e bewde, Й“e keddoo e wemmbaade e aande.

2:16.text: Ko Й“een ngoni naafigeeЙ“e siforЙ“e Й—i sifaaji sabu Й“e lomtinirii keefeeru liimanee gal, njulaagu maЙ“Й“e alaa tono; sabu Й“e mbaasii goonЙ—ingol Alla, Й“e peewaano e goonga on.

2:17.text: Alla yerЙ—inirii Й“ee naafigeeЙ“e yeruuji Й—iЙ—i: yeru jayngol, e yeru ndiyam, so tawii ko yerЙ—inde Й“e jayngol: Й“e nannde ko e oon kuЙ“Й“uЙ—o jayngol ngam yaynaade, nde ngol jaawi o sikki ombo naftoro ooyre maggol kono tan ngol Гұifi, ooyre nde majjiti, heddii tan ko nguleeki maggol, joom en keddii e niЙ“e e wemmbere hay huunde Й“e nji'ataa wonah feede e laawol.

2:18.text: KamЙ“e ko fahЙ—uЙ“e Й“e nanataa njaЙ“ataa goonga, muumЙ—uЙ“e Й“e kaalataa mo, wumЙ“e Й“e nji'ataa mbo, Й“e nduttotaako gaa majjere maЙ“Й“e.

2:19.text: So tawii ko yerЙ—inde Й“e e ndiyam: Й“e nanndi ko e toЙ“o mawngo, e duule niЙ“Й“une e digaali e maje, Й—i jippii dow yimЙ“e Й—eГұЖҙere mawnde heЙ“i Й“e, Й“e ngoni e sukkude noppi maЙ“Й“e, sabu sattude kartaali Й—i e hulgol maayde, Alla na humpitii heeferЙ“e Й“en O ronkantaa Й“e.

2:20.text: Jalbugol maje Й—e na Й—eЙ“a Й—oofde gite maЙ“Й“e, kala nde majal yaynii Й“e njawta, so ngal yaynaaki Й“e keddoo e niЙ“Й“ere, Й“e njahataa, so Alla welano itta nanЙ—e e gite maЙ“Й“e e kattanЙ—e Makko kuЙ“tidinЙ—e, Й“e ngontaa heЙ“tude Й—e, sabu Й—uurnaade Й“e goonga o. Kur'aan on waЙ—i toЙ“u ngo yeru, hito parГұite wa'i no kaЙ—ooje, ooyre maje Й—e wa'i no googna peeГұanatЙ—o Й“e seeЙ—a kala, sukkude noppi Й—i wa'i no salaade Й“e goonga o, nanndal hakkunde naafigeeЙ“e e Й“ee yerЙ—inaaЙ“e Й—oo woni waasde naftorde, yeru jayngol ngol: huЙ“Й“uЙ“e ngol Й“ee alaa ko naftorii heen sonaa niЙ“Й“ere e sumde, yeru ndiyam Й—am: alaa ko Й“e naftori e toЙ“o ngo sonaa kulol e ko digaali Й—i e maje Й—e Й“ittini Й“e, ko nii naafigeeЙ“e ngoniri, alaa ko Й“e nji'ata e Lislaam sonaa satteende.

2:21.text: Onon yimЙ“e ndewee joomi mon Kanko tan, wonaa hay gooto goЙ—Й—o, sabu ko Kanko tagi on O tagi leЖҙЖҙi gadiiЙ—i on, mbela joo ndaЙ—iron lette makko Й—oftaade jamirooje Makko ndeento-Й—on Й—i O haЙ—i.

2:22.text: Ko Kanko waЙ—i leydi ndi wonani on mbertu ndaЙ—Й—udi, O waЙ—i dow mon asamaan o mahaaЙ—o e ГұeeГұal, Kanko tigi neeminiri on jippinde toЙ“o ngo, O fuЙ—ni dow leydi ndi Й“iЙ“Й“e leЙ—Й—e ceertuЙ—e, Й—e ngoni njeЙ—u, taa mbaЙ—anee Alla renndidiiЙ“e e nanndidiiЙ“e tawa oЙ—on nganndi alaa fof tagoowo sonaa Alla, teddungal e mawngu woodanii Mbo.

2:23.text: Onon yimЙ“e Й“ee so tawii oЙ—on cikkitii Kur'aan jippinaaЙ—o o dow jeyaaЙ—o Makko Muhammadu (jkw), MiЙ—en cappoo on nde ngaddoton simoore wootere nanndunde heen, hay so wonii ko Й“urnde raЙ“Й“ude heen, noddee kala mbo njiЙ—Й—on e wallidiiЙ“e mon, so tawii oЙ—on ngoonЙ—i e ko nodditorto-Й—on ko.

2:24.text: So tawii on mbaЙ—aani Й—uum - te on mbaawantaa Й—um pooma- ndeento-Й—ee jayngol kuЙ“Й“irtengol yimЙ“e haanduЙ“e e lette, e nooneeji kaaЖҙe e ko Й“e ndewannoo e goЙ—Й—i kadi, ngol jayngol Alla tigi heblani ngol heeferЙ“e Й“e.

2:25.text: Nde wonndoo ko heeferЙ“e kammbanaa ko yawti ko; Aan Annabiijo weltinir goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e Alla, gollooЙ“e moЖҙЖҙi, aljannaaji Й—i caalli ndogata les kuЙ“eeje e leЙ—Й—e majji, kala nde Й“e njeЙ—aa Гұammineede Й“iЙ“Й“e majje belЙ—e, Й“e mbi'a: Й—ee nanndi ko e Й—eya Й—e njeЙ—ano-Й—en ko adii, Й“e ndokkee Й—e tawa mbaadi e inЙ—e majje na nanndi eЙ—e aduna Й—e, haa Й“e mbaawa jaЙ“de Й—e, kono eЙ—e ceerti Гұamri e meeЙ—am, to aljanna eЙ“e ndaГұa rewЙ“e laaЙ“Й“e hisЙ“e e kala ayiibe ko miijetee e aduna, Й“e ngona e neema duumiiЙ—o mbo taЖҙataa, wano neema aduna taЖҙoowo o.

2:26.text: Anndu Alla ceniiЙ—o O aamataa addude yeruuji Й—i O welaa, O nanndinira Й“oЕӢngu -cufu- e ko Й“uri ngu mawnude maa ko jaasi ngu, yimЙ“e Й“ee ko pecce Й—iЙ—i njiirata Й—um: goonЙ—inЙ“e e heeferЙ“e, so tawii ko goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e eЙ“e njaЙ“a tawa eЙ“e nganndi ko ГұeeГұal woni e ngool nanndingol, so tawii ko heeferЙ“e Й“ee, Й“e ngona e naamnitaade, ngam jalkitde, holko waЙ—i Alla Mo nanndinira e Й—ee takooje koyЙ—e, wano Й“owЙ—i, e buubi, e jommbaalji, e ko wonaa Й—ii, jaabawol mum iwde e Alla ko: Й—ii yeruuji eЙ—i coomi peewal e tindinooje e humpitagol yimЙ“e Й“e, heewЙ“e heen Alla majjiniri Й“e Й—ii yeruuji sabu salaade Й“e mijitaade Й—i, heewЙ“e heen kadi O feewni Й“e sabu teskitaade Й—i, alaa majjooЙ“e so wonaa haanduЙ“e heen, Й“een ngoni saliiЙ“e Й—oftaade, wano naafigeeЙ“e Й“e.

2:27.text: ЖҒeen firtooЙ“e aadi dewe Alla gooto O, e Й—oftaade NulaaЙ—o Makko mbo nelaaЙ“e adiiЙ“e kaali fii mum, Й“ee salotooЙ“e aadiiji Alla Й“e ngoni ko e taЖҙde ko Alla yamiri yo enЙ—am jokke, Й“e ngoni e goopi ngam saaktude bonannde, Й“ee ngoni ustoraaЙ“e njeЙ—u aduna e laakara.

2:28.text: Onon heeferЙ“e geЙ—e mon na haawnii! holno njeddirton Alla, tawa oЙ—on ceedoo maandeeji baawal Makko e ko'e mon, on ngoodaano, O tagi on O wuurni on, O wara on kadi Й—iЙ—aЙ“ol, O wuurtina on kadi Й—iЙ—aЙ“ol, rewa heen O rutta on e Makko ngam O yoЙ“a on ko mbaЙ—no-Й—on ko.

2:29.text: Ko Alla tan tagani on kala ko woni e dow leydi ndi: caalli, e leЙ—Й—e e ko wonaa Й—uum ko limotaako, onon oЙ—on naftoroo heen e dakmitaade ko O eeltani on, O tagi kadi asamaanji Й—i jeeЙ—iЙ—i kiЙ“indiiЙ—i, ganndal Makko na fiiltii kala huunde.

2:30.text: Alla ToowЙ—o O na filloo, O wii malaykaaЙ“e Й“e: Kanko maa O waЙ— yimЙ“e lomtondirooЙ“e dow leydi ndi, ngam Й“e nguurnira ndi dewe Alla, malaykaaЙ“e Й“e naamnii joomii Й“e - naamnal laЙ“Й“inagol - holko woni ГұeeГұal waЙ—ude Й“iЙ“Й“e-aadama lomtoo dow leydi, tawa eЙ“e mbonna ndi, Й“e ndufa ЖҙiiЖҙe e tooГұe, Й“e mbii: minen ko min rewooЙ“e Ma tan, ko min sennooЙ“e yettooЙ“e Ma, miЙ—en teddina mawngu Maa e timmal Maa, min ceerataa heen, Alla jaabii Й“e naamnal maЙ“Й“e: Miin MiЙ—o anndi ko on nganndaa e ГұeeГұe mawЙ—e ko Й“e tagiraa, e paandale lomtineede Й“e.

2:31.text: Ngam laЙ“Й“inde teddeengal Baaba Aadama (jkm) Alla anndini mo inЙ—e geЙ—e Й—ee fof, gila e muumintaaji e joorЙ—e e tagooje goЙ—Й—e; konngi majje e maanaaji mum, rewi heen O holli Й—e malaykaaji, o wii: kaalanee Min inЙ—e majji so tawii oЙ—on ngoonЙ—i e ko kaaloton ko, wonde onon Й“uri teddude oo tagaaЙ—o.

2:32.text: ЖҒe mbii - e jaЙ“de ustaare maЙ“Й“e Й“e ndutti Й“ural to Alla - miЙ—en cennu Maa min mawninii Maa Aan jooma amen gaa salaade Гұaawoore e sariya Maa, minen alaa ko min nganndi sonaa ko njeЙ—Й—aa min e ganndal, Ko Aan tigi anndi alaa ko wirnoto Maa, ГұeeГұЙ—uЙ—o baЙ—iroowo geЙ—e fof Й—o haani e kattanЙ—e e sariya Maa.

2:33.text: Oon tuma Alla ToowЙ—o O wii Aadam: anndin Й“e inЙ—e Й—een geЙ—e, nde o anndini Й“e Й—e wano Joomiiko anndiniri mo, Alla wii malaykaaji Й—i: mbela mi haalanaano on: Miin MiЙ—o anndi ko suuЙ—ii nder asamaanji e lesdi, MiЙ—o anndi ko Й“annginton e ko cuuЙ—oton.

2:34.text: Alla Mbo laЙ“Й“ina ko O yamiri yo malaykaaji Й—i cujjan Aadam ngam teddinde mo, Й“e njaawi Й“e cujji e Й—oftaare yamiroore Alla, so wonaa Ibilis gonnooЙ—o e jinneeji, o salii ko Alla yamiri mo sujjude, o mawnikinii dow Aadam, ndeen o wonti e heeferЙ“e yedduЙ“e Alla toowЙ—o O.

2:35.text: Min mbi'i: aan Aadama yaa hoЙ—oy aljanna aan e cuddiiЙ—o maa -Hawaa-, Гұaamee toon e weltaare kala Й—o muuy-Й—on, kono taa Й“adee kii lekki ki Mi haЙ—i on Гұaamde, si on ngoopii yamiroore njeyete-Й—on ko e tooГұooЙ“e.

2:36.text: SeyЙ—aane seeraani e soklinde Й“e ЕӢarЙ—ina, haa o liЙ“i Й“e e goopol, Й“e Гұaami e kiin lekki ki Й“e kaЙ—anoo, njoЙ“di maЙ“Й“e wonndoo ko Alla yaltini Й“e aljanna, Alla wii Й“e kamЙ“e e seyЙ—aane o: njippoЙ—ee dow lesdi, ngonon aГұondirЙ“e, tabiton toon mbeltoron e moЖҙЖҙi gonЙ—i heen haa kala nde happu mon yonti, darnga daroo.

2:37.text: Aadama jaЙ“i konngi Й—i Alla haalani mo, o du'ori Й—i, Й—iin ngoni haala Alla: (Й“e mbii joomiraawo amen min tooГұii ko'e amen, so A accanaani min njurmo-ЖҠaa min maa min njeye e bonnoraaЙ“e) Aaraf:23. Alla jaЙ“ani mbo tuububuye makko, O accani mo, Joomiraawo ko keewЙ—o yaafaade jeyaaЙ“e Makko.

2:38.text: Min mbii Й“e: onon fof njippee aljanna pa'on to lesdi, so nelaaЙ“e Am ngaddii e mon peewal, kala dewЙ—o ngal o goonЙ—ini nelaaЙ“e Am oon dee kulol alanaa mo Гұande wattan, Й“e cunotaako e ko yawtiri Й“e to aduna.

2:39.text: So tawii ko Й“een yedduЙ“e penni kaawese Amen, kamЙ“e ngoni yimЙ“e jayngol ГұiiЙ“ooЙ“e toon.

2:40.text: Onon Й“iЙ“Й“e Isra'il - Annabi Yaakub -ciwtoree mojjereeji Alla Й—i O waЙ—ani on njetton Mo, njokkon humnude aadi Am e mon, goonЙ—inde Mi e nulaaЙ“e Am, e gollirde sariyaaji Am Й—i, so on kumnii aadi Am e ko podan-Mi on ko, wano nguurndam mbelЙ—am e aduna, e njoЙ“di moЖҙЖҙiri Гұande darnga, kulon Mi Miin tan tawa on pirtataa aadi Am o.

2:41.text: GoonЙ—inee Kur'aana mbo njippin-Mi dow Muhammad (jkm) te ombo hawri e ko woni nder Tawreeta, ko adii nde ngootaagu Alla e annabaagu Muhammad (jkm) wayleede e mayre, ndeento-Й—ee wonde adiiЙ“e yeddude, wotaa mbattitee aayeeje Am Й—e coggu pamaru, kulee tikkere e lette Am Й—e.

2:42.text: Taa njillindiree goonga - mbo Alla jippini dow nulaaЙ“e Mum- e penaale mon Й—e, wotaa cuuЙ—ee goonga garЙ—o e defte mon Й—e cifiiЙ—e Muhammad (jkm) tawa oЙ—on mbo nganndi oЙ—on laaЙ“aa.

2:43.text: Tottiree juulde timminon dosЙ—e mayre e baЙ—Й—iiЙ—i e sunnaaji mayre, njaltinee asakal jawle mon Й—e Alla resndi on, njankinanoЙ—ee Alla hawtude e yankinaniiЙ“e Mo iwde e leГұol Muhammadu (jkm).

2:44.text: Holko Й“uri bonde, si oЙ—on njamira woЙ“Й“e yo ngoonЙ—u mbaЙ—a ko moЖҙЖҙi, oЙ—on njejjita ko'e mon, tawa oЙ—on njannga Tawreeta, oЙ—on nganndi ko woni heen e yamiroore rewde diine Alla Й—e, e jaЙ“ande nulaaЙ“e Makko, mbela on mbaawaa naftorde hakkillaaji mon Й—i?!

2:45.text: Mballitoree muГұal e juulde fii kala geЙ—e diine e aduna, Й“attinatnde on faade e Alla, O walla on O reena on O ittana on boneeji, nganndee juulde na saЙ—ti na teddi si wonah e hulooЙ“e joomiraawo maЙ“Й“e.

2:46.text: Sabu kamЙ“e ngoni yananaaЙ“e maa Й“e kawru e Joomiraawo Гұande darnga, maa Й“e ndutto e Makko ngam O yoЙ“a Й“e golleeji maЙ“Й“e.

2:47.text: Onon Й“iЙ“Й“e Annabiijo Alla Yaakuub (Isra'il) ciftoree moЖҙЖҙere diine e aduna nde mbaЙ—an-Mi on, ciftoree wonde Mi Й“urnirii on annabaagal e laamu dow wondiiЙ“e mon e yonta.

2:48.text: Ndeentoro-Й—ee lette Гұalaande darnga rewde ko yamiraa e accude ko haЙ—aa, ndeen Гұalaande fittaandu nafataa fittaandu hay huunde, ndu jaЙ“antaake tefande goЙ—Й—o sonaa e yamiroore Alla, coodtiigu ko heewi fof jaЙ“etaake, Й“e ngalaa ballo Гұande heen, so tawii tefoowo e coodtiigu ballo alah holno daЙ—irtee!

2:49.text: Onon Й“iЙ“Й“e Isra'il ciftoree nde Min ndanndi on e boneeji yimЙ“e Fir'awna, Й“e pawii on kala lette, nde Й“e kirsi sukaaЙ“e mon worЙ“e haa mbaason heddaade, Й“e ngacca sukaaЙ“e mon rewЙ“e ngam Й“e ngollana Й“e, Й“e koyni on, ko jooma mon danndi on boneeji fir'awna e wallidiiЙ“e mum ngam humpitaade on, mbela joo njetton Mbo.

2:50.text: Ciftoree moЖҙЖҙere nde Min mbaЙ—ani on, Min peccani on maayo ngo woni laawol njoorndi ndew-Й—on heen, Min ndanndi on, Min njooli fir'awna e wondiiЙ“e mum yeeso mon, oЙ—on ndaarda Й“e gite mon ЕӢaas.

2:51.text: Ciftoree e Й—iin moЖҙЖҙi ko Min podondirnoo e Muusaa jammaaji capanЙ—e nayi ngam jippinde heen Tawreeta wona fooyre (yaynannde) e peewal, alaa ko mbaЙ—Й—on heen sonaa oЙ—on ndewa ngaari, baЙ—al mon ngal ko tooГұe mawЙ—e.

2:52.text: Rewi heen Min ngaccani on Й“aawo nde tuub-Й—on, Min leЙ“taani on mbela joo njettiron Alla rewde Mo e Й—oftaade Mo no haaniri.

2:53.text: Ciftoree e Й—ii moЖҙЖҙi, nde Min ndokki Muusaa (jkm)deftere (Tawreeta) seerndoore hakkunde goonga e fenaande,e hakkunde peewal e majjere haa njiiton goonga jokkon mbo.

2:54.text: Ciftoree e Й—iin moЖҙЖҙi, nde Alla Гұaawani on accude rewde ngaari ndi, nde Muusaa (jkm) wii on: on tooГұii ko'e mon e rewde mon ngaari ndi, tuubee ndutto-Й—on e tagЙ—o on O, mbarondiron, Й—uum Й“uri e mon jokkude keefeeru caasnoowu jayngol, on mbaЙ—ii Й—uum e ballal Alla, O accani on, sabu ko keewЙ—o yaafaade jurmotooЙ—o jeyaaЙ“e Makko.

2:55.text: Ciftoree nde baabiraaЙ“e mon Й“ee kaaldi e Muusaa e cuusal, Й“e mbii: min ngoonЙ—intaa ma haa min jiira Alla gite amen ko laaЙ“i,ndeen jayngol cumowol Й“ami on,ngol wari on oЙ—on ndaarondira.

2:56.text: Rewti heen Min immintini on Й“aawo maayde mon mbela njetton Alla sabu ko O moЖҙЖҙi e mon.

2:57.text: Na jeyaa e moЖҙЖҙi Amen dow mon, Min neldi duule Й—uwo-Й—on heen nguli naange nde majju-Й—on nde, Min njippini dow mon njuumri welndi, e colli juЙ—aaЙ—i, Min mbii on: Гұaamee moЖҙЖҙi Й—i Min njeЙ—e on. Yeddugol maЙ“Й“e alaa ko ustataa Min, kono ko ko'e maЙ“Й“e Й“e tooГұi, Й“e ustoraa baraaji lette ngoodana Й“e.

2:58.text: Ciftoree e neemaaji Alla dow mon,nde Min mbii on:naatee ndee saare (Baytil Mukaddas),Гұaamee toon belЙ—i ceniiЙ—i e kala nokku Й—o mbela-Й—on, so oЙ—on naata damal ngal tugganon Alla tiiЙ—e,toro-Й—on Alla mbi'on: Joomi amen momtan min bakkatuuji amen;Min njaЙ“ana on,maa Min Й“eydan moЖҙЖҙinЙ“e golle maЙ“Й“e Й“ee baraaji.

2:59.text: ЖҒeen tooГұЙ“e mbattiti konngol tanaa ngol Й“e mbi'anoo, Й“e naatiri ladgol, Й“e mbi*i: gabbel nder leebol sabu jalkitde yamiroore Alla toowЙ—o O; njoЙ“di tooГұooЙ“e Й“e ko Alla njippini dow maЙ“Й“e lette sabu yaltugol maЙ“Й“e keerol sariya e luutndaade yamiroore.

2:60.text: Ciftoree moЖҙЖҙi Alla dow mon nde majju-Й—on nde, wemmbere bonnde heЙ“i on, ndeen Muusaa (jkm) toranii on Joomiraawo O yarna on; Min njamiri mo fiyirde haayre nde sawru makko; nde o fiynoo nde tan gite ndiyam sappo e Й—iЙ—i puccitii tolnondir e limoore leГұГұi mon Й—i, ndiyam suppitii heen, Min mbii on: Гұaamee njaron e njeЙ—u ngu Alla addani on te on tampanaani Й—um, taa mbaЙ—ee bonannde e leydi hee.

2:61.text: Ciftoree nde njeddu-Й—on moЖҙЖҙere Jooma mon,kaaЙ“-Й—on mbii-Й—on Muusaa:min muГұataa e Гұaamdu wooturu,torano amen Jooma maa O yaltinana min Гұaandu iwde e puЙ—i lesdi,gila e haako e kecciЙ—Й—i mayri haa e buudi e gabbe e Гұebbe e basalle mayri;Muusaa (jkm) wii e waasde weleede Й—aЙ“Й“al mon: on mbattitat ko Й“uri jaasde Й—um ko okka-Й—on,oЙ—on keЙ“annoo Й—um ko aldaa e tampere-: njippee e ndi leydi faade e wooto e gure Й—e, maa on taw toon ko toriЙ—on ko,nde Й“e ndewi belaaЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й“e calii ko Alla suЙ“anii Й“e,Й“e keddodi e hoyre e baasal e Й“ittere,Й“e nduttii e tikkire Alla; sabu salaade Й“e diine Makko,e yeddu- de Й“e aayeeji Makko,e tooГұe ko Й“e mbannoo annabaaЙ“e Makko, Й—uum fof addi Й—um ko woopde Й“e Alla e ko Й“e njawtatno keeri Makko.

2:62.text: ЖҒeen goonЙ—inЙ“e e ngol leГұol, e Й“een goonЙ—in Й“e e leГұГұi jawtuЙ—i ko adii nuleede Muhammadu (jkm) gila e yahuudu en e nasaara en e Saa'iba en - Й“een ngoni rewЙ“e e yoga e annabaaЙ“e Й“e keЙ“i goonЙ—inde Alla e Гұalaande watindiine- Й“een na njogii mbarjaari to Jooma maЙ“Й“e, Й“e kulanaaka Гұande wattan, Й“e cunotaako e ko yawtiri Й“e to aduna.

2:63.text: Ciftoree aadi tiiЙ—Й—o mbo Min keЙ“i e mon,wano goonЙ—inde Alla e nulaaЙ“e Mum,Min Й“amti haayre nde dow mon ngam hulЙ“inde on e reentinde on woppude gollirde aadi o,Min njamiri on njogoron Tawreeta nde Alla jippini e mon e soobee e tiiЙ—naare, ko aldaa e aamre,ndeenee ko woni e mayre tesko-Й—on nde;na waawi ndaЙ—on lette Alla.

2:64.text: Alaa ko mbaЙ—Й—on sinaa oЙ—on njedda oЙ—on ngoopa Й“aawo nde aadi Жҙettaa e mon, so wonaano Й“ural ko Alla accani on, e jaЙ“de tuububuye mon, maa on ngon bonnoraaЙ“e sabu ngool salagol e ngool goopol.

2:65.text: On nganndii e yananeede kabaaru Й“een ardiiЙ“e mon, nde Й“e ngoopiri awde (liЙ—Й—i) Гұande hoore-biir nde Й“e kaЙ—anoo awde e mayre, Й“e taarori Й—um e wertude saГұo ngo ado hoore-biir, Й“e njaltini liЙ—Й—i Й—i Гұande dewo, Й“ee woopooЙ“e Alla waЙ—ti Й“e baaЙ—i gaГұaaЙ—i woni lette maЙ“Й“e sabu goopol maЙ“Й“e.

2:66.text: Min mbaЙ—i ndee saare tooГұooЙ“e woni maanditorde wonande ca'e taariiЙ—e nde, e aroyooЙ“e caggal maЙ“Й“e; haa Й“e ndeentoo waЙ—de bano maЙ“Й“e, Min mbaЙ—i Й—uum wona teskorde hulooЙ“e lette Й—e Alla fawata taccooЙ“e keeri Makko.

2:67.text: Ciftoree fillayeeji adiiЙ“e on, ko waЙ—noo hakkunde maЙ“Й“e e Muusaa (jkm), nde o haalani Й“e yamiroore Alla yo Й“e kirsu nagge e na'i Й—in, Й“e njaawaani jaЙ“de, Й“e mbii: mbela a yiЙ— jalkitde min! Muusaa wii: miЙ—o moolii Alla nde mi jeyetee e fenanooЙ“e Alla, e jalkitooЙ“e yimЙ“e.

2:68.text: ЖҒe mbii Muusaa: torano min joom maa haa O laЙ“Й“inana min mbaadi nagge nge O yamiri min yo hirse, o wii Й“e: Alla dee wii: ko nagge nge wonaa ЕӢakewe (nayewe) nge wonaa Гұalel, kono ko hakindiinge, njaawee mbaЙ—ee yamiroore jooma mon.

2:69.text: ЖҒe njokki jeddi e sanndolinde maЙ“Й“e, Й“e mbii Muusaa (jkm): torano min joom maa haa O laЙ“Й“inana min ngoobo (mbaadi) magge, Muusaa wii Й“e: Alla dee wii: ko nagge oole sanne, kala daarЙ—o nge weltoroo.

2:70.text: ЖҒe ndoonii e sanndolinde, Й“e mbii: torano min jooma maa haa O Й“eyda laЙ“Й“inande min sifaaji magge; sabu na'i baaЙ—i noon na keewi, min mbaawaani seerndude Й—i. ЖҒe teentini wonde -si Alla jaЙ“ii- maa Й“e njiitu nagge Й—aЙ“Й“aange yo hirse nge.

2:71.text: Muusaa wii Й“e: Alla dey wii: ko nagge nge eeltanaaka goole ndema, wonaa kadi yarnude lesdi, ko nge hisnge e ustaare, nge alaa ngoobu sinaa oolu, ndeen noon Й“e mbii: jooni dey a addii sifa laaЙ“Й—o tinndinoowo nagge nge tigi, Й“e kirsi nge Й“aawo nde Й“e Й—eЙ“i waasde hirsude nge sabu jeddi e sanndolinde.

2:72.text: Ciftoree nde mbar-Й—on gooto e mon, ngon-Й—on e tuumondirde, gooto kala na laЙ“Й“ina hoore mum na tuuma goЙ—Й—o oon, oЙ—on pooЙ—ondira, ko Alla tigi yaltinta ko cooЙ—anno-Й—on e warde mon oon mbo wi'aani waЙ—aani.

2:73.text: Min mbii Й“e: piyindiree baraaЙ—o o e nagge nge njamira-Й—on yo on kirsu; ndeen Alla Й—iftina mo Oanndina barЙ—o o! Й“e mbaЙ—i noon, o haali barЙ—o mo o. Nii no Alla Й—iftiniri oo maayЙ—o ko noon O Й—iftinirta maayЙ“e Гұande darnga, O holla on maandeeji laЙ“Й“inooji baawal Makko, na waawi kakkilanon Й—um ngoonЙ—ino tigi Alla ToowЙ—o O.

2:74.text: Rewi heen ko Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e njoori Й“aawo oo waaju laaЙ“tuЙ—o e Й—ee kaawase Й“annguЙ—e, haa Й“erЙ—e Й—e mba'i no kaaЖҙe, maa Й“uri Й—um yoorde; Й—e ngonko majje waylotaako pooma, kaaЖҙe noon na mbaylitoo, kaaЖҙe na woodi jaltinooje ndiyam, yimЙ“e e muumuntaaji naftora heen, no woodi kadi jowtotooЙ—e njana sabu hulde Alla, Й“erЙ—e mon Й—e mba'aani noon, Alla noon yeebotaako golle mon, Omo humpitii Й—e, O yoЙ“a on Й—e.

2:75.text: Mbela oЙ—on njoortii - onon goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e - wonde Yahuud en maa ngoonЙ—in Й“e jaЙ“ana on?! Й“aawo nde nganndu-Й—on goonga gonal e sanndolinde maЙ“Й“e! goonga tigi, na woodnoo fedde e annduЙ“e maЙ“Й“e nannooЙ“e haala Alla jippinaaka dow maЙ“Й“e e Tawreeta; Й“e mbayla konngi e maanaaji mayre Й“aawo nde Й“e paami Й“e nganndi Й—i, tawa eЙ“e nganndi mawneeki bonannde maЙ“Й“e.

2:76.text: Na jeyaa e lootondirЙ—i yahuud en e peeje maЙ“Й“e bonЙ—e, yoga e maЙ“Й“e so kawrii e goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e mbi'a Й“e min jaЙ“ii Annabi Muhammadu (jkm) e sellugol nelal Makko ko Й—uum tigi Tawreeta seedii, kono tan si Й“e njeewdii hakkunde mum en Й“e ngona e felondirde, sabu juulЙ“e Й“ee na pawa e maЙ“Й“e hujja ko Й“e njaЙ“i goonЙ—ugol Annabaagu ngu.

2:77.text: ЖҒee yahudeeЙ“e Й“e njokki ngol laawol ГұiЕӢangol, na wayno Й“e nganndaa wonde Alla Mo anndi ko Й“e cuuЙ—ata e ko Й“e peГұГұinta e konngi e baЙ—e maЙ“Й“e, maa O feГұГұinan Й—um jeyaaЙ“e Makko O weeja Й“e.

2:78.text: Na woodi fedde e yahud en alaa ko Й“e nganndi e Tawreeta sonaa janngugol, Й“e nganndaa ko nde tinndini, alaa ko Й“e keЙ“i e mawЙ“e maЙ“Й“e sonaa penaale, Й“e cikki ko Й—uum woni Tawreeta nde Alla jippini nde.

2:79.text: Halkaare e lette bonЙ—e na padi Й“een winndooЙ“e deftere e juuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й“e mbi'a - fenaande-: ЖҠum ko to Alla iwri; Й“e coodtira goonga e rewde peewal coggu aduna hoyngu, wano jawdi e koongu, ko halkaare e lette muusЙ—e woodani Й“e sabu fenande Alla ko Й“e mbinndiri juuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e, bone woodanii Й“e e jawdi e koongu ko Й“e paggitii heen.

2:80.text: ЖҒe mbii - fenaande e mawnikinaare -: jayngol memataa min, min naatataa e maggol sonaa balЙ—e seeЙ—a, O wii - Aan Annabi - yo A wii Й“ee yimЙ“e: mbela on keЙ“anii Й—um fodoore iwde e Alla? So tawii on keЙ“ii Й—uum; Alla dey firtataa aadi, wolla ngon-Й—on ko e fenande Alla, oЙ—on kaala ko on nganndaa.

2:81.text: Wonaa no Й“ee yimЙ“e cikkiri; Alla dey lettata ko kala baЙ—Й—o bonannda keefeeru, bakkatuuji makko taarorii mo bannge fof, O yoЙ“ira Й“e naatde jayngol, Й“e ГұiiЙ“a toon pooma.

2:82.text: ЖҒeen goonЙ—inЙ“e Alla e NulaaЙ—o Makko, Й“e ngolli golle moЖҙЖҙe, baraaji maЙ“Й“e to Alla ko naatde aljanna Й“e ГұiiЙ“a toon pooma.

2:83.text: Ciftoree - onon Й“iЙ“Й“e Isra'iil - aadi celluЙ—o mbo Min Й“ami e mon, nde ngoottinton Alla, alaa mbo ndenndinton e Makko, moЖҙЖҙon e jiknaaЙ“e e jiidaaЙ“e e waayЙ—uЙ“e (yatiim en) e miskineeЙ“e e haajorЙ“e ballal, e nde kaalanton yimЙ“e Й“e haala moЖҙЖҙa, e yamirde ko moЖҙЖҙi e haЙ—irde ko boni, tawa on caЙ—tinaani, tottiron ГұiiЙ“non juulde no yamiraa nii haa timma, totton asakal ngal haanduЙ“e heen e Й“erЙ—e laaЙ“Й—e, alaa ko mbaЙ—Й—on sonaa luutndi-Й—on cali-Й—on timminde aadi o.

2:84.text: Ciftoree aadi tabitЙ—o mbo Min Й“ami e mon nder Tawreeta, harminde rufondirde ЖҙiiЖҙe, e harminde goЙ—Й—o yaltina goЙ—Й—o galle, rewi heen on njaЙ“ii aadi mbo Min Й“ami e mon, te oЙ—on ceedii sellugol aadi o.

2:85.text: Rewi heen, oЙ—on luutndoo aadi o; oЙ—on mbarondira, oЙ—on njaltina sete e mon iwde e galleeji maЙ“Й“e, oЙ—on mballinoo aГұЙ“e e waЙ—de tooГұe, so aГұЙ“e Й“ee ndahii Й“e ngaddii Й“e e mon ngonon e soodtude Й“e, Й—uum fof noon na harmi e mon, holno ngoonЙ—inirton yoga e Tawreeta: soodtugol dahaaЙ“e, njeddon kadi yoga e ko woni e mayre: reende pittaali e haЙ—de yaltinde yimЙ“e iwde e galleeji maЙ“Й“e? BaЙ—oowo Й—uum alaa njuЙ“di sonaa koyeera e nguurndam aduna, to laakara o fawetee ko lette Й“urЙ—e muusde, Alla noon yebotaako ko ngolloton, Kanko Omo humpitii Й—um, maa O yuЙ“u on Й—um.

2:86.text: Ko Й“een ngoni soodirЙ“e laakara nguurndam aduna (Й“e cuЙ“ii aduna) Й“urnude ko gasata dow ko heddotoo, Й“e koynantaake lette Laakara, Й“e ngalaa ballo Гұande heen.

2:87.text: Goonga tigi, Min okkii Muusaa Tawreeta, Min ndewni heen nulaaЙ“e Й“aawo makko, noon kadi Min okkii Iisaa Й“ii Maryam maandeeji Й“annguЙ—i laЙ“Й“inooji goonЙ—ude mo, wano wuurtinde maayЙ“e, e sellinde bempiloowo (mbo yi'ataa jamma) e Гұawu daneyel, Min cemmbiniri mo Malayka Jibriil (jwm) mbela -onon Й“iЙ“Й“e Isra'il- kala nde nulaaЙ—o Alla addi e mon ko yahdaani e belaaЙ—e mon calo-Й—on goonga o, mawnikino-Й—on Й“urno-Й—on nulaaЙ“e Alla Й“e, yoga heen njeddon Й“e woЙ“Й“e heen mbaron Й“e.

2:88.text: Hujja Yahuud en waasde jokkude Й“e Mahammade (jkm) ko wiide Й“e: Й“erЙ—e amen Й—e ko muuraaЙ—e, ko kaalataa ko alaa ko naatata e majje, te Й—e paamataa Й—um, wonaa no Й“e cikkiri, accu tan Alla yaltinii Й“e yurmeende Makko sabu keefeeru maЙ“Й“e, alaa ko Й“e ngoonЙ—ini si wonaa seeЙ—a e ko Alla jippini.

2:89.text: Nde Alla addi e maЙ“Й“e Kur'aan Teddunde nde, ende hawri e lasli celluЙ—i gonЙ—i e Tawreeta e Injjil, tawii ko adii jippagol mayre eЙ“e mbi'annoo: maa min poolu heeferЙ“e Й“e, min udditanee so annabi nulaama min ngoonЙ—ina mo min ndewa mo, nde Kur'aan o e Muhammadu (jkm) ngari e maЙ“Й“e, no Й“e nganndiri Й—um e goonga; ndeen Й“e njeddi, huЙ—oore Alla yo won e dow heeferЙ“e yedduЙ“e Alla e nulaaЙ—o Makko.

2:90.text: Bone wonii e ko Й“e coodiri ko'e maЙ“Й“e (mbarjaari) Й“e njeddi ko Alla jippini Й“e penni NullaЙ“e Makko, Й—um woni tooГұe e ngaГұgu sabu jippineede Annabaagal e Kur'aana o dow Muhammadu (jkm), e sabaabu ko Й“e ngadii waylitde e Tawreeta. Lette koynooje Гұande darnga na woodani Й“een yedduЙ“e annabaagu Muhammadu (jkm).

2:91.text: So tawii ЖҒee YahuudЙ“e mbi'aama: goonЙ—inee goonga e peewal ko Alla jippini dow NulaaЙ—o Makko, Й“e mbi'a: miЙ—en ngoonЙ—ini ko jippinaa dow annabaaЙ“e amen, Й“e njedda ko jippinaa dow Muhammadu (jkm), tawa noon ko oo Kur'aan woni goonga jahduЙ—o e ko Й“e njogii ko, tawno Й“e ngoonЙ—inii ko jippinaa e maЙ“Й“e maa Й“e ngoonЙ—in Kur'aana o. Wii Й“e -Aan annabi-: ko waЙ—i oЙ—on mbarannoo AnnabaaЙ“e Alla Й“e so tawno oЙ—on ngoonЙ—ini goonga garЙ—o e mon o?!

2:92.text: Goonga tigi NulaaЙ—o mon Muusaa (Jkm) addanii on maandeeji laaЙ“Й—i tinndinooji goonЙ—ugol makko; Й“aawo Й—uum oЙ—on ndewa ngaari ndi caggal nde Muusaa yahi nootoyaade joomum, onon ko on tooГұooЙ“e oЙ—on ndenndina Alla e goЙ—Й—o, te ko Kanko tan haandi e reweede.

2:93.text: Ciftoree nde Min Й“ami e mon aadi teentuЙ—o njokkon Muusaa kisal won e makko, e jaЙ“de ko o addi iwde e Alla, Min Й“amti dow mon fello ngo ngam hulЙ“inde on, Min mbii on: njogoree Tawreeta nde Min ngaddani on nde e soobee e tiiЙ—naare, nanee njaЙ“on Й—ofto-Й—on, si Й—uum alaa Min liЙ“a fello ngo dow mooЙ—on, mbii-Й—on: min nanirii noppi amen min ngoopiri golle amen, rewde ngaari ndi debbi e Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e sabu yeddugol maЙ“Й“e. Yo a wii Й“e - Aan Annabi-: bone wonii e Й—um ko goonЙ—ingol mon yamiri on keefeeru, so tawii oЙ—on ngoonЙ—ini; sabu keefeeru yahdataa e goonЙ—inal goonga.

2:94.text: Aan Annabiijo, yo A wii Й“e: onon yahuud en so tawii oЙ—on njogii aljanna to laakara tawa alaa goЙ—Й—o naatoowo toon tanaa mon; njiЙ—ee maayde Й—aЙ“Й“on nde; mbela keЙ“on Й—um ko yaawi, poofto-Й—on e tampere nguurndam aduna, so tawii oЙ—on ngoonЙ—ini ndee noddoore mon.

2:95.text: ЖҒe njiЙ—ataa maayde pooma; sabu jeddi Alla Й—i Й“e ngardini e nguurndam maЙ“Й“e, e fennude NulaaЙ“e Makko, e waylude defte maЙ“Й“e, Alla Mo humpitii tooГұooЙ“e e maЙ“Й“e, maa O yoЙ“u gooto kala e golle mum.

2:96.text: Maa a taw -Aan Annabiijo -Yahuud en ngoni Й“urЙ“e reerЙ—ude e nguurndam,hay so Й—am wonii koyЙ—am,Й“uri reerЙ—ude kadi Й“een renndinЙ“e e Alla Й“e goonЙ—inaani ummital e hiiseede,hay so Й“e ngonii yimЙ“e deftere,gooto e maЙ“Й“e na yiЙ—a wuurde duuЙ“i ujunere, o woЙ—Й—ataa lette Alla kala no nguurndam makko juutiri, Alla tigi Mo Жҙellitii e golleeji maЙ“Й“e,alaa ko suuЙ—antoo Mo heen,maa O yoЙ“ Й“e Й—e.

2:97.text: Wii - Aan Annabiijo - Й“een Yuhuud en wiiЙ“e: "wonde Jibriil ko gaГұo amen e malaykaaЙ“e Й“e": Oon gaГұЙ—o Jibriin yo anndu ko e makko Kur'aan on jippori maa e yamiroore Alla, nde goonЙ—ini defte Alla gadiiЙ—e Й—e; wano Tawreeta e Injiila, o woni tinndinoowo moЖҙЖҙere, beltiniroowo goonЙ—inЙ“e ko Alla resani Й“e e moЖҙЖҙereeji, gaГұЙ—o jooma Й—ii sifaaji e golle oon jeyaa ko e majjuЙ“e.

2:98.text: ЖҒeen aГұЙ“e Alla e nulaaЙ“e Mum, Й“e ngaГұi malaykaaЙ“e Й—iЙ—o Й“aditiiЙ“e Alla: Jibriil e Mika'iil; ko Alla woni gaГұo heeferЙ“e, te kala mbo Alla woni gaГұo mum o heЙ“ii perte mawnde.

2:99.text: Goonga tigi, Min njippinii e Maa - Aan Annabiijo - maandeeji tinndinooji goonЙ—inal MaaЙ—a e annabaagal e wahyu ko ngaddu-Й—aa, no Й—um laaЙ“iri alaa jeddoowo Й—um sonaa yaltuЙ“e diine Alla o.

2:100.text: Na jeyaa e malkiseede Yahuud en, kala nde Й“e Й“ami aadi - wano goonЙ—inde ko Tawreeta tinndini e annabaagal Muhammadu (jkm) - wooda e maЙ“Й“e firtuЙ“e oon aadi, nganndee ko Й“uri heewde e Й“ee YahuudeeЙ“e goonЙ—intaa ko Alla jippini; sabu goonЙ—ingol na Й—aЙ“Й“i timminde aadi.

2:101.text: Nde Muhammadu (jkm) nelaaЙ—o iwde e Alla ari e maЙ“Й“e, tawii sifa makko arii nder Tawreeta, sete e maЙ“Й“e Й—uurnii ndeen tinndinoore, Й“e calii wondeede Й—um, Й“e mba'i no majjuЙ—o mbo waawataa naftorde goonga e peewal gonngal heen, o faaletaake (wondetaake) Й—um.

2:102.text: Nde Й“e ngoppi diine Alla o Й“e njokki penaale Й—e seyЙ—aneeji kaalata e laamu Annabiijo Alla Suleymaan kisal won e makko, Й—i cikki (numi) ko mbilewu o tabintiniri laamu makko, Suleymaan yeddiraani mbilewu - wano yahuud en cikkiri - kono seyЙ—aneeji kam njeddii nde Й“e ngonnoo e jannginde yimЙ“e Й“ee mbilewu jippinanoongu dow malaykaaЙ“e Й—iЙ—o Й“e: Haaruut e Maaruut, to saare Baabel, Iraak, ngam humpitaade e Гұoolde yimЙ“e Й“e, kala nde malaykaaЙ“e Й“e nganndini goЙ—Й—o mbilewu Й“e ndeentina mo laЙ“Й“inana mo: minen ko min humpittooЙ“e yimЙ“e Й“e, janngude ma mbilewu taa waЙ—e njeddaa, waЙ—i e maЙ“Й“e njanngi mbelewu seerndoowu gorko e debbo mum, aawa ngaГұngu hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, Й“een mbileeЙ“e mbaawaa lorrude hay gooto sonaa e beleeЙ—e Alla, Й“e njannga ko lorrata Й“e tawa nafataa Й“e, Й“een yahudeeЙ“e nganndii wonde kala mbo lomtini deftere Alla nde mbilewu o maletaake Гұande laakara, bone woodanii Й“e e ko Й“e lomtini sariya Alla o mbilewu, so tawiino Й“e nganndi Й—um nafataa Й“e mbaЙ—ataano Й—ee golle bonЙ—e e majjere Й“anngunde.

2:103.text: Tawno yahuud en ngoonЙ—inii Alla e goonga, Й“e kuliri Mo rewde Mo, Й“e ngoppi woopde Mo; ndeen barke Alla Й“urata moЖҙЖҙande Й“e e ko Й“e ngoni ko, tawno eЙ“e nganndi ko nafata Й“e.

2:104.text: Alla ToowЙ—o O Mbo tinndina goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“ee suЙ“aade konngi moЖҙЖҙi, O wii Й“e: onon goonЙ—inЙ“e taa mbi'ee konngol: {aynu min}; woni: aynu geЙ—e amen; sabu yahuud en na mbi'a noon Annabiijo (jkm) tawa Й“e paandii heen ko maanaa bonЙ—o, woni Й“urtere, Alla haЙ—i ngol konngol ngam sukkude ngal damal, O yamiri jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“e yo mbi'at: {habba min}; woni: muГұan min haa min paama ko kaalataa ko, ngol konngol na adda maanaa o tigi. YedduЙ“e Alla Й“e lette muusЙ—e na ngoodani Й“e.

2:105.text: YedduЙ“e Й“ee - foti ko yimЙ“e deftere wolla ko renndinЙ“e e Alla - njiЙ—ataa jooma mon jippinana on hay moЖҙЖҙere, foti ko seeЙ—a maa ko heewi, Alla e yurmeende Makko heerori waЙ—ande annabaagu e wahyu e goonЙ—ingol mbo O welaa e jeyaaЙ“e Makko, Kanko woni Joom Й“ural mawngal, alaa ko tagaaЙ—o daГұata sonaa iwa e Makko, ko e Й“ural Makko O neliri NulaaЙ—o o, O jippini deftere nde.

2:106.text: Alla ToowЙ—o O laЙ“Й“ini wonde kala nde itti Гұaawoore Aaye nder Kur'aana, maa so O momtii wowlaandu aaye o haa yimЙ“e njejjiti mbo, ndeen O adda ko Й“uri nafoore, foti yaawii maa leelii, wolla ko nanndi e mum, Й—uum noon wonata ko e ganndal e ГұeeГұal Makko, Aan -Annabiijo- AЙ—a anndi Alla Mbo hattani kala huunde, O waЙ—a ko O welaa, O Гұaawa ko O yiЙ—i.

2:107.text: A anndii - Aan Annabiijo - wonde Alla woni Jooma asamanji e lesdi, Omo Гұaawa ko O welaa, O yamira jeyaaЙ“e Makko ko O muuyi, O haЙ—a Й“e ko O welaaka, O lelna e sariya ko O welaa, O itta ko O welaa, on ngalaa ballo jogotooЙ—o geЙ—e mon sonaa Alla, wonaa kadi ballo deenoowo on gaa bone, ko Alla tan woni baawЙ—o kattanЙ—o Й—uum fof.

2:108.text: Onon goonЙ—inЙ“e on potaani naamnaade nelaaЙ—o mon o -naamnal salagol- wano yimЙ“e Muusaa naamnornoo annabi maЙ“Й“e o ko yawti; Й“e mbii: {hollu min Alla ko laaЙ“i} [Nisaa"i: 153], kala lomtinirЙ—o goonЙ—ingol keefeeru tawa o majjii laawol pooccingol ngol.

2:109.text: ЖҒaawo goonЙ—ingol mon, heewЙ“e e yahudeeЙ“e e nasaara en njiЙ—iino nawtude on e keefeeru wano ndewiranno-Й—on pankareeji, sabu ngaГұgu maЙ“Й“e, Й—uum Й“e njelii Й“aawo nde Й“e laaЙ“aa wonde ko Annabiijo addi iwde e Alla ko goonga, ngaccee -onon goonЙ—inЙ“e- golleeji maЙ“Й“e Й—i, Й—uurnee majjere maЙ“Й“e e bone maЙ“Й“e, haa Гұaawoore Alla yana e maЙ“Й“e, yamiroore e Гұaawoore Alla arii, yedduЙ“e Й“e okkano suЙ“aade Lislaam maa Й“e njoЙ“a Jijya wolla hare- Alla Mbo hattani kala huunde, O ronkantaa Й“e.

2:110.text: Г‘iiЙ“nee e timminde jookli juulde e baЙ—Й—iiЙ—i e sunnaaji mayre, tottee asakal jawle mon faade e haanduЙ“e heen, kala golle moЖҙЖҙe Й—e mbaЙ—an-Й—on ko'e mon ado maayde mon, maa on keЙ“ mbarjaari joom mon Гұande darnga, Alla noon Ko ji'oowo golle mon, O yoЙ“a gooto kala ko gollunoo.

2:111.text: Fedde e yahuud en e nasaara en mbii: Aljanna ko kamЙ“e keerori Й—um, yahuud en mbii: alaa naatoowo toon sonaa yay huudeejo, nasaara en mbii: alaa naatoowo toon sonaa nasaraajo, Й—uum woni yelaaji e miijooji maЙ“Й“e bonЙ—i, yo A ruttu e maЙ“Й“e mbi'aa -Aan Annabi -: ngaddee tinndinoore ko cikkoton ko, so tawii oЙ—on ngoonЙ—i e nodditoore mon nde.

2:112.text: Sellii wonde naatoowo Aljanna woni laaЙ“anЙ—o Alla faati e Makko, oon woni kadi moЖҙЖҙinirЙ—o dewe makko jokkude ko nulaaЙ—o addi, kala fedde nde o jeyaa ko oon woni naatoowo Aljanna, o heЙ“a mbarjaari joom mum, Й“e kulataa ko fadi Й“e laakara, Й“e cunotaako e ko yawtiri Й“e aduna. ЖҒaawo garal annabiijo Muhammadu (jkm) Й—iin sifaaji ngoodaani sonaa e juulЙ“e.

2:113.text: Yahuud en mbii: nasaara en ngonaani e diine celluЙ—e, nasaara en mbii: yahuud en ngonaani e diine celluЙ—e, kamЙ“e fof noon eЙ“e njannga defte Й—e Alla jippini e maЙ“Й“e, eЙ—e coomi yamiroore goonЙ—inde AnnabaaЙ“e Й“e fof, golle maЙ“Й“e nanndi, Й—um ko konngol Й“een heeferЙ“e Й“e nganndaa; nde Й“e penni nulaaЙ“e Й“e e defte jippinaaЙ—e e maЙ“Й“e fof, Й—uum waЙ—i maa Alla Гұaaw hakkunde luuruЙ“e Й“e fof Гұande darnga, e Гұaawoore Makko nuunЙ—unde: alaa ko danndata sonaa goonЙ—ingol kala ko Alla ToowЙ—o o jippini.

2:114.text: Alaa Й“urЙ—o bonde tooГұe oon kaЙ—Й—o yo innde Alla jante e juulirЙ—e Makko, o haЙ—i heen juulde e jantaade e janngude Kur'aana, o daranii yirbinde e bonnude Й—e, Й“een yahooЙ“e e bonnude Й—e Й“e kaanaani naatde e juulirЙ—e Alla Й—e sonaa Й“e kulЙ“inee Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—enЖҙoo; sabu keefeeru maЙ“Й“e, eЙ“e keЙ“a koyeera e aduna, eЙ“e keЙ“a lette mawЙ—e to wattannde sabu ko Й“e kaЙ—i yimЙ“e Й“ee juulirЙ—e Alla Й—e.

2:115.text: Ko Alla jeyi laamu fuЙ—naange e hirnaange e hakkunde majji, O yamira jeyaaЙ“e Makko ko O muuyi, nganndee kala Й—o kuccit-Й—on oЙ—on tawa toon Alla ToowЙ—o O, yamirde on huccitde Baytil Magdas wolla Kaaba ka, maa so on ngoopii Kibla o, wolla huccitgol toon saЙ—anii on; taa Й—um Й“ittin on; sabu banngeeji Й—i fof ko Alla ngoodani, Alla ko jaajЙ—o yurmeende e huynangol Makko na huufi tagoore nde, gannduЙ—o muuyaaЙ—e e golle maЙ“Й“e.

2:116.text: ЖҒe mbii (yahud en e nasaara en): Alla jogitiima Й“iЙ—Й—o! senaande woodani Mo, Kanko Mbo yondinii gaa tagoore Makko, jogittooЙ—o Й“iЙ—Й—o ko hatojinЙ—o heen, accu dey Kanko Mo senaande woodani jeyi kala ko woni e asamaanji e lesdi, tagooje Й—ee fof ko jeyal Makko, ko Й—oftaniiЙ—e Mo, Ombo firlita Й—e no O muuyiri.

2:117.text: Alla -senaande woodani Mo- woni puЙ—Й—uЙ—o asamanji e lesdi e kala ko woni e majji,nanndo mum meeЙ—aa wonde, so O Гұaawii huunnde nde O muuyi O wi'ata tan ko: {won} nde wona no Alla muuyiri, alaa duttoowo yamiroore e Гұaawoore Makko.

2:118.text: ЖҒeen Й“e nganndaa - yimЙ“e deftere e heeferЙ“e saliiЙ“e goonga- mbii: ko waЙ—i Alla haaldataa e amen ko aldah heeda, maa O addana min maande heeriinde? wano ngol konngol leЖҙЖҙi jedduЙ—i nelaaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e kaalnoo, hay so yontaaji e nokkeeli maЙ“Й“e na ceerti, Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e nanndi, Min laЙ“Й“inanii yimЙ“e yananaaЙ“e Й“e aayeeje goonga, Й“e cikkittaako.

2:119.text: Minen Min nelirii ma -Aan Annabiijo - diine goonga Й—e ngalaa sikke; mbeltiniraa goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e aljanna, njeertiniraa yedduЙ“e Й“e jayngol, alaa ko waЙ—Й—i maa sonaa yottinaandu laaЙ“ndu, Alla Гұamataa ma fii yimЙ“e jayngol (jahannama) Й“e goonЙ—inaani ma.

2:120.text: Alla Mbo haalda e Annabi Makko Hombo wasiyo Homo reentini e wiide mo:yahuud en mbeletaake ma wonaa kadi nasaara en haa nde ngoppu Й—aa Lislaam o,njokkaa ko Й“e ngoni e mum,so a waЙ—ii Й—um maa gooto e jokkuЙ“e ma, Й“aawo nde goonga laaЙ“Й—o aran maa, a heЙ“ataa ballal e faabu Alla, Й—um jeyaa ko e Й“annginde hulЙ“inagol woppude goonga e jokkude yimЙ“e pankare.

2:121.text: Kur'aana tedduЙ—o o na haala fii fedde e yimЙ“e deftere, eЙ“e ngollira defte jippinaaЙ—e Й—e Й“e njogii, Й“e njokka Й—e no haaniri, eЙ“e tawa e majje maandeeji tinndinooji nuunЙ—ugol Annabiijo Muhammadu (jkm), Й—uum waЙ—i Й“e njaawi goonЙ—inde mo, na woodi fedde wonnde dooniinde e keefeeru, ndeen Й“e bonnoraa.

2:122.text: Onon Й“iЙ“Й“e Isra'iil, ciftoree Й“ural Am -diine e aduna - ngal Mi waЙ—ani on, ciftoree wonde Mi Й“urnirii on yimЙ“e yonta mon annabaagal e laamu.

2:123.text: MbaЙ—ee heedo reentaade hakkunde mon e lette Гұande darnga; e jokkude yamirooje Alla e reentaade kaЙ—aaЙ—i Mum, sabu na ndeen Гұalaande hay neЙ—Й—o gooto naftaa goЙ—Й—o hay huunde, Й“e njaЙ“antaake coodtiigu no foti fof, gooto no waawi fotde fof tefantaa Й“e, Й“e galaa ballo tanaa Alla.

2:124.text: Siftor nde Alla humpitii Ibrahiima (km) e ko O yamiri mo e Гұaawooje e baЙ—Й—iiЙ—i, o waЙ—i Й—e haa hiЙ“Й“i, Alla wi'i annabi Makko Ibrahiim: Mi waЙ—at ma ГұemmbeteeЙ—o yimЙ“e, eЙ“e nanndinoroo golle e jikkuuji maa, Ibrahiim wi'i: Aan jooma am waЙ— noon e leГұol am ardotooЙ“e ГұemmbeteeЙ“e, Alla wi'i e jaabaade mo: tooГұooЙ“e e leГұol maa keЙ“ataa fodoore Am waЙ—eede ardotooЙ“e diine.

2:125.text: Siftor nde Alla waЙ—i suudu teddundu ndu woni ruttorde yimЙ“e, Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e kaЙ“Й“ondiri e mayru, kala nde Й“e mbayri ndu Й“e nduttoo e mayru, O waЙ—i ndu hoolaare maЙ“Й“e, Й“e tooГұetaake nder mayru, O wi'i yimЙ“e Й“e: njogitoЙ—ee haayre nde - nde Ibrahiima darotonoo e mum nde o mahannoo Kaaba ka- nokku juulde. Min tinndini Ibrahiima e Й“iЙ—Й—o makko Ismaa'iil yo Й“e laЙ“Й“in tuundi e sanamji suudu ndu ngam rewooЙ“e e taarotooЙ“e e ufnotooЙ“e (lismitiiЙ“e) e juulooЙ“e.

2:126.text: Siftor - Aan Annabiijo - nde Ibrahiima torotoo joom mum, o wi'i: Joom am waЙ— Makka leydi hoolniindi, hay gooto tooГұetaake toon, njeЙ—aa yimЙ“e mayri Й“iЙ“Й“e lekЙ—e, Й—um wona njeЙ—u heeraniingu goonЙ—inЙ“e Ma e Гұalaande wattan, Alla wi'i: kala jedduЙ—o e maЙ“Й“e maa Mi weltinir mo njeЙ—u aduna o neemoo seeЙ—a, Й“aawo Й—uum to laakara Mi nawa mo e lette jayngol, ko e battane bonЙ—e o ruttotoo Гұande darnga.

2:127.text: Siftor - Aan annabiijo - nde Ibrahiim e Ismaa'iil ngoni e Й“amtude ndaЙ—Й—udi Kaaba ka, eЙ“e kaala - e yankinaare - Jooma amen jaЙ“an min golle amen, wano mahde nduu suudu, ko Aan woni jaЙ“oowo du'aaji amen, gannduЙ—o enniyaaji e golle amen.

2:128.text: Joomiraawo amen waЙ— min Й—oftiiЙ“e yamiroore Maa, Й—igganЙ“e Ma, min ndenndintaa e Maa hay gooto, yo A waЙ— leГұol amen Й—oftiiЙ“e Ma, nganndinaa min no rewde Ma foti wonirde, njaafo-ЖҠaa min bonЙ—i amen e ЕӢakkinde amen Й—oftaade Ma, ko Aan woni JaafotooЙ—o jurmotooЙ—o jeyaaЙ“e Maa tuubooЙ“e.

2:129.text: Aan Joomiraawo amen waЙ— e maЙ“Й“e nulaaЙ—o iwde e Й“esngu Ismaa'iil, o janngina Й“e aayeeje Й—e njippin-ЖҠaa e maЙ“Й“e, o janngina Й“e Kur'aana e Sunna, o laЙ“Й“ina Й“e e sirku e ГұiЕӢaaЙ—i; ko Aan tigi woni jooma semmbe pooloowo, Г‘eeГұЙ—uЙ—o e golle e Гұaawooje Maa.

2:130.text: Alaa fof gaccoowo diine Ibrahiima (km), faade e diine goЙ—Й—e, sonaa Й—aaynuЙ—o fittaandu mum, o acci goonga o fa'i e majjere, Min cuЙ“iima mo nelaaЙ—o e beldiijo ga aduna, to laakara o jeyee he Й“een moЖҙЖҙuЙ“e tottirЙ“e ko Alla waЙ—Й—ini dow maЙ“Й“e, Й“e keЙ“i tolnooji Й“urЙ—i toowde.

2:131.text: Alla suЙ“iima mo sabu ko o yaawi naatde e Lisaam, nde Jooma makko wi'i mo: laЙ“Й“inan Am dewe, njankinano-Й—aa Kam e Й—oftaare, o jaabii Jooma makko: mi jebbiliima e TagЙ—o jeyaaЙ“e yeЙ—i Й“e, pewjoowo geЙ—e maЙ“Й“e.

2:132.text: Ibrahiima tinndini Й“iЙ“Й“e makko ngol konngol: {mi jebbiliima e jooma binnde Й—e}, ko noon kadi Yaakuuba tinndiniri Й“iЙ“Й“e makko; Й“e noddi Й“iЙ“Й“e maЙ“Й“e: Alla dey suЙ“aniima on diine Lislaam, nanngito-Й—ee heen haa maayde tawa on heen, oЙ—on njaЙ“ana Alla ko feeГұi e ko suuЙ—ii.

2:133.text: Mbela on tawaama nde maayde arani Yaakuub, nde o naamnii Й“iЙ“Й“e mum Й“e: holko ndewoton Й“aawo maayde am? Й“e njaaborii mo: Min ndewata ko joomiraawo maa e joomiraawo baabiiЙ“e maa Ibrahiima e Ismaa'iila e Ishaaka, DeweteeЙ—o Gooto Mbo alaa denndidiijo, ko Kanko tan min jaЙ“ani min Й—oftotoo.

2:134.text: Ngool ko leГұol Й“ennungol wano leГұГұi gadiiЙ—i on Й—i, ko ngol faggitii moЖҙЖҙi maa bonЙ—i ngol heЙ“ata, onon ne ko paggiti-Й—on keЙ“oton, on naamnetaake golle maЙ“Й“e, Й“e naamnetaake golle mon, hay gooto fawetaake lette goЙ—Й—o, nganndee gooto fof yoЙ“etee ko ko waЙ—noo, taa golle yawtuЙ“e kaЙ— on ndaarde golle mon, caggal yurmeende Alla alaa ko nafata goЙ—Й—o sonaa golle makko.

2:135.text: Yahuud en mbi'i ngol leГұol: ngonee yahuud en ndewon laawol peewal, nasaara en mbi'i: ngonee nasaara en ndewon laawol peewal. Jaabo Й“e - Aan Annabiijo - mbi'aa: nganndee minen min ndewata ko diine Ibrahiima peewЙ—e Й—e, o jeyaaka e renndinnooЙ“e Alla e goЙ—Й—o.

2:136.text: Mbi'ee - onon goonЙ—inЙ“e - YahudeeЙ“e e nasaara en joomen nduu noddaandu bonndu: min ngoonЙ—inii Alla e Kur'aan jippinaaЙ—o e amen, min ngoonЙ—inii ko jippinaa dow Ibrahiima e Й“iЙ“Й“e makko Ismaa'iila e Ishaak e Yaakuuba, min ngoonЙ—inii Tawreeta nde Alla addani Muusaa, e Injiila nde Alla addani Iisaa, min ngoonЙ—ini defte Й—e Alla addani AnnabaaЙ“e fof, min ceerndataa hay gooto e maЙ“Й“e, nganndee kamЙ“e fof minen Й“e ngoonЙ—ini, ko ceniiЙ—o gooto O tan min njaЙ“ani e yankinaare.

2:137.text: So Yahuud en e Nasaara en e heeferЙ“e woЙ“Й“e ngoonЙ—inii wano goonЙ—inal mon ngal, tawa Й“e peewii e laawol pooccingol ngol Alla welaa, so Й“e caliima goonЙ—inde, Й“e penni AnnabaaЙ“e fof wolla yoga e maЙ“Й“e, ndeen Й“e ngoni ko e luutondiral e gaГұondiral, taa mettin - Aan Annabi - maa Alla danndu ma tooГұe maЙ“Й“e, O haЙ—an maa bone maЙ“Й“e, O walle, Kanko woni nanoowo haalaaji mume en, gannduЙ—o enniyaaji e golle mum en.

2:138.text: Ndoono-Й—ee e diine Alla Й—e O tagiri on peeГұndi e cuuЙ—iindi mum, alaa diine Й“urЙ—e diine Alla Й—e, kanje jahdi e neesu, gaddooje moЖҙЖҙereeji, kaЙ—ooje bonnere, mbi'ee: minen ko Alla Gooto O tan min ndewata, min ndenndintaa e Makko hay gooto.

2:139.text: Wii - Aan Annabiijo - mbela on njeddondirat e amen - onon yimЙ“e deftere - wonde ko onon Й“uri min haandude e Alla e diine Makko Й—e; sabu diine mon Й—e e deftere mon nde ngadii, Й—uum noon nafataa on, enen fof ko Alla woni jooma men, on naamnetaake golle amen, min naamnetaake golle mon, gooto kala ko golle makko yoЙ“etee, miЙ—en ndewa Alla ko laaЙ“i min ndenndintaa e Makko hay huunde.

2:140.text: Mbela on mbi'at - onon yimЙ“e deftere -: wonde Ibrahiima e Ismaa'iil e Ishaak e Yaakuub e AnnabaaЙ“e iwЙ“e e Й“iЙ—Й—o Yaakuub, ngonndoo ko e laawol Yahuudaagu e Nasaaraagu? Wii Й“e - Aan Annabiijo -: ko onon Й“uri anndude wolla Alla?! so tawii Й“e cikkii wonde Й“een ngonndoo ko e laawol maЙ“Й“e ndeen tawa Й“e pennii; sabu jibineede e maayde maЙ“Й“e wonndoo ko ado jippaade Tawreeta e Injiila! Anndaama ko fenaande Й“e kaalta e Alla e NulaaЙ—o Makko, Й“e cuuЙ—i goonga jippiiЙ—o dow maЙ“Й“e, alaa Й“urЙ—o tooГұe oon cuuЙ—Й—o seedanfaagu, wano baЙ—al yimЙ“e deftere, Alla noon yeebotaako golle mon, maa O yoЙ“ on Й—e.

2:141.text: Ngool leГұol yawtii ko adii on,engol heЙ“a golle Й—e ngol faggiti, onon ne oЙ—on keЙ“a golle Й—e paggiti-Й—on,on naamnetaake golle maЙ“Й“e, kamЙ“e ne Й“e naamnetaake golle mon, alaa lettirteeЙ—o bakkaat mbo goЙ—Й—o waЙ—i, alaa naftortooЙ—o golle goЙ—Й—o,nganndee gooto kala yoЙ“etee ko ko waЙ—i.

2:142.text: ЖҒen njofiЙ—uЙ“e faaЙ—a hakkil en ka alyahuuda, e nanndo maЙ“Й“e ka naafiqiiЙ“e Й“en wi'oyay: E ko hoccintini juulЙ“e Й“en ga'e Qibla suudu almaqdisi ndun ndu Й“e fewtaynoo?! Jaabor-Й“e -An nulaaЙ—o- :Ko Allah gooto On heeranii laamu fuЙ—naange e hiirnaange e baЕӢЕӢeejo goo ko wanaa Й—in,Himo fewtinira on mo O muuyi e jiyaaЙ“e Makko nokku kala ka O yiЙ—i, KaЕӢko On SeniiЙ—o,Himo fewnira on O muuyi e jiyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en faade e laawol feewungol;ngol ooГұaaki ngol Й“oylaaki.

2:143.text: Ko wano Men waЙ—irani on non Qibla mo Men suЙ“anii on; Men waЙ—iri on mofte suЙ“aaЙ—e nunЙ—uЙ—e,hakindiiЙ—e ndeer mofte Й—en fof, ka fiЙ“ndeeji,ka dewe e ka gollodal; no laatoroyon Гұalnde darngal seeditaЕӢtooЙ“e NulaaЙ—o Allah on kon ko Alla yamirnoo on yottinnde e mofte mo'on,e no NulaaЙ—o Muhammadu (yo O his) laatoroya seeditoytooЙ—o e mo'on wo'nde O yottinii kon ko O nulanoo e mo'on.Men waЙ—iraali kadi waylugol Qibla on mo fewtayno-Й—aa e mu'un;e maanaa bayt al maqdisi on, si wanaa no men anndira -anndal feeГұugol yowondiragl e njoЙ“di- on jaЙ“ayЙ—o (yarlora) shari'a Allah On,o jebbilora mo,o jokka NulaaЙ—o on, e [no men anndira] on muurtoowo e diine mu'un,o jokka mbeleeЙ—e makko, hara o jebbilortaa konko Allah Shar'inani.GomЙ—ii waylugol Qibla on ka arannde, laatino huunde mawnde si wanaa e dow Й“en Й“en Allah hawrinndini e gomЙ—innde Й—um,e wo'nde kala ko O Shar'inani jiyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en ko ГұeeГұal yottiingal.Allah Laatoraali yeeboowo liimanaaku mo'on, ko e Makko juulde mon nden ado wayleede Qibla hewtata, pellet, Allah ko HilnotooЙ—o yimЙ“e Й“en Yurmee Й“e,O SaЙ—tinaЕӢtaaЙ“e,O yeebataa sawaaba golleeji maЙ“Й“e.

2:144.text: GomЙ—ii Men yi'ii - ko an yo Annabiijo- wayloragol yeeso maa ngon e ndaarЙ—e maa Й—en ka baЕӢЕӢe kammu, sabbitagol ette-ettennoo fii jipporagol wahyu on waylireede Qibla on ka yiЙ—u-Й—aa, ma Men Fewtinire e Qibla mo yiЙ—u-Й—aa welani maa - ko on woni suudu Allah hormorteendu ndun- o lomtoo baytul maqdisi on, fewtinir yeeso maa ngon baЕӢЕӢe suudu Allah hormorteendu ndun, kala ka ngonЙ—on - onon gomЙ—imЙ“e- fewtiree e baЕӢЕӢe mayru tuma juulo-ton. Pellet, Й“en RokkaaЙ“e Deftere Й“en immorde e yahuuda e Nasaara en, hiЙ“e anndi wo'nde wayleede Qibla on ko goonga jipporЙ—o ka TagЙ—o-Й“e On Kippu-Й—o fiyakuuji maЙ“Й“e; tawde Й—um no tabiti ka deftere maЙ“Й“e, Allah non Welsindoraali kon ko Й“en Й—uurniiЙ“e e goonga gollata, ko woni, KaЕӢko SeniiЙ—o On Himo anndi Й—um, ma O yoЙ“iroyЙ“e Й—um.

2:145.text: Mi woondii si an -annabiijo on- a addidanii Й“en rokkaaЙ“e deftere nden immorde e alyahuuda e annasaare en,wondude e kala maande e burhaanu,wo'nde wayleede Qibla on ko goonga,a wonaali kadi fewtiroowo e qibla maЙ“Й“e Й“aawa nde Allah yiltu-maa e Й—um,yoga e maЙ“Й“e kadi fewtirtaa e qibla yoga;sabu fedde kala e maЙ“Й“e hino heeferЙ—ina ndeya. Pellet si a jokkii mbeleeЙ—e Й“ee Й—oo ko faati e Qibla on e ko wanaa Й—um immorde e shari'aaji e Гұaawooje Й“aawo nde anndal sellungal ngal sikke alaa e mu'un ari e maa;an dey ontuma a jeyaama e tooГұirЙ“e selugol peewal ngal, jokka mbeleeЙ—e.Ko Annabiijo on(Yo O his)yeewtaa Й—oo kon,ko tinndingol kaanude jokkugol Й“e,sabu Allah daЙ—ndii Annabiijo Makko on e Й—um,ko jeertinnde mofte makko Й—en si o feЖҙЖҙii.

2:146.text: ЖҒen Й“e Men Rokki Defere nden immorde e annduЙ—uЙ“e Alyahuuda e Annasaara en,hiЙ“e nganndi wayleede Qibla on tawЙ—o ko gootel e maandeeji Annabaaku Muhammadu (yo O his) ka maЙ“Й“e,wano Й“e nganndiri Й“iЙ—Й“e maЙ“Й“e Й“e faaytnaЕӢtaako Й“e.ЖҠum haЙ—aali fedde goo e maЙ“Й“e hino suuЙ—a goonga arЙ—o e mabЙ“e,haasidaagol immorde e pittaali maЙ“Й“e, hiЙ“e waЙ—a Й—um e hoore hiЙ“e nganndi ko nde goonga.

2:147.text: Ko Й—um Й—oo woni goonga kan, wata laatodu -an NulaaЙ—o- e Й“en sikkitiiЙ“e sellugol Й—um.

2:148.text: Ena woodani kala mofte, baЕӢЕӢe mo Й“e fewtata e mu'n, foti non ko ko memetee walla miijitee; wano luutondiral mofte ka huccitirde maЙ“Й“e e kon ko Allah Shar'inani Й“e, Й—uuЙ—al yiilorЙ—e maЙ“Й“e lorrataa so tawii ko yamaruree Allah e shari'a Makko, adondiree -onon gomЙ—imЙ“e- e huuwugol moЖҙЖҙereeji Й—i yamira-Й—on, Allah mooЙ“itiroyay on kala nokku mo laatoroyton Гұalnde darngal; ngam O yoЙ“ita on golle mo'on. Pellet, Allah ko hattanЙ—o e dow kala huunde, O RoЕӢkataa mooЙ“tude on yoЙ“a on.

2:149.text: Nokku kala mo yaltir-Й—aa e kala ka laati-Й—aa -an annabiijo-e jokkuЙ“e ma,faalaЙ—aa juulude,fewtir baЕӢЕӢe Juulirde Hormorde nden,sabu Й—um ko goonga wahyinaaЙ—o ummoraade Joomi maa. Allah Wonaali WelsindiiЙ—o e kon ko gollo-ton,ko woni,Himo Жҙellitii e Й—um,O yoЙ“oyay on Й—um.

2:150.text: Nokku kala mo yaltir-Й—aa-an Annabiijo-faalaЙ—aa juulude,fewtir baЕӢЕӢe Juulirde Hormaande nden.Nokku kala mo ngonЙ—on-onon gomЙ—imЙ“e- fewtiniree geece mon Й—en baЕӢЕӢe mayru so on faalaamaa juulude;fii wata wonan yimЙ“e Й“en hujja mo Й“e hujjinorta e dow mo'on-so wanaa Й“en tooГұuЙ“e e maЙ“Й“e,Й“en Й—on heddoday e geddi mu'un,Й“e hujjinora e mo'on ko Й“e yiЙ—i e hujjaaji,wata non on huluЙ“e,hulee Joomi mo'on tan, golliron yamirooje Makko woЙ—Й—ito-Й—on haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko.Pellet,Allah Shar'inirii fewtugol Kaaba on ngam Timminirgol neemaaji Makko ЖҠin e mo'on fii Ko O seerndi on e denndaangal mofte,e fii no O Fewnira on ka Й“uri teddude e Qibla yimЙ“e.

2:151.text: Ko wano non Men Neeminiri e mo'on neema goo; tawde Men Nulii e mo'on NulaaЙ—o jeyaaЙ—o e mo'on, himo janngana on Aayeeje Amen, o laЙ“Й“inira on kon ko o yamirta on immorde e Й“ure e moЖҙЖҙere, e ko o haЙ—ata on e mu'um immorde e ellaaji e aГұiniiЙ—i, himo janngina on Al Qura'aanaare nden e Sunna on, o janngina on kon ko on anndaano e fiyakuuji diine e dunyaaru mo'on.

2:152.text: JaЕӢtoree Lam Й“erЙ—e mo'on e terЙ—e mo'on; Mi Annditira on MaЕӢtugol on Reena on, njoЙ“di ndin ko e ndeer golle Й—en woni. Jaarnee Lam e neemaaji Am Й—i Mi Neemini e mo'on, wata on yeddira huutorgol Й—i ka harmi.

2:153.text: Ko onon yo gomЙ—imЙ“e, wallitoree muГұГұaare e juulde, tuma rewoton Lam jebbilano-Й—on yamiroore Am. Pellet, Allah hino wonndi e muГұГұiiЙ“e Й“en, O Walliray-Й“e hawrindineede e sawaaba.

2:154.text: Wata on wi'u-onon muumini en-fii Й“en wareteeЙ“e e laawol Allah:"Ko maayirЙ“e wano fof maayirta".Ko woni,Й“en ko wuurЙ“e ka Joomi maЙ“Й“e, kono on so'ataa nguurdam maЙ“Й“e;saЙ“u ko Й—am nguurdam heerii-Й—am, Й—am anndortaako si wanaa wahyu immorЙ—o ka Allah.

2:155.text: Ma Men jariba on nooneeji e musiibaaji; wano hulugol ayЙ“e mo'on, e heege sabu ЕӢakkireede Гұaametee, e Й—oytagol jawle Й—en sabu waaseede Й—en maa saЙ—tugol heЙ—de Й—e, e Й—uytoral woЕӢkiiji Й—in sabu boneeji halkayЙ—i yimЙ“e Й“en, maa yanirgol shahiidi fii Allah, e Й—uytoral dimЙ—e leydi ndin, wewlin -an nulaaЙ—o- Й“en muГұГұotooЙ“e Й—in musiibaaji sabu ko O EltaniЙ“e aduna e laaxara.

2:156.text: ЖҒen tawЙ“e si gootel e Й—in musiibaaji heЙ“iiЙ“e,Й“e wi'ira yarluyee e jebbilaare:Menen ko men jeyaaЙ“e Allah,Himo WaЙ—a e amen kon ko O muuyi,ko ka Makko kadi woni ruttorde amen Гұalnde darngal,ko Kanko Woni TagЙ—o men,O Teddiniri men neemaaji seertuЙ—i, ko ka Makko woni ruttorde amen e lannoode fiyaaku amen.

2:157.text: Ena woodani Й“en siforЙ“e Й—ii sifaaji,maЕӢtoore immorde ka Allah,ndeer mbatu malaa'ika en toowungu,e yurmeende jippotoonde e maЙ“Й“e.Ko Й“ee Й—oo ngoni feewirЙ“e laawol goonga ngol.

2:158.text: Pelle Safaa e Marwa Й—en takko ka suudu Kaaba, ko jeyaaЙ—e e maandeeji shari'a Й“aЕӢnguЙ—o on. Kala on faandiiЙ—o suudu Kaaba ndun fii tottugol dewal hajju maa umara, ella woo fawaaki mo nde o wanngotoo hakkunde majji; tawa himo fiЙ“i Й—um ko fiyaaku majjiyaЕӢkooЙ“e jeyaa, gomЙ—ii non Allah ЖҒaЕӢnginii wonde Й—um ko e dewe hajju jeyaa. Kala on huuwuЙ—o yiЙ—aaЙ—i Й—in ka dewe hara himo laЙ“Й“ini; pellet Allah Jaarnay mo, O JaЙ“ana mo Й—um, O YoЙ“a mo; tawde KaЕӢko Allah Ko O AnnduЙ—o Й“en huuwayЙ“e moЖҙЖҙere, haaniduЙ“e e baraaji.

2:159.text: ЖҒen suuЙ—ooЙ“e kon ko Men Jippini immorde e Й“aЕӢngannduyee tinndinЙ—o goona Annabiijo on e kon ko o addi, jeyaaЙ“e e Alyahuuda e Annasaara, Й“aawo nde Men FeГұГұinani Й—um yimЙ“e Й“en ka defte maЙ“Й“e; Й“en Й—on [suuЙ—ooЙ“e], Allah WoЙ—Й—intinay-Й“e e Yurmeende Makko, Malaa'ika en e Annabi en e yimЙ“e Й“en fof kadi huЙ—irayЙ“e woЙ—Й—intineede e Yumeende Allah.

2:160.text: So wanaa Й“en ruttiiЙ“e e Allah, nimsuЙ“e ko suuЙ—irani Й—een Aayeeje Й“aЕӢnguЙ—e, Й“e moЖҙЖҙini golleeji maЙ“Й“e feeГұuЙ—e e wirniiЙ—e, Й“e feГұГұini kon ko Й“e suuЙ—unoo e goonga e peewal; Й“en Й—on, Mi JaЙ“ay ruttogol maЙ“Й“e ngol ka Й—oftaare Am, tawde ko Miin woni JaЙ“oowo tuubuubuye Й“en tuubayЙ“e e jeyaaЙ“e Й“en, YurmeteeЙ—o Й“e.

2:161.text: Pellet, Й“en yedduЙ“e Й“e maayidi e keerefaaku ado Й“e yiltaade e mu'un, ena fawii Й“en Й—on kuddi Allah ndin raЙ—oreede e Yurmeende Makko nden, ena fawiiЙ“e kadi kuddi Malaa'ika en e yimЙ“e Й“en fof; raЙ—oreede e Yurmeende Allah woЙ—Й—iЕӢtinee e Mu en.

2:162.text: Ko Й“e luttidooЙ“e e ndin kuddi, Й“e hayfinЕӢtaake leЙ“te Й—en hay Гұallal gootal, Й“e nennЕӢtaake Гұalnde darngal.

2:163.text: ReweteeЙ—o mon On e goonga -onon yo yimЙ“e- ko O gooto Bajjo ka Jaati Makko e Sifaaji Makko. ReweteeЙ—o e goona woo alaa tanaa Makko, ko KaЕӢko woni HuuЙ“uЙ—o Yurmeende Yaajunde, HeerorЙ—o Yurmegol jeyaaЙ“e Mu'un; sabu O NeemiriiЙ“e neemaaji Й—i limtotaako.

2:164.text: Pellet hino e ndeer tagugol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin,e kon ko ngoni e majji immorde e kaawaseeji tagudu,e waylondiral jemma on e Гұalorma on,e Й—en laaЙ—e dogooje e maaje ndiyam, roondiiЙ—e kon ko nafata yimЙ“e Й“en; immorde e Гұaametee e koltu e ngeengu,e ko nannditata e kuntayЙ—i haajiiji maЙ“Й“e, e kon ko Allah Jippiniri ka kammu immorde e ndiyam; O Wurnitiri Й—am leydi ndin kon ko fuЙ—ata e mayri wano remuru e huЙ—o, e kon ko O saakti e mayri daabeeji wuuruЙ—i, e waylitorgol keneeli Й—in cenЙ—e kala, e duule eltiraaЙ—e hakkunde leydi e kammu. Pellet, Й—um Й—on fof ngonii daliluuji feeГұuЙ—i e Goodal Allah SeniiЙ—o On, wonande Й“en haqqilooЙ“e hujjaaji, Й“e fahma daliluuji e Й“aЕӢngannduyeeji.

2:165.text: E hoore Й—en aayeeje Й“aЕӢnguЙ—e, [a taway] hino e yimЙ“e njogitotooЙ“e ko woori Allah deweteeЙ—i; hiЙ“e mbaЙ—a Й—in yerondirЙ—i Allah ToowuЙ—o On, Й“e njiЙ—iraЙ—i wano Й“e njiЙ—irta Allah. Kono Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e hino Й“uri saЙ—tude giggol wonande Allah e dii ko Й“eya njiЙ—ata deweteeЙ—i mu'un; sabu kamЙ“e [muumuni en] Й“e kafidataa e Allah hay e gooto, hiЙ“e njiЙ—a Mo ka welo-welo e ka wororde. ЖҒeya kan, hiЙ“e njiЙ—a deweteeЙ—i maЙ“Й“e Й—in ka welo-welo, Й“e yiltitoo e Allah si Й“e saЙ—tiraama. Hara Й“en tooГұuЙ“e nganduno fiyaake maЙ“Й“e on ka laakara e on shirku mo Й“e faggitorta bakkaatu, tuma Й“e nji'ata lepte Й—en; Й“e nganndayno HeerorЙ—o On doole Й—en fof ko Allah, e wonde ko O SaЙ—tuЙ—o leptugol on yeddoowo mo. Hara Й“e nji'ayno Й—um, Й“e kafidataano e Allah hay e gooto.

2:166.text: Tuma hooreeЙ“e jokkanooЙ“e Й“en pottitoytoo jokkunooЙ“e lo'uЙ“e Й“en; sabu ko Й“e nji'oyta kon kulaleeji Гұalnde darngal e caЙ—eele mu'un, hara non sabuuji maЙ“Й“e e pehe mu'un daЙ—irЙ—i fof taЖҙaama.

2:167.text: ЖҒen jokkunooЙ“e lo'uЙ“e mbi'a: Hara nun men gasayno ruttaade ka aduna, men pottitora hooreeЙ“e amen Й“en wano Й“e pottitori men. Ko wano Allah Holliri Й“e non Й—en lepte mawЙ—e ka laakara, ko non O HollirtaЙ“e battane jokkirgol hooreeЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en e hoore meere; ngam no Й“o nimsira Й“e sunoo. ЖҒen ngonaali njaltooЙ“e e yiite Й—en poomaa.

2:168.text: Ko onon yo yimЙ“e! Г‘aamee yoga e ko woni ka leydi immorde e hayawaanu e fuЙ—ateeri e leЙ—Й—e, kon ko heЙ“orta no dagori laaЙ“iri hara soЙ“aa. Wata on jokku Й—ate seytaane Й—e o yollata on e mu'un, pellet ko o gaГұo mon feГұГұinЙ—o ngayngu. DagaЕӢtaako non haqqiloowo jokkugol gaГұo makko tiiЙ—noriiЙ—o lorrude mo majjina mo!

2:169.text: KaЕӢko [seytaane] o yamirtah on si wanaa ko bonnata immorde e bakkaatu e kala ko mawni e junuubi, e nde wowloton e hoore Allah -ka kaЙ“Й“e e ka shari'aaji- ko aldaa e anndal iwrungal ka Allah maa nulaaЙ—o Makko on.

2:170.text: Si Й“ee heeferЙ“e wi'anaama: "Jokkee kon ko Allah Jippini immorde e peewal e annoora", Й“e mbi'ray lunndagol: "Ko woni, men jokkay kon ko men tawri baabiraaЙ“e amen immorde e piЙ“e e finaa-tawaa. Hara Й“e jokkoay tun baabiraaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en hay si tawiino Й“en laatanooki haqqilooЙ“e hay e huunde immorde e peewal e annoora, Й“e feewirtaa e on goonga mo Allah yarlanii Й“e?!

2:171.text: Misal Й“en heeferЙ“e e ko Й“e jokkata kon baabiraaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e, ko wano on gaynaako ewnotooЙ—o nodda bahiimaaji mu'un, Й—i nana hito makko, kono fahmataa haala makko. ЖҠin [keeferi] ko pahooji e nanugol goonga nanira nafitorgol Й—um, mbobooji Й—i Й—emЙ—e mu'un Й—i waawataa haalude goonga, humiЙ—uЙ—i e yi'ugol mo. Ko Й—um wani si tawii Й—i haqqilataa peewal ngal noddoton-Й“e e mu'un.

2:172.text: Ko onon yo Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah jokki nulaaЙ—o Makko on! Г‘aamee imoorde e laaЙ“uЙ—i Й—i Allah Arsiki on O Daginani on, jaarniron Allah kene e gunndoo fii ko O Teddiniri on neemaaji. Hino jeyaa e jaarnugo Mo kaЕӢko ToowuЙ—o On, Й—oftagol yamiraaЙ—i Makko, woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko; si on wanii rewirayЙ“e Mo kaЕӢko tan e hoore goonga, hara on kafidaali Mo hay e huunde.

2:173.text: Anndee ko Allah Harmini e mo'on immorde e Гұaametee, ko ko maayiri nii, e ЖҙiiЖҙam rufaaЙ—am iloojam, e teewu kose, e kon ko innde goo jaЕӢtaade e mu'un ka hirsugol ka wanaa innde Allah.Si neЙ—Й—o o duГұaama e Гұaamugol huunde tuma o saЙ—tiraa, hara wanaa feЖҙЖҙintingol ko haani kon; haray bakkatu e lepte fawaaki mo.Pellet Allah Ya'fotooЙ—o kala tuuЙ“uЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en,YurmeteeЙ—o Й“e.Hino jeyaa e Yurmeende Makko nden, tawde o yawtanii ya'fike kala on ГұaamirЙ—o ko harmi fewndo duГұiraa.

2:174.text: ЖҒen SuuЙ—ooЙ“e kon ko Allah Jippini ka Deftere e ko woni e mayre immorde e daliluuji selluЙ—i, e fii annabaaku Muhammadu (yo o his), wano alyahuuda e annasaara en gerdata; hiЙ“e soodira ngol suuЙ—ugol maЙ“Й“e Й—on cogguwel famЙ—ungel; wano fii ardagol maa jaahu maa jawdi. ЖҒen Й—on alaa e waЙ—ude ka deedi maЙ“Й“e ka haqiiqa, si wanaa kon leГұtoyta Й“e ka yiite, Allah Yeewtoytaa Й“e Гұalnde darngal ko Й“e yiЙ—i, ko woni, O yeewtoyayЙ“e ko bonaЕӢta Й“e, O LaЙ“Й“inoytaaЙ“e O MaЕӢtoytaaЙ“e, hino woodani Й“e lepte muusuЙ—e.

2:175.text: ЖҒen siforoЙ“e suuЙ—gol ganndal ngal yimЙ“e katonjiЕӢta,ko Й“en waЙ—titiri majjere nden peewal sabu ko Й“e suuЙ—i kon goonga kan.ЖҒe waЙ—titiri lepte Alla Й—en ya'fuyee Makko on.Alaa fotuЙ—o muГұГұorde Й“e huuwugol kon ko naadataЙ“e yiite.A sikkay Й“e haajaaka ko woni e magge imomorde e lepte;sabu ko Й“e muГұГұii kon e magge.

2:176.text: Ko jaЕӢtaa koo e njoЙ“di, ko fii suuЙ—ugol maЙ“Й“e ganndal ngal e peewal ngal, sabu tawde Alla Jippinirii Defte Makko Й—en goonga. ЖҠum no haani ka Й“aЕӢnginee hara suuЙ—aaka. ЖҒen non luutondirЙ“e e Defte Alla Й—en Й“e gomЙ—ini yoga e yeddi yoga e majje, Й“e ngonii e senngo woЙ—Й—iingo goonga kan.

2:177.text: MoЖҙЖҙere welyande Alla nden wonaali tan fewtugol Й“aЕӢnge fuЙ—naange maa hiirnaange walla ko lunndii Й—um. Ko woni tun moЖҙЖҙere nden fof ko: e Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Alla ko ReweteeЙ—o Gooto, Й“e gomЙ—ini Гұalaande sakkitiinde, e denndaangal Maalaa'ika en, e denndaangal Defte jippiiЙ—e Й—en, e denndaangal AnnabaaЙ“e Й“en ko aldaa e senndindiro; o nafqi kadi jawdi -e hoore himo yiЙ—indi rerЙ—i e mayri- joomiraaЙ“e Й“adondiral Й“en, e on wonduЙ—o mo ben mun maayi ado o hellifeede, e Й“en katonjinЙ“e, e on tuЕӢaraЕӢkeejo wayrondirЙ—o e yimЙ“e mun, e Й“en fewtiЕӢteeЙ“e ballal Й“e haanida e toragol yimЙ“e Й“en, e nafqugol jawdi fii rinЙ—ingol daaЙ—e; e on ГұiiЙ“nuЙ—o juulde timminirinde no Alla Yamiriri, o totti asakal waЙ—Й—iiЙ—o on, e Й“en hunnayЙ“e aadondiral maЙ“Й“e si Й“e haldidaama, e Й“en muГұГұotooЙ“e baasal e saЙ—teende e nawnaare, e Й“en Й“e dogataa ka hare si nde tiiЙ—ii. ЖҒen siforiiЙ“e Й—ii sifaaji, ko Й“en ngoni goongimЙ“e Alla Й“en ka gomЙ—inal maЙ“Й“e e ka golleeji maЙ“Й“e. Ko Й“en kadi ngoni gomЙ—uЙ“e Гұeemtini kon ko Alla Yamiri Й“e, Й“e woЙ—Й—itii ko ko O HaЙ—i Й“e.

2:178.text: Ko onon yo gomЙ—imЙ“e Alla jokkitii NulaaЙ—o Makko on,farlaama e mo'on ko faati e Й“en warayЙ“e woЙ—Й“e hoore tewaare e jaggitere.Ngam leptirgol waruЙ—o on bone makko on:dimo yo warire sabu dimo,jeyaaЙ—o wariree sabu jeyaaЙ—o, deyel kadi wariree sabu deyel.Si waraaЙ—o on ya'fike ado o timmude,maa waliiyu makko on ya'fanii mo,hino fawii ya'fiiЙ—o on jokkitagol waruЙ—o on ka tottirgol diya no moЖҙЖҙiri wanaa lorra e maЕӢti.No fawii kadi waruЙ—o on tottirgol diya on no moЖҙЖҙiri ko aldaa e saatinugol. Ngol ya'fagol Й—on jaЙ“a diya on ko hoynaneede immorde e Joomi mo'on, e yurmeende Й—ee mofte.Kala on jaggituЙ—o e waruЙ—o on Й“aawo ya'fuyee on e jaЙ“ugol diya on,no woodani mo lepte muusuЙ—e immorde ka Alla.

2:179.text: No woodani on e kon ko Alla shar'ini immorde e njottiigu, nguurdam wonande on; sabu daЙ—nugol ЖҙiiЖҙe mo'on, e duГұugol jaggitiirgol hakkunde mo'on. Ko joomiraaЙ“e haqqilaaji Й“en tan gelotoo Й—um; Й“en gomЙ—uЙ“e Alla ToowuЙ—o On Й“e jebbilanii shari'a Makko On Й“e gollitiri Yamirooje Makko.

2:180.text: Farlaama e mo'on si maande maayde nden arii goЙ—Й—o e mo'on, si tawii himo acci jawle nde o wasiyaЕӢtoo jibinЙ“e mo Й“en e Й“adondiraaЙ“e Й“en kon ko shari'a on happi -Й—um non wanaa yo fawu tataЙ“al jawdi ndin- WaЙ—ugol Й—um ko hannduyee fellitanaaЙ—o gomЙ—uЙ“e Й“en (huli Alla). Ndee Гұaawoore no woodunoo ado aayeeje ndonndi nden jippaade. Ko nde aayeeje ndoondi Й—en jippinoo Й—e Й“aЕӢngini Й“en ronooЙ“e maayЙ—o on e yeru ko Й“e ronata.

2:181.text: Kala on waylitirЙ—o wasiyee on Й“eydugol maa ustugol walla haЙ—ugol Й“aawo nde o anndi fii makko, pellet bakkaatu Й—um on ko e Й“en waylituЙ“e fawii wanaa e wasiyanaaЙ—o on. Allah ko Nanoowo yeewtereeji jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, AnnduЙ—o golleeji maЙ“Й“e Й—in. Huunde laawotaako Mo e fiyakuuje maЙ“Й“e Й—in.

2:182.text: Kala anndirЙ—o jeyЙ—o wasiyee on ooГұagol e goonga kan maa Й—awre ka wasiyee,o moЖҙЖҙiЕӢtiniri bonannd e wasiyiiЙ—o on annasiya,o moЖҙЖҙiЕӢtini hakkunde pooЙ—ondirЙ“e Й“en ka wasiyee,bakkaatu fawaaki mo.Toode o yoЙ“ete e ngol moЖҙЖҙiЕӢtingol.Pellet Alla ko Yawtanoowo kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, YurmotooЙ—o Й“e.

2:183.text: Ko onon yo gomЙ—imЙ“e Alla jokki NulaaЙ—o Makko on, koorka kan farliraama e mo'on immorde e Joomi mo'on wano ka farliranoo e Й—eya mofte adinooЙ—e on, belajo'o laatoЙ—on gomЙ—uЙ“e, waЙ—iron hakkunde mo'on e lepte Makko Й—en heedoode sabu golleeji moЖҙЖҙi mawnuЙ—i wano koorka.

2:184.text: Koorka waЙ—Й—ii ka on kan, ko hoorugol ГұalЙ—i seeЙ—aaji e nder hitaande nden. Kala e mo'on laatiiЙ—o nawnuЙ—o nawnaare saЙ—taynde hooridugol e mu'un walla himo e jahal, no newnanaa taЖҙugol, o yoЙ“itoya yeru kon ko o taЖҙunoo e ГұalaaЙ—e. No fawii Й“en haЙ—tanЙ“e koorka kan Гұammingol si Й“e taЖҙii: Й—um ko Гұammingol Й“iliiЙ—o Гұalaade nde Й“e taЖҙi. Ko hoorgol ngol Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude taЖҙugol yoЙ“ita ngol maa Гұammina, si wonii hiЙ—on nganndi moЖҙЖҙere wonde e koorka kan. Ko ndee Гұaawoore woni aranere nde Alla WaЙ—Й—iniri koorka; ontuma mo no yiЙ—i hooray, mo no yiЙ—i kadi taЖҙay Гұammina. Alla fawii koorka kan Й“aawo mu'un, O Farli ka e kala hellifaaЙ—o.

2:185.text: Lewru koorka ndun,ndu Alqur'aanaare nden fuЙ—Й—ii jippagol e mun ndun dow Annabiijo on (yo o his) ka jemma layla. Alla Jippiniriinde fewnirgol yimЙ“e Й“en.ЖҒaЕӢngannduyeeji feeГұuЙ—i no e mayre immorde e peewal,e serndugol hakkunde goonga e mehre. Kala on tawaaЙ—o lewru koorka hara himo ГұiiЙ“i selli, yo o hooru no waЙ—Й—ii. Kala laatiiЙ—o no nawni maa no e jahal saЙ—tungal hooridude e mu'un, no newnanaa taЖҙugol. Si o taЖҙii le, no waЙ—Й—ii mo yoЙ“itugol Й—een ГұalaaЙ—e Й—e o taЖҙi. Alla no Faalanaa on e ko O Shar'inani on kon, Rewnugol on Й—atal newiingal hara wanaa saЙ—tungal. E fii yo no timminiron hoorugol ГұalЙ—e lewru ndun fof, e no mawniniron Alla Й“aawo timmugol lewru koorka ndun e Гұalnde iidi nden fii ko O Hawrindini on hoorugol, O Newnani on timmingol. Belajo'o, jaarnon Alla e peewal mon ngal gaa e kaa diina ka O Welanaa on.

2:186.text: Si jeyaaЙ“e Am Й“en lamndike ma (Annabiijo) fii ЖҒadal Am e Jaabinol Am toraareeji maЙ“Й“e,haray Min:Ko Mi ЖҒadiiЙ—o Й“e,AnnduЙ—o fiyakuuji maЙ“Й“e,Nanoowo Toraaje maЙ“Й“e.ЖҒe katonjinaa e lonto maa toowugol hitooji maЙ“Й“e. MiЙ—o Jaabina toraare nodduЙ—o si o tororii laaal. Yo Й“e jebbilano lam? e yamirooje Am Й—en,Й“e tabita e gomЙ—inal maЙ“Й“e;sabu ko Й—um nafata Й“e ka jaabinaneede. Belajo'o Й“e jokkay ngol laawol feewungol ka fiyakuuji diina e aduna maЙ“Й“e.

2:187.text: Laatinoke ka aranun,hino harmunoo nde goorko nde gorko immoto nder jemma koorka ado peeral ngal nde o Гұaamata maa o yottoo e gennda makko.ЖҠum momtaa, Allah Daginani on (yo gomЙ—imЙ“e) yottagol e genndiraaЙ“e mon Й“en ka jemmaaji koorka.Onon e genndiraaЙ“e mo'on Й“en, kala ko suruta wonannde oya,gooto e mo'on waawa wonde Й“aawo oya. Allah Anndiino wonde e jaЕӢfitotono waЙ—ugol kon ko O HaЙ—i on,O Yurmaa on O JaЙ“ani on tuubuubuyee,O hoynani on. Jooni non, renndee e maЙ“Й“e,Й—aЙ“Й“on kon ko Alla Hoddirani on e jurriya. Г‘aamon yaron jemma on fof, haa peeral fajiri ngal feeГұirana on mutugol jemma on, refti timminiron koorka kan haЙ—itagol e firtayЙ—i Й—in; gila ka peeral haa ka mutal. Wata on renndu rewЙ“e mon Й“en hara hiЙ—on ufnii ka juulirЙ—e, sabu Й—um firtay koorka. ЖҠee Гұaawooje jaЕӢtaaje Й—oo, ko keeri Allah hakkunde haram e halal, wata on Й“aЙ—to Й—i fes! Sabu ko Й—i keeri Alla, heewii ka Й—i naЙ“ra e haram. Ko sifa Й—ee Гұaawooje feeГұuЙ—e woni ko Alla Й“aЕӢnginiraЕӢta yimЙ“e Й“en aayeeje Makko Й—en, belajo'o Й“e wona goonЙ—uЙ“e e huuwugol ko O Yamiri woЙ—Й—itoo ko O HaЙ—i.

2:188.text: Wata yoga Жҙettir jawle yoga e mo'on ko aldaa e laawol shari'a: wano wujjugol maa jattugol maa janfagol. Wata on pooЙ—ondire e mayri ka ГұaawooЙ“e Й“en fii no fedde goo Гұaamira jawle yimЙ“e Й“en, jillondiron e bakkaatu on hara hiЙ—on nganndi wonde Alla Harminii Й—um. Ko bakkondingol e hoore no anndi ko harmi kon Й“uri kaanude, Й“uri muusude lepte.

2:189.text: HiЙ“e naamno-maa (aan NulaaЙ—o) fii darorЙ—e lebbi e waylitagol fiyakuuji majji. Wi'u: Hikma Й—um,ko waqaЕӢtinagol yimЙ“e Й“en,Й“e nganndira Й—um waktuuji dewe maЙ“Й“e, wano:lebbi hajju,maa darorЙ—e koorka,maa timmugol hitaande fii asakal.HiЙ“e nganndira Й—um kadi waktuuji ligge maЙ“Й“e, wano: eЙ“Й“ugol lajal diya e Гұamaale.Dewal ngal wonaali ardirgol cuuЙ—i Й—in ka Й“abbe=caggal majji tuma hormini-Й—on fii hajju maa 'Omra (wano woowirno-Й—on fewndo majjere).Si ko woni dewal ngal tigir: ko dewal on gomЙ—uЙ—o ka gunndoo e ka kene. Ko ardugol e dame cuuЙ—i mon Й—in non Й“uri nawanaade on; sabu Alla Fawaali on e Й—um ko no saЙ—tana on. WaЙ—ee golle moЖҙЖҙe Й—en heeda hakkunde mon e lepte Alla Й—en, belajo'o, malire-Й—on heЙ“ugol faale mo'on, daЙ—on kon ko hulu-Й—on.

2:190.text: HaЙ“ee (fii Й“amtugol konngol Allah), Й“en haЙ“ooЙ“e on immorde e heeferЙ“e sakkotooЙ“e on e diina Alla. Wata on yawtir keeri Alla Й—in warugol paykoy maa rewЙ“e walla nayeeЙ“e ekn. Pellet, Alla YiЙ—aa Й“en jaggitooЙ“e yawta keeri Makko Й—i O Г‘aawi Й—in.

2:191.text: HaЙ“eeЙ“e Й“e nokku kala ka tawЙ—on Й“e, yaltinonЙ“e e nokkuure nde Й“e yaltini on e mu'un; nden woni Makka. Ko fitna sakkagol gomЙ—inЙ—o on e diina makko naЙ“ra e geddi Й“uri mawnude e dii haЙ“ugol. Wata on Й—aЙ“Й“itirЙ“e hare ka Misiide HormaЕӢte -ka mawningol nde- haa Й“e Й—aЙ“Й“itira on Й—on hare. Si Й—um waЙ—ii, haЙ“eeЙ“e. Ko sugu Й—ee lepte haЙ“ugolЙ“e ka Misiide hormaЕӢte Й—oo woni njoЙ“di heeferЙ“e Й“en.

2:192.text: Si Й“e haЙ—itike haЙ“ugol on e yeddugol, haЙ—itee e Й—um. Pellet, Alla ko Haforanoowo kala tuubuЙ—o, O JogitortaaЙ“e bakkatuuji yawtuЙ—i, Ko O huuЙ“uЙ—o-yurmeende, O yaawnirtaaЙ“e lepte.

2:193.text: HaЙ“ee heeferaaЙ“e Й“en haa nokku ka laatortaaЙ“e shirku maa sakkagol yimЙ“e Й“en e laawol Alla, maaЙ—um geddi; fii no diina kan feeГұirana Alla. Si Й“e haЙ—itike gejji e sakkagol diina Alla kan, tertee haЙ“ugol Й“e; sabu non jaggitere alanaa si wanaa Й“en tooГұirooЙ“e geddi e sakkagol diina Alla.

2:194.text: Lewru hormaЕӢteeru ndun ndu Alla Newinirani on horminagol totta 'Omra hitaande jeeЙ—iЙ—aЙ“ere, ko mbattiigu lewru hormaЕӢteeru ndu shirkooЙ“e Й“en sakkinoo on e mu'un gaa e haram on hitaande jeegaЙ“ere. HorminaaЙ—i Й—in (wano leydi hormaЕӢteeri ndin, e lewru hormaЕӢteeru ndun, e horminagol ngol), diya on siinee e majje hoore joggituЙ—o woo. Kala on jaggituЙ—o e mo'on fewndo majji, jaggitiree mo yeru jaggitannde makko nden, wata on yawtu keerol yerondirgol ngol. Pellet Alla YiЙ—aa Й“en yawtayЙ“e keeri Makko Й—in. Hulee Alla reЕӢtoЙ—on yawtugol keeri Makko Й—in, anndon pellet Alla no Wondi e gomЙ—uЙ“e Й“en; O WallirayЙ“e ballal e faabo.

2:195.text: Nafqee sakkoЙ—on jawdi fii Й—oftaare Alla (wano jihaadi ekn), wata on weddor ko'e mon Й—en faade e halakuyee; tertoЙ—on jihaadi e sakkagol fii laawol Alla, maa bugoron ko'e mo'on Й—en e ko wonata sabu halkaare mo'on. MoЖҙЖҙinee ka dewe mo'on e ka huuwondire mo'on e ka jikkuuji mo'on. Pellet Alla no YiЙ—i moЖҙЖҙinooЙ“e Й“en e kala fifaaku. Himo MawninanaЙ“e mbarjaari, O Hawrindina Й“e e peewal.

2:196.text: Tottiree hajju ngun e 'omra on no timmiri,Й—aЙ“Й“oron welayee Alla ToowuЙ—o On.Si on haЙ—aama e fii timmingol(hajju ngun e 'omra on) Гұawu maa gaГұo,fawike on hirsugol kon ko newii e kirse;wano gelooЙ—i maa na'i maa dammi,ngam yo daginitoron hormagol mo'on.Wate laЙ“e ko'e mon Й—en maa femmbon haa kirse Й—en yottoo nokku ka Й—e haanaa hirseede.Si no haЙ—aa ka hormaЕӢte,yo hirse ka haЙ—aa Й—on.Si haЙ—aaka non ka hormaЕӢte,yo hirse Й—on Гұalnde boragol ngol haa Й“aawo e ГұalЙ—i tashriiqi.On tawЙ—o e mo'on ko ГұawЙ—o maa lorra no ka cukuli hoore makko,hon tenЙ—i eken o femmborii sabu on lorra,ella alanaa mo.No fawii mo tan sottoraade Й—um: hoorugol balЙ—e tati,maa Гұammina Й“iliiЙ“e jeegoo e Й“iliiЙ“e hormaЕӢteeru ndun,maa hirsugol dammol sennditana waasuЙ“e hormaЕӢteeru ndun.Si on laataaki huluЙ“e,kala e mo'on dakmitorЙ—o tottirgol 'Omra on nder lebbi hajju Й—in,o dakmitori kon ko harmi e makko immorde e haЙ—aaЙ—i horminiiЙ—o haa o horminanii hajju nden hitaande;fawike mo hirsugol kon ko newanii mo immorde e: damol,maa o hawtida e jeegoo hirsugol ngelooba walla nagge.Si o haЙ—tanaali hirsugol ngol,yo o hooru balЙ—e tati ka hajju ton lomto mum,e hoore non o hooroyay balЙ—e jeeЙ—iЙ—i ka makko si o ruttike,Й—um hawra balЙ—e sappo timmuЙ—e. Ngol dakmitagol waЙ—Й—inayngol kirse maa koorka (fii Й“e haЙ—tanaa kirse Й“en),wanaa fii jeyaaЙ“e Й“en ka Hormorde maa hoЙ—uЙ“e takko Й—on;sabu Й“en Й—on hatonjinaa e dakmitagol,tawde hiЙ“e Й“adii Hormorde nden,Й“e yonndinoray wanngagol ngol e dii dakmitorgol 'omra haa e hajju.Hulee Alla jokkon ko O Shar'ini, mawninon keeri Makko Й—in,anndon pellet Alla ko saЙ—tuЙ—o leptugol lunndiiЙ—o yamirooje Makko.

2:197.text: Lebbi hajju Й—in ko anndaaЙ—i, ko gila juldaandu haa timma sappo tafaske (donkin). Mo waЙ—Й—inii hajju e hoore-mu'un ndeer Й—in lebbi o horminii e majji, haray renndugol e soccondiro harmii e makko. Tawde Й—um yaltinay hominiiЙ—o ka suudu hormaЕӢte e Й—oftaare Allah. Yeddondiral pooЙ—ayngal e tikkere fof kadi no harmi e makko. Kala ko golluЙ—on e moЖҙЖҙere, Alla no Anndi Й—um, O YoЙ“ay on. Wallinoree hajju ngun yooЙ“agol Гұaametee e njaram. Anndon non ko Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude e ko wallinortee ka fiyakuuji mo'on, ko kulol Alla. Hulee Lam Гұemtinon Yamirooje Am, woЙ—Й—itoЙ—on HaЙ—aaЙ—i Am, yo joomiraaЙ“e haqqille hisuЙ—e.

2:198.text: Bakkaatu fawaaki on nde Й—aЙ“Й“irton ka hajju ton, arsike mon njulaaku dagiingu ekn. Si on iwtii 'Arafaat Й“aawo on daraade ton Гұalnde jeenay-re nden, fewron Muzdalifa jemma sappo nden taaske, jaЕӢtoree innde Alla nden subbunhinagol e haylilugol e du'agol ka hormorde Muzdalifa. JaЕӢtoron innde Alla kon ko O Fewniri on e diina Makko, e neweende hajjugol ka suudu Makko. GomЙ—ii on laatinoke ado Й—um, ko on welsindinooЙ“e e shari'a Makko.

2:199.text: Refti yahron 'Arafaat, hono yimЙ“e nyeemtinatnooЙ“e Annabi Ibraahiima Й“en gerdaynoo, hara wanaa hono no yimЙ“e majjere roЕӢkiraynoo daragol Й—on. ЖҠaЙ“Й“iron haforaneede immorde e Alla kon ko raЙ“Й“indini Й—on e dewe Makko. Pellet Alla ko Haforanoowo kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, HuuЙ“uЙ—o yurmeede Й“e.

2:200.text: Si on gaynii golle hajju Й—en, on joofinirii Й—um jaЕӢtoore innde Allah. Hebbinoree maЕӢtugol Mo, hono maЕӢtorton baabiraaЙ“e mo'on, walla ko Й“uri kon ko maЕӢtorayЙ—o baabiraaЙ“e mon Й“en; tawde neemaaji mon Й—in fof ko e Makko SeniiЙ—o ToowuЙ—o On iwri. YimЙ“e Й“en no seedi, no e maЙ“Й“e yedduЙ“e shirkuЙ“e, Й“en gomЙ—inaa si wanaa oo aduna, Й“en Й—on naamnotaako Joomi maЙ“Й“e so wanaa cuЙ—inorЙ—i aduna; bano cellal e jawdi e Й“iЙ—Й“e. ЖҒe ngalaa non joЙ“di e kon ko Alla Hebilani jeyaaЙ“e Makko gomЙ—uЙ“e Й“en ka laakara, sabu rerЙ—irgol Й“e aduna on Й—uuro laakara.

2:201.text: No e yimЙ“e Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Alla e Гұalaande sakkitiinde, hiЙ“e toroo Joomi maЙ“Й“e neemaaji aduna e golle moЖҙЖҙe HiЙ“e toroo Mo kadi polgal ka aljanna, e daЙ—ugol lepte yiite.

2:202.text: ЖҒen torotooЙ“e moЖҙЖҙere aduna e laakara, no woodaniЙ“e geЙ“al-moЖҙЖҙal immorde e baraaji mawЙ—i, sabu kon ko faggitii golle moЖҙЖҙe ka aduna maЙ“Й“e. Alla non ko YaawuЙ—o hasbugol golle.

2:203.text: JaЕӢtoree Innde Alla nden kabbirugol e haylilugol nder Й“alЙ—e seeЙ—aaje, Й—en ngoni: sappo e go'o, Й—iЙ—i e sappo e tati tafaske. On mo yaccini o yati Mina Й“aawo bugagol kaaЖҙe Й—en ka sappo e Й—iЙ—aЙ“ere, no newii, kadi o alaa bakkaatu; tawde Alla no Hoynani mo Й—um. On mo neЙ“tini kadi haa ka sappo e tataЙ“ere, no wenii, on kadi alaa bakkaatu; tawde o waЙ—ii ko haani, o Гұemtinii Annabiijo on mo jam e kisiyee woni e mun on. ЖҠum Й—oo fof ko wanande on gomЙ—uЙ—o ka hajju makko o gerdiri no Alla Yamiriri. Huliree Alla ГұemitiЕӢgol Yamirooje Makko woЙ—Й—itoo HaЙ—aaЙ—i Makko. Pelliton wonde onon ko ka Makko KaЕӢko tan woni ko ruttete Й—on, ngam O YoЙ“ita on golleeji mo'on.

2:204.text: Ko an Annbiijo, anndu no e yimЙ“e Й“en nafoqinЙ—o konngugol mun ka aduna Й—oo, yi'iraa-mo moЖҙЖҙo-konngol, sikkiraa Й—um ko o goongiyaЕӢke. Anndu non faandaare makko ko daЙ—ndugol hoore-makko e jawdi makko. Hara non himo seediЕӢtina Alla (e hoore fenaande), kon ko woni e Й“ernde makko immorde e gomЙ—inal maa moЖҙЖҙere, e hoore non ko o saЙ—tuЙ—o wennje e ngayngu juulЙ“e Й“en.

2:205.text: Si o huccii ma o seedii e ma'a, o yaccora ka leydi fii bonnirgol gejji, e bonnital gese, e warugol neemoraaЙ—i. Alla YiЙ—aa bonnere ka leydi, O YiЙ—aa kadi Й“en bonnooЙ“e.

2:206.text: Si on bonnoowo wi'anaama (nde mo wasiyee): "Hulu Alla reЕӢtoЙ—aa e Keeri Makko Й—in" mawnitaare nden haЙ—a mo artugol e goonga kan, o heddoo e bakkaatu on. NjoЙ“di makko ndin yonii naatugol jahannama, nge bonii ГұiiЙ“irde sumooЙ“e nge.

2:207.text: No e yimЙ“e Й“en: gomЙ—inЙ—o sooЙ—tiroowo woЕӢkii mun dewal Joomi makko, o tiiЙ—noo Й—aЙ“Й“ere yaluyee Makko. Alla non ko YaajuЙ—o yurmeede jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, HilnotooЙ—o Й“e.

2:208.text: Ko onon yo gomЙ—imЙ“e Alla e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, naatiree e lislaamu mooЙ“gal (denndanngal), wata on accu huunde e makko; wano yimЙ“e defte gerdata: Й“e gomЙ—ina yoga Й“e yedda yoga. Wata on jokku Й—ate seytaane, on ko gaГұo mooЙ—on Й“aЕӢngu Й—o ngyangu.

2:209.text: Si on arii ooГұaade e muurtude Й“aawo kon ko ari on e Й“aЕӢngannduyeeji feeГұuЙ—i, nganndee pellet, Alla ko FooluЙ—o e Qudra Mu'un, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e Yiilugol Shari'aaji Makko. ЖҠum non, hulee Mo mawninon Mo.

2:210.text: ЖҒee jokkuЙ“e Й—ate seytaane murtuЙ“e e laawol goonga,Й“e sabbitaaki si wanaa nde Allaahu SeniiЙ—o On ArdaЕӢtaЙ“e Гұalnde darngal,e ndeer niЙ“e duule,fii no O Г‘aawira hakkunde maЙ“Й“e. Malaa'ika en kadi ngara ko Й“e kuuЙ“ituЙ“e Й“aЕӢnge fof, ontuma non fiyaake Alla on gasinee e maЙ“Й“e. Ko faade ka Alla SeniiЙ—o Bajjo On,woni ruttorde fiyakuuji tageefo ngon.

2:211.text: NulaaЙ—o, naamnor geЙ—alЙ“e Israa'iila en feloore, wi'aa: ko laaЙ“i jelu Alla ЖҒaЕӢnginani on aayeeje Makko tinndinooje goongugol NulaaЙ“e Й“en, fennuЙ—on Й—e Й—uuri Й—on? Kala waЙ—titirЙ—o neenma Alla On geddi e fennugol, Й“aawo nde on neema feeГұani mo, pellet, Alla ko SaЙ—tuЙ—o leptugol yeddooЙ“e fenna Й“en.

2:212.text: ЖҒen heeferЙ“e cuЙ—inanaama Й—am nguurdam aduna e ko woni e majjam, immorde e ko woni heen e dakamme yonn ngasawon. HiЙ“e jalkita Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Alla e Гұalaande sakkitiinde. ЖҒen huluЙ“e Alla Й—oftii Yamirooje Makko, Й“e reЕӢtii e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko; Й“e wonoyay dow heeferЙ“e Й“en ka laakara, tawde Alla NaadoyaЙ“e aljanna. Alla no Rokka on mo O Muuyi e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en ko aldaa e hasboore.

2:213.text: YimЙ“e Й“en laatino mofte goote fottuЙ—e e peewal ben maЙ“Й“e Aadama, haa no seytaane majjiniriЙ“e non, Й“e luutondiri hakkunde gomЙ—inal e keeferaaku.
