37:164.text: Malaa'ika'en Й“anngini jeyeede maЙ“Й“e ka Allah, daЙ—ndinoo e ko sirkooЙ“e Й“en aaЖҙoriЙ“e kon, wi'ugol: Alaa e amen, mo alanaa Й—um, darorde anndaande, fii rewugol Alla Й—oftoo Mo.

37:165.text: Menen Malaa'ika, ko men darnaaЙ“e saffinaa, fii rewugol Allah Й—oftoo Mo. Ko memen kadi woni subbunhinantooЙ“e Allah Й“en, sifaaji yahduЙ—i e Makko.

37:166.text: Menen Malaa'ika, ko men darnaaЙ“e saffinaa, fii rewugol Allah Й—oftoo Mo. Ko memen kadi woni seninooЙ“e Allah ko O haandaani ko sifaaji.

37:167.text: SirkooЙ“e Makkah Й“en woniino e wi'ugol, ado nuleede Muhammadu (yo o his): Sinno hara meЙ—en joginoo Deftere sugu Defte arane Й—en, wano Tawreeta, ko pellet, men laЙ“Й“inanayno Alla dewalngal. Hara non, ko e fenaande Й“e woni. Tawde Muhammadu addanii Й“e Alqur'aana, Й“e yeddi nde. Kono non, aray nde Й“e anndata, fii lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e, haЙ“Й“iiЙ—e Й“e Й—en, Г‘alnde Darngal.

37:171.text: GomЙ—ii Konngol Amen ardinoke, fii NulaaЙ“e Amen Й“en, wonnde ko Й“e wallirteeЙ“e e hoore ayЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en, hujja e dolle Й—e Alla neeminiri Й“e. E wonnde poolal ngal, ko fii konu Amen, haЙ“irayngu fii Alla ngun, no daalol Alla ngol Й“amtora.

37:172.text: GomЙ—ii Konngol Amen ardinoke, fii NulaaЙ“e Amen Й“en, wonnde pellet, ko Й“e wallirteeЙ“e e hoore ayЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en, hujja e dolle Й—e Alla neeminiri Й“e. E wonnde poolal ngal, ko fii konu Amen, haЙ“irayngu fii Alla ngun, no daalol Alla ngol Й“amtora.

37:173.text: GomЙ—ii Konngol Amen ardinoke, fii NulaaЙ“e Amen Й“en, wonnde ko Й“e wallirteeЙ“e e hoore ayЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en, hujja e dolle Й—e Alla neeminiri Й“e. E wonnde poolal ngal, ko fii konu Amen, haЙ“irayngu fii Alla ngun, no daalol Alla ngol Й“amtora.

37:174.text: An NulaaЙ—o, Й—uurno Й“ee sirkooЙ“e saЙ—ta feereeЙ“e, haa e saanga nde Allah humpitu maa, arugol lepte maЙ“Й“e Й—en.

37:175.text: Ndaaraa Й“e, tuma lepte Й—en jippotoo e maЙ“Й“e, Й“e aray yi'ude, ka yi'ugol nafataa Й“e!

37:176.text: E hara ko lepte Alla Й—en, Й“ee sirkooЙ“e heГұorta?

37:177.text: Si lepte Allah Й—en jippike e maЙ“Й“e, haray bimmbi maЙ“Й“e on bonii !

37:178.text: An NulaaЙ—o, Й—uurno e maЙ“Й“e, haa Allah Гұaawa fii leptugol Й“e ngol.

37:179.text: Ndaaraa; kamЙ“e kadi, Й“e aray yi'ude lepte Allah Й—en yanooje e maЙ“Й“e.

37:180.text: Senayee woodanii Joomi maa, an Muhammadu, O laaЙ“ii e kon ko sirkooЙ“e Й“en siforta Mo e ustiiЙ—i !

37:181.text: Kisiyee Allah e mantoore Makko, wonii e NulaaЙ“e Makko tedduЙ“e Й“en.

37:182.text: Yettoore nden fow, woodanii Alla seniiЙ—o toowuЙ—o On. Ko Kanko hanndi e Й—um. Ko Kanko woni JeyЙ—o winndere nden fow. JeyЙ—o Й—um alaa, si wanaa Kanko.

38:1.text: Saad: yewtere yawtiino, fii sugu Й—ee karfe taЖҙondirЙ—e, ka fuЙ—Й—orde simoore Baqarah. E ngol cortewol Й—oo, Allah no woodanira Alqur'aana, yowondirnde e waajitorЙ—i yimЙ“e, kon ko nafata Й“e aduna e laakara. Hara wanaa ko sirkooЙ“e Й“en aaЖҙotoo, wonnde Allah no mai denndadiijo.

38:2.text: Ko woni kon, heeferЙ“e Й“en wonii e townitanagol wootinЙ—innde Allah, e luutondirgol e Muhammadu (yo o his), e anygol mo.

38:3.text: ЖҠuuЙ—ii e mofte fennuЙ“e NulaaЙ“e mun, ado maЙ“Й“e, Й“e Men halki, Й“en noddi faaboo uma, nde lepte tellato, kono oon waqtu wonaana waqtu faabeede e lepte sakko faabo nafa Й“e.

38:4.text: ЖҒe ЕӢalЙ—i, tuma Й“e yi'unoo NulaaЙ—o arЙ—o Й“e on, ko jertina Й“e e lepte Allah Й—en, ko e maЙ“Й“e o jeyaa. YedduЙ“e Й“en nde yi'unoo hujjaaji Й“annginЙ—i goonga Muhammadu kan, Й“e wi'i: Oo, ko biloowo yimЙ“e nii, heewuЙ—o fenaande e ko wi'ata kon, wonnde ko o NulaaЙ—o, mo Allah wahayini e mun.

38:5.text: Kere o waЙ—ay reweteeЙ—i limtilimtiЙ—i e mun Й—in fow, reweteeЙ—o gooto tun? Pellet, ko huunde haЙ—tirnde haawnagol non.

38:6.text: Mbatu maЙ“Й“e ngun hucciti, Й“e wi'ani yimЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en: Yehee, jokkon haaju mun, wata on naatu e diina Muhammadu, tabitee e reweteeЙ—i mon Й—in. Anndon ko Muhammadu noddi on e mun kon, wiide yo on rewu gooto tun, ko ko o eЙ“Й“ani, fii no o waawira'en, waЙ—ten jokkude mo.

38:7.text: Men nanaali fii ko Muhammadu noddata men e mun kon, woni bajjinЙ—ingol Allah ngol, e diina baabiraaЙ“e amen Й“en, wanaa e diina Iisaa kan. Ko men naniri mo kon wonaali, si wanaa fenaande fefindaande.

38:8.text: Kere ko e makko Alqur'aana jippintee hakkunde amen, o heertora Й—um e hoore amen, menen koohooЙ“e Й“en? Si ko woni, Й“ee sirkooЙ“e wonii e sikkitagol wayahu mo mi jippini e maaЙ—a on. Fotde Й“e meeЙ—aali lepte Allah Й—en, kono hiЙ“e Й—ayintora nennitaneede Й“e. Si Й“e meeЙ—uno lepte Й—en, Й“e haЙ“Й“itotanooko e yeddugol sirkana Allah, sikkitoo e ko O wahayini kon e maaЙ—a.

38:9.text: Kaa Й“ee sirkooЙ“e fennooЙ“e jogiti ngaluuji Й“ure Joomi maa, FooluЙ—o Mo fooletaake On, Okkoowo mo O muuyani yeЙ—ude. Wano ngalu ngu O yeЙ—irta Annabaaku, on mo O muuyani. Tawde wanaa kamЙ“e Й—um wonani, sakko Й“e yeЙ—a mo Й“e yiЙ—ani, maa Й“e Й—ala goЙ—Й—o goo.

38:10.text: Kaa ko kamЙ“e woodani laamagol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin e kon ko woni hakkunde majji? Sakko Й“e heЙ“a feere yeЙ—ugol e Й—awugol! Si ko non Й“e aaЖҙori, haray yo Й“e ЖҙeenЕӢir kala sabu no Й“e hewtiryta ka kammuuli, fii no Й“e Гұaawira ko Й“e yiЙ—i, woni yeЙ—ugol maa Й—alugol. Kono Й“e hippataa Й—um!

38:11.text: ЖҒee fennooЙ“e Muhammadu jom kisiyee on, ko konu hoyngu, fooliroyteengu wano Й—iya feddeeji fennunooЙ—i NulaaЙ“e mun, ado maЙ“Й“e.

38:12.text: Wanaa Й“ee woni ko adii fennude. WoЙ—Й“e adinoke Й“e e Й—um, woni YimЙ“e Nuuhu Й“en, e Aadi'en e Fir'awna lettiraynooЙ—o yimЙ“e Й“en, pempe.

38:13.text: Samuuda'en kadi, e yimЙ“e Luutu Й“en, e yimЙ“e Shu'aybu Й“en fow kadi fenni NulaaЙ“e mun Й“en. Ko Й“en woni feddeeji hawrunooЙ—i e fennugol yedda ko NulaaЙ“e lun addannooЙ“e.

38:14.text: Alaa e Й—in feddeeji, mo fennaali NulaaЙ“e Й“en. Lepte Allah Й—en jojji e maЙ“Й“e, fii kala Й—e tonngino haa e dumunna.

38:15.text: ЖҒee fennooЙ“e Muhammadu (yo o his) habbaaki, si wanaa wuttaandu Й—iЙ—aЙ“uru ndun ka alaandu, ndu alaa ruttorde. Lepte Й—en yana e maЙ“Й“e, si Й“e Й“e tuubaali ko adii.

38:16.text: ЖҒe woni e jalkitugol wi'a: Joomi amen, yaccinan men geЙ“al lepte amen Й—en aduna, ado Г‘alaande Darngal.

38:17.text: An NulaaЙ—o, muГұГұo e ko fennooЙ“e Й“en wowlata maa kon; annditaa jeyaaЙ—o Amen on, Daawuuda, jom cemmbe dartorЙ—e ayЙ“e mun, muГұГұoo e Й—oftagol Allah. Kanko ko o Й—uuЙ—unooЙ—o ruttoragol tuubannde Allah, e gollugol ko welata Mo.

38:18.text: Men elti pelle Й—en, ko subbunhinoda e Daawuuda, ka kiikiiЙ—e e ka weetugol.

38:19.text: Men elti kadi colli Й—in, ka Й—i mooЙ“indiraa ka weeyo, tawi Й—i fow majji, hiЙ—o Й—oftanii subbunhinanagol Allah.

38:20.text: Men semmbiniri fii laamu Makko ngun, mirin mo Men okki mo on, wonndude e waawugol foola ayЙ“e makko Й“en. Men yeЙ—i mo Annabaaku, e hawrugol e sawaaba. Men yeЙ—i Mo Й—emngal laaЙ“ungal.

38:21.text: An NulaaЙ—o, hara kabaaru wenjunooЙ“e Й“en Й—iЙ—o arii maa, tuma nde Й“e Жҙawunoo ka ganngunal Annabi Daawuuda nokku dewirdo mum!

38:22.text: Tuma nde Й“e naatirnoo e juhal, ka Daawuuda, o Й—eЖҙii Й“e. ЖҒe anndi o Й—enЖҙike, Й“e wi'ani mo: wata a hulu ! Ko men yeddondirЙ“e Й—iЙ—o; goЙ—Й—o e amen tooГұii oya. Ko yo a Гұaawir nunЙ—al hakkunde amen, wata a tooГұu, tinndinaa men e laawol focciingol ngol, woni laawol sawaaba gol.

38:23.text: Gooto e maЙ“Й“e wi'iani Daawuuda: Oo gorko, ko musiЙ—Й—o am: himo jogii baalii cappanЙ—e jeenay e jeenay, min miЙ—o jogii baalii gootii. O Й—aЙ“Й“iri lam henndingol mo ngil, o fooli lam e yewtere.

38:24.text: Daawuuda Гұaawiri hakkunde maЙ“Й“e wi'angol wullitiiЙ—o on: Pellet, musiЙ—Й—o maa on tooГұirii ma, Й—aЙ“Й“ugol Й“eydiyude baalii maa ngii, ka baali makko. Ko Й“uri Й—uuЙ—ude e hawtuЙ“e, hino tooГұindira hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, si wanaa gomЙ—imЙ“e gollooЙ“e moЖҙЖҙuЙ—i yamiraaЙ—i Й—in; Й“en Й—on, ko nunЙ—uЙ“e hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, kono Й“e Й—uuЙ—aa. Annabi Daawuuda felliti, wonnde Men jarriborii mo ngol wennjondiro. O Й—aЙ“Й“iri Joomi makko haforaneede, o suuyiri sujjugol, o tuubani Allah.

38:25.text: Men jaЙ“irani mo tuubuubuyee, yaafanagol mo Й—um. Pellet non, hino woodani ka Amen, Й“adal e moЖҙЖҙugol ruttorde laakara.

38:26.text: Ko an yo Daawuuda, Men waЙ—ii ma lomto ka hoore leydi. Siinu fiyakuuji diina e aduna Й—in, Гұaawiraa nunЙ—al hakkunde yimЙ“e Й“en. Wata a jokku mbeleeЙ—e, tuma Гұaawataa hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, sakko tooГұataa goЙ—Й—o e maЙ“Й“e, sabu tawde oya on no Й“aЙ—i maa e jeya maa e weldigal, o majjiniri Й—um, laawol Allah focciingol ngol. Anndaa, pellet, majjooЙ“e Й“en e ngol Allah focciingol, hino woodani Й“e lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e, sabu ko Й“e yejjitiri kon, Г‘alaande hasboore nden. Tawde si Й“e annditayno fii mayre, Й“e hula nde, Й“e jokkataano mbeleeЙ—e.

38:27.text: Men tagiraali kammu ngun e leydi ndin meere. ЖҠum ko sikke yedduЙ“e Й“en. Bone Yiite woodanii Й“en yedduЙ“e, sikkuЙ“e Й—um, Г‘alnde Darngal, si Й“e luttii e keeferaaku sikkitagol Allah ko boni !

38:28.text: Men waЙ—ataa Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“e jokki NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Й“e golli golle moЖҙЖҙe, wano Й“en bonnirooЙ“e ka leydi, geddi e keeferaaku. Men waЙ—ataa kadi hulirЙ“e Joomi mun Й“en, Й—oftagol yamirooje Makko, woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko, wano heeferЙ“e Й“en e naafiqiiЙ“e yooliiЙ“e e geddi Й“en. Fonnugol Й“e, ko ooГұaare nde yahdaa e Allah toowuЙ—o seniiЙ—o On. Si ko woni, O yoЙ“itiray gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, naatugol Aljanna, O leptira yedduЙ“e Й“en, naatugol Yiite. Tawde Й“e fotataa ka Allah. NjoЙ“di maЙ“Й“e kadi fotataa ka Makko.

38:29.text: Ko Deftere heewunde barki e nafa, woni ndee Alqur'aanaare, nde Men jippini e maaЙ—a. Fii no yimЙ“e Й“en taskra miijitoo maanaaji mayre, joomiraaЙ“e haqqille Й“en hisuЙ—e Й“en, waajitora.

38:30.text: Men yeЙ—i Daawuuda, geЙ—al makko Sulaymaana, neema e Й“ural Amen, ko Й“ernde makko deeЖҙira. Sulaymaana moЖҙЖҙii jeyaaЙ—o. Ko o Й—uuЙ—unooЙ—o tuubugol ruttoo e Allah.

38:31.text: Janto nde o hollanoo kiikiiЙ—eere, pucci yooЙ—uЙ—i yaawuЙ—i, darorayЙ—i taape tati, Й“amta nayaЙ“al ngal. ЖҒe seeraali e hollugol mo Й—um, haa naange muti.

38:32.text: Sulaymaana maaki: Mi Й“urnorii yiЙ—gol jawdi, wano Й—ii pucci, e dow ko mi jantotoo Joomi am kon, haa naange ngen mutoyii, mi faЙ—ii julde alansaraa nden.

38:33.text: Ruttee lam Й—ii pucci. ЖҒe rutti mo Й—i, o woni e sodirgol Й—i kaafa, ka taape(koyde) e ka daaЙ—e majji.

38:34.text: GomЙ—ii Men jarribike Sulaymaana, Men werii e jullere makko laamu nden, seytaniiru, nannditiniindu e neЙ—Й—o, ndu ardii seeЙ—a e laamu makko ngun. Refti Sulaymaana hettiti laamu makko ngun, o wuurti mbo e seytaniiru ndun.

38:35.text: Sulaymaana maaki: Joomi am, haforanam goopi am, yeЙ—aa lam laamu heeranii ngu lam, ngu haananaa goЙ—Й—o goo, Й“aawo am. Ko An Joomi, woni Й—uuЙ—ugol mawni dokke.

38:36.text: Men jaabinani mo toraare nden. Men eltani mo henndu ndun, tawi ndu wifiray neweende, e yamiroore makko, e hoore doole e yaawere mayru fow, ndu naЙ“a mo ka o faalaa.

38:37.text: Men eltani mo kadi seytanuuji Й—in, Й—i woni e ley konngol makko. No e majji mahaynooЙ—i, goЙ—Й—i Й—in mutaynooЙ—i ka maayo, Й—i yaltina kaЕӢЕӢe.

38:38.text: Seytanuuji goo, ko rawaniyanke, eltanaaЙ—i mo. ЖҠin ko dummbaaЙ—i e jolokooje, ka Й—i waawaa memminaade.

38:39.text: ЖҠum ko ko Men yeЙ—u maa, an Sulaymaana, ka jaabingol toraare maa. Okku mo yiЙ—anЙ—aa, maa Й—alaa mo faalaЙ—aa. A lamnditortaake goЙ—Й—um e mun.

38:40.text: Pellet, Sulaymaana ka Amen, ko jeyaaЙ—o e Й“adnaaЙ“e, maranaaЙ“e ruttorde moЖҙЖҙunde, woni Aljanna.

38:41.text: Janto kadi, an NulaaЙ—o, jeyaaЙ—o Amen on Ayyuuba, nde o torinoo Allah Joomi makko, wonnde: Seytaane memirii lam tampere lebtatnde.

38:42.text: Men wi'ani mo: latir tunndawal(koyngal) maa ka leydi. O waЙ—i Й—um, Й“unndu Й“ullitanii mo Й—on: tawi goЙ—Й—am Й—am, ko yaretee Й—am, o lootora Й—ama, ko o ittira lorra e tampere memunoonde mo nden.

38:43.text: Men jaabinani mo toraare. Men huncani mo lorra makko kan, Men yeЙ—i mo Й“eynguure makko nden, Men Й“eydani mo geЙ—alЙ“e e taaniraaЙ“e yeru maЙ“Й“e, yurmeende immorde e Amen, e njoЙ“di muГұal makko ngal, e fii no joomiraaЙ“e haqqille hisuЙ—e Й“en, waajitora, wonnde muГұal, adday hoyeende e warjeede.

38:44.text: Nde Annabi Ayyuuba tikkannoo debbo makko on, o woondiri piyugol mo loyru teemedere. Men wi'ani mo ontuma : Ko an Ayyuuba, nanngiri sookewo maa ngon, tamannde huЙ—o, piyiraa mo Й—um, no hunniraa woodoore maa nden, hara a firtaa nden. O waЙ—i Й—um. Men tawu mo, ko o muГұГұiiЙ—o e ko Men jarribori mo kon. O moЖҙЖҙii jeyaaЙ—o. Pellet, ko o Й—uuЙ—unooЙ—o tuubugol ruttoo ka Allah.

38:45.text: Janto kadi, an NulaaЙ—o, jeyaaЙ“e Amen Й“en Й“e Men suЙ“ii, e NulaaЙ“e Amen, Й“e Men immini: Ibraahiima, e Ishaaqa e Yaaquuba. ЖҒe laatino joomiraaЙ“e cemmbe ka Й—oftagol Allah, Й—aЙ“Й“a welayee Makko. ЖҒe woni kadi joomiraaЙ“e giiЙ—e, jaЙ“ooЙ“e goonga.

38:46.text: Men heertinanii heertinannde, nden woni wuurnugol Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, anntidugol fii galle laakara Й—en, hebilaronaЙ—e, golle moЖҙЖҙe, nodda yimЙ“e Й“en e mum.

38:47.text: Kadi, Й“ee ka Amen, ko jeyaaЙ“e e suЙ“iraaЙ“e Й—oftagol dewgol Men, suЙ“iraaЙ“e tammbitagol Nulal Amen ngal, yottina e yimЙ“e Й“en.

38:48.text: Janto kadi, an Annabiijo, Ismaa'iila geЙ—al Ibraahiima, e Ysa'u, e Zal-Kifli, mantiraaЙ“e mantoore labaande, tawde hiЙ“e hanndi e mun. Kala e maЙ“Й“e, ko jeyaaЙ“e e suЙ“aaЙ“e moЖҙЖҙuЙ“e Й“en ka Allah.

38:49.text: ЖҠum ko annditirgol Й“ee, mantoore labaande, ka Alqur'aana. Ko pellet, hino woodani hulirЙ“e Allah Й“en Й—oftagol Mo woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in, ruttorde moЖҙЖҙunde, ka galle laakara.

38:50.text: Nden ruttorde moЖҙЖҙunde, ko Aljannaaji ГұiiЙ“al, Й—i Й“e naatoyta Г‘alnde Darngal, hara dame majji no udditiranaaЙ“e, saЙ—nugol Й“e.

38:51.text: Hara ko Й“e soЙ“Й“indiiЙ“e e hoore danЙ—e cuЙ—inanaaЙ—e Й“e, hiЙ“e nodda gollooЙ“e ton Й“en, lamndooЙ“e muuyanteeЙ—i Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i serti, e noone kala e njaram, mo Й“e yiЙ—i, wano sanngara ekw.

38:52.text: Hino woodani Й“e ton: rewЙ“e raЙ“Й“inayЙ“e ndaarЙ—e mun e worЙ“e mun tun, fotЙ“e e duuЙ“i.

38:53.text: Ko Й—um woni ko fodaЙ—on e njoЙ“di laaЙ“undi, onon gomЙ—uЙ“e Й“en, Г‘alnde Darngal. Fii golle mon moЖҙЖҙe Й—en aduna.

38:54.text: Pellet, njoЙ“di jantaandi fii mun ndin Й—oo, ko arsike Amen, mo Men arsikoyta gomЙ—uЙ“e Й“en, Г‘alnde Darngal. Arsike duumotooЙ—o, mo taЖҙondirtaa, o lannataa.

38:55.text: Ko jantoo kon, ko njoЙ“di gomЙ—uЙ“e Й“en. Pellet, hino woodani kadi yawtirЙ“e keeri Allah Й—in geddi e keeferaaku, njoЙ“di sertundi; kamЙ“e on, ko ruttorde Й“urnde bonnde woodani Й“e Г‘alnde Darngal.

38:56.text: NjoЙ“di maЙ“Й“e ndin, ko Jahannama, huuЙ“itaynge Й“e, nge tampina Й“e nguleeki e ooyeende. HiЙ“e mari ton ndaЙ—Й—uЙ—e, kono Й—e bonii daЙ—Й—uЙ—e!

38:57.text: ЖҠen lepte, ko ndiyam haЙ—tuЙ—am e fatugol, e mbor- di ilatndi e Й“alli yimЙ“e lepteteeЙ“e Й“en ka Yiite. Yo Й“e sulko Й—am, sabu ko njaram maЙ“Й“e Й—am ittataa Й—onka Й—an non!

38:58.text: Hino woodani Й“e lepte goo, nannduЙ—e e majje. ЖҠen ko nooneeji, Й—i Й“e leptiroytee ka laakara.

38:59.text: Si yimЙ“e Yiite Й“en naatoyii e magge, Й“e ukkondi- royii hakkunde maЙ“Й“e e weljugol hoynindira, kala e maЙ“Й“e wona e daЙ—ndinagol e oya. WoЙ—Й“e e maЙ“Й“e wi'i: E hino fedde naatidoyay nde e mon ka Yiite. ЖҒe jaaboo Й“e: Toolii alanaa Й“e, tawde ko Й“e meeЙ—irayЙ“e Yiite ngen, no men meeЙ—irta nge.

38:60.text: Fedde jokkunooЙ“e Й“eya Й“en wi'ana koohooЙ“e Й“en: ko onon Й“ee koohooЙ“e kan, woni toolii alanaa, ko onon defi men Й—ee lepte muusuЙ—e, sabu ko mojjinirЙ—on men kon, bewinЙ—on men. Ndee ГұiiЙ“irde Jahannama Й—oo, nde bonii ГұiiЙ“irde naatooЙ“e nge fow.

38:61.text: ЖҒe wi'a kadi: Joomi amen, defuЙ—o men majjugol on, Й“aawo nde peewal ngal ari e amen, sowan mo lepte Й—en ka Yiite.

38:62.text: BewЙ“e townitiiЙ“e Й“en wi'a: Ko haЙ—i men yi'ugol ka Yiite gaa, worЙ“e Й“e men limtaynoo ka aduna, jeyaaЙ“e e bomЙ“e, hannduЙ“e e lepte?

38:63.text: Hara men falju e kon men jagitornoo Й“e kon jalnori, tawa Й“e handaa e lepte, kaa hara Й“e naatu Yiite, gite amen yawti Й“e?

38:64.text: Pellet, ko Men jantanii on kon, e ko yedduЙ“e Й“en wenjorndirta hakkunde maЙ“Й“e Г‘alnde Darngal, ko goonga mo sikke alaa e mu'un.

38:65.text: An Muhammadu, maakan yimЙ“e maa yedduЙ“e Й“en: Anndee ko mi jertinoowo on, e lepte Allah Й—en, fii wata Й—e yanir e mon, sabu yeddugol mon fenna NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Anndo kadi, alaa reweteeЙ—o hannduЙ—o e dewal, si wanaa Allah SeniiЙ—o On. Ko Kanko woni Bajjo ka mawngu e sifaaji e ka inЙ—e Mun, FooluЙ—o kala huunde. Mo huunde kala yankinii ЖҠum.

38:66.text: Ko Kanko woni JeyЙ—o kammuuli Й—in, e leydi ndin, e kon ko woni hakkunde majji. FooluЙ—o e laamu Mun, Mo gooto foolataa. Haforoowo junuubi jeyaaЙ“e Makko tuubuЙ“e Й“en.

38:67.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee fennooЙ“e : ndee Alqur'aanaare, ko kumpital mawngal fiyaaku.

38:68.text: Kono hiЙ—on Й—uurnii e on kabaaru mawnuЙ—o fiyaaku. On alaa yeЖҙЖҙitaade e makko.

38:69.text: Mi heЙ“ataano ganndal, e ko feЖҙЖҙaynoo hakkunde Malaa'ika'en, fii tagugol Aadama, si wanaano Allah wahayini Й—um e am, O anndimmi.

38:70.text: Allah wahayiniraali e am, si wanaa tawde ko mi jertinoowo on, e lepte Makko Й—en, Й“anninano on.

38:71.text: Janto nde Joomi maa daalannoo Malaa'ika'en: Min ko Mi tagiroowo Й“anndinke, woni Aadama (yo o his) immorde e loopal.

38:72.text: Si Mi fotindirii tagu makko ngun, Mi moЖҙЖҙintinii mbaadi makko ndin, mi wuttii ruuhu Am on e makko, ko yo on sujjan mo.

38:73.text: Malaa'ika'en Й—oftii yamaruyee Joomi maЙ“Й“e on, Й“e sujji Й“e denndaangal, sujuudu teddungal. Alaa mo sujjanaano Aadama e maЙ“Й“e.

38:74.text: Si wanaa Ibuliisa, o mawnitinii sujjugol ngol, o woni jeyaaЙ—o e yedduЙ“e Joomi mun.

38:75.text: Allah daali: Ko an yo Ibuliisa, ko honЙ—um haЙ—u maa sujjangol Aadama, mo tagirmi juuЙ—e Am? Ko mawnintinaare haЙ—u maa kaa hari nun ko a jeyanooЙ—o e townitaniiЙ“e Joomi mun Й“en?

38:76.text: Ibuliisa wi'i: Ko min Й“uri Aadama moЖҙЖҙude. Tawde A tagirii lam immorde e yiite, A tagirii mo kanko e loopal. Sikkugol mo wonnde yiite Й“uri loope teddude.

38:77.text: Alla daalani ibuliisa: Yaltu ka Aljanna ton, sabu ko a huЙ—aaЙ—o KiitaaЙ—a.

38:78.text: Pellet, raЙ—eede ka Aljanna fawike ma, haa Г‘alaande nЙ“jodi kuuЙ—e, nden woni Г‘alnde Darngal.

38:79.text: Ibuliisa wi'i: Nennitanam maayugol, haa Гұalnde immintaa jeyaaЙ“e Maa Й“en.

38:80.text: Allah daali: A jeyaama e nennitanaaЙ“e Й“en.

38:81.text: A nennitanaama, haa e happu anndaaЙ—o, halkeede ma.

38:82.text: Ibuliisa wi'i: Mi woondirii kattal e mawngu Maa ngun ! Ma mi majjin Й“iЙ—Й“e Aadama Й“en fow.

38:83.text: Si wanaa Й“en Й“e daЙ—ndu-ЖҠaa bone am, heertinir-ЖҠaa Й“e e rewugol Am tun.

38:84.text: Allah daali: goonga kan ko e Am, ko goonga Mi wowlata, wanaa ko lunndi Й—um.

38:85.text: Ma Mi hebbinire Jahannama Г‘ande Darngal, an e Й“en jokkuЙ“e ma, yedduЙ“e Й“en e banii Aadama Й“en fow.

38:86.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan sirkooЙ“e Й“en: Mi lamndaaki on e ko mi yottinta e mon kon, njoЙ“di. Mi wonaali kadi etotooЙ—o sincugol Й“eyda e ko mi yamiraa kon.

38:87.text: Alqur'aana wonaali, si wanaa waaju, wonannde hellifaaЙ“e yimЙ“e e jinna Й“en.

38:88.text: Ma on anndu kabaaru ndee Alqur'aanaare, wonnde ko nde goonga, Й“aawo dummunna Й“adiiЙ—o, tuma nde maayoton.

39:1.text: Jippagol Alqur'aana, ko immorde ka Allah, FooluЙ—o Mo gooto foolataa, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e tagu Mun, e toppitagol Mun e sari'a Mun. Wanaa e goЙ—Й—o goo, ko woori Mo, nde jippori.

39:2.text: Men jippinirii Deftere Alqur'aana nden e maaЙ—a, an NulaaЙ—o, e hoore goonga. Kumpite mayre fow ko goonga, Гұaawooje mayre fow kadi ko nunЙ—uЙ—e. Haray rewu Allah, wootinЙ—inaa mo, laЙ“Й“inanaa Mo tawhiidi e hoore sirku.

39:3.text: Anndee, ko Allah woodani, diina laaЙ“uka e sirku kan. ЖҒen non Й“e Й“eya jogitori yiЙ—Й“e gaanin Allah, immorde e sanamuuji e bewinayЙ—i, Й—i Й“e rewata Й“e acca Allah, Й“e wona e ngantinorgol Й—um, wiide: Men rewiraali Й—ii, si wanaa tun no Й“adinira men ka Allah, martaba, Й—i hewtina Mo haajuuji amen, Й—i tefana men ka Makko. Pellet, Allah Гұaawoyay hakkunde gomЙ—imЙ“e wootimЙ“e Mo Й“en, e yedduЙ“e sirkuЙ“e Й“en, Г‘alnde Darngal, e kon ko Й“e luutondiraynoo e mun, ka tawhiidi. Pellet, Allah fewnataa e goonga, on fenoowo dammba e Alla sirku, dullanoowo neemaaji Allah Й—in e makko.

39:4.text: Sinno Allah yiЙ—uo siforgol Й“iЙ—Й—o, O suЙ“otono ko O yiЙ—i, e tagu Makko ngun, O waЙ—a on Й—on Й“iЙ—Й—o Makko. Kono O senike O laaЙ“ii e kon ko sirkooЙ“e Й“en wowolata ! Ko Kanko woni Allah Gooto On ka jaati, e ka sijaafi e ka golle Makko. KafidiiЙ—o alanaa Mo e Й—in. Ko O FooluЙ—o tagu Makko ngun fow.

39:5.text: O tagirii kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, ГұenЖҙal yottiingal, ko fijindaaru alaa e mu'un, wano tooГұuЙ“e Й“en aaЖҙorta. Himo suddira jemma on, Гұalawma on, O suddira kadi Гұalorma on, jemma on. O elti naange ngen e lewru ndun, tawi kala majji, hino doga haa e happu eЙ“Й“aaЙ—o, on woni lannugol Й—am nguurndam. Haray anndee, ko Kanko woni FooluЙ—o, yoftotoowo ayЙ“e Mun, Mo gooto foolataa, Haforoowo junuubi kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

39:6.text: Joomi mon, onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, tagii on e fittaandu wooturu, ndun woni Aadama. Refti O tagi e makko, genndo makko on Hawaa. O tagani on gelooЙ—i e na'i e dammi e be'i, nooneeji jeetati, noone kala, gorel e deyel. Himo tagira on ka teege yumma mon en, sagara naЙ“i sagara, e nder niЙ“e reedu e rennga e jowtol. Ko On mooЙ—on tagoowo Й—um fow, woni Allah, Joomi mon. Ko Kanko laamu woodani. ReweteeЙ—o e goonga alaa, si wanaa Kanko. Ko honno ferlitoraЙ—on e rewugol ko tagataa, acca Й—on tagoowo On?

39:7.text: Si onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, on yeddii Joomi mon, anndon tun, Allah ko yondiniiЙ—o e gomЙ—inal mon, keeferaaku mon, lorrataa Mo. Ko onon Й—um lorrata, tawde Allah kan, O siforaali yamiroowo pankere e ko aГұinii. Si on yettii Mo non e neemaaji Makko Й—in, on gomЙ—inii Mo, O weltanto on, O warjoo on e Й—um. Anndon wonii bakkondinki woo, ronndantaako wokki goo. Kala e ko faggitanii hoore mun. Refti ko ka Joomi mon tun, woni ruttorde mon, Г‘alnde Darngal; O yeetitoo on, fii ko gollaynoЙ—on aduna, O yoЙ“ita on, njoЙ“di golle mon Й—en. Kanko seniiЙ—o On, pellet, ko O annduЙ—o ko woni e Й“erЙ—e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Huunde e ko woni e majje, suuЙ—aaki Mo.

39:8.text: Si lorra heЙ“ii yedduЙ—o, wono Гұawu maa sattireede arsike maa hulugol yoolaade, o toroo nde Joomi makko hunciranta mo Й—um, ruttagol e Makko, Kanko tun. Refti non, si Allah neeminirii mo huncangol mo on lorra, o yejjita fii Allah, Mo O torotonoo On, ado Й—um. O waЙ—ana Mo kafidiiЙ—i, reweteeЙ—i, ko wanaa Allah, no o majjinira woЙ—Й“e goo, e laawol Allah ngol. NulaaЙ—o, maakan sugu on Й—on : dakmitor yeddugol maa ngol, yeru ko o heddoriЙ—aa e duuЙ“i kon. Anndaa pellet, ko a jeyaaЙ—o e yimЙ“e duumoytooЙ“e ka Yiite Й“en, Г‘alnde Darngal.

39:9.text: Kaa ko on Й—oftiiЙ—o Allah, feЖҙЖҙiniroowo jemma on, sujjangol Mo, darorana Mo naafe, hara himo huli lepte laakara Й—en, himo jortrii yurmeende Joomi makko nden, kaa ko yedduЙ—o rewoowo Allah on ka saЙ—teende tun, o yedda Mo ka hoyeende, o waЙ—ana Mo kafidiiЙ—i? An NulaaЙ—o, maaku : Hara Й“en annduЙ“e ko Allah farli kon e maЙ“Й“e, hino fota e Й“en Й“e anndaa huunde e Й—um? Anndu ko taskotoo kon ko senndi Й—in feddeeji Й—iЙ—i, ko joomiraaЙ“e haqqille hisuЙ—e Й—en.

39:10.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan jeyaaЙ“e Am gomЙ—imЙ“e Lam Min e NulaaЙ“e Am Й“en: huliree Joomi mon, Й—oftagol yamaruyeeji Makko, e woЙ—Й—itagol haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko. Hino woodani moЖҙЖҙimЙ“e golle Й“en e mon aduna, moЖҙЖҙoreede e mun aduna, walleede e cellal e jawdi, ka laakara, hara ko Aljanna. Leydi Allah ndin ko yaajundi, feree e mayri, haa e nokku ka waawoton rewude Mo woo, ka goЙ—Й—o haЙ—ataa on Й—um. Anndon muГұГұiiЙ“e Й“en, Й“e timminirante njoЙ“di maЙ“Й“e ndin Г‘alnde Darngal, ko aldaa e limaneede maa etaneede, Й—uuЙ—i fanЙ—i.

39:11.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maaku: min mi yamiraama rewugol Allah tun, mi laЙ“Й“inana Mo dewal ngal.

39:12.text: O yamirimmi kadi, wonugol arano e jebbilaniiЙ“e Mo Й“en, yankinaniiЙ“e Mo e Й—ee mofte.

39:13.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maaku: min miЙ—o huli, si mi yeddii Allah, mi Й—oftaaki Mo, nde lepte Г‘alaande Mawnde nden heЙ“atammi, nden woni Г‘alnde Darngal.

39:14.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maaku : min ko Allah tun mi rewata, mi laЙ“Й“inana Mo dewal. Wanaa goЙ—Й—o goo, mi waЙ—anta Й—um.

39:15.text: Onon sirkooЙ“e Й“en non, rewee ko yiЙ—uЙ—on e sanamu, hara wanaa Kanko. ЖҠum ko kammbaa ! An NulaaЙ—o, maaku: ko woni hayruЙ“e Й“en tigiri, ko Й“en tawata Й“e hayrinii ko'e maЙ“Й“e e Й“eynguureeji maЙ“Й“e, Й“e ronkoya yiidoyde e maЙ“Й“e, si Й“en naatoyii Aljanna, maa Й“e naatidoya e maЙ“Й“e ka Yiite, tawa Й“e yiitidataa poomaa. Anndee ko Й—um tigiri, woni hayrere Й“anngunde nden, ko sikke alaa e mu'un.

39:16.text: Curki e kippoodi wulndi, hino woodirani Й“e senngo dow maЙ“Й“e, e senngo ley maЙ“Й“e. Ko Й—ee lepte jantaaЙ—e fii mun, woni ko Allah hulЙ“irnirta jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Ko onon yo jeyaЙ“Й“e Am, kori huliree Lam, Й—oftagol yamiraaЙ—i Am, woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Am.

39:17.text: ЖҒen woЙ—Й—itiiЙ“e e rewugol sanamuuji Й—in, e kala ko wonaa Allah, Й“e tuubi Й“e ruttii ka Allah, welo-welo Aljanna no woodani Й“e, tuma Й“e maayata, e ka genaale, e Г‘alnde Darngal. An NulaaЙ—o, wewlinir jeyaaЙ“e Am Й“en.

39:18.text: ЖҒen nanooЙ“e Konngol Й“en, Й“e senndindira ko moЖҙЖҙi e ko boni e maggol, Й“e jokka ko Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude e maggol. Ko Й“en siforiiЙ“e Й—in sifaaji, woni Й“e Allah fewniri peewal Й“en, ko Й“en woni joomiraaЙ“e haqqille hisuЙ—e Й“en.

39:19.text: Kala mo konngol lepte jojjiri e mun, sabu duumagol mo e yeddugol e majjere, a alanaa on feere, an NulaaЙ—o, fii no feewira. E ko an NulaaЙ—o, waawata daЙ—ndude wa'uЙ—o non e Yiite ngen?

39:20.text: Si ko Й“en hulirЙ“e Joomi mun, Й—oftagol yamiraaЙ—i Makko, woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko, hino woodani Й“e kuЙ“eeje toowuЙ—e fawondiri ka Aljanna, hara canЙ—i no ila senngo ley majje. Ko Allah fodi Й“e Й—um! Allah non firtataa fodoore Makko.

39:21.text: HiЙ—on anndiri seedagol mon, wonnde Allah saaЖҙinirii ndiyam ka kammu, O naadi Й—am e Й“ulli e canЙ—; refi O yaltinira Й—am ndiyam, remuru seedudnu noone, refti O yoorna ndu, yi'aandu an seeditiiЙ—o on, hindu soyЙ—i, Й“aawo ndu wonunoo haako; refti O waЙ—a Й—um ko muncitaa. Pellet, wonii e ko jantaa koo, waaju, wonannde joomiraaЙ“e haqqille Й“en hisuЙ—e Й—en.

39:22.text: E ko on mo Allah yaГұГұani Й“ernde mun fii lislaamu, o feewi e mun, hara himo e Й“anngannduyee immorde ka Joomi makko, wa'ata wa yoora Й“enrdeejo e jantagol Allah? ЖҒe fotataa fes. Tawde ko feewuЙ“e Й“en, daЙ—ata, yoora Й“erЙ—e'en e jantagol Allah .ЖҒen wonii e majjere Й“anngunde.

39:23.text: Allah jppinii e NulaaЙ—o Makko on Muhammadu (yo o his) Alqur'aana, Й“urnde moЖҙЖҙude yewtere. O waЙ—i nden nanndude ka goonga, e ka moЖҙЖҙugol, e ka yuЙ“Й“ondirgol e waasde luutondirde. Fillayeeji e Гұaawooje hino Й—uuЙ—i e mayre, kaГұum e fodooje e kammbaa, e sifaaji yimЙ“e goonga, e yimЙ“e meere Й“en ekn. Guri Й“en hulooЙ“e Joomi mun, hino riЙ“ira sabu nanugol kammbaaji ko woni e mayre, refti guri e Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e deeЖҙira jantagol Innde Allah, tuma Й“e nani jortagol e welo-welo ko woni e mayre. Koo ko jantaa e ko Alqur'aana battinta, ko peewal Allah, ngal O fewnirta mo O muuyani, O hoyna mo Mo O muuyani. Kala non mo Allah fewnaali, haray fewnoowo mo alaa.

39:24.text: Kere on mo Allah fewni aduna, O naadoya mo Aljanna laakara, on fotay wa yedduЙ—o maayi e keeferaaku on, naatoyoowo Yiite, tonnge juuЙ—e e koyЙ—e, mo tawata waawoytaa daЙ—irde Yiite ngen, si wanaa tun o fewtinira nge yeeso makko ngon? TooГұuЙ“e Й“en feliree wi'aneede ontuma: meeЙ—en non hannde, kon ko wonunoЙ—on faggitorde geddi e keeferaaku. Ko njoЙ“di mon ndin nii.

39:25.text: Mofte adinooЙ“e Й“ee sirkooЙ“e, kadi fennuno NulaaЙ“e mun, lepte Й—en ardirani Й“e juhal, fewndo ka Й“e so'aa-anndude, sakko Й“e hebiloranaЙ—e tuubugol.

39:26.text: Allah meeЙ—iriЙ“e sabu Й—um, lepte koyeera, e jaasere, e wirtere ka ngurrndam aduna. Pellet, ko lepte laakara Й—en habbitiiЙ—e Й“e, Й“uri mawnude e tiiЙ—e, si tawno hiЙ“e anndunoo.

39:27.text: GomЙ—ii Men piyanii yimЙ“e Й“en, e ndee Alqur'aanaare jippinaande e Muhammadu (yo o his) noone kala e mise moЖҙЖҙere e bone, goonga e meere, gomЙ—inal e keeferaaku, ekn. ЖҠum fow, ko jortagol nde Й“e waajitora, Й“e huutora goonga kan, Й“e sela meere nden.

39:28.text: Men waЙ—i nde Alqur'aanaare, janngeteende e haala Aarabu, nde aldaa e ooГұaare maa jiЙ“i-liЙ“i, jortagol no Й“e hulira Allah, jokkugol yamiraaЙ—i Makko, woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko.

39:29.text: Allah waЙ—ii misal hakkunde sirkoowo e wootinЙ—inoowo, woni gorko mo lurruЙ“e hawti : si o weltinii woЙ—Й“e Й“en, Й“eya Й“en monoo, o wona e jiЙ“i-liЙ“i. Oya gorko, ko laaЙ“anЙ—o gorko goo, kanko tun, himo anndi ko deeЖҙinta oya, e ko wallinta mo Й“ernde. ЖҒen worЙ“e Й—iЙ—o, Й“e fotataa e misal. Yettoore woodanii Allah. Kono ko Й“uri Й—uuЙ—ude e maЙ“Й“e, Й“e anndaa. Ko waЙ—i si Й“e kafida e Allah, goЙ—Й—um goo.

39:30.text: Pelelt, an NulaaЙ—o, ko a maayoowo, kamЙ“e kadi ko Й“e maayooЙ“e, feere mun alaa.

39:31.text: Refti onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, Г‘alnde Darngal, ko ka Joomi mon yeddondiroyton, e ko pooЙ—ondiraynoЙ—on fii mun, goonguЙ—o on seerta e meerenteejo on.

39:32.text: Alaa Й“urЙ—o tooГұude haa hewta on dammbuЙ—o e Allah, ko yahdaani e Makko, wano waЙ—angol Mo kafidiiЙ—o, maa genndo maa Й“iЙ—Й—o. Alaa kadi Й“urЙ—o tooГұde wa on fennuЙ—o wahyu on mo NulaaЙ—o Allah on (yo o his) addi. E wonaa ka Yiite woni jaaЖҙorde yeddude Allah Й“en, Й“e yeddi ko NulaaЙ—o Makko on addi kon? Pellet, ko non woniri, weerde maЙ“Й“e, ko nder ton.

39:33.text: On non arduЙ—o e goonga, ka haala e ka kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e, foti ko Annabaajo maa goЙ—Й—o goo, o gomЙ—ini Й—um, o gollitiri. Ko Й“en woni gomЙ—uЙ“e Й“en tigiri, Й—oftiiЙ“e yamaruyeeji Joomi mun, woЙ—Й—itiiЙ“e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko.

39:34.text: Hino woodani dakammeeji duumotooЙ—i, ka Joomi maЙ“Й“e; ko Й—um woni njoЙ“di moЖҙЖҙinooЙ“e golle Й“en, ka Joomi maЙ“Й“e e jiyaaЙ“e.

39:35.text: Fii no Allah momtirana Й“e, ko Й“uri bonnde e ko Й“e gollaynoo e geddi aduna, tawde Й“e tuubii e mun, Й“e ruttike e Joomi maЙ“Й“e. O yoЙ“itira Й“e njoЙ“di maЙ“Й“e ndin, ko Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude e kon ko Й“e gollunoo.

39:36.text: Mbela Allah siforaali yonugol jeyaaЙ—o Makko on Muhammadu (yo o his) ka fiyakuuji makko diina e aduna, O duГұana mo ayЙ“e makko? Pellet, O yonay mo. HiЙ“e hulЙ“inire, an NulaaЙ—o, sabu majjere e Й—aayre maЙ“Й“e, Й—in sanamuuji, Й—i Й“e rewata Й“e acca Allah, wiide Й—i memirte bone. Kala non mo Allah hoyni, O hawrinaani mo fewnude, haray fewnoowo on Й—on, alaa.

39:37.text: Kala non mo Allah hawrindini e peewal, alaa haЙ—tanЙ—o majjinde mo. Mbela Allah siforaaki wonnde FooluЙ—o Mo gooto foolataa, Jom leptugol Й“en heefereЙ“e yedduЙ“e Mo? Ko non woniri, Ko O FooluЙ—o, Jom lepte.

39:38.text: Pellet, si an NulaaЙ—o, a lamndike Й“ee sirkooЙ“e: Ko hommbo tagi kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin? Ma Й“e wi'u: Ko Allah tagi Й—i. Awa maakan Й“e, feГұГұinanaaЙ“e, ronkere reweteeЙ—i maЙ“Й“e Й—in: Yeetee lam fii Й—ii sanamuuji, Й—i rewoton gaanin Allah; si Allah faandanike lorra, hara Й—i waaway ittannde lam on lorra? Maa si O faandanike lam moЖҙЖҙere Makko, taw si Й—i haЙ—tani haЙ—ugol lam nden moЖҙЖҙere Makko? Maakan Й“ee: Allah tun yonii lam, ko e Makko mi fawi kala fiyaaku am, ko e Makko kadi tun, woni ko wakkiltoo Й“en tuuginotoo.

39:39.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maaku: Ko onon yo yimЙ“e am, golliree no waalorani on, sirkangol Allah. Min ko no Joomi am yamirimmi non, mi gollirta, woni noddugol e tawhiidi, laЙ“Й“inana Mo dewal. Aray ka anndon, battane laawol kala e me'en.

39:40.text: Aray nde anndon, ko hommbo lepte aduna hoynayЙ—e aroyta e muuЙ—um, lepte duumiiЙ—e jippoyoo e makko Г‘alnde Darngal, hara Й—e taЖҙondirtaa, sakko Й—e lanna.

39:41.text: Men jippinirii Deftere Alqur'aana nden, e maaЙ—a an NulaaЙ—o, fii yimЙ“e Й“en, e hoore goonga, no jertiniraaЙ“e. Kala feewuЙ—o, ko hoore makko o feewani, Allah nafitortaa peewal makko, tawde ko O yondiniiЙ—o e Й—um; kala kadi majjuЙ—o, haray lorra mun on, ko e makko yiltotoo, Й—um lorrataa Allah. A wonaali wakkilaaЙ—o Й“ee, fii daranagol Й“e haa Й“e feewa. Ko yottingol tun, fawi maa e maЙ“Й“e.

39:42.text: Allah hino Жҙettita pittaali Й—in, tuma lajal majji timmata, e Й—in Й—i lajal mun timmaali, fewndo Й—oyngol majji. O jogitii Й—in Й—i O Гұaawani maayde, O accita Й—iya, Й—i O Гұaawani heddagol, haa e dumunna happaaЙ—o ka Makko. Pellet, wonii e ko sifaa koo, maandeeji, wonannde Й“e miijitotooЙ“e, tinndinayЙ—i, wonnde waЙ—oowo Й—um On, hino hattani wuurnitugol yimЙ“e Й“en, Й“aawo maayde maЙ“Й“e, fii hasbugol Й“e, yoЙ“a Й“e.

39:43.text: Kaa Й“ee sirkooЙ“e jogitor sanamuuji maЙ“Й“e Й—in, tefooji, Й—i Й“e jortorii nafa, hara wanaa Allah? An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“e: On jogitoto tefoojo, hay si tawii Й—i jeyanaa on, onon e majji, hay huunde, kadi Й—i haqqiltaa, ko wowlataa, Й—i nanataa, Й—i yi'ataa, Й—i nafataa, Й—i lorrataa?

39:44.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee sirkooЙ“e: Tefoore nden fow, ko Allah heeranii. Gooto tefataa ka Makko, si wanaa e duЕӢayee(sakkitoore) Makko. O jaЙ“antaa kadi tefoore, si wanaa mo O welanaa. Ko Kanko tun, laamagol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, woodani. Refti ko ka Makko tun, woni ruttorde mon, Г‘alnde Darngal, fii hasbeede, yoЙ“ee. O yoЙ“a kala mon, e golle mun.

39:45.text: Si fii Allah tun jantaama, Й“erЙ—e sirkooЙ“e, Й“e gomЙ—inaa laakara e ummital e hasboore e njoЙ“di Й“en, wona e tamagol. Si fii sanamuuji Й—i Й“e rewata Й—in, gaanin Allah jantaamaa, e jaka yoo, hiЙ“e wewla weltoo.

39:46.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maaku: Yaa Allah, tagirЙ—o kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, no Й—i anndiranooka, AnnduЙ—o ko wirnii e ko feeГұi, Mo huunde e Й—in suuЙ—aaki. Ko An tun, Гұaawata hakkunde jeyaaЙ“e Maa Й“en, Г‘alnde Darngal, e kon ko Й“e luutondiraynoo e mun ender aduna. ЖҒannginaa goonguЙ—o e meerente, malaaЙ—o e malkisaaЙ—o.

39:47.text: Si tawno no woodannoo tooГұirЙ“e sirko e geddi Й“en, kala ko woni kon ka leydi, immorde e jawle, Й“e sottorayno Й—um, lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e Й—en Й—e yi'oyta, Й“aawo ummital maЙ“Й“e. Kono Й“e alaa feere Й—um. Hay si Й“e heЙ“u feere mun, Й“e jaЙ“anoytaake. Ontuma, feeГұirana Й“e ka Allah, noone e lepte, Й—o Й“e tijjanooki.

39:48.text: Boneeji sirku e geddi, Й—i Й“e faggitinoo Й—in feГұana Й“e, lepte Й—e Й“e jalkitaynoo Й—en huuЙ“ita Й“e, Й—en lepte Й—e Й“e hulЙ“inirtenoo, Й“e wona e jalkitugol.

39:49.text: Si Гұawu maa baasal ekn heЙ“ii neЙ—Й—o keefeero, o nadda Men, fii huncangol mo Й—um. Refti si Men okkii mo neema callal maa jawdi, o wona e wi'ugol: Anndee ko Allah okkiri lam Й—um, ko anndugol Mo, miЙ—o hanndi e mun. Kono ka goonga, Й—um ko jarrabuyee e ndaarndo; kono Й“urЙ“e Й—uuЙ—ude e heeferЙ“e Й“en, Й“e anndaa Й—um, Й“e mantora neema Allah on e maЙ“Й“e.

39:50.text: GomЙ—ii heeferЙ“e adinooЙ“e Й“en, wowliino ngol konngol. Kono kon ko Й“e faggitotonoo e jawle e kuЙ“eeje, duncanaano Й“e hay huunde.

39:51.text: NjoЙ“di boneeji sirku e geddi, Й—i Й“e wonunoo e faggitagil Й—in, memi Й“e. TooГұirЙ“e ko'e mun Й“en sirku e geddi, jeyaaЙ“e e Й“ee Й—oo Й“en, njoЙ“di boneeji Й—i Й“e faggitotonoo Й—in, memiroyaЙ“e, wano yawtuЙ“e Й“en. ЖҒe wonaa fuutotooЙ“e Allah, wanaa fii foolugol Mo!

39:52.text: SirkooЙ“e Й“en wi'ay ko Й“e wi'i, hara Й“e anndaa wonnde Allah no yaГұГұana arsike on, mo O muuyani, fii jarribagol ontigi, ndaara si o yettay kaa o yedday? Ko wano non kadi O Й“iЙ—tiniranta mo O muuyani, jarribagol fahin, ontigi, ndaara si o muГұГұoto kaa o monanto eЙ“Й“oore Allah nden? Pellet, wonii e ko jantaa koo, fii yaГұГұaneede maa Й“iЙ—tinanee arsike, maandeeji, wallitirЙ—o taskagol fii Allah, wonannde yimЙ“e gomЙ—inooЙ“e. Tawde ko Й“en nafitorta Й—in maandeeji, wanaa yedduЙ“e yawtooЙ“e Й—en Aayeeje, hara hiЙ“e Й—uurnoo Й—e.

39:53.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan jeyaaЙ“e am yawtirЙ“e keeri Й“en sirku e geddi: wata on taЖҙo e yurmeende Allah nden, e ko O haforanta on junubaaji mon. Tawde pellet, Allah ko haforoowo junuubi Й—in fow, wonannde kala tuubanЙ—o Mo. Ko Kanko woni Haforoowo junuubi tuubayЙ“e Й“en, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e.

39:54.text: Tuubee ruttoron ka Joomi mon, golle moЖҙЖҙe, jebbilanoЙ—on Mo, ado lepte laakara Й—en arde e mon, hara on heЙ“irtaa sanamuuji Й—in wanaa yimЙ“e mon Й“en, faabo.

39:55.text: Jokkee ndee Alqur'aanaare, tawnde ko Й“urnde moЖҙЖҙude e ko Joomi mon jippinani on, haa e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, gollitiron nde, woЙ—Й—itoЙ—on e ko nde haЙ—i, ado lepte Й—en ardude on e juhal, hara on so'aa anndude, sakko hebiloron tuubugol.

39:56.text: WaЙ—ee ko yamiraЙ—on, ado wonkii wi'oyde tuma nimse nafataa janngo: Ee nimse am, e ko mi welsindii e Allah, geddi e keeferaaku. Ki tabintina wonnde ko jeyano e jalkitaynooЙ“e yimЙ“e gomЙ—imЙ“e Й—oftii Й“en.

39:57.text: Maa ki ngantinora kodduruyee, ki wi'ia: Si Allah feewnuno mi, mi jeyeteno e huluЙ“e Mo Й“en. Mi Й—oftoo yamirooje Makko, mi woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko.

39:58.text: Maa ki yelora wi'ugol, nde ki yi'ata lepte Й—en: Si feere ruttagol aduna no woodannoo lam, mi tuubanayno Allah, mi jeyee e moЖҙЖҙinooЙ“e golle Й“en.

39:59.text: ЖҠum gasatira no faaliraЙ—aa non feewirde ! Tawde Aayeeje Amen Й—en aruno e maaЙ—a, fennuЙ—aa Й—e, mawnintiniЙ—aa, laatiЙ—aa jeyaaЙ—o e yedduЙ“e Allah Й“en, yeddi Aayeeje Makko Й—en e NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

39:60.text: Г‘alnde Darngal, a yi'oyay fenunooЙ“e e hoore Allah Й“en, Й“e dammbi sirku e Й“iЙ—Й—o e Makko, hiЙ“e Й“awli geece, hakkee ko Й“e malkisaa. Wonaa ka Jahannama woni jaaЖҙorde mawnintinaniiЙ“e gomЙ—ingol Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on? Ko ton tigiri, woni weerde maЙ“Й“e.

39:61.text: Allah hisinira huluЙ“e Mo Й—oftii haЙ—itii Й“en, e lepte, O naadaugol Й“e ka maloore Aljanna. Bone lepte memataa Й“en, wanaa kamЙ“e woni ko sunoytoo, fii ko feЖҙЖҙi e geЙ“oy aduna.

39:62.text: Ko Allah woni TaguЙ—o kala huunde, wanaa goЙ—Й—o goЙ—Й—um goo. Ko Kanko kadi woni FawtiiЙ—o kala huunde, O Toppitoo fii mayre, O waЙ—ira nde, no O haajiri.

39:63.text: Ko Kanko tun, jogitii ngaluuji moЖҙЖҙere Й—in, ka kammuuli e ka leydi. Himo yeЙ—a Й—i Mo O haajani, O Й—awa Й—i Mo O muuyi. YedduЙ“e Aayeeje Allah Й“en non, ko Й“en woni hayruЙ“e Й“en. Tawde Й“e faЙ—ii gomЙ—ingol e nguurndam maЙ“Й“e Й—am aduna, e hoore Й“e naatoyay Й“e heddoo ka Yiite, laakara.

39:64.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee sirkooЙ“e jokkuЙ“e maa, fii rewugol sanamuuji maЙ“Й“e Й—in: E on yamiray lam, onon Й“ee majjuЙ“e fii Joomi mun, nde mi rewata ko woori Allah? Anndee ko Allah tun, hanndi e reweede, mi rewataa, si wanaa Kanko.

39:65.text: GomЙ—ii Allah wahayinii maaЙ—a, an NulaaЙ—o, O wahayini kadi e NulaaЙ“e adinooЙ“e ma Й“en: si a kafidii e Allah goЙ—Й—um goo, ko pellet, golle maa moЖҙЖҙe Й—en bonay; jeyeЙ—aa e hayruЙ“e aduna Й“en, sabu hayruЙ“e diina maa, hayroyaa kadi e lepte laakara Й—en.

39:66.text: Ko Allah tun, si a reway, hara a kafidaali Mo e goЙ—Й—um goo, jeyeЙ—aa e yettooЙ“e Mo neemajji Й—i O neemini e maaЙ—a Й—in.

39:67.text: SirkooЙ“e Й“en mawniniraali Allah, no O haaniri mawninireede, tuma Й“e kafidunoo Mo e taguuji Makko lo'uЙ—i, Й“e yejjiti wonnde no jeyaa e kattane Makko ngal, tawde leydi ndin e ko woni mayri kon : immorde e pelle e leЙ—Й—e e canЙ—i e boyli, fow e mun, Г‘alnde Darngal, ko e tamannde Makko wonata, kammuuli Й—in jeeЙ—iЙ—i kadi, fow majji taggiree Гұaamo Makko ngon. Senayee woodanii Mo ! O laaЙ“ii O toowii kon ko sirkooЙ“e Й“en fiЙ“ata wowla e Makko.

39:68.text: Г‘alnde Malaa'ikaajo on wuttoyta ka Allaandu, kala ko woni ko kammuuli e ka leydi fow maayay, refti wuttee e mayru Й—iЙ—aЙ“ol, fii ummital, tawaa Й“e fow Й“e wuurnitaama, hiЙ“e darii habbii ko Allah waЙ—ata Й“e.

39:69.text: Leydi ndin jalbirora, tuma JeyЙ—o ndi On feeГұiroyta Гұaawugol hakkunde jeyaaЙ“e Й“en. Talki golle Й—in sennditee, AnnbaaЙ“e Й“en addee, mofte Muhammadu (jom kisiyee Й—en) Й“adine, fii seeditanagol Й“eya AnnabaaЙ“e, e yimЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en. Allah Гұaawira nunЙ—al hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, wonaa Й“e tooГұeteeЙ“e nden Г‘alnde: goЙ—Й—o Й“eydantaake bonЙ—i, o Й—uytantaake moЖҙЖҙi.

39:70.text: Allah yoЙ“ita wonki kala, ko ki golli kon, woni bone maa moЖҙЖҙere. Ko Kanko Allah Й“uri anndude ko Й“e gollata kon. Huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo e kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e, woni bonЙ—e maa moЖҙЖҙe. O yoЙ“itoyay Й“e Й—um, nden Г‘alnde.

39:71.text: Malaa'ika'en soggiroya yeddunooЙ“e Allah Й“en, ka Jahannama, dente-dente, hoynaaЙ“e. Si Й“e hewtii nge, dame magge udditaneeЙ“e, Malaa'ika ayninaaЙ“e nge Й“en jaЙ“Й“ora Й“e feloore wi'ugol: Enee, NulaaЙ“e jeyaaЙ“e e mooЙ—on, hewtaano on, Й“e no jannganaynoo on Aayeeje Allah, jippinaaЙ—e e mon Й—en, Й“e rentinira on, hawrugol e lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e Г‘alnde Darngal? ЖҒe qirritora wi'ugol: Ko non woniri, ko woni tun, hari Konngol lepte ngol jojjiino e yedduЙ“e Й“en. Menen non, ko men yeddunooЙ“e.

39:72.text: ЖҒe wi'iranee hoyneede, e teЖҙagol yurmeende Allah e yaltugol ka Yiite ton: naatiree dame Jahannama ngen, lutton ton poomaa. Nge bonii weerde mawnintiniiЙ“e toownitanii goonga Й“en.

39:73.text: Malaa'ika'en Й—owira muumini'en, hulunooЙ“e Joomi mun, Й—oftinooЙ“e yamaruyeeji Makko, Й“e woЙ—Й—itii e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko, teddungal, haa ka Aljannaaji, hara ko dente-dente. Si wonii Й“e hewtii ton, dame majji udditanaama Й“e, Malaa'ikaaЙ“e ayninaaЙ“e ton Й“e wi'ana Й“e: on hisii e kala lorra, maa ko huloton. ЖҒerЙ—e mon e golle mon laaЙ“ii. Naatiree Alajanna on, duumagol ton poomaa.

39:74.text: Muumini'en si naadaama Aljanna, Й“e wi'a: Yettoore woodanii Allah, laatinanЙ—o men fodoore Makko, e Й—emЙ—e NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, wonnde O naadoyay men Aljanna. O ronini men leydi Aljanna ndin, meЙ—en hoЙ—ira e mayri, kala ka men yiЙ—i. Mbarjaari gollunooЙ“e golle moЖҙЖҙe Й“en, fii Allah, ndi moЖҙЖҙii barjaari.

39:75.text: Nden Г‘alnde, a yi'ay Malaa'ika'en no fiiltii Arsi ki, hiЙ“e senina yettugol Joomi maЙ“Й“e, e huunde ko heeferЙ“e wi'ata Mo, kon ko haananaa Mo. Allah Гұaawira nunЙ—al, hakkunde tageefo ngon fow: O teddina Mo muuyanaaЙ“e Й“en, O lepte lepteeЙ“e Й“en. Ontuma wi'ee: Yettoore woodanii Allah, JeyЙ—o tageefo ngon, e fii ko O Гұaawiri kon yurmeende, hakkunde jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, O heertinani yurmeende Makko nden, muumini'en, yedduЙ“e Й“en hanndi e lepte Й—en.

40:1.text: Haa, Miim: yewtere fii sugu Й—ee kalfe yewtanooma ka simoore Al Baqarah.

40:2.text: Jippinde Quraana ummaade e Alla TedduЙ—o O hay gooto foolataa Mbo gannduЙ—o maslahaaji jiyaaЙ“e Makko e dow NelaaЙ—o Makko.

40:3.text: Haforoowo junubaaji Й—in, JaЙ“anoowo kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, SaЙ—tuЙ—o leptugol saliiЙ—o tuubannde Mo, Jom neema yaajuЙ—o. ReweteeЙ—o e goonga alaa, si wanaa Kanko tun, ko ka Makko woni ruttorde nden, Г‘alnde Darngal. O yoЙ“a Й“e, ko Й“e hanndi kon.

40:4.text: Alaa ko wennjata e Aayeeje Allah Й“annginЙ—e tawhiidi e goonga NulaaЙ“e Й“en, si wanaa yedduЙ“e Allah Й“en, sabu jiiЙ“agol haqille maЙ“Й“e. Wata a sunor hoditoraa, ko Й“e woni dillirde jawle e neemaaji. Ko Й“e nennitiranaa, ko hebilangol Й“e fewjana Й“e.

40:5.text: Ado Й“ee Й—oo, hari yimЙ“e Nuuhu Й“en fenniino NulaaЙ“e mun, feddeeji Й—in Й“aawo maЙ“Й“e kadi fenni Aadi, e Samuuda, e yimЙ“e Luutu Й“en, e wonndiiЙ“e Madyana Й“en e Fir'awna'en fow. Mofte kala e Й“en Й—on, himmiri nanngugol NulaaЙ—o mun on, fii warugol mo. ЖҒe wennjiri meere maЙ“Й“e, fii bonnitirgol nde goonga kan. Kono Mi nanngi Й“e. Tesko no nanngal Am waЙ—tinirnoo e maЙ“Й“e. ЖҠum ko lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e wonunoo.

40:6.text: Ko wano Allah Гұaawiri non fii halkugol Й—en mofte fennunooЙ“e NulaaЙ“e mun, Konngol Joomi maa ngol, an NulaaЙ—o, jojjiri e yedduЙ“e Й“en: wonnde pellet, ko Й“e yimЙ“e Yiite.

40:7.text: Malaa'ikaaЙ“e ronndiiЙ“e Arsi Joomi maa kin, an NulaaЙ—o, e Й“eya wonЙ“e sera makki, hiЙ“e laЙ“Й“ina Joomi maЙ“Й“e, e kon ko hanndaa e Makko, Й“e gomЙ—ina Mo, Й“e Й—aЙ“Й“ira Mo, haforangol gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“en, Й“e wi'a: Joomi amen, ganndal Maa ngal e yurmeende Maa nden, yaajanii kala huunde. Yawtan tuubuЙ“e Й“en, junuubi maЙ“Й“e Й—in, Й“en jokkuЙ“e diina Maa kan, daЙ—ndaa Й“e kadi, Yiite ngen.

40:8.text: Mala'ika'en wi'a kadi: Joomi amen, naadu gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en ka Aljannaaji ГұiiЙ“al, Й—in Й—i foduЙ—aa Й“e, waЙ—tidaaЙ“e e kala moЖҙЖҙinnoЙ—o golle, immorde e baabiraaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e, e genndiraaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e, e Й“iЙ—Й“e maЙ“Й“e. Pellet, ko An woni FooluЙ—o Mo gooto foolataa, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e eЙ“Й“oore e toppitannde Mun.

40:9.text: DaЙ—ndaa Й“e golle maЙ“Й“e bonЙ—e Й—en, hara A nanngitiraali Й“e Й—en. Kala non daЙ—nduЙ—aa Й—um Г‘alnde Darngal, haray A yuminii mo. Ko Й—um woni malal mawnungal ngal sugu mun alaa.

40:10.text: YedduЙ“e e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, noddoyte Г‘alnde Darngal, tuma Й“e naadaa ka Yiite, Й“e tikkana ko'e maЙ“Й“e, haa Й“e feГұГұina Й—um, wonnde: ko tikkere Allah nden, Й“uri mawnude e dii ko tikkanЙ—on ko'e mon kon, tuma noddetenoЙ—on aduna, e fii gomЙ—ingol Allah, yeddon Mo, kafidon Mo e reweteeЙ—i goo.

40:11.text: YedduЙ“ Й“en qirritoo junuubi maЙ“Й“e Й—in, ka qirritagol tuuba nafataa, Й“e wi'a: joomi amen, A warii men laawi Й—iЙ—i, tawde men woodanooko, taguЙ—aa Men, refti waruЙ—aa men Й“aawo Й—um. WuurnituЙ—aa men kadi laawi Й—iЙ—i, ka tawnoo men woodanooka, e ka wuurnituЙ—aa men Й—on ummital. Haray men qirrike junuubi Й—i men faggitii Й—in. Taw si laawol no woodi, ka men yaltira e ngee Yiite, men yiltitoo aduna, fii moЖҙЖҙingol golle amen, jaЙ“anaa men Й—e?

40:12.text: ЖҠen lepte Й—e leptiraЙ—on, ko sabu tawde si Allah tun noddanooma, hara O sirkanaaka, on yeddayno Й—um, waЙ—anon Mo kafidiiЙ—i; si tawii non O kafidaama, gomЙ—inon. Awa Гұaawoore nden, ko Kanko tun heeranii, On ToowuЙ—o e Jaati Mun e Kattal Mun, MawnuЙ—o e hoore kala huunde.

40:13.text: Ko Allah tun woni holliroowo on maandeeji Makko Й—in, ka tatteeri(jookli) e ka wonkiiji, ko Й“annginana on, Kattal e Gootaagu Makko. O jippinirana on toЙ“o ka kammu, fii ko arsikireЙ—on, immorde e puЙ—i e remuruuji ewk. Alaa non waajitoroowo maandeeji Allah Й—in, si wanaa tuuboowo laЙ“Й“ina, ruttoo e Makko on.

40:14.text: Onon Й“ee gomЙ—imЙ“e, rewiree Allah, laЙ“Й“inirangol Mo dewal e toraare, hara on kafidaali Mo e goЙ—Й—um, hay si tawii Й—um welataa heeferЙ“e Й“en.

40:15.text: Ko Kanko hanndi heertinaneede toraare e Й—oftaare, tawde ko O Jom darjaaji toowuЙ—i Й“anngi e kala tagu Makko ngun, JeyЙ—o Arsi mawЙ—o on. Himo jippinira wahayu on, e mo o muuyani e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, no pittaali maЙ“Й“e wuurira, Й“e wuurniira Й—um woЙ—Й“e goo, e fii yo jertinir yimЙ“e Й“en, Г‘alnde Darngal, nde aramЙ“e e sakkitiiЙ“e hawroyta.

40:16.text: Г‘alnde Й“e feeГұoyta nden, hara hiЙ“e mooЙ“ondiri e nokku gooto. Huunde suuЙ—otaako Allah, e fii maЙ“Й“e, wanaa kamЙ“e, wanaa golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en, wanaa kadi njoЙ“di maЙ“Й“e ndin.

40:17.text: Hannde, wonkii kala yoЙ“ete ko feggitii e golle: woni moЖҙЖҙere maa bone. TooГұe woo alaa hannde, tawde ko Allah Гұaawata, pellet, Allah ko yaawuЙ—o hasboore jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, tawde Himo huЙ“indii fii maЙ“Й“e.

40:18.text: JertinirЙ“e an NulaaЙ—o, Г‘alaande Darngal nden, Й“adiinde, hewtunde. Tawde ko Й“adii fow, ko ko hewti. Nde Гұalnde, hakkee ko Й“erЙ—e Й—en ngoЖҙata, Й—e Жҙawtiray ka konondol, hara Й“e waawataa haalude, si wanaa mo Allah duЕӢanii e maЙ“Й“e. TooГұirnooЙ“e sirku e geddi Й“en non, Й“e heЙ“oytaa giЙ—o maa musiЙ—Й—o, wanaa kadi tefoowo jaЙ“anteeЙ—o, si Й“e aru heЙ“ude on.

40:19.text: Allah no anndi ko gite Й—en janforta e ndaarЙ—e, e ko Й“erЙ—e Й—en suuЙ—ata. Huunde e mun wirnaaki Mo.

40:20.text: Allah ko nunЙ—al Гұaawirta, O tooГұirtah goЙ—Й—o Й—uytangol mo moЖҙЖҙi maa Й“eydangol mo bonЙ—i. ЖҠin Й—i sirkooЙ“e Й“en rewata ko wanaa Allah, hay huunde Й—i Гұaawataa, tawde Й—i jeyaa huunde. Pellet, ko Allah woni Nanoowo haala jeyaaЙ“e Mun, Yi'oowo annuyeeji e kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e. O yoЙ“itoya Й“e Й—um.

40:21.text: Hara Й“ee sirkooЙ“e yiilaaki ka leydi, Й“e taskoo no mofte fennunooЙ“e ado maЙ“Й“e Й“en wa'unoo? Ko battane bonЙ—e wonunoo. Hara le Й“een no Й“urnoo Й“e tiiЙ—ude Й“e doole e batteeji accaaЙ—i ka leydi, wano kubeeje Й—e Й“ee ronki battinorde. Kono Allah halkitirno Й“e junuubi maЙ“Й“e Й—in, Й“e heЙ“aano daЙ—ndoowo Й“e e lepte Allah Й—en.

40:22.text: Ko waЙ—i kon Й“e leptaa, ko tawde NulaaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en addanayno Й“e hujjaaji Й“annguЙ—i, immorde ka Allah, Й“e yedda Allah, Й“e fenna NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. E ko Й“e doolnunoo kon fow, Allah naangiri Й“e lepte, O halki fii maЙ“Й“e, tawde pellet, ko O DoolnuЙ—o, SaЙ—tuЙ—o leptugol yedduЙ—o Mo, fenni NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

40:23.text: GomЙ—ii Men nulirii Muusaa, Aayeeje Amen bannguЙ—e Й—en, e hujja Й“annguЙ—o.

40:24.text: Men nuli mo haa e Fir'awna, e jaagoraaЙ—o makko on Haamaana, e Qaaruuna. Kono Й“e wi'i: Muusaa, ko mbileejo, Й—uuЙ—uЙ—o fenaande, e wi'ugol ko o NulaaЙ—o.

40:25.text: Nde Muusaa addannooЙ“e hujjaaji Й“annginЙ—o goonga makko kan, Fir'awna wi'i:waree Й“iЙ—Й“e gomЙ—imdimЙ“e Й“en e makko, heddon rewЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en, hoynugol Й“e. Kono ko heeferЙ“e Й“en fewjirta Й—uytugol limoore gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en wonaali, si wanaa mulata yaha, hara batte alanaa Й—um.

40:26.text: Fir'awana wi'i: Accee mi wara Muusaa, fii yaggingol mo, e no o noddira Joomi makko, fii haЙ—ugol lam Й—um. Min mi haajaaka e Й—um. Mi hulu wata o waylu diina mon kan, maa o feГұГұina bonnere ka leydi, woni warugol e bonnital.

40:27.text: Nde Fir'awna gaynunoo kammbude, Annabai Muusaa maakani mo: Mi moolorii daЙ—ndiragol JeyЙ—o lam On, jeyi on, e bone mawnintinaniiЙ—o goonga e gomЙ—inal, mo gomЙ—inaa Г‘alnde Darngal, e hasboore e lepte ko woni ton.

40:28.text: Gorko goo, gomЙ—inЙ—o Allah, jeyaaЙ—o e yimЙ“e fir'awna Й“en, suuЙ—unooЙ—o yimЙ“e mun, gomЙ—inal makko ngal, saliiЙ—o fellitgol maЙ“Й“e warugol Muusa ngol, o wi'i: E on waray gorko mo bonnaa, si wanaa fii o wi'i: Ko Allah woni Joomi am? Hara le o addanii on hujjaaji e Й“annganduyeeji, sembinayЙ—i goonga makko kan, wiide ko O nulaaЙ—o Joomi makko? Si tawii ko o fenuЙ—o, haray lorra fenaande makko nden, ko e makko yantata; si tawii non ko goonguЙ—o, haray yoga e ko o kammbirani on kon e lepte aduna Й—en, heЙ“ay on. Pellet, Allah fewanataa e goonga, on tawЙ—o no yawti keeri Allah Й—in, fefindii fenaande, baki e Makko, Kanko e NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

40:29.text: Ko onon yo yimЙ“e am, laamu no woodani on hanndi, hiЙ—on fooli e leydi Misra ndin. Kono ko hommbo daЙ—ndata en, e lepte Allah Й—en, si Й—e arii e men, tuma waruЙ—en Muusaa? Fir'awna wi'i: Ko feere am nde mi Гұaawi nden, jokketee. Mi yi'ii feere warugol Muusaa, fii haЙ—ugol bone e bonnere. Mi tinndintaa on, si wanaa sawaaba.

40:30.text: GomЙ—inЙ—o on laaЙ“ani reedu, o wi'itani yimЙ“e makko Й“en: min on miЙ—o hulani on - si tawii on arii Muusaa e hoore tooГұe e jaggitere - lepte, sugu lepte yimЙ“e feddeeji Й“en, haЙ“unooЙ“e NulaaЙ“e mun adinooЙ“e, Allah halki Й“e.

40:31.text: Wano mbowka yeddaynooЙ“e fenna NulaaЙ“e Й“en, sugu yimЙ“e Nuuhu Й“en, e Aadi'en, e Samuuda'en, e arunooЙ“e Й“aawo maЙ“Й“e Й“en. Allah halkirno Й“e, yeddugol maЙ“Й“e fenna NulaaЙ“e Й“en. Allah non faandanaaki jeyaaЙ“e Й“en, tooГұe. Ko junuubi maЙ“Й“e, O leptirta Й“e, njoЙ“di hawrondindi e golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en.

40:32.text: Ko onon yo yimЙ“e am, min miЙ—o hulani on, Г‘alnde Darngal: nden Г‘alaande, nde yimЙ“e Й“en noddindiroyta, sabu Й“adandiral maa jaahu, sikkugol Й“e Й—um nafay nden Г‘alnde hulЙ“iniinde.

40:33.text: Г‘alnde huccitiroyton, dugugol, sabu kulol Yiite ngen, hara daЙ—ndoowo on e lepte Allah Й—en, alanaa on nden Г‘alnde. Kala mo Allah hoyfii fii mun, O Й—awi mo gomЙ—ingol, haray fewoowo mo alaa. Tawde ko Allah tun fewnata.

40:34.text: GomЙ—ii Yuusufu ardaniino on ko adii, e hujjaaji Й“annginЙ—i wootinЙ—ingol Allah, kono on seeraano e sikkitagol fenna, kon ko o addani on. Haa nde o faatinoo, Й“eyduЙ—on sikkitagol, wi'uЙ—on. Allah nultataa NulaaЙ—o goo, Й“aawo makko. Ko wano majjirЙ—on nii e goonga kan, Allah majjinirta kala yawtoowo keeri Allah Й—in, sikkitiiЙ—o e gootaaku Makko.

40:35.text: ЖҒen wenjirooЙ“e Aayeeje Allah Й—en, fii bonnitirgol Й—e ko aldaa e hujja arЙ—o Й“e, kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en mawnii tikkere mun ka Allah, e ka gomЙ—imЙ“e Mo gomЙ—ini NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Ko wano Allah notiri non e Й“erЙ—e Й“ee wenjooЙ“e Й—oo Й“en, O notirta e Й“ernde kala mawnintinaniiЙ—o goonga, dundarankeejo feewnetaake e peewal maa e jam.

40:36.text: Fir'awna wi'ani jaagoraaЙ—o makko on Haaamaana: Ko an yo Haamaana, mahanam soorooru toowundu, no gasa ka mi yottoo Й—ate Й—en.

40:37.text: Fii no mi yottora e laawi ЖҙawruЙ—i Й—in ka kammuuli, mi Жҙeewa ReweteeЙ—o Muusaa, On mo o aaЖҙii wiide On ko ReweteeЙ—o e goonga, sabu miЙ—o sikki ko o fenoowo. Ko wano non Fir'awna cuЙ—iranaa, kuuЙ—e makko bonЙ—e Й—en, no de Й—aЙ“Й“iraynoo Haamaana, waЙ—ugol Й—um; o sakkaa e laawol goonga ngol, o heddii e laawol majjere ngol. Feere Fir'awna nden non - e fii feГұГұingol meere makko nden, bonnita goonga Muusaa kan - wonaali, si wanaa e hayrere, tawde ko nimse e sooyugol ko sakkitori, e makiseede poomaa.

40:38.text: Gorko gomЙ—inЙ—o, jeyaaЙ—o e yimЙ“e Fir'awna Й“en, woni e laaЙ“angol reedu, o wi'i: Ko onon yo yimЙ“e am, jokkee lam, mi tinndina on, laawol sawaaba e peewal ngol.

40:39.text: Ko onon yo yimЙ“e am, anndee Й—am nguurndam aduna, ko dakamme daЖҙondirayЙ—o, wata Й—um hodu on. Anndon ko laakara on, e neemaaji makko duumotooЙ—i Й—in, woni galle ГұiiЙ“al Й—en. Golliranee Й—en Й—on, Й—oftagol Allah, rentoo e soklirgol nguurndam mon aduna, yejjiton gollangol laakara.

40:40.text: Mo gollii ko boni, o yoЙ“itetaake, si wanaa yeru Й—um, o Й“eydantaake lepte e mun; kala kadi golluЙ—o ko moЖҙЖҙi, hara ko fii Allah, woni gorko maa debbo, hara ko gomЙ—inЙ—o Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Й“en Й—on e sifaaji maЙ“Й“e yettiniiЙ—i Й—in, Й“e naatoyay Aljanaa, Г‘alnde Darngal, Й“e arsikoyee ton: kon ko Allah fodunooЙ“e e dimЙ—e, e neemaaji duumiiЙ—i, Й—i taЖҙondirtaa, ko aldaa e limoore.

40:41.text: Ko onon yo yimЙ“e am, ko waЙ—i si miЙ—o nodda on e daЙ—irgol hayrude aduna e laakara, gomЙ—inde Allah, golla ko moЖҙЖҙi, onon, hiЙ—on noddira lam naatugol Yiite, Й—aЙ“Й“irgol lam, yeddugol Allah?

40:42.text: HiЙ—on noddira lam e meere mon nden, jortagol no mi yeddira Allah, mi kafida Mo e goЙ—Й—um goo, ko mi alanaa Й—um ganndal, hara non, min miЙ—o noddude on e gomЙ—ingol Allah, FooluЙ—o Mo gooto foolataa, Surroowo bakkaatu, MawnuЙ—o haforangol jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

40:43.text: Tigi on, ko noddoton lam e mun kon, gomЙ—ingol Й—oftoo, noddaandu goonga woo alanaa Й—um aduna, wanaa laakara, gooto kadi noototaakau ndun noddaandu. E wonnde pellet, ruttorde men nden, en fow, ko ka Allah tun, e wonnde fantimЙ“e geddi Й“en, ko Й“en woni yimЙ“e Yiite Й“en, duumotooЙ“e ton, Г‘alnde Darngal.

40:44.text: ЖҒe salii laaЙ“al makko reedu ngal, o wi'ani Й“e: aray nde anndoton, fii ko mi laaЙ“ani on reedu kon, nimson salaare mon nden; min non, mi fawii fiyaaku am on fow, e Allah Gooto On. Pellet, huunde suuЙ—aaki Allah, e golle jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

40:45.text: Allah daЙ—ndi mo, boneeji Й—i Й“e fewjunannoo mo Й—in, fii warugol mo, O huuЙ“itiri yimЙ“e Fir'awna Й“en, lepte yoolagol. Allah yooli mo kanko Fir'awna, e konu maЙ“Й“e ngun fow.

40:46.text: Caggal Й“e maayii, Й“e weeЙ“itoyte e Yiite ngen, ka genaale maЙ“Й“e, bimmbi e kiikiiЙ—e. Г‘alnde Darngal darotoo (wi'oyte): Naadee jokkunooЙ“e Fir'awna Й“en, ka Й“uri saЙ—tude e lepte. Sabu ko Й“e yeddiraynoo kon, Й“e fenna Й“e falatoo e laawol Allah ngol.

40:47.text: Janto an NulaaЙ—o, tuma jokkunooЙ“e Й“en yeddondiroyta e jokkanooЙ“e Й“en, ka nder Yiite, Й“e wi'ana Й“en jokkonooЙ“e towninitinooЙ“e: Menen, ko onon men jokkunoo aduna, e majjere, taw si on duncanay men geЙ“al e lepte Allah Й—en, ronnditanoЙ—on men Й—e?

40:48.text: TownitiniiЙ“e jokkanooЙ“e Й“en kadi wi'a: En fow meeЙ—en, jokkunooЙ“e e jokkanooЙ“e fow, hino e Yiite ngen, gooto ronnditantaako goЙ—Й—o goo, geЙ“al e lepte laakara Й—en. Tawde pellet, Alah Гұaawii hakkunde jeyaaЙ“e Й“en. O yoЙ“iti kala e ko hanndi e mun kon.

40:49.text: WonaaЙ“e lepteede Й“en ka Yiite fow wi'ana Malaa'ika'en, ayninaaЙ“e Yiite ngen, tuma Й“e taЖҙii yaltugol e magge, ruttoo aduna, fii tuubugol: Toranee men Joomi mon, O hoynana men Гұalaande wootere, e Й—ee lepte duumiiЙ—e.

40:50.text: AyninaaЙ“e Jahannama Й“en jaaboo heeferЙ“e Й“en: NulaaЙ“e mon Й“en ardanaano on e hujjaaji Й“annguЙ—i? HeeferЙ“e Й“en wi'a: oo'owoye ! ЖҒe arduno e mun few ! Malaa'ika'en jaabitoo: awa toree, onon tigiri. Menen men tefantaa keefeero. Kono toraare heeferЙ“e Й“en wonaali, si wanaa e meere. Tawde Й“e jaЙ“irantaake, sabu keeferaaku maЙ“Й“e ngun.

40:51.text: Pellet, Men wallay NulaaЙ“e Amen Й“en, e gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ“e Mun Й“en, aduna Й—oo, Й“anngingol hujjaajii maЙ“Й“e Й—in, foolna Й“e e ayЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en. Men walliroya Й“e kadi Г‘alnde Darngal, naadugol Й“e Aljanna, leptira yeddondiraynooЙ“e e maЙ“Й“e aduna Й“en, naatugol Yiite, Й“aawo nde AnnabaaЙ“e e Malaa'ikaaЙ“e e gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en fow seeditaade, wonnde Nule Й—en yottino e mofte Й—en.

40:52.text: Г‘alnde nde tooГұunooЙ“e geddi e keeferaaku Й“en nafiroytaa hoore-maЙ“Й“e, ngatinagol, hara kuddi Allah no woodani Й“e nden Гұalnde, e galle bonЙ—e ka laakara, ka Й“e hawroyta e lepte muusuЙ—e.

40:53.text: GomЙ—ii Men okkii Muusaa ganndal, ngal o fewnirta Й“iЙ—Й“e Israa'iila Й“en, e goonga, Men waЙ—i Tawreetaare nden, Deftere roneteende, hakkunde Й“iЙ—Й“e Israa'iila Й“en.

40:54.text: Ko nde fewnaynde e goonga, e waaju wonannde joomiraaЙ“e haqqille hisuЙ—e Й“en.

40:55.text: An NulaaЙ—o, muГұГұo e ko yimЙ“e maa fennata maa, Й“e lorre, sabu pellet, ko Allah fodu maa e ballal e semmbineede kon, ko goonga mo sikke alaa e mu'un. Insinoraa fii haforaneede junuubi maa Й—in, subbunhinoraa yettugol Joomi maa, gila irfaj, haa mir.

40:56.text: Pellet,wennjirooЙ“e e Aayeeje Allah Й—en,fii bonnitirgol Й—e ko aldaa e hujja wanaa daliil,ko fii tun faale townitagol mawnintinanoo goonga kan, kono Й“e hewtataa e ko Й“e faalaa kon.An NulaaЙ—o,moolor Allah,tawde pellet,ko Kanko woni Nanoowo haalaaji jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en,Yi'oowo kuuЙ—emaЙ“Й“e.Huunde e Й—in suuЙ—aaki Mo,O yoЙ“itoyay Й“e Й—um.

40:57.text: Pellet, ko tagugol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, sabu cemmbe e yaГұji majji, Й“uri mawnude e dii tagugol yimЙ“e Й“en. TagirЙ—o Й—i mawneendi majji On, ko hattanЙ—o wuurnitugol maayЙ“e, fii Гұaawugol Й“e yoЙ“ita Й“e. Kono ko Й“uri Й—uuЙ—ude e yimЙ“e Й“en, Й“e anndaa, sakko Й“e waajitora Й—um, Й“e waЙ—a Й—um dalil, e fii ummital.

40:58.text: BunЙ—o fotataa e yi'oowo, wanaa gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“en, goongini NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, Й“e moЖҙЖҙini golle, woni ko fotata e bonnirЙ—o golle mun, finnde bonnde e geddi. Kono on waajitortaa, si wanaa seeЙ—a. Tawde si Й—on waajitoraynoo ko yoni, on anndayno ko senndi Й“en Й—iЙ—o, fii no yaccoron wa'ude wa gomЙ—imЙ“e golli moЖҙЖҙuЙ—i yamiraaЙ—i Й—in, no jortoron weleyee Allah.

40:59.text: Pellet, Darngal, ngal Allah wuurnitata maayЙ“e Й“en e mun, fii Гұaawugol Й“e yoЙ“a, ko ko arata, feere mun alaa, sikka alaa e Й—um. Kono Й“urЙ“e Й—uuЙ—ude e yimЙ“e Й“en, Й“e gomЙ—inaa Й—um. Ko Й—um haЙ—i Й“e hebilanagol nden Гұalnde

40:60.text: Joomi mon, onon yimЙ“e Й“en, daali: heertinanee Lam, Min tun, dewal e toraare, Mi jaabinana on toraare mon, Mi yawtana on, Mi yurmina on. MawnintinantooЙ“e Й—um Й“en, ko pellet, Г‘alnde Darngal, Й“e naatoyay Jahannama, ko Й“e hoyЙ“e jaasinaa.

40:61.text: Ko Allah woni waЙ—iranЙ—o on jemma on, niЙ“Й“itirЙ—o, fii ka deeЖҙon fowtoЙ—on e mun, O waЙ—irani on nyalorma on, ndayginЙ—o, fii ka gollon e mun. Pellet, Allah ko Jom Й“ural mawngal e yimЙ“e Й“en, tawde O timminirii neemaaji Makko Й—in e maЙ“Й“e, no feeГұiri e no wirnori. Kono ko Й“uri Й—uuЙ—ude e yimЙ“e Й“en, Й“e yettataa Allah, e naamaaji Makko Й—in, dow maЙ“Й“e.

40:62.text: Ko On mooЙ—on Allah, waЙ—anЙ—o on Й—in neemaaji, woni TaguЙ—o kala huunde. Wanaa goЙ—Й—o goo. RewteeЙ—o e goonga alaa, si wanaa Kanko. Ko honno ferlisoraЙ—on gaay e rewugol Mo, jokka rewugol ko nafataa lorrataa?

40:63.text: Ko wano Й“ee Й—oo ferlisoraa non e gomЙ—ingol Allah rewa Mo Kanko tun, Й“eya yeddaynooЙ“e Aayeeje Allah tindinayЙ—i fii tawhiidi on, ferlisortenoo e kala jamaanu, Й“e feewataano e goonga, Й“e hawrataano e sawaaba.

40:64.text: Ko Allah woni waЙ—anЙ—o on, onon yimЙ“e Й“en, ndii leydi, dunngal ГұiiЙ“irgal mon, O waЙ—i kammu ngun, ГұeГұaangu dow mon, hara yanataa e mon, O mbaadini on ka renngaaji yumma mon'en - O moЖҙЖҙini mbaadiiji mon, - O arsiki on laaЙ“uЙ—i dagiiЙ—i. Ko On mooЙ—on, neeminirЙ—o on Й—um, woni Allah Joomi mon. Senaare heewii e JeyЙ—o tageefo ngon fow. ReweteeЙ—o alanaa ngo, si wanaa Kanko seniiЙ—o On.

40:65.text: Ko Kanko woni wuurЙ—o Mo maayataa On. reweteeЙ—o e goonga alaa, si wanaa Kanko. Noddiree Mo dewal e toraare; faandoЙ—on Mo Kanko tun, hara on kafidaali Mo e taguuji Makko goo. Yettoore woodanii Allah, JeyЙ—o tageefo ngon.

40:66.text: Maaku an NulaaЙ—o: min, Allah haЙ—ii lam rewugol, Й—in Й—i rewoton, hara wanaa Allah; sanamuuji Й—i nafataa, Й—i lorrataa. Mi haЙ—a Й—um, nde hujjaaji Й—in arunoo e am, fii Й“anngingol meere rewugol Й—in. Allah yamiri lam kadi, nde mi jebbilantoo Mo, Kanko tun, ka dewal. Tawde ko Kanko woni JeyЙ—o tageefo ngon fow. JeyЙ—o ngo alaa, si wanaa Kanko.

40:67.text: Ko Kanko tagiri ben mon Aadam, immorde e mbulmbulndi, refti O tagiri on Й“aawo Й—um, e toЙ“Й“ere maniiyu, refti e heЙ—Й—ere ЖҙiiЖҙam, refti Й“aawo Й—um, O yaltiniri on e deedi neeniraaЙ“e mon Й“en, entoy tokosoy, fii no yottoron cukaaku ngun, mawnon haa wonton nayeeЙ“e, - kono hara woЙ—Й“e e mo'on, maayay ado Й—um, - haa no yottoron dumunna happaaЙ—o ka Allah, mo Й—uytotaako Й“eydotaako, belajo'o, ka nafitoron Й—ii hujjaaji fii anndugol kattal e gootaagu Allah ngun.

40:68.text: Ko Kanko Allah tun, woni wuurnoowo, e waroowo. Si O haajii e fiyaaku, ko O wi'anay mo tun: "wonu", o wona.

40:69.text: A tinaali, an NulaaЙ—o, Й“en wennjondirteeЙ“e e Aayeeje Allah Й—en, fennooЙ“e Й—e, e hoore ko Й—e feeГұi kon? a ЕӢalЙ—ay e maЙ“Й“e, e ko Й“e Й—uurnotoo e goonga kon, hoore ko ka feeГұi kon.

40:70.text: ЖҒen fennuЙ“e Alqur'aana, e ko Men immindini kon e NulaaЙ“e Amen Й“en, immorde e goonga, aray ka Й“en fennooЙ“e annda, battane e bone mun.

40:71.text: ЖҒe anndoyay battane fennugol maЙ“Й“e ngol, tuma nde kolmboyaa ka daaЙ—e maЙ“Й“e, Й“e jolkiree ka koyЙ—e, halfinaaЙ“e lepte Й—en daasa Й“e.

40:72.text: ЖҒe ndaasee e ndiyam wulЙ—am haa fati, refti Й“e huЙ“Й“ee Yiite ngen.

40:73.text: Refti Й“e feliree wi'aneede: ko honto woni reweteeЙ—i mon, Й—i aaЖҙinoЙ—on wonnde on sirkiraniiЙ—i dewal?

40:74.text: Ko honto Й—in sanamuuji, Й—i rewaynoЙ—on, hara wanaa Allah, Й—i nafataa Й—i lorrataa? HeeferЙ“e Й“en jaaboo: ЖҠi majjitorike men. Wurin, men wonaano aduna, e rewugol ko hanndunoo e reweede. Ko wano Й“ee Й—oo majjiri non, Allah majjinirta yedduЙ“e goonga Й“en, e kala nokku e jamaanu.

40:75.text: ЖҒe wi'anee : ko fawi on Й—ee lepte, ko sabu ko weltoraynoЙ—on kon, sirku on, e ko wewlaynoЙ—on kon fantinon.

40:76.text: Natiree dame Jahannama Й—en, luttugol ton poomaa. Nge bonii jaaЖҙorde townitaniiЙ“e goonga Й“en.

40:77.text: MuГұГұo, an NulaaЙ—o, e ko yimЙ“e maa lorrete Й“e fenne kon. Pellet, ko Allah fodu maa wallude kon, ko goonga, mo sikke alaa e mu'un. Ko si Men holle yoga e ko Men kammbirani Й“e kon e lepte, e nguurndam maa, wano feЖҙЖҙirnoo ka hare Badri, maa hara Men Жҙettite ado mun, fow e mun, ko ka Amen tun, woni ruttorde maЙ“Й“e, Г‘alnde Darngal, Men yoЙ“a Й“e golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en, Men naatnaЙ“e ka Yiite, Й“e lutta ton poomaa.

40:78.text: GomЙ—ii Men imminii NulaaЙ“e Й—uuЙ—uЙ“e, haa e yimЙ“e mun, ado maa, an NulaaЙ—o. ЖҒen fenni Й“e, Й“e lorri Й“e. Kono Й“e muГұГұii e Й—in fow. Hino e Й“en NulaaЙ“e, Й“e Men fillani maa fii mun; hino e maЙ“Й“e, Й“e Men fillanaaki ma fii mun. Haananaa NulaaЙ—o woo, nde o addanta yimЙ“e makko Й“en Aaya, immorde e Joomi makko, si wanaa hara ko e duЕӢayee Makko. Ko heeferЙ“e Й“en lamndotoo mofte maЙ“Й“e Й—en addugol Aaya, ko tooГұe. Si yamiroore Allah fii Гұaawugol sennda hakkunde NulaaЙ“e Й“en e yimЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en arii, ko nunЙ—al Гұaawirtee. HeeferЙ“e Й“en halkee, NulaaЙ“e Й“en daЙ—ndee; nden Гұalnde, yimЙ“e meere Й“en sooyira yollugol ko'e maЙ“Й“e e halkaare, sabu keeferaaku maЙ“Й“e ngun.

40:79.text: Ko Allah woni waЙ—anЙ—o on gelooЙ—i Й—in, e na'i Й—in e dammi Й—in, ko waЙ—Й—oron yoga e majji, Гұaamon tebbeeli yoga majji.

40:80.text: Hino woodani on e Й—ii neemoraaЙ—i, nafooreeji Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i, heyЙ—itayЙ—i jamaanu kala. HiЙ—on heЙ“ira Й—i, kala ko faaleteЙ—on e haajuuji, wano setagol ka njorndi e ka maayo.

40:81.text: Allah no holla on maandeeji tindinayЙ—i e kattal e gootaagu Makko ngun. E ko honЙ—um e maandeeji Allah Й—in, woni yeddoton, Й“aawo nde yananaЙ—on, wonnde ko Й—i maandeeji Makko?

40:82.text: E Й“ee fennooЙ“e yiilaaki ka leydi, Й“e taskoo ko honno battane Й—eya mofte fennunooЙ“e ado maЙ“Й“e wattinirnoo, Й“e waajitora Й—um? GomЙ—ii Й—en mofte no Й“urnoo Й“e jawle e cemmbe, Й“e Й“uri Й“e batteeji accaaЙ—i ka leydi. Kono kon ko Й“e faggotonoo e cemmbe, duncanaano Й“e goЙ—Й—um, nde lepte Allah Й—en arunoo halkugol Й“e.

40:83.text: Nde NulaaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en addaannoЙ“e hujjaaji Й“annguЙ—i Й—in, Й“e fenni Й—i, Й“e welaa jogitagol ganndal ko woni ka maЙ“Й“e kon, lunndiingal ko NulaaЙ“e Й“en addani Й“e kon. Ontuma, Й“e huuЙ“itiraa lepte Й—e Й“e jalkitaynoo Й—en, si NulaaЙ“e Й“en hulЙ“iniriino Й“e Й—e.

40:84.text: Nde Й“e yi*unoo lepte Amen Й—en, Й“e jaЙ“i ka jaЙ“ugol nafataa, Й“e wi'i: Men gomЙ—inii Allah tun, men yeddii Й—in kafidaaЙ—i e sanamuuji Й—i men rewaynoo, hara wanaa Kanko.

40:85.text: Kono gomЙ—inal maЙ“Й“e wonaAno ko nafata Й“e, fewndo Й“e haccinoo lepte Amen Й—en no jippoo e maЙ“Й“e; Й—um ko laawol yawtunoongol e jayaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, wonnde gomЙ—inal nafataa Й“e, tuma Й“e yi'i lepte Й—en. YedduЙ“e Й“en sooyiniri ko'e-maЙ“Й“e Й—on nden Гұalnde, nde Й“e halkiranoo sabu ko Й“e yeddiri kon Allah, Й“e salii tuubude ado Й“e yi'ude lepte Й—en.

41:1.text: Haa, Miim: Yewtere fii sugu Й—ee kalfe yawtiino ka cortewol Al Baqarah.

41:2.text: Ndee Alqur'aanaare, ko jippornde iwri ka Allah, YurmeteeЙ—o, HinnotooЙ—o On.

41:3.text: Ko Deftere fensitiraande Aayeeje mun, no timmiri, nde waЙ—aa janngeteende e aarabu, wonannde yimЙ“e anndooЙ“e Й“en, tawde ko Й“en nafitorta maanaaji mayre, e peewal e goonga ko woni e mayre.

41:4.text: Ko nde wewlinirayЙ“e gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, ko Allah fodi Й“e kon e mbarjaari teddundi, hulЙ“iniraynde kadi, lepte Allah muusuЙ—e Й—en. Kono Й“urЙ“e Й—uuЙ—ude Й“en e maЙ“Й“e, Й—uurnii nden; watti Й“e nanataa peewal ko woni e mayre kon, sakko Й“e jaЙ“a.

41:5.text: ЖҒe wi'i: ЖҒerЙ—e amen Й—en no uddaa sokaa, Й—e haqqiltaa e ko noddataa men e mun kon, noppi amen Й—in kadi, no teddiri pahu, Й—i nanataa Й—um. Heedo hino hakkunde amen e maa, ko wowlataa kon hewtataa men. Haray wonu e golle maa; menen kadi men wona e gole amen, men jokkataa ma.

41:6.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan satta feere'en Й“ee: anndee ko mi neЙ—Й—anke wano mon. Allah wahayinii e am, wonnde ReweteeЙ—o mon on ka goonga, ko ReweteeЙ—o gooto pet, woni Kanko Allah. haray ГұiiЙ“ee e ngol laawol Й—on, Й—aЙ“Й“iron Mo haforaneede junuubi mon. Halkaare e lepte woodanii sirkooЙ“e rewooЙ“e ko wanaa Allah Й“en, e kafidoowЙ“e e Makko Й“en.

41:7.text: ЖҒe jonnataa Й“en zakka jawle maЙ“Й“e Й—en, hara kadi hiЙ“e yeddi fii laakara, e neemaaji mun duumotooЙ—i, e lepte mun muusuЙ—e.

41:8.text: Pellet, Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Й“e golli moЖҙЖҙuЙ—i yamiraaЙ—i Й—in, hino woodani Й“e njoЙ“di duumotoondi ndi taЖҙatah, woni Aljanna.

41:9.text: An NulaaЙ—o, felu sirkooЙ“e Й“en, maakanaa Й“e: ko honnЙ—um yeddiranton taguЙ—o On leydi ndin nder balЙ—e Й—iЙ—i : - woni Alat e tenen, - waЙ—anon Mo yeradiiЙ“e ko rewetee, hara wanaa Kanko? Awa ko On woni JeyЙ—o tageefo ngon fow.

41:10.text: O waЙ—i pelle e dow mayri, ko ndi tabitira, hara ndi dillaali. O eЙ“Й“i nguureeji yimЙ“e Й“en e kulle Й—en, e mayri, nder balЙ—e nayi timmirЙ—e Й—eya balЙ—e Й—iЙ—i, woni: talaata e alarba, wonannde kala faalaaЙ—o lamndaade fii mun.

41:11.text: Refti O faandanii tagugol kammu ngun, tawi ontuma, hingu curkini, O daalidani ngu kanngu e leydi ndin: ardiree yamiroore Am, Й—oftagol, maa karhegol, hakkunde mun. ЖҠi wi'idi: Men arii ko men Й—oftiiЙ“e. Alaa ko men faalantee hoore amen, hara wanaa e yiЙ—i Maa, yo Joomi amen.

41:12.text: Allah timminiri tagugol kammuuli Й—in, e nder balЙ—e Й—iЙ—i: woni Alkamisa e Juma; ko e Й—en balЙ—e Й—iЙ—i, woni tagugol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, timmiri balЙ—e jeegoo. Ontuma Allah yamiri kammu kalal, fiyaaku maggu, immorde e yamaruyee Й—oftagol Mo rewa Mo. Men cuЙ—iniri kammu aduna ngun, koode, Men reeni ngu e ko seytanuuji Й—in wujjata heЙ—oo kon. Ko jantaa koo fow, ko eЙ“Й“oore FooluЙ—o Mo gooto foolataa, AnnduЙ—o fii tagu Makko ngun.

41:13.text: Si Й“e salike gomЙ—innde ko arduЙ—aa e mun kon, haray wi'u Й“e, an NulaaЙ—o: mi jertinirii on lepte, sugu lepte jippinooЙ—e e Aadi'en yimЙ“e Huudu Й“en, e Samuuda'en yimЙ“e Saaalih, tuma Й“e fennunoo Й“en Й—iЙ—o.

41:14.text: Nde NulaaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en ardirannooЙ“e waaju wootu ngun, gooto kala e maЙ“Й“e, hiЙ“e yamira wiide, wata Й“e rewu dey, si wanaa Allah tun. HeeferЙ“e Й“en e maЙ“Й“e wi'i: si Joomi amen haajuno jippinnde Malaa'ikaaЙ“e NulaaЙ“e e amen, O waЙ—ayno Й—um. Awa menen on, ko men yedduЙ“e ko nulaЙ—on fii mun kon, tawde ko on yimЙ“e honooЙ“e amen.

41:15.text: Aadi'en yimЙ“e Huudu Й“en kan, e hoore ko Й“e yeddi Allah kon, Й“e mawnintinii kadi ka leydi, ko aldaa e goonga, Й“e woni e tooГұugol heddii Й“e Й“en, Й“e Й—aynitorii doole maЙ“Й“e Й—en wi'ugol: hara ko hommbe Й“uri men doole? Hakkee ko Й“e felliti e doolnugol. Allah ruttiri ngol wiide Й“e: E Й“ee yi'aali Й“e seeditii, wonnde Allah taguЙ—o Й“e On no Й“uri Й“e tiiЙ—ude doole? ЖҒe woni e yeddugol Aayeeje Allah Й—e NulaaЙ—o maЙ“Й“e Huudu addi Й—en.

41:16.text: Men wurti henndu bittinndu e maЙ“Й“e, e ГұalaaЙ—e maЙ“Й“e kiitaade, sabu lepte Й—en; fii no Men meeЙ—inira Й“e lepte hoynooje Й—e Й“en ka nguurndam aduna. Pellet, ko lepte laakara habbitiiЙ—e Й“e Й—en, Й“uri sattude wonnde hoynayЙ—e Й“e, kadi, Й“e heЙ“oytaa ton faabo, ko daЙ—nda Й“e lepte Й—en.

41:17.text: Samuuda'en non, yimЙ“e Saalih Й“en, Men fewnirno Й“e Й“annginangol Й“e laawol goonga ngol; kono Й“e suЙ“ii majjere nden e dow peewal ngal. lepte jaasinooje Й—en nanngiri Й“e, sabu keeferaaku e jeddi ko Й“e faggitotonoo.

41:18.text: Men danЙ—ni gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ“e Mun Й“en, huliraynooЙ“e Allah Й“en, Й—oftagol yamirooje Makko Й—en, woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in. Men daЙ—ndi Й“e Й—en lepte yanunooЙ—e e yimЙ“e maЙ“Й“e.

41:19.text: Г‘alnde Allah mooЙ“indiroyta ayЙ“e Makko Й“en faade ka Yiite, hara halfinaaЙ“e Yiite ngen hino ГұoЖҙЖҙindira Й“e; tawa Й“e hattanaa laawagol ngen.

41:20.text: Haa si tawii Й“e hewtii ka Yiite, Й“e fuЙ—Й—ike yeddude kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en aduna, nanЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, e giiЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, e guri Й“alli maЙ“Й“e Й—in wona e seeditagol geddi e keeferaaku ko Й“e huuwaynoo kon aduna.

41:21.text: HeeferЙ“e Й“en wi'ana guri maЙ“Й“e Й—en: ko fii honЙ—um seeditaniЙ—on e dow amen, ko men huuwaynoo aduna? guri maЙ“Й“e Й—en jaaboo: ko Allah wowlinЙ—o kala huunde On, woni ko wowlini men. Ko Kanko tagunoo on, ka laawol aranol, fewndo wonuЙ—on aduna. Ko ka Makko tun, woni ruttorde mon laakara, fii Гұaaweede yoЙ“ee.

41:22.text: On wonaali hiЙ—on suuЙ—itoo, fewndo faggitotonoЙ—on geddi Й—in, fii wata nanЙ—e mon, e giiЙ—e mon, e guri mon seeditoyo e dow mo. Ko tawde on gomЙ—inaano hasboore, wanaa fii lepte maa warjeede Й“aawo maayde. Kono on sikkuno, wonnde Allah anndaa ko Й—uuЙ—i e ko huuwaynoЙ—on kon, Й—aynitiЙ—on.

41:23.text: Ko Й—en sikke mon bonЙ—e, wonunoo ko sikkunoЙ—on Joomi mon, Й—e halki on. WaЙ—tinirЙ—on sabu Й—um, jeyaaЙ“e e pertuЙ“e aduna e laakara Й“en.

41:24.text: Hay si Й“ee Й“e tere mun seeditii e dow mun muГұГұike, ko Yiite ngen wonata jaaЖҙode maЙ“Й“e; hay si Й“e Й—aЙ“Й“irii yarluyee Allah on huncaneede lepte Й—en, Й“e wonaa heЙ“ayЙ“e Й—um, wanaa fii naatugol Aljanna.

41:25.text: Men heblani Й“ee heeferЙ“e, seytanuuji ko Й“e wonda e maЙ“Й“e, Й—in lobbinani Й“e golle maЙ“Й“e bonЙ—e Й—en aduna, e fiyakuuji laakara, Й—i Й“e yejjitinaa fii mun, haЙ—i Й“e hebilangol Й—i. Konngol lepte ngol jojji e maЙ“Й“e ontuma, wondude e mofte yawtunooЙ“e ado maЙ“Й“e, immorde e jinna e yimЙ“e. Pellet, Й“en wonuno hayruЙ“e, tawde Й“e hayrinirii ko'e-maЙ“Й“e e Й“eynguureeji maЙ“Й“e fow, Г‘alnde Darngal, naatoygol Yiite.

41:26.text: Nde heeferЙ“e Й“en ronkunoo teeЙ—ora hujja on hujja goo, Й“e wasondiri wiide: wata on jentito ndee Alqur'aanaare nde Muhammadu janngata e mon, wata on jebbilano nde, ko yo on sonku tuma nde janngetee, balajo'o, on foolay mo, o acca janngugol nde nodda e mayre, Й“uttiniren e makko.

41:27.text: Ma Men meeЙ—iniroy yedduЙ“e Allah Й“en fennuЙ“e NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e Г‘alne Darangal, Men yoЙ“ira ko Й“uri bonde e ko Й“e huuwaynoo kon e sirku e geddi.

41:28.text: Ko ndin njoЙ“di jantaandi, woni njoddi ayЙ“e Allah yedduЙ“e Mo fenni NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en: ko Yiite ngen. Hino woodani Й“e ton galle luttugol, poomaa; njoЙ“di kon ko Й“e yeddiraynoo Aayeeje Allah Й—en, Й“e salii gomЙ—innde Й—e, e hoore ko Й“anngunoo tiiЙ—i hujja kon fow.

41:29.text: YeddunooЙ“e Allah fenni NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en wi'oya: Joomi amen, hollii men majjiinooЙ“e men Й“en ka jinna e ka yimЙ“e: Ibuliisaa fuЙ—Й—uЙ—o yeddugol on nodda e mun, e banii-aadama fuЙ—Й—uЙ—o rufude ЖҙiiЖҙam on, men tippa e maЙ“Й“e e nder Yiite, haa Й“e wona e Й“urЙ“e joltude Й“en ka Yiite, Й“urЙ“e tiiЙ—ude lepte Й“en.

41:30.text: Pellet, wi'uЙ“e Й“en: Joomi amen ko Allah, wanaa goЙ—Й—um goo, hooti Й“e tabiti e Й—um, Й“e woЙ—Й—itii haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in; Malaa'ika'en hino jippoo e maЙ“Й“e tuma Й“e Жҙettitetee, Й“e wi'ana Й“e: wata on hulu maayde e ko hikkori yeeso mayre, wata on sunano ko acciЙ—on aduna; wewliree Aljanna mo wonanoЙ—on e fodeede on aduna, sabu ko gomЙ—inirЙ—on kon Allah, golluЙ—on ko moЖҙЖҙi.

41:31.text: Ko menen woni yiЙ—Й“e mon Й“en ka nguurndam aduna, tawde men semmbinayno on men reena on, ko menen kadi woni yiЙ—Й“e mon Й“en ka laakara: ngol giggol no heddii. Hino woodani on ka Aljanna, kala ko wonkiiji mon faaletee, immorde e dakammeeji e muuyanteeji. Hino woodani on ton kadi, kala ko faaleteЙ—on.

41:32.text: ЖҠum ko maraari helaandi fii hottude mon, immorde e Joomiraawo, Haforoowo junuubi kala tuubanЙ—o Mo e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e.

41:33.text: Alaa Й“urЙ—o moЖҙЖҙude konngol, wano on nodduЙ—o e fii wootinЙ—ingol Allah, o gollitiri sari'a Makko on, o golli golle moЖҙЖҙe weltinayЙ—e Joomi makko, o wi'i: min on, ko e jebbilaniiЙ“e yankinanii Allah Й“en, mi jeyaa? Wa'uЙ—o non fow, ko on Й“uri yimЙ“e Й“en moЖҙЖҙude konngol.

41:34.text: Golle moЖҙЖҙe Й—en e Й—oftaare weltinaynde Allah nden, fotataa e bone maa geddi tikkinayЙ—i Mo Й—in. DuГұir ko Й“uri e moЖҙЖҙude, on boniiЙ—o e maaЙ—a; e jaka yoo, on mo ngayngu woni hakkunde maa e mun, si tawii a duГұirii bone makko on moЖҙЖҙere, himo wa'ita wa giЙ—o saЙ—tuЙ—o giggol.

41:35.text: Hawrataa e on jikku yettiniiЙ—o, si wanaa muГұГұotooЙ“e lorra e bone yimЙ“e Й“en; hawrataa e mun, si wanaa jom geЙ“al manngal. Tawde ko e Й—um moЖҙЖҙere Й—uuЙ—unde woni.

41:36.text: Si seytaane arii sowinsinirde maa bonnugol e kala, waqtu moolor Allah, yiltoЙ—aa e Makko. Ko Kanko woni Nanoowo ko wowlataa kon, AnnduЙ—o fii maaЙ—a.

41:37.text: Hino jeyaa e maandeeji tindinayЙ—i e mawngu Makko ngun, jemma on e Гұalorama on ko waylondirta kon, e naange ngen e lewru ndun. Onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, wata sujjan naange ngen wanaa kadi lewru ndun. Sujjanee Allah tun, taguЙ—o Й—i On, si wonii ko Kanko rewoton.

41:38.text: Si Й“e townitorii Й—uurnagol, Й“e sujjanaali Allah taguЙ—o On, haray Malaa'ika'en wonЙ“e ka Allah Й“en, hiЙ“e subbunhinoo Й“e yetta Mo jemma e Гұalorma, hara Й“e haaЙ“ataa rewugol Mo.

41:39.text: Hino jeyaa e maandeeji Makko tindinЙ—i e mawngu e gootaagu e kattal Makko wuurnitugol, tawde a yi'ay leydi ndin no yoori, ndi alaa puЙ—i. Si wonii non Men jippinii ndiyam toЙ“o e mayri, ndi dillira aawdi mariindi e mayri ndin, ndi fontoo. Awa wuurnituЙ—o ndii leydi On puЙ—i, pellet, ko wuurnitoowo maayЙ“e Й“en, fii Гұaaweede yoЙ“ee, tawde pellet, ko O hattanЙ—o kala huunde. Wuurnitugol leydi yoorunoondi ronkintaa Mo, wanaa fii wuurnitugol maayЙ“e e genaale mun.

41:40.text: Pellet, ooГұotooЙ“e Й“en e Aayeeje Amen Alla Й—en, Й“e yedda Й—e Й“e fenna, Й“e wayla Й—e, fii maЙ“Й“e suuЙ—aaki Men; MeЙ—en anndi fii maЙ“Й“e. E ko feroyteeЙ—o on ka Yiite Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude kaa ko aroyoowo on Г‘alnde Darngal himo hoolii daЙ—ugol lepte? Onon Й“ee yiimЙ“e, huuwee ko yiЙ—uЙ—on e moЖҙЖҙere maa bone, Men Й“annginanii on Й—ate moЖҙЖҙere e bone Й—en fow. Ko pellet, Allah no reeni ko golloton e Й—in kon. Hunnde e kuuЙ—e mon, suuЙ—aaki Mo.

41:41.text: YeddunooЙ“e Й“en Alqur'aana tuma nde arunoo e maЙ“Й“e, immorde e Allah, ko leptoyteeЙ“e Г‘alnde Darngal, feere mun alaa. Pellet non, ko nde Deftere teddunde foolunde. Gooto hattanaa waylude nden, maa wattita nde.

41:42.text: Meere iwrantaa nde yeeso mayre, wanaa Й“aawo mayre; foti koi Й—uytugol maa Й“eydugol, waylugol maa wattitugol. Ko nde jipporiinde immorde ka Г‘eeГұo e tagu Mun, e eЙ“Й“oore Mun e sari'a Mun On, YettiniiЙ—o e kala fiyaaku On.

41:43.text: A wi'aaka an NulaaЙ—o, immorde e fenneede, si wanaa ko NulaaЙ“e adinooЙ“e ma Й“en wi'anoo. MuГұГұo, sabu pellet, Joomi maa, ko O Jom yaafuyee kala tuubanЙ—o Mo e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, e Jom lepte muusuЙ—e e kala haЙ“Й“itiiЙ—o e junuubi, o ronki tuubude.

41:44.text: Si Men waЙ—uno ndee Alqur'aanaare e haala goo, hara wanaa aarabu, heeferЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en wi'ayno: ko haЙ—no Aayeeje mayre Й—en Й“annginiree, no men faamira? Alqur'aana wonay e haala ajami, arduЙ—o e mayre on wona aarabuujo? An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee: Alqur'aana, wonannde gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“en Й“e goongini NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, ko fewnaynde itta e majjere, e sellinaynde Гұabbuuli majjere Й—in ka Й“ernde e ko jokki Й—um. ЖҒe gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en kan Allah, pahu no e noppi maЙ“Й“e Й—in, kayre hinde niЙ“Й“itani Й“e, Й“e faamataa nde. ЖҒen siforiiЙ“e Й—in sifaaji, hino wa'i wa noddirteeЙ“e e nokku woЙ—Й—uЙ—o, ko honno Й“e nanirta ndun noddaandu?

41:45.text: GomЙ—ii Men okkii Muusaa Tawreetaare nden, kono luutondira e mayre: woЙ—Й“e e maЙ“Й“e gomЙ—ini nde, woЙ—Й“e Й“en yeddi nde. Si wanaa fii fodoore Allah nden, wonnde ko Г‘alnde Darngal O Гұaawoyta hakkunde jeyaaЙ“e Й“en, e ko Й“e luutondiri e mun kon, O Гұaawayno hakkunde luutondirnooЙ“e e fii Tawreeta Й“en; O feГұГұina goonguЙ—o on e meerenteejo on, O teddina goonguЙ—o On, O hoyna meereejo on. HeeferЙ“e Й“en kan, pellet, hiЙ“e e sikke sikkitiiЙ—o ndee Alqur'aanaare.

41:46.text: Kala golluЙ—o ko moЖҙЖҙi, ko kanko nafitorta Й—um, wanaa Allah nafitorta golle moЖҙЖҙe hay gooto. Kala kadi huuwuЙ—o ko boni, lorra mun ko e makko yantata, wanaa Allah woni ko bone geddi gooto e tagu Makko ngun, lorrata. O yoЙ“oyay kala e ko hanndi kon. Joomi maa an NulaaЙ—o, O siforaali wonnde, tooГұoowo jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. O Й—uytanoytaaЙ“e moЖҙЖҙi maЙ“Й“e, O Й“eydanoytaaЙ“e kadi bonЙ—i.

41:47.text: Ko faade ka Allah tun, woni ko ganndal Darngal ruttetee: ko Kanko tun anndi nde ngal darotoo, wanaa goЙ—Й—o goo. DimЙ—e yaltataa coombi mum (oomЙ—i mun), deyel kadi saawataa, ngel jibintaa si wanaa e ganndal Makko. Hay huunde yawtataa Mo e Й—in. Г‘alnde O noddiroyta kafidaynooЙ“e Allah Й“en e sanamu, hara Himo felira Й“e Й—en kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e wiide: ko honto woni Й—in Й—i kafidaynoЙ—on e Am woni? SirkooЙ“e Й“en wi'i: Tigi-tigi on, men qirrii ma wonnde hay gooto e amen alaa seeditotooЙ—o Й—um Й—oo.

41:48.text: ЖҒe majjondira e Й—in sanamuuji Й—i Й“e rawaynoo; Й“e yananee ontuma, wonnde laaworde lepte Allah Й—en alanaa Й“e, wanaa daЙ—inrde.

41:49.text: NeЙ—Й—anke on haaЙ“ataa toragol cellal, e jawdi, e Й“iЙ—Й—o ekn. Si bone baasal maa Гұawu ekn memii mo, ko o heewuЙ—o fibtaade e taЖҙagol e njurum Allah nden.

41:50.text: Si Men meeЙ—inirii mo cellal e ngalu e Й“uttu, Й“aawo jarrabuyee e Гұawu memunooЙ—o mo, ko pellet o wi'ay: ЖҠum Й—oo ko min woodani ! Tawde miЙ—o haandi e mun. Mi fellitaa si Darngal daroto. Si Й—um aru waЙ—de, haray pellet, hino woodani lam ka Allah, ngalu e jawdi; wano O neeminirnoo e am aduna, tawde miЙ—o hanndi e mun. Ma Men yeetitoyo yedduЙ“e Allah Й“en, geddi e keeferaaku ko Й“e huuwaynoo, ko ma Men meeЙ—inoy Й“e lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e muusuude.

41:51.text: Si Men neeminirii neЙ—Й—anke on cellal e Й“uttu ekn, o welsindoo e jantagol Allah Й—oftoo Mo, o Й—uurnora Й—um, toownugol balaaje makko. Si Гұawu non memii mo, maa baasal ekn, o wona torotooЙ—o Allah ko Й—uuЙ—i, hara himo woyto e Makko fii on bone, no O huncirana mo Й—um. Tawaa o yettataa Allah si O neeminii e makko, o muГұГұotaako kadi e ko O jarriborta mo kon.

41:52.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee sirkooЙ“e fennooЙ“e: "Yeetee lam, si wonii ndee Alqur'aanaaree ko ka Allah iwri, refti yedduЙ—on nde fennuЙ—on; ko honno fiyaaku mon waЙ—tinirta? Haray ko hommbo Й“uri majjude on salaniiЙ—o goonga, feeГұirka hujja doolnuЙ—o?
