41:53.text: Aray ka Men holla heeferЙ“e Qurayshi Й“en, maandeeji Amen Й—in ka tatteeji leydi, tuma Allah yaГұГұanta juulЙ“e Й“en, Men holla Й“e Й—i e maЙ“Й“e tigiri, ka uddital Makka, haa Й“anngana Й“e ko sikke alaa e mu'un, wonnde ndee Alqur'aanaare, ko nde goonga, mo Allah seeditii wonnde ka ka Makko nde iwri. Ko hommbo non Й“uri mawnude Allah seedee? Si ko goonga Й“e muuynoo, Й“e yonndinorayno seedee Joomi maЙ“Й“e on.

41:54.text: Anndee sirkooЙ“e Й“en no e sikke fii hawroygol e Joomi maЙ“Й“e, Г‘alnde Darngal; Й“e gomЙ—inaa laakaraa, ko Й—um waЙ—i si Й“e hebilorantaako ngal golle moЖҙЖҙe. Anndee non, Allah no huЙ“indorii ganndal e kattal Makko ngal, kala huunde.

42:1.text: Haa, Miim : firo sugu Й—ee kalfe yawtiino ka fuЙ—Й—orde cortewol Al-baqarah.

42:2.text: Ain, Siin, Qaaf: firo sugu Й—ee kalfe yawtiino ka fuЙ—Й—orde cortewol Al-baqarah.

42:3.text: Ko sugu oo wayahu woni ko Allah wahayiniri e maa an Muhammdu, e Й“en AnnabaaЙ“e Makko adinooЙ“e ma, Allah FooluЙ—o e yaggingol ayЙ“e Mun, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e toppitannde Mun e tagu Mun.

42:4.text: Ko Kanko Allah tun, woni ko jeyi kala ko woni ka kammuuli e ka leydi: tagugol e laamagol toppitoo. Ko Kanko kadi woni ToowuЙ—o e jaati Mun, fotde mum, poolgu e kattal Mun e toppitagol Mun, MawnuЙ—o e jaati Mun.

42:5.text: Hino jeyaa e mawngu Allah ngun, tawde kammuuli Й—in e no Й—i foti e waade e toowude, hiЙ—i eЙ“Й“a seekorgol dow leydi ndin, hara Malaa'ika'en no laЙ“Й“inira Joomi maЙ“Й“e, yettugol Mo, yankinanoo Mo mawnina Mo, Й“e toroo Mo haforangol wonЙ“e ka leydi Й“en. Awa anndee pellet, ko Allah woni Haforanoowo kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e.

42:6.text: ЖҒen jogitiiЙ“e sanamuuji yiЙ—Й“e reweteeЙ—i hara wanaa Allah, Allah na tommbii kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, O yoЙ“itoyay Й“e Й—e. An non NulaaЙ—o, a wonaali fawaaЙ—o reenugol golle maЙ“Й“e, tawde a lamnditortaake kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en. An on, ko a yottinoowo tun.

42:7.text: Ko wano Men wahayinirnoo e Й“eya AnnabaaЙ“e adinooЙ“e ma Й“en, Men wahayiniri e maaЙ—a an NulaaЙ—o, janngeteende e haala aarabu, fii ko jertiniraa yimЙ“e Makka Й“en e aarabuuЙ“e wonЙ“e takko mayre Й“en, refti yimЙ“e Й“en fow. Jertinaa kadi yimЙ“e Й“en, fii Г‘alande Darngal, Гұalnde Allah mooЙ“oyta adinooЙ“e e sakkitiiЙ“e fow nokku gooto, fii Гұaaweede yoЙ“ee; Гұalaande nde sikke alaa e mu'un. YimЙ“e Й“en wonoyay pecce Й—iЙ—i: feccere goo, ka Aljanna; woni muumini'en, ndeya feccere, ka Yiite; woni heeferЙ“e Й“en.

42:8.text: Si Allah haajuno, O waЙ—ayno fow e mofte goote ka lislaamu, O naada Й“e fow kadi Aljana. Kono ГұenЖҙal Makko ngal eЙ“Й“ii nde O naadata mo O muuyi ka lislaamu, ontigi naatoya Aljanna. TooГұuЙ“e non ko'e-mun geddi e keeferaaku, Й“e alaa giЙ—o heftoowo fii maЙ“Й“e, wanaa walloowo Й“e e lepte Allah Й—en.

42:9.text: Si ko woni, Й“ee sirkooЙ“e jogiti yiЙ—Й“e goo, ko wanaa Allah. Hara non ko Allah woni GiЙ—o On tigiri, wanaa goЙ—Й—o goo nafatah maa lorra. Ko Kanko woni wuurnitoowo maayЙ“e Й“en, fii hasbugol Й“e yoЙ“a Й“e, huunde ronkintaa Mo.

42:10.text: Onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, kala ko luutondirЙ—on e fii mun ka doose diina maa ka calЙ—i mun, haray Гұaawoore mun nden, ko ka Allah woni: on ruttoto ka Deftere Makko maa ka Sunna NulaaЙ—o Makko on (yo o his). Ko On siforЙ—o Й—in sifaaji, woni Joomi am; ko e Makko mi fawi fii am on fow, ko ka Makko kadi mi ruttorta tuubugol.

42:11.text: Ko Allah tagi kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, no Й—i anndiranooka. O waЙ—irani on e pittaali mon Й—in genndooЙ“e, O waЙ—ani on e gelooЙ—i Й—in e na'i Й—in e dammi Й—in nooneeji, no Й—i Й—uuЙ—ira fii mon. Himo tagira on e ko O waЙ—irani on genndiraaЙ“e kon, O wuurnira on e ko O waЙ—irani on e tebeeli e Й“ira neemoraaЙ—i mon Й—in. Hay huunde e tagu tagu Makko ngun yerondiraa e Makko. Ko Kanko woni Nanoowo haala jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, Yi'oowo kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en; huunde e mun laawotaako Mo. Ma O yoЙ“itoy Й“e golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en: ko moЖҙЖҙi e ko boni.

42:12.text: Ko Kanko tun heerori soktirЙ—e ngaluuji kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin. Himo yaajnana arsike on mo O muuyani e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, fii ndaarndagol si ontigi yettay Mo kaa o yedday; ko wano non kadi O Й“illinirta mo O muuyani, jarribagol annda si ontigi muГұГұoto kaa o tikkiray senndoore Allah nden. Pellet, ko O AnnduЙ—o kala huunde. Hay huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo, e nafata jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

42:13.text: O sar'inanii on e diina kan, sugu ko O yamirnoo kon Nuuhu yottingol gollitiri, e kon ko Men wahayini e maaЙ—a, an NulaaЙ—o. O sar'inani on kadi, sugu ko Men yamirnoo kon Ibraahiima, e Muusaa e Iisaa'en fow yo yottin gollitira, wonnde: ГұiiЙ“inee diina kan; hara on seertaali e makka. Kono ko noddataa sirkooЙ“e Й“en e mun kon, yo Й“e bajjinЙ—in Allah, woЙ—Й—itoo e sirku, Й—um mawnii e dow maЙ“Й“e. Allah non, Himo suЙ“oo e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, O hawrindida Й—um ko rewa Mo Й—oftoo Mo, O fewna kala tuuboowo yiltoo e junuubi mun.

42:14.text: HeeferЙ“e Й“en e sirkuЙ“e Й“en seertaano, si wanaa Й“aawo nde hujja on ГұiiЙ“irde e dow maЙ“Й“e, nuleede Muhammadu (jom kisiyee) sabu bewre e tooГұd. Si wanaano sabu fii Allah anndiino wonnde O nennanayЙ“e lepte Й—en haa e happu mo O anndi; woni Г‘alnde Darngal, ko pellet, O Гұaawayno hakkunde maЙ“Й“e; O jippinira lepte Й—en e maЙ“Й“e, sabu yeddugol Й“e ngol Allah, fenna NulaaЙ—o Makko on. Pellet, Alyahuuda roninaaЙ“e Tawreeta Й“en, e Annasaara roninaaЙ“e Linjiila Й“en Й“aawo Й“eya, e kala arnooЙ“e Й“aawo sirkooЙ“e Й“en, fow e maЙ“Й“e no sikkitii ndee Alqur'aanaare, nde Muhammadu ardi e mun, fennuЙ“e mo.

42:15.text: Noddan kaa diina ГұiiЙ“uka; tabitiraa e Й—um, no Allah yamirmaa non; wata a jokku mbeleeЙ—e maЙ“Й“e meerente Й—en, maakanaa Й“e tuma wennjondiral: mi gomЙ—inii Allah, e kala Deftere nde O jippini e NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. O yamirii lam, yo mi Гұaawir nunЙ—al hakkunde mon. Ko Allah Mo mi rewata on, woni Joomi am e Joomi mon on fow. Ko menen golle amen - moЖҙЖҙe maa bonЙ—e - woodani, ko onon kadi golle mon - moЖҙЖҙe maa bonЙ—e woodani. Yeddondiral woo alaa hakkunde amen e mon, Й“aawo hujja on Й“anngude. Allah mooЙ“oyay en fow men. Ko ka Makko woni ruttorde nden Г‘alnde Darngal; O yoЙ“ita kala e men, ko hanndi kon. Ontuma non, laaЙ“ay ko hommbo goongi, oya feni.

42:16.text: ЖҒen wennjirooЙ“e hujjaaji meerente e diina Allah jippinaaka e Muhammadu kan, Й“aawo nde yimЙ“e Й“en nootaade ka, hujja Й“en on, ko meere yanoowo ka Joomi maЙ“Й“e e ka gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en; Й“aЙ—te woo alanaa mo. Tikkere Allah hino fawii Й“e, sabu yeddugol Й“e ngol saloo goonga, hino woodani Й“e lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e, sabbitiiЙ—e Й“e Г‘alnde Darngal.

42:17.text: Ko Allah woni jippinirЙ—o Alqur'aanaare nden goonga, mo sikke alaa e mu'un, O jippini kadi fii nunЙ—al, ko Гұaawiree hakkunde yimЙ“e Й“en. Hino hasii hara Darngal, ngal Й“ee fennata fii mun ngal, ko ko Й“adii. Hino anndaa non, wonnde kala ko arata, ko ko hewti.

42:18.text: ЖҒe gomЙ—inaa Й“en Darngal, hino Й—aЙ“Й“a yaccingol fii maggal; tawde Й“e gomЙ—inaa fii hasboore wanaa warjeede wanaa fii lepte. GomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“en kan, ko Й“e hulu Й“e fii maggal, e hoore hiЙ“e felliti wonnde ko ngal goonga, mo sikke alaa e mu'un. Awa anndee wonЙ“e yeddondireede Й“en e fii Darngal, hara hiЙ“e sikkitii daragol maggal, ko pellet, Й“e wonii e nder majjere woЙ—Й—unde goonga.

42:19.text: Allah ko newaniiЙ—o jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Himo yaacnana arsika mo O muuyani e maЙ“Й“e, O Й“illina mo O muuyani, ka yurmegol mo; hay si goЙ—Й—um goo yaltitii. Ko Kanko woni DoolnuЙ—o Mo gooto foolataa, JaaliiЙ—o yagginoowo ayЙ“e Makko Й“en.

42:20.text: Kala tawЙ—o ko baraaje ndun laakara o faaliraa golle makko Й—en, Men sowanay mo mbarjaari makko ndin; moЖҙЖҙere kala, sappo yeru mun, haa hewta cowalle teemeЙ—Й—e jeeЙ—iЙ—i, haa Й“ura Й—on ko Й—uuЙ—i. Kala kadi tawЙ—o ko jayru ndun aduna tun o faalaa, Men okkay mo geЙ“al makko ngal, yeru makko on; hara non o alaa ka laakara ton, hay geЙ“al, tawde o Й“uurnii aduna e dow laakara.

42:21.text: Kaa hara kafidaaЙ—i e Alalh hino woodani Й“ee sirkooЙ“e, sar'inanЙ—i Й“e e diina kan, kon ko Allah duЕӢaaki fi mun: harmingol ko dagii, maa dagingol ko harmi? Si wanaano fii ngola Konngol ngol Allah happunoo e mun, dumunna senndugoygol hakkunde luutondirЙ“e Й“en, e tawde O nennanay Й“e haa nden Гұlande, O Гұaawayno hakkunde maЙ“Й“e kisan. Ko pellet, hino woodani tooГұirЙ“e ko'e-mun Й“en sirkangol Allah yedda Mo, lepte muusuЙ—e, Г‘alnde Darngal.

42:22.text: A yi'ay an NulaaЙ—o, tooГұirЙ“e ko'e-mun Й“en sirku e geddi, hiЙ“e huliri leptireede ko Й“e faggitii kon e bakkaatu, hara le Й—um yantay e maЙ“Й“e, feere mun alaa, nafa woo alaa e ko Й“e hulirta Й—um. ЖҒen non gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Й“e golli golle moЖҙЖҙe, Й“en no seedi e Й“eya; Й“ee Й—oo hino e nder naakooji Aljanna, hiЙ“e neeminora ton, kala ko Й“e faalaa ka Joomi maЙ“Й“e; neemaaji Й—i taЖҙondirtaa haa pooma. Ko Й—um tigiri, woni Й“ural mawnungal, ngal alaa nanndo.

42:23.text: Ko ngon welo-welo mawngo, woni ko Allah wewlinirta jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, e junngo NulaaЙ“e Makko on; Й“en jeyaaЙ“e gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, Й“e golli golle moЖҙЖҙe. An NulaaЙ—o, maaku: mi Й—aЙ“Й“iraa on njoЙ“di woo, e ko mi yottinta kon, si wanaa njoЙ“di wootiri, ndi nafitorton onon; ndin woni: nde yiЙ—orton lam, fii ko mi enЙ—am mon. Kala faggitiiЙ—o moЖҙЖҙere, Men Й“eydanay mo njoЙ“di e hoore mayre: moЖҙЖҙere nden, ko sappo yeru mayre. Pellet, Allah ko Haforoowo junuubi kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, mantoowo golle maЙ“Й“e moЖҙЖҙe Й—en Й—e Й“e gollirta fii Makko.

42:24.text: Hini jeyaa e ko sirkooЙ“e Й“en aaЖҙii, wonnde Muhammadu (yo o his) fefindi ndee Alqur'aanaare, o dammbi nde e Joomi makko. Allah ruttiiri Й“e wiide: hara a aru fefindaade fenaande woo, Ma Mi notu e Й“ernde maa nde, Mi meha meere fefindaande nden, Mi heddina goonga kan. Nde tawnoo non, wanaa non woniri, Й—um tinndinii wonnde Annabiijo on (yo o his) ko wahayu Joomi makko o wonndi e mun. Pellet le, ko O AnnduЙ—o ko woni e Й“erЙ—e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo e mum.

42:25.text: Ko Kanko Allah woni jaЙ“oowo tuubuubuyee jeyaaЙ“e Makko yedduЙ“e Й“en, si Й“e ruttike e Makko, O yawtana Й“e bonЙ—i Й—i Й“e faggitii Й—in, e hoore Himo anndi kala ko huuwoton. Huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo e golle mon Й—en. Ma O yoЙ“itoy on Й—e.

42:26.text: Himo jaabina toraare gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Mun on, Й“e golli golle moЖҙЖҙe, O Й“eydana Й“e e ko Й“e lamndaaki mo kon, ka Й“ural Makko. YedduЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Mun Й“en non, hino woodani Й“e lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e, habbitiiЙ—e Й“e Г‘alnde Darngal.

42:27.text: Si tawno Allah yaГұГұanno jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en fow arsike, ko pellet, Й“e bewirayno tooГұe ka hoore leydi; kono Himo jippinira arsike on, emmbere ko O muuyi yaГұГұude O Й“illina. Pellet, ko O humpitiiЙ—o fii jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, ReenuЙ—o Й“e. O okkiray ГұeГұЖҙal Makko ngal, O Й“illinira ngal kadi.

42:28.text: Ko Kanko woni jippinoowo ndiyam Й—am e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, Й“aawo Й“e taЖҙaade fii majjam, O saaka Й—am ndiyam, Й—am fuЙ—ina leydi ndin. Ko Kanko kadi woni GiЙ—o heftuЙ—o fii maЙ“Й“e, YettiniiЙ—o e kala fiyaakyu.

42:29.text: Hino jeyaa e maandeeji tindinayЙ—i e kattal e gootaagu Makko ngun: tagugol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, e Й—in ruugayЙ—i haawniiЙ—i, Й—i O saakiti hakkunde majji. Kanko e fii mooЙ“indiroygol Й“e ngol Гұaawa Й“e yoЙ“ita Й“e, nde O haaji e mun woo, ko O hattanЙ—o. O ronkataa fii mun, wano woniri O ronkaano tagugol Й“e ka arannde laawol.

42:30.text: Kala ko heЙ“i on, onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, immorde e musiiba wonkiijii mon maa e jawle mon, ko sabu geddi Й—i juuЙ—e mon Й—en faggitii. Allah non, hino yaafoo ko Й—uuЙ—i e mun, hara O nanngitirtaa on Й—in.

42:31.text: On wonaa hattanЙ“e laawagol lepte Joomi Й—en, si O faandanike on Й—e; On maraa kadi yawti Mo Kanko, woni giЙ—o hettoowo fii mon, wanaa ballo faabotooЙ—o on e lepte Makko Й—en, si O faandanii mon Й—e.

42:32.text: Hino jeyaa e maandeeji tinndinayЙ—i e kattal e gootaagu Makko ngun: laaЙ—e dogayЙ—e Й—en ka maayo, toowirЙ—e wa pelle.

42:33.text: Si O haajii deeЖҙingol henndu naЙ“ay ndu laaЙ—e Й—en, O waЙ—ay; ndu waЙ—tina ontuma, tabitu ndu e hoore maayo ngon. Woni e ko jantaa koo, maandeeji Й“annginЙ—i kattal Allah ngal, wonannde kala muГұГұotooЙ—o jarrabuyee, yettoowo neema Allah on e dow mun.

42:34.text: Si Mo yiЙ—i Kanko Allah, O yooliray Й—en laaЙ—e, wurtugol heenndu tiiЙ—undu e majje, sabu bakkaatu ko yimЙ“e Й“en faggitii kon. Himo yaafoo non, ko Й—uuЙ—i e bakkatuuji jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

42:35.text: Tuma O halkirta laaЙ—e Й—en henndu ndun, wennjaynooЙ“e e Aayeeje Allah Й—en, fii bonnitugol Й—e, hiЙ“e wonnde ontuma, wonnde alaa no Й“e laawora e halkaare nden.

42:36.text: Kala huunde nde hokkaЙ—on onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, woni ko jaahu maa Й“iЙ—Й—o, haray ko dakamme nguurndam aduna, ko ko fii mun lannata; neema duumotooЙ—o on, ko neema Aljanna on mo Allah marani gomЙ—imЙ“e Mo Й“en, Й“e gomЙ—ini NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, hara ko e Joomi maЙ“Й“e tun, woni Й“e fawotoo e fiyaaku maЙ“Й“e kala.

42:37.text: ЖҒen woЙ—Й—itotooЙ“e e junuubi mawЙ—i Й—in e pankare Й—en, si wonii Й“e tikkanii fawГұoriiЙ—o Й“e konngol maa kuugal, hara Й“e yaaforay ontigi e Й—um, sabu moЖҙЖҙere e maslaha ko woni e mun.

42:38.text: ЖҒen nootoriiЙ“e Joomi maЙ“Й“e, huuwugol ko O yamiri Й“e, woЙ—Й—itoo e ko O haЙ—i Й“e, ГұiЙ“nir Й“e julde nden no timmiri, Й“e tawata ko diisondirayЙ“e hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, e kala fiyaaku maЙ“Й“e, wintotorayЙ“e fii Allah, e kon ko Men arsiki Й“e.

42:39.text: E Й“en tawЙ“e si tooГұe yanii e maЙ“Й“e, Й“e yottoray teddingol hoore maЙ“Й“e, tuma tawi hara tooГұuЙ—o on hanndaa e yaafeede. Nden yottannde, ko jojjunde, teЕӢtinii si nafa alaa e yaafagol ngol.

42:40.text: Kala faalaaЙ—o yottaade, ko hakkee makko. Ko woni tun, hara ko yeru mun, ko aldaa e Й“eydugol maa fantingol. Kala non yaafiiЙ—o boniiЙ—o e mun, o moЖҙЖҙintini hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, haray njoЙ“di makko ndin ko ka Allah woni. Pellet non, O yiЙ—aa tooГұirooЙ“e yimЙ“e Й“en, ka wonikiiji e ka jawle e guri maЙ“Й“e; Himo aГұi Й“en.

42:41.text: Kala non yottiiЙ—o, ko Й“en woni Й“e nanngitirtaake ko waЙ—i kon.

42:42.text: Ka nanngitireede lepte fawii e mun, ko tooГұooЙ“e yimЙ“e Й“en, hara hiЙ“e huuwa geddi e leydi ndin: Й“en Й—on, lepte muusuЙ—e hino woodani laakara.

42:43.text: MuГұГұiiЙ—o on kadi o yaafii tooГұe Й—en, ko pellet, moЖҙЖҙere ngal muГұal Й—on, yiltoto e makko wonndude e renndo ngon. ЖҠum ko fiyaaku yettiniiЙ—o, ko jom-geЙ“al mawngal tun, woni ko hawrondirta e Й—um.

42:44.text: Kala mo Allah hoyni gaa e peewal haa O majjini ontigi e goonga kan, haray giЙ—o goo alanaa mo, mo no heftana mo fiyakuuji makko Й—in. A tinay tooГұirnooЙ“e ko'e mun Й“en geddi e keeferaaku, tuma Й“e yi'i lepte Й—en Г‘alnde Darngal, hiЙ“e yeloo wi'a: hara laawol ruttorde aduna no woodi, men tuubana Allah?

42:45.text: A tinay kadi an NulaaЙ—o, Й“ee tooГұuЙ“e hino weeЙ“itee e Yiite ngen, hara ko Й“e hoynaaЙ“e jaasinaa, hiЙ“e ndaarira yimЙ“e Й“en, lepaarol, hakkee ko Й“e huli nge. GomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en wi'ay ontuma: ko woni hayruЙ“e Й“en tigiri, ko hayrimЙ“e ko'e mun Й“en e Й“eynguureji mun Й—in Г‘alnde Darngal, sabu ko Й“e hawri kon e lepte Allah Й—en. Awa anndee pellet, tooГұirЙ“e ko'e mun Й“en geddi e keeferaaku, Й“e wonii e lepte duumiiЙ—e poomaa.

42:46.text: YiЙ—Й“e alanaa Й“e,ko wallitoo Й“e daЙ—ugol lepte Allah Й—en,Г‘alnde Darngal.Kala non mo Allah majjini e goonga kan,haray o heЙ“ataa ko tinndina mo e maggal, haa poomaa.

42:47.text: Onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, nootee Joomi mon, tinnorgol e ko O yamiri kon, woЙ—Й—itoo e ko O haЙ—i kon, acca kadi caate, ado Г‘alaande Darngal nden arde on, nde tawata ruttoowo alanaa nde. Nden Гұalnde, fattorde woo alanaa on, yeddugol junuubi mon Й—in ko faggita ka kadi alanaa ton.

42:48.text: Si Й“e Й—uurnike e ko yamirЙ—aa Й“e kon, haray Men nuliraali ma an NulaaЙ—o, aynugol kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e: fawaaki ma, si wanaa yottingol nulal ngal e maЙ“Й“e, Гұaawoore maЙ“Й“e nden, ko ka Allah woni. Si wonii Men meeЙ—inirii neЙ—Й—anke on neema ngalu e callal ekn, o wewlira Й—um; si bone non woni memiei Й“e sanu junuubi maЙ“Й“e Й—in, a taway ko Й“e anndiraaЙ“e dullangol Allah, ronka yettude neemaaji Makko Й—in, Й“e wona e tikkangol ko O hoddirani Й“e kon ГұeГұЖҙal Makko.

42:49.text: Ko Allah heeranii laamagol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin. Himo tagira worЙ“e e rewЙ“e maa ko wanaa Й—um, no O haajiri. Himo yeЙ—a mo O muuyani Й“iЙ—Й“e rewЙ“e, O Й—ala ontigi Й“iЙ—Й“e worЙ“e, ko non kadi O yeЙ—irta mo O muuyani Й“iЙ—Й“e worЙ“e, O Й—ali mo Й“iЙ—Й“e rewЙ“e, maa O waЙ—ana mo O muuyani kadi Й“iЙ—Й“e e worЙ“e, O waЙ—a mo O muuyani wonnde mo jibintaa. Pellet, Himo anndi ko fewndii e ko saatii. Ko Й—um woni timmugol ganndal e ГұeГұЖҙal Makko. Huunde wirnanaaki Mo. Wanaa goЙ—Й—um kadi rontinta Mo.

42:51.text: Sellantaa neЙ—Й—anke, nde Allah yewtata, si wanaa hara ko wahayu maa ko nanndi, maa hara ko no o nanirta yewtere Makko nden, tawa o sutaaki mo, maa O immina Malaa'ikaajo e makko, wano Jibiriilu, on wahayina e neЙ—Й—anke NulaaЙ—o on, ko Allah duЕӢanii mo kon. Pellet, Kanko Allah, ko O ToowuЙ—o e Jaati e Sifaaji Makko, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e tagu e kattal e sari'a Makko on.

42:52.text: Ko wano Men wahayinirnoo non e AnnabaaЙ“e adinooЙ“e ma Й“en, Men wahayiniri Alqur'aana e maaЙ—a, an NulaaЙ—o, e yamiroore Amen. A anndaano ko woni Defte jippiiЙ—e Й—en e Й“eya NulaaЙ“e, a anndaano kadi ko woni gomЙ—inal; si ko woni, Men jippinin ndee Alqur'aanaare, ko nde ndayginnde, ndaygu ngu Men fewnirta mo Men muuyani e jeyaaЙ“e Amen Й“en. Pellet, ko a fewnoowo yimЙ“e Й“en, e laawol focciingol, woni diina lislaamu kan.

42:53.text: Laawol Allah, On jeyЙ—o ko woni kon ka kammuuli e ka leydi, taguЙ—o laamii toppitii Й—i. Anndee pellet, ko ka Allah tun, woni ko fiyakuuji Й—in ruttotoo, ka eЙ“Й“ugol topiitoo.

43:1.text: Haa, Miim. Yewtere fii sugu Й—ee kalfe yawtiino ka cortewol Al baqarah.

43:2.text: Allah woondirii Deftere Й“annginnde laawol peewal ngol.

43:3.text: Men waЙ—ii nde janngeteende e haala aarabu, no taskoron maanaaji mayre, onon Й“ee Й“e nde jippinaa e haala mun, faamon Й—um, egganon mofte goo.

43:4.text: Pellet, ndee Alqur'aanaare, hino ka Alluwal reenaangal, toowunde darja, ГұeГұaande e yamirooje e haЙ—aaЙ—i Aayeeje mun.

43:5.text: E Men acciray jippinirgol Alqur'aana e mon, Й—uurnoragol on, fii ko fantinirЙ—on kon sirku e geddi? Men waЙ—ataa Й—um ! Tawde MeЙ—en yurmaa on.

43:6.text: ЖҠuuЙ—ii e AnnabaaЙ“e Й“e Min nuli e mofte adinooЙ“e Й“en.

43:7.text: Annabaajo Allah araano e Й—en mofte adinooЙ“e, si wanaa Й“e wonuno e jalkitugol mo.

43:8.text: Men halkiino ko Й“uri Й—en mofte saЙ—tude jawlagol. Wanaa mofte Й“urЙ—e Й“en Й—on jaasude Men ronkata fii mun ! Toode mise halkanooЙ“e goo, yawtiino ka Alqur'aana; wano Aadi'en, e Samuuda'en, e yimЙ“e Luutu Й“en, e wondiiЙ“e Madyana Й“en.

43:9.text: Ko pellet, si an NulaaЙ—o a lamndike Й“ee sirkooЙ“e fennuЙ“e: wiide ko hommbo tagi kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin? ЖҒe wi'ay: ko FooluЙ—o Mo fooletaake On, AnnduЙ—o kala huunde On tagi Й—i.

43:10.text: Allah waЙ—iranЙ—o On leydi ndin weertaandi, ka rewnoton teppe mon, O waЙ—ani on kadi laawi e pelle e naЙ—f mayri, fii no Й—oworon Й—e ka yahdu mon.

43:11.text: On jippinirЙ—o ndiyam ka kammu, yeru ko yonata on onon e neemoraЙ—i mon e remuruuji mon. Men wuurnitiri Й—am, leydi yoorundi ndi alah puЙ—i. Ko non tigiri, woni ko Allah wuurnitiroyta on.

43:12.text: On taguЙ—o kala nooneeji Й—in: wano jemma e Гұaloram, gorel e deyel ekw, O waЙ—irani on e laaЙ—e Й—en e neemoraaЙ—i Й—in, ko waЙ—Й—oron ka setagol mon: waЙ—Й—oЙ—on laaЙ—e Й—en ka maayo, waЙ—Й—oЙ—on neemoraaЙ—i Й—in ka njorndi.

43:13.text: On eltiranii on Й—um fow, fii yo on fotondir e hoore ko waЙ—Й—otoЙ—on kon ka setagol mon, refti annditon neema Joomi mon On, tuma nde fotondirЙ—on e majji, wi'on ontuma: LaaЙ“al e senayee woodanii eltanЙ—o men ndii baЙ—Й—ateeri, menen on, men wonaano haЙ—tamЙ“e e mun, si wanaano Allah eltani men.

43:14.text: Menen on, ko ka Joomi amen tun, woni ko men ruttoytoo, si men maayii, fii Гұaaweede warjee.

43:15.text: SirkooЙ“e Й“en aaЖҙii wonnde tagaaЙ“e goo, ko jibinaaЙ“e taguЙ—o On seniiЙ—o, tuma Й“e wi'unoo: Malaa'ika'en, ko Й“iЙ—Й“e Allah rewЙ“e ! Pellet, neЙ—Й—anke wi'oowo sugu ngol konngol, ko yedduЙ—o Й“annguЙ—o keeferaaku e majjere.

43:16.text: Kaa hara onon Й“ee sirkooЙ“e, on wi'u wonnde Allah jogitanike hoore Makko Й“iЙ—Й“e rewЙ“e, e ko O tagi kon, O heertinani on onon, Й“iЙ—Й“e worЙ“e Й“en? Ko honЙ—um e senndoore woni kon ko aaЖҙiЙ—on?

43:17.text: Si goЙ—Й—o e maЙ“Й“e wewliniraama jibinaneede Й“iЙ—Й—o debbo ko o dammbunoo kon e Joomi makko, yeeso makko ngon niЙ“Й“itira suno, metteendi ndi o wonndi. Ko honno non o dammbirta e Joomi makko, kon ko tikkinta mo, si o humpitiraama Й—um.

43:18.text: E ko on ne'eteeЙ—o e cuЙ—aari, hara kanko on ka yeddondiral, o Й“annginirtaa haala, sabu ndewaagu makko ngun?

43:19.text: ЖҒe inni Malaa'ikaЙ“e tawЙ“e Й“en ko jeyaaЙ“e Jom Hinaranke On, rewЙ“e. Kere Й“e seedino fewndo Allah tagate Й“en, haa feeГұani Й“e wonnde ko Й“e rewЙ“e? Awa fii ngol seedagol maЙ“Й“e winndete, Й“e lamnditoyee fii mun, Г‘alnde Darngal, Й“e leptiree nden fenaande maЙ“Й“e.

43:20.text: ЖҒe wii hoЙ“e hujjaniro koddoruyee, Й“e wi'i: si Allah haajuno, men rewataano Malaa'ika'en. Tawde O haajii Й—um, hollii Himo welaa. Kono Й“e alanaa e kon ko Й“e wowlata, hay e ganndal; Й“ee wonaali, si wanaa e fenugol.

43:21.text: Kaa ko Deftere Men addani Й“ee sirkooЙ“e, ado Alqur'aana, daginanaynde Й“e rewugol ko woori Allah, hara ko e nden Deftere woni ko Й“e dallinorta?

43:22.text: Ko woni kon, Й“e dallinor finaa-tawaa wiide: memen men tawu baabiraaЙ“e amen Й“en e hoore diina, rewaynooЙ“e sanamu; haray ko e Й—in batteeji Й—on men rewata e mun.

43:23.text: Ko wano Й“ee Й—oo fenniri non, Й“e dallinori baabiraaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en, ko non woniri Men nulaali jertinoowo yimЙ“e mun aditaade ma an NulaaЙ—o, si wanaa hooreeЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en wi'ay: menen men tawu baabiraaЙ“e amen Й“en e dow diina, Й—um non ko batteeji maЙ“Й“e Й—in men jokkata. Haray wanaa e maa woni ko adii e Й—um.

43:24.text: NulaaЙ—o maЙ“Й“e on maakani Й“e: on jokkay tun baabiraaЙ“e mon Й“en, hay si mi addanii on ko Й“uri diina maЙ“Й“e kan moЖҙЖҙude? ЖҒe wi'i: memen dey, ko men yedduЙ“e ko nulidaЙ—on e mun kon.

43:25.text: Men yottii e Й—en mofte fennunooЙ“e NulaaЙ“e mun Й“en ado maa, Men halki Й“e. Taskii no battane maЙ“Й“e wa'unoo. Ko battane muusunooЙ—e wonunoo.

43:26.text: Janto kadi yo NulaaЙ—o, tuma nde Ibraahiima maakannoo ben makko e yime makko Й“en: min on ko mi daЙ—ndiiЙ—o e sanamuuji Й—i rewoton Й—in, gaanin Allah.

43:27.text: Si wanaa Allah taguЙ—o lam On, On Й—on fewnay lam e jokkugol diina focciika kan.

43:28.text: O waЙ—i konngol tawhiidi ngol Ibraahiima maaki ngol, heddotoongol e Й“aawo makko, ngol mulataa e geyngol wootinЙ—inooЙ“e Allah Й“en Й“e kafidataa Mo e huunde. Belajo'o, Й“e ruttoray e Allah, tuubugol e sirku e geddi.

43:29.text: Mi hawjaano halkugol Й“ee sirkooЙ“e fennuЙ“e, Mi dakmitirno Й“e e heddagol e aduna, kamЙ“e e baabiraaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en, haa nde Alqur'aana arunoo e maЙ“Й“e, e NulaaЙ—o Й“annguЙ—o, woni Muhammadu (Jom kisiyee).

43:30.text: Nde Alqur'aanaare nden ardirunooЙ“e goonga mo sikke alaa e mu'un, Й“e wi': Й—um ko ko Muhammadu woni mbilЙ—oraade men, menen non, ko men yedduЙ“e Й—um.

43:31.text: SirkooЙ“e fennuЙ“e Й“en wi'i: ko hanno Allah jippinira Alqur'aana e gooto e worЙ“e koohooЙ“e Makka maa Taa'ifu Й“en? hara wanaa e Muhammadu baaso alyatimaajo oo?

43:32.text: E ko kamЙ“e senndata yurmeende Joomi maa nden, an NulaaЙ—o, sakko wona Й“e okkay nde mo Й“e yiЙ—ani, Й“e Й—ala nde mo Й“e haaji, kaa ko Allah? Awa ko Menen woni ko senndi arsikeeji maЙ“Й“e Й—in hakkunde maЙ“Й“e aduna, Men waЙ—i e maЙ“Й“e alЙ—uЙ“e e waasuЙ“e, fii no yga maЙ“Й“e wonira eltanaaЙ“e Й“eya. Haray, ko ko Joomi maa yurmetee jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en kon ka laakara, Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude e dii ko Й“ee mooЙ“ata e aduna lannoowo on.

43:33.text: Si wanaa fii wata yimЙ“e Й“en wonu e mofte goote ka keeferaaku, Men waЙ—ayno e cuuЙ—i yedduЙ“e Allah Й“en: kiЙ“Й“ale kaalisi, e ЕӢabbirЙ—e ka Й“e Жҙawra.

43:34.text: Men waЙ—ayno kadi e cuuЙ—i maЙ“Й“e Й—in, dame e danЙ—e e ndaЙ—Й—uЙ—e ka Й“e soЙ“Й“indoo fii no Й“e unura e fitina on seeЙ—a-seeЙ—a.

43:35.text: Men waЙ—anayno Й“e kadi cuЙ—aari kaЕӢЕӢe. Kono Й—um fow wonaali, si wanaa ko dakamme nguurndam aduna; nafa mun ko seeЙ—a mo juutataa. Ko neema laakara on ka Joomi maa an NulaaЙ—o, Й“uri moЖҙЖҙannde Й—oftiiЙ“e Allah Й“en, Й“e woЙ—Й—itii e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in.

43:36.text: Kala Й—uurniiЙ—o e Alqur'aana, haa o ronki taskagol nde, haray o leptirte wuurteede e setaneeru ndu o seertataa e mun, ko Й“eyda mo bewre.

43:37.text: ЖҠin awaseeji coowodaaЙ—i non e Й“en Й—uuniiЙ“e Alqur'aana, ko sakkotooЙ—i Й“e e diina Allah kan, haa Й“e ronka Й—oftaade Mo, Й“e haЙ—itoo e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in, hara hiЙ“e sikka ko Й“e feewuЙ“e e goonga, Й“e ronka tuubude e nden majjere maЙ“Й“e.

43:38.text: Haa si on Й—uurninooЙ—o jantoore Allah nden aroyii Г‘alnde Darngal, o yelora wiide: ee bone ! hara hakkunde am e maa, an oo coowodaaЙ—o, woЙ—Й—irayno goЙ—Й—al fuЙ—naange e hiirnaange woЙ—Й—ondiri ! Tawde a bonii coowodaaЙ—o !

43:39.text: Allah daalana heeferЙ“e Й“en nden Г‘alnde: Й—um nafataa on hannde - nde tawnoo on tooГұiriino ko'e-mon sirku e geddi - wonnde on hawtoyte ka lepte. ЖҒe sirkanЙ—on Й“e, ronnditantaako on huunde e lepte Й—en.

43:40.text: ЖҒee ko faaЙ—uЙ“e e nanugol goonga, wumiЙ—uЙ“e e yi'ugol mo. Hara non ko an NulaaЙ—o, woni ko waawata naninnde faaЙ—uЙ—o maa fewna bunЙ—o maa majjuЙ—o laawol focciingol ngol?

43:41.text: Si Men aru Жҙettitude ma ado Men leptude Й“e, haray doo ko Men yottorayЙ“e e maЙ“Й“e, leptugol aduna e laakara.

43:42.text: Maa hara Men holle yoga e ko lepte Й—e Men kammbirani Й“e Й—en, haray doo ko Men gaynooЙ“e fii maЙ“Й“e. ЖҒe haЙ—tanaa dartagol Men e huunde.

43:43.text: An NulaaЙ—o, jogito kon ko Joomi maa wahayini e maaЙ—a, golitiraa Й—um. Pellet, hiЙ—a jokki laawol goonga, ngol jilЙ“uya alah e mum.

43:44.text: Ndee Alqur'aanaare non, ko teddungal maaЙ—a an e yimЙ“e maa. Arma nde lamnditeЙ—on fii gomЙ—ingol nde ngol, e rewgol peewal hende ngal, e noddugol e mayre ngol Г‘alnde Darngal.

43:45.text: An Nulaao, lamndii e Й“en Й“e Nulunoo ado maa, si tawii Men waЙ—uno tanaa Allaahu On, reweteeЙ—i goo?

43:46.text: GomЙ—ii Men immindinii Muusaa e Aayeeje Amen Й—en, haa e Fir'awna e mbatu yimЙ“e makko Й“en, o maakani Й“e: ko mi NulaaЙ—o JeyЙ—o tageefo ngon fow.

43:47.text: Nde o addannooЙ“e Aayeeje Amen Й—en, Й“e woni e jalugol Й—e jalkita.

43:48.text: Men hollaali Fir'awna e mbatu mun ngun hujja semmbinЙ—o ko Muusaa addi kon, si wanaa haray ko on Й“uri adiiЙ—o mo on mawnude. Men nanngiri Й“e lepte Й—en aduna, jortagol nde Й“e Й“oorotoo e keeferaaku, kono Й—um nafaano.

43:49.text: Nde memi Й“e huunde e lepte, Й“e wi'ani Muusaa (yo o his): ko an yo mbileejo! Torano men Joomi maa, ko O jantimaa kon ka fii huncugol lepte Й—en, si wonii men gomЙ—inii. Tawde pellet, ko men feewooЙ“e, si O huncanii men lepte Й—en.

43:50.text: Nde Men huncannooЙ“e lepte Й—en, e jaka yoo, hiЙ“e firta ahadi maЙ“Й“e ndin.

43:51.text: Fir'awna noddi e yimЙ“e makko Й“en, o woni e mantorgol laamu makko ngun, wi'angol Й“e: ko onon yo yimЙ“e am, wanaa min jey laamu Misra? E hino Й—ii canЙ—i Niilu ngol hino ila e ley kuЙ“eeje am? E on yi*aani laamu am ngun, haa anndon mawngu am ngun?

43:52.text: Ko min Й“uri teddungal, e dii Muusaa lo'uЙ—o, on mo lobbintaa haala.

43:53.text: Awa ko hanno Allah werloo jawe kaЕӢЕӢe, e oo mo O nuli, no o hollira wonnde ko o NulaaЙ—o Makko? MaaЙ—um Malaa'ikaaЙ“e Й“en arda e makko nun, hara ko Й“e jokkondirЙ“e?

43:54.text: Fir'awna Й—aytini Й—aytini yimЙ“e makko Й“en, Й“e Й—oftii majjere makko nden. Pellet, Й“en Й—on laatino yimЙ“e yaltuЙ“e e Й—oftaare Allah.

43:55.text: Nde Й“e tikkinirnoo Men haЙ“Й“itagol e keeferaaku ngun, Men yottii e maЙ“Й“e; Men yooli Й“e fow maЙ“Й“e.

43:56.text: Men waЙ—i Fir'awna e yimЙ“e mun Й“en, adiiЙ“e yimЙ“e Й“en e keeferaaku, Men waЙ—ti Й“e waajitorteeЙ“e, wonannde kala waajitoriiЙ—o Й“e, fii wata sugu mun heЙ“u Й—um.

43:57.text: Nde sirkooЙ“e Й“en sikkunoo wonnde Iisaa, Mo Annasaara'en rewata on, hino jeyaa e Й“e Allah daali fii mun Й“en :"Pellet, onon e ko rewoton kon gaanin Allah, ko on carmalle Jahannama. Ko on joloyayЙ“e e magge", e hino le Allah haЙ—ii rewugol mo, no O haЙ—iri rewugol sanamuuji Й—in non, tawaa yoo, yimЙ“e maa Й“en, an NulaaЙ—o, hino sonka wennjondiree, Й“e wi'i: men weltorii tawde reweteeЙ—o amen on, ko martaba Iisaa woni. Allah jippini Й—on kisan, ko raddira Й“e: "Pellet, Й“en Й“e moЖҙЖҙi Й—in adanii Й—um ka Amen, Й“en Й—on ko woЙ—Й—intinteeЙ“e e magge"

43:58.text: ЖҒe wi'i: Ko reweteeЙ—i amen Й—in Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude, kaa ko iisaa? Ibn az-ZibaвҖҷraa e nanndo makko piyiranaali ngal misal, fii heЙ“ugol yottaade ka, ko fii tun wennjodnireede. ЖҒen ko yimЙ“e saЙ—tuЙ“e wennje.

43:59.text: Iisaa geЙ—al Maryama on wonaali, si wanaa jeyaaЙ—o Allah, mo Men neeminiri Annabaaku e Nuleede, Men waЙ—i mo misal wonannde Й“iЙ—Й“e Israa'iila Й“en, ko Й“e dallinora e kattal Allah ngal, nde tawnoo O tagirmo ko aldaa e baaba, wano O tagiri Aadama ko aldaa e jibimЙ“e.

43:60.text: Si Men haajuno gaynugol fii mon, onon Й“iЙ—Й“e Aadama Й“en, Men waЙ—irayno Й—um, waЙ—titirgol on Malaa'ika, ko lomtoo on ka leydi, Й“e wona e rewugol Allah, hara Й“e kafidataa Mo e goЙ—Й—um.

43:61.text: Ko pellet, Iisaa ko maande jeyaande e maandeeji Darngal mawЙ—i Й—in, tuma o jippoytoo ka jamaanu sakkitoru. Wata on sikkito fii Й—um. Jokkee lam e ko mi addi kon immorde ka Allah, ko Й—um woni laawol focciingol ngol.

43:62.text: Wata seytaane falor on e laawol focciingol ngol, Й—ayne e koomte maako Й—en ! tawde pellet, ko o gaГұo mon Й“annginЙ—o ngayngu.

43:63.text: Nde Iisaa (jom kisiyee) on ardannoo yimЙ“e makko Й“en hujjaaji Й“annginЙ—i Nulala makko ngal, o maakani Й“e: GomЙ—ii mi ardanii on e ГұeeГұal immorde ka Allah, e no Й“annginirana on yoga e ko luutondirЙ—on e mun, ka diina mon. Haray huliree Allah, Й—oftagol yamiraaЙ—i Makko Й—in, e woЙ—Й—itagol haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in. ЖҠofton mi e ko yamirta on kon, rentoЙ—on e ko mi haЙ—i on e mun kon.

43:64.text: Pellet, ko Allah woni Joomi am e Joomi mon. ReweteeЙ—o goo alanaa en. LaЙ“Й“inanee mo Kanko tun, dewe Й—en. Ko Й—um woni laawol focciingol ngol.

43:65.text: Feddeeji Annasaara Й—in luutondiri hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, fii Iisaa: woЙ—Й“e wi'i: ko o reweteeЙ—o, woЙ—Й“e Й“en wi'i: ko o Й“iЙ—Й—o Allah, woЙ—Й“e goo wi'i: kanko fow e neene makko, ko Й“e reweteeЙ“e. Awa bone woodanii Й“en tooГұirЙ“e ko'e mun, siforgol Iisaa reweteeЙ—o, maa Й“iЙ—Й—o maa tammo tammitaaЙ“e, immorde e lepte muusuЙ—e, habbitiiЙ—e Й“e Г‘alnde Darngal.

43:66.text: Hara Й—ii feddeejii luutondirЙ—i fii Iisaa no habbii si wanaa nde Darngal ngal ardata Й“e e juhal, hara Й“e so'aa anndude fii Й—um? Si ngal arii Й“e e fewndo keeferaaku maЙ“Й“e, haray battane maЙ“Й“e, ko lepte muusuЙ—e.

43:67.text: WeldunЙ“e yiЙ—indiri Й“en e majjere keeferaaku, yoga maЙ“Й“e ayroyay yoga, Г‘alnde Darngal; si wanaa hulirЙ“e Allah Й“en, Й—oftagol yamaruyeeji Makko Й—in, woЙ—Й—itoo e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in. ЖҒen Й—on, weldigal maЙ“Й“e ngal duumoto.

43:68.text: Allah daalano Й“en gomЙ—umЙ“e: Ko onon yo jeyaaЙ“e Am ! Kulol alanaa on hannde, e fii ko yawtiri on kon; wanaa on sunorayЙ“e kadi, fii geЙ“oy aduna yawtukoy.

43:69.text: ЖҒen gomЙ—imЙ“e Alqur'aanaare jippiinde nden e NulaaЙ—o maЙ“Й“e on, Й“e woni jebbilaniiЙ“e nde; waajitoray Й“e, Й“e haЙ—itora kaЙ—aaЙ—i mayre kadi.

43:70.text: Naatee ka Aljanna, onon e nannduЙ“e e mon gomЙ—inal, hara hiЙ—on weltora neemaaji duumotooЙ—i, Й—i lannataa, taЖҙondirtaa.

43:71.text: GollooЙ“e hino wanngindinee e maЙ“Й“e, miranji kaЕӢЕӢe e ГұedduЙ—e yooЙ—uЙ—e. Hino ka Aljanna ton: kala ko wonkii muuyetee, gite dakmitora ndaarugol. Hara non, ko on duumotooЙ“e ton, on yaltatah haa poomaa.

43:72.text: Ko on Aljanna mo sifanaЙ—on fii mun, woni mo Allah roniniri on Й“ural Makko, sabu kon ko gollaynoЙ—on.

43:73.text: Hino woodani on ton, muuyanteeЙ—i Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i, Й—i taЖҙondirtaa, ko e Й—in Гұaamoton.

43:74.text: Pellet, bonnirЙ“e keeferaaku e geddi Й“en, ko ka lepte Janhannama Й“e luttoyta Г‘alnde Darngal, Й“e heddoo ton poomaa.

43:75.text: ЖҒe hoynantaake lepte Й—en, wurin hara ko Й“e taЖҙiiЙ“e e yurmeende Allah nden.

43:76.text: Men tooГұiraali Й“e naadugol Й“e Yiite, si ko woni, ko kamЙ“e tooГұirnoo ko'e maЙ“Й“e keeferaaku.

43:77.text: ЖҒe nodda Malaa'ikaajo halfinaaЙ—o Yiite ngen on, Й“e wi'a: ko an yo Maaliku ! Yo Joomi maa gaynu fii amen, men foofto e lepte Й—en. O jaabitoo Й“e: pellet, ko e Й—en lepte luttoton poomaa, on maayataa ton, sakko lepte Й—en taЖҙondira e mon.

43:78.text: GomЙ—ii Men addanno on goonga ka sikke alaa e mu'un ; kono Й—uuЙ—uЙ“e e mon, ko aГұunooЙ“e goonga.

43:79.text: Si Й“e fewjanii Annabiijo on (yo o his), haray doo ko Men fewjanooЙ“e Й“e feere Й“urnde nden Й—on.

43:80.text: Kaa hara Й“e sikku wonnde Men nanataa gunndooji maЙ“Й“e Й—in e sirruuji maЙ“Й“e Й—in? Ko pellet, Men nanay Й—i fow ! Wuri Malaa'ikaaЙ“e Й“en hino maandina kala ko Й“e huuwi.

43:81.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan dammbuЙ“e Й“iЙ—Й“e rewЙ“e Й“en e Allah: wonnde O siforaali jogitagol Й“iЙ—Й—o ! O laaЙ“ii O senike e Й—um ! Si Й—um wonuno, ko min woni adiiЙ—o rewude Alla ceniiЙ—o O.

43:82.text: Senyanee woodanii JeyЙ—o kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, JeyЙ—o kadi Arsi kin e kon ko Й“ee sirkooЙ“e dammbirta Mo debbo e Й“iЙ—Й—o.

43:83.text: NulaaЙ—o, accuЙ“e Й“e jumpa e meere nde Й“e woni e mun, Й“e fija haa Й“e hawroya e Гұalaande maЙ“Й“e nde Й“e fodaa, ndeen woni Г‘alnde Darngal.

43:84.text: Ko Kanko Allah woni reweteeЙ—o e goonga On ka kammu e ka leydi, ko Kanko kadi woni Г‘eeГұo e tagu Mun e eЙ“Й“oore Mun e toppitagol Mun, AnnduЙ—o fiyakuuji jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Mo tawata huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo e fii maЙ“Й“e.

43:85.text: MoЖҙЖҙere Allah e barki Makko Й“eydanike Mo, Kanko On Mo woodani Й—um laamu kammuuli Й—in e leyd ndin e ko woni hakkunde majji. Ko ka Makko tun, anndal fii daragol Darngal woni, goЙ—Й—o goo anndaa Й—um. Ko ka Makko tun kadi, woni ruttorde mon laakara, fii Гұaaweede yoЙ“itee.

43:86.text: ЖҠi sirkooЙ“e Й“en rewata Й—in acca Allah, Й—i waawataa tefoygol ka Allah, si wanaa Й“en seediiЙ“e konngol liimaanu ngol, hara hiЙ“e anndi ko Й“e seedii kon: wano Iisaa, eвҖҳUzayru, e Malaa'ika'en.

43:87.text: Ko pellet, si a lamndike Й“e, ko hommbo woni ko tagi Й“e? ЖҒe wi'ete: Ko Allah. Ko honno non Й“e yiiliraa e rewugol Mo, Й“aawo Й“e qirritaade Й—um?

43:88.text: Allah hino anndi kadi fii ko NulaaЙ—o wullitornoo fennugol yimЙ“e makko Й“en, nde Й“e maakunoo: ko an Joomi, pellet, Й“ee ko yimЙ“e Й“e gomЙ—itaa ko nuluЙ—aa lam e maЙ“Й“e kon.

43:89.text: Awa Й—uurno Й“e, maakanaa Й“e ko duГұata bone maЙ“Й“e on - Й—um ko Makka waЙ—i - aray nde annda ko sabbitiiЙ“e kon e yaggineede.

44:1.text: Haa, Miim. Yewtere fii sugu Й—ee kalfe yawtiino ka simoore Al baqarah.

44:2.text: Allah woondirii Deftere Й“annginnde laawol peewal ngol.

44:3.text: Men jippinirii Alqur'aana, e jemma laylatul qadiri: jemma hebbiniraaЙ—o barki, Men siforii wonde jertinirooЙ“e ndee Alqur'aanaare.

44:4.text: Ko e nder on jemma, woni ko kala fiyaaku ГұeГұaaЙ—o, humondirЙ—o e arsike maa lajal ekn, woni ko Allah siinata e nden hitaande.

44:5.text: MeЙ—en senndira kala fiyaaku ГұeГұaaЙ—o immorde ka Amen. Men siforii wonde imminooЙ“e NulaaЙ“e.

44:6.text: MeЙ—en imminira NulaaЙ“e Й“en, yurmeende Joomi maa an NulaaЙ—o, yurmegol NulaaЙ“e e mun Й“en. Pellet, Kanko Allah, ko O Nanoowo haalaaji jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, AnnduЙ—o kuuЙ—e e annuyeeji maЙ“Й“e Й—in. Hunnde e Й—in suuЙ—aaki Mo.

44:7.text: JeyЙ—o kadi kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin e ko woni kon hakkunde majji, si wonii ko on yananaaЙ“e Й—um, haray gomЙ—inee NulaaЙ“e Am Й“en.

44:8.text: ReweteeЙ—o e goonga woo alaa, si wanaa Kanko. Himo wuurna, Himo wara, wuurnoowo wara alaa, si wana Kanko. JeyЙ—o on Jeyi baabiraaЙ“e mon adinooЙ“e Й“en.

44:9.text: ЖҒee sirkooЙ“e yananaaka e Й—um. Si ko woni, hiЙ“e sikkitiiЙ—i Й—um, Й“e woni e fijugol e meere.

44:10.text: Habbitoyo NulaaЙ—o, lepte yimЙ“e maa Й“adiiЙ—e hewtuЙ—e, Гұalnde kammu ngun ardata e curki feeГұayngu e gite maЙ“Й“e, hakkee ko Й“e sattina heege muusnge.

44:11.text: Hara curki kin hino sudda yimЙ“e Й“en, Й“e wi'anee ontuma: ko lepte muusuЙ—e woni ko heЙ“i on.

44:12.text: ЖҒe wona e tororgol Joomi maЙ“Й“e wi'ugol: Joomi amen, huncan men Й—ee lepte, haray ko men gomЙ—inooЙ“e ma e NulaaЙ—o Maa on, si A huncanii men Й—e.

44:13.text: Ko honno Й“e waajitorta, Й“e tuubana Joomi maЙ“Й“e, hara le NulaaЙ—o ariino Й“e, Й“annginani Й“e Nulal ngal, Й“e anndi le ko o goonguЙ—o hoolniiЙ—o?

44:14.text: Refti Й“e Й—uurnii e goongingol mo ngol, Й“e wi'i mo: ko goЙ—Й—o goo woni e anndinnde mo, o wonah NulaaЙ—o, haa Й“e wi'oyi: ko o haangaaЙ—o.

44:15.text: Tuma Men huncani on lepte Й—en yeru seeЙ—a; pellet, on ruttitoto e keeferaaku e fennugol mon ngol.

44:16.text: Habbito Й“e yo NulaaЙ—o, haa Г‘alnde Men nanngiroyta yimЙ“e maa yedduЙ“e Й“en, wippannde manwde nden Badri, haray pellet, ko Men yottoytooЙ“e e ko Й“e yeddiri kon Allah, Й“e fenni NulaaЙ—o Makko on.

44:17.text: GomЙ—ii Men jerribinoke ado maЙ“Й“e, yimЙ“e Fir'awna Й“en, NulaaЙ—o Allah tedduЙ—o, ari e maЙ“Й“e, himo nodda Й“e e wootinЙ—ingol rewa Allah: on woni Muusaa (yo o his).

44:18.text: Muusaa maakani Fir'awna e yimЙ“e mun Й“en: accidee lam e Й“iЙ—Й“e Israa'iila Й“en, tawde ko Й“e jeyaaЙ“e Allah. Haqqe alanaa on e maccinЙ—ingol Й“e. Awa min wonannde on, ko mi NulaaЙ—o Allah e mon, hoolniiЙ—o e ko Allah nuli lam yottingol kon, mi Й—uytataa mi Й“eydataa e mun.

44:19.text: E wonde wata townitanor Allah, tertagol rewude Mo, townitanoo jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, tawde min on, mi addanay on hujja Й“annguЙ—o.

44:20.text: Min kadi non, mi moolorii JeyЙ—o lam On Jeyi on, nde warirtonmi kaaЖҙe.

44:21.text: Si on gomЙ—inaa ko mi addi kon, haray woЙ—Й—itee lam, hara on hewtiraali lam bone.

44:22.text: Annabi Muusaa noddiri Joomi mun, wonnde Й“ee yimЙ“e Fir'awna Й—oo e dental mun Й—oo, ko bomЙ“e hannduЙ“e e yaccinaneede lepte.

44:23.text: Allah yamiri Muusaa yaadugol e yimЙ“e makko Й“en jemma, O humpiti mo, wonnde Fir'awna e yimЙ“e non, ko jokkitooЙ“e mo.

44:24.text: Allah yamiri mo lummbidugol e Й“iЙ—Й“e Israa'iila Й“en ka maayo, O acca ngo ko deeЖҙa, tawde Fir'awna e konu mun ngun, kalkirete yooleteede ka maaya.

44:25.text: ЖҠuuЙ—ii ko Fir'awna e yimЙ“e mun acci Й“aawo maЙ“Й“e, immorde e gese e Й“ulli ilooji.

44:26.text: ЖҒe acci kadi remuruujo e koЙ—anЙ—e labaaЙ—e.

44:27.text: E koЙ“e acci caggal mum en e nguurndam Й“e wonunoo neeminireede.

44:28.text: Ko wano siforanoЙ—on non, feЖҙЖҙirnoo e maЙ“Й“e. Men ronini Й—in neemaaji maЙ“Й“e, yimЙ“e goo, Й“en woni Й“iЙ—Й“e Israa'iila Й“en.

44:29.text: Kammu ngun wullaali yoolagol Fir'awna e yimЙ“e mun Й“en, wanaa leydi ndin, Й“e wonaali kadi muГұГұoranteeЙ“e no Й“e tuubira.

44:30.text: GomЙ—ii Men daЙ—ndii Й“iЙ—Й“e Israa'iila Й“n e lepte hoynooje, tawde Fi'awna e yimЙ“e mun Й“en, laatino warooЙ“e Й“iЙ—Й“e maЙ“Й“e worЙ“e, Й“e acca rewЙ“e Й“en.

44:31.text: Men daЙ—ndi mo e lepte Fir'awna Й—en, tawde o wonuno mawnintiniiЙ—o fantini e yawitagol yamaruyee e diina Allah kan.

44:32.text: GomЙ—ii Men suЙ“orike Й“iЙ—Й“e Israa'iila Й“en e dow anndal Amen, e hoore winndere jamaanu maЙ“Й“e, tawde Й“e Й—uuЙ—irano AnnabaaЙ“e.

44:33.text: Men okki Й“e hujjaaji Й—i Men semmbiniri Muusaa, Й—i neema feeГұirani Й“e e mun, wano manna e colli juЙ—aaЙ—i.

44:34.text: ЖҒee sirkooЙ“e fennooЙ“e no wi'a e yeddugol ummital:

44:35.text: Ndee maayde wonaali, si wanaa aranere nden tun, men wonaali kadi immintinoyteeЙ“e Й“aawo mun.

44:36.text: Awa Muhammadu, an e jokkuЙ“e ma Й“en, artiree baabiraaЙ“e amen maaynooЙ“e Й“en, si wonii ko e goonga wonЙ—on, wonnde Allah immintinay maayЙ“e Й“en, fii Гұaaweede yoЙ“itee.

44:37.text: Kere ko Й“ee sirkooЙ“e fennuЙ“e ma an NulaaЙ—o, Й“uri cemmbe e neema, kaa ko yimЙ“e "Tubba'in" Й“en e Й“eya adinooЙ“e Й“e, wano 'Adi'en e Samuuda'en, Men halkuno Й“en fow, tawde ko Й“e laatina bomЙ“e.

44:38.text: Me tagiraali kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin e ko woni hakkunde majji kon, fijooЙ“e e Й—um.

44:39.text: Men tagiraali kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, si wanaa fii ГұeГұЖҙal faandaangal. Kono ko Й“uri Й—uuЙ—ude e sirkooЙ“e Й“en, Й“e anndaa Й—um.

44:40.text: Pellet, ko Г‘alnde Darngal, woni ko Allah saatini senndindirgol hakkunde jeyaaЙ“e Й“en, Й“e fow maЙ“Й“e, tuma Й“e mooЙ“indiraa.

44:41.text: Г‘alnde nde giЙ—o woo nafoytaa giЙ—o mun ; Й“e wonaali kadi daЙ—ooЙ“e lepte Allah Й—en, tawde Laamu ngun nden Г‘alnde, ko Allah woodani, wanaa goЙ—Й—o e nodditoraynooЙ“e ngu.

44:42.text: Si wanaa neЙ—Й—o mo Allah yurmaa woo, on Й—on nafitoroy golle makko moЖҙЖҙe Й—en. Pellet, Allah ko FooluЙ—o Mo fooletaake, HinnotooЙ—o kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

44:43.text: Pellet, leggal Zaqquumi ngal Allah fuЙ—ini ngal ka asli Yiite,

44:44.text: Ko ngal woni Гұaamdu Й—uuЙ—uЙ“e bakkaatu Й“en, woni heefero o na nyaama e Й“esnooje makki coЙ“Й—e Й—e.

44:45.text: Nde Й“esnaande na nanndi e nebban Й“ale nde taayinaa, hara hino fata e deedi maЙ“Й“e Й—in, hakkee ko wuli.

44:46.text: Wano ndiyam wulЙ—am jaw nguli fatirta.

44:47.text: AyninaayЙ“e Yiite ngen wi'anee: nanngee mo pooЙ—iron doole, haa ka hakkunde Jahiimi.

44:48.text: Refti yuppon ka hoore makko, ndiyam fasnaaЙ—am Й—am, hara o seertataa e lepte Й—en.

44:49.text: O wi'anee ontuma: awa meeЙ—u non lepte muusuЙ—e Й—en ! An sikkunooЙ—o ko a fooluЙ—o mo dartetaake, tedduЙ—o hakkunde yimЙ“e mun.

44:50.text: Awa ko Й—ee lepte woni ko sikkitinoЙ—on si laatotono Г‘alnde Darngal sikke iwii e mon caggal On fellitii hannde.

44:51.text: Pellet, hulirЙ“e Joomi mun Й“en Й—oftagol Mo haЙ—itoo e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko, Й“en wonii e weerde hoolniinde e kala bone.

44:52.text: E nder gese e Й“ulli ilayЙ—i.

44:53.text: HiЙ“e Й“oornoo ka Aljanna ton, comci Й—aatuЙ—i e tekkuЙ—i, hara hiЙ“e fewtondiri, Й“e runtandirtaa.

44:54.text: Ko wano Men teddiniri Й“e non Й—in jantaaЙ—i, Men resiniri Й“e kadi ka Aljanna, rewЙ“e yaajuЙ“e gite, tiiЙ—uЙ“e Й“aleeri gite.

44:55.text: HiЙ“e gollooЙ“e ton Й“en, fii addangol Й“e kala muuyanteeЙ—i Й—i Й“e faaletee, hara ko Й“e hooliiЙ“e e anngal taЖҙondirgol Й—i maa lorra majji.

44:56.text: Ko Й“e duumotooЙ“e ton, Й“e meeЙ—ataa ton maayde woo, si wanaa maayde aranere nden aduna, Joomi maЙ“Й“e daЙ—nda Й“e lepte Yiite ngen.

44:57.text: ЖҠum ko dokkal e moЖҙЖҙere immorde ka Joomi maa. Haray ko jantaa koo, e naadeede Й“en Aljanna, daЙ—nda Й“e Yiite, ko Й—um woni maloore mawnde nden, nde sugu mun alaa.

44:58.text: Ko Men newinirani ndee Alqur'aanaare jippinirgol nde e Й—emngal maa, aarabu ngal, an NulaaЙ—o, ko no Й“e waajitora.

44:59.text: Habbito faabo maa ngon e halkeede Й“e nden. KamЙ“e ko Й“e habbitiiЙ“e maayde maa.

45:1.text: Haa, Miim. Yewtere fii sugu Й—ee kalfe yawtiino ka cortewol Al baqarah.

45:2.text: Jippagol Alqur'aana, ko immorde ka Allah, FooluЙ—o Mo fooletake On, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e tagu Mun e kattal Mun e toppitagol Mun.

45:3.text: Pellet, hino e kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, tinndinayЙ—i kattal e gootaagu Allah ngun, wonannde gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en. Tawde ko Й“en taskorta maandeeji Й—in.

45:4.text: Hino e tagugol on ngol kadi, onon yimЙ“e Й“en, immorde e toЙ“Й“ere maniiyu, refti huyre, refti heЙ—Й—ere, e ngun tagu ngu Allah saaki ka leydi hino ruuga, ko maandeeji wonii e Й—um fow, wonannde yimЙ“e yananaaЙ“e wonnde ko Allah woni taguЙ—o On.

45:5.text: Wonii kadi e luutongol jemma e Гұalorma ngol, e kon ko Allah jippiniri ka kammu, immorde e ndiyam, O wuurnitiri Й—am leydi ndin, fewndo ndi yoorunoo ndi alaa puЙ—i, e firlitagol keneeli Й—in, yiltindira Й—i senngo kala, tuma woo, fii nafa mon, ko maandeeji non, wonannde yimЙ“e haqqilooЙ“e Й“en. ЖҒe dallinora Й—um, e wootinЙ—ingol Allah ngol, e wonnde Himo haЙ—tani ummitingol, O haЙ—tani huunde kala.

45:6.text: ЖҠin ko maandeeji e hujjaaji Й—i Men janngirta e dow maaЙ—a, an NulaaЙ—o, e hoore goonga. Si tawii Й“e gomЙ—inaali yewtere Allah e hujjaaji mun jippinaaЙ—i e JeyaaЙ—o Makko on, haray ko yewtere honnde goo Й“e gomЙ—inoyta?

45:7.text: Halkaare e lepte Allah woodanii kala Й—uuЙ—uЙ—o fenaande e bakktuuji !

45:8.text: On geddo hino nana Aayeeje Allah Й—en ka Alqur'aana hino janngee e dow makko, refti o duumoo e geddi e keeferaaku makko, o townitanoo jokkugol goonga kan, wa si tawii o nanaano Й—en Aayeeje janngaaЙ—e e dow makko. Awa an NulaaЙ—o, humpitu on bone makko laakara, Й—um le ko lepte muusuЙ—e hino habbitii mo ton.

45:9.text: Si goЙ—Й—um hewtii mo e Alqur'aana, o jogitora Й—um jalnori makko. ЖҒen siforЙ“e ngol jalkitugol Alqur'aana, hino woodani lepte hoynooje, Г‘alnde Darngal.

45:10.text: Jahannama hino yeeso maЙ“Й“e, habbitii Й“e laakara. Jawle Й—e Й“e faggitinoo duncanoytaaЙ“e huunde ka Allah, wanaa sanamuuji Й—i Й“e jogitinoo reweteeЙ—i Й—in gaanin Allah, woni ko duncanoyta Й“e. Hino woodani Й“e Г‘alnde Darngal, lepte mawЙ—e.

45:11.text: Ndee deftere nde Men jippini e NulaaЙ—o Amen on Muhammadu, ko Й—owoore e goonga. ЖҒen yedduЙ“e non Aayeeje Joomi maЙ“Й“e Й—en, hino woodani Й“e lepte bonЙ—e muusuЙ—e.

45:12.text: Ko Alla gooto O woni eeltanЙ—o mon- ono yimЙ“e- maaya ngo ngam laaЙ—e ndiyam ndoga e hengo, haa Й—aЙ“Й“on e Й“ural makko e nooneeji paggitaaЙ—e dagiiЙ—e, mbela joo njetton neemaaji Alla e dow mon.

45:13.text: Alla mbo senaade woodani eeltanii mon denndaangal ko woni e kammuuji hono naange e lewru e koode, e ko woni e leydi hono caatli e leЙ—Й—e e montaanji eken, wonii e eeltude Й—iin noon dallilaajim baawka Alla e ngootaagu Makko, wonande yimЙ“e miijatooЙ“e kaawisaaji makko Й—i Й“e teskooЙ—i.

45:14.text: Maakan aan NulaaЙ—o, Й“een goonЙ—inЙ“ Alla e nulal NullaaЙ—o Makko : yoЙ“e njaafa Й“een heefereЙ“e bonЙ“e e mum en Й“e ngannduЙ—a paalaaka neemaaji Alla e lepte makko e dow mum en, Ma Alla yoЙ“ goonЙ—inЙ“e munyЙ“e e heefrЙ“e jaggitЙ“e koЙ“e paggittono e golle nder aduna;

45:15.text: Kala golluЙ—Й—o golle lobbe ko hoore mum o gollani, Alla na yondani e golle mum he, kala kadi mo golli golle bonЙ—e ko lepte Й—e ngonata e dow mum, bone golle mum loratah Alla, refti koto Alla Й“e nduttoto nyande darngon gooto fof yoЙ“e ko haandi ko.

45:16.text: Ko goongo Min njonnii Banii Israa*iil Tawreet e senndude hakkunde aade en min waЙ—i ko Й“uri heewde e AnnabaaЙ“e ko Annabi Ibraahiima njalti yo jam e kisal ngon e mum, Min ngarsikini Й“e e nooneeji laaЙ“Й—i, Min Й“urniЙ“e e yimЙ“e jamaanu mum en.

45:17.text: Min toottiЙ“e dallillaaji Й“annguЙ—i ceerndooji hakkunde goongo e fenaande, Й“e luuraani si wonah caggal nde hujjaaji neleede Muhamed pawii e maЙ“Й“e, alah fof ko fooЙ—iЙ“e e ngal luural si wonah bewre e reerЙ—ude e laamu kam e koongu, Joomo noo Aan NulaaЙ—o na seernda hakkunde mum en koЙ“e yeddandiratno ka aduna, O seernda jom goongo e jom fenaande.

45:18.text: Refti Min mbaЙ—ma e laawol e sunna e dow yamiroore Amen nde Min njamiri annabaaЙ“e adiiЙ“e, nodda e Iimaan e golle lobbe, rew o sariya, woto belaaЙ—e Й“een Й“e nganndah goonga, belaaЙ—e maЙ“Й“e na majjinaЙ“e gaa e goonga.

45:19.text: Pellet Й“een Й“e nganndah goonga Й“e curantaa Ma lepte Alla hay huunde si a rewii belaaЙ—e maЙ“Й“e, toonyooЙ“e seertuЙ“e laabi yogo e mum en wallat yogo goo, Й“e mballandira e dow juulЙ“e, Alla noon wallat hulЙ“e KoЙ“e ciini jamirooje makko deenii kaЙ—aaЙ—e Makko.

45:20.text: O quraana kombo gite Й—e yimЙ“e njiirata goongo e peewal faade e goongo, e yurmeende wonande yananaaЙ“e, sabu ko e mammbo Й“e peewrata faade e laawol poocingol ngam Joomi mum en weleeЙ“e, O naatnaЙ“e aljanna, O deestinaЙ“e yiite.

45:21.text: Mbela Й“een faggitiriiЙ“e terЙ—e mum en keefeeru e goopi cikkat ma Min mbaЙ— njoЙ“di mum en hono njoЙ“di Й“een golluЙ“e golle lobbe, Й“e ngoonЙ—ini, Й“e pota aduna e laakara? kaanii Гұaawoore mum en.

45:22.text: O tagri kammuuji e leydi ГұeeГұal timmungal, O tagiraaniЙ—i fijirde, e ngam O yoЙ“a kala fittaandu kondu faggino ko boni wolla ko lobbi, Alla toonyataaЙ“e ustude moЖҙЖҙi mum en ma Й“eydude bonЙ—i mum en.

45:23.text: Ndaar -aan nulaado- faade e oon dewЙ—o belaaЙ—e mum o waЙ—iЙ—e hono dewetooЙ—o mbo o lunndataaka, Alla majjanii mbo e ganndal ummaade e makko, sabu hombo haandi e majjineede, O ommbi Й“ernde makko o nanatah nangol naftaraade, O muuri ndaarЙ—e makko haa o sutataako goonga, hombo hawrinta oon e goonga caggal de Alla majjani mbo? Mbela on miccataaka lorlo rewde belaaЙ—e, e nafoore rewde sariya.

45:24.text: HeefareeЙ“e yedduЙ“e ummital wii: Nguurndam alah si wonah nguurndam amen aduna Й—am, nguurndam alah caggal Й—aam, njiirle na maaya nduttataaka, jiirle kadi nguura, alah ko warata min si wonah lomtandirde jemma e nyalawma, Й“e ngalah ganndal koЙ“e njeddi ko ummital, Й“e ngonah si wonah sikkooЙ“e, te sikke nafatah goonga hay ndiga;

45:25.text: Si aayeeje Amen njanngaama e sirkuЙ“e yedduЙ“e ummital, Й“e ndaГұatah hujja mbo kujjinorto si wonah wiide NulaaЙ—o yo o his e wondiiЙ“e makko: nguurtinane min baabiraaЙ“e amen si on ngonii goonЙ—uЙ“e e ko noddittaЙ—on wonde ma min ummita caggal maayde amen:

45:26.text: MaakanЙ“e Aan NulaaЙ—o: Alla na wuurna mon e takde mon refti O wara mon, refti O renndina on caggal maayde mon faade darorde nyalngu darnga ngam haasbo e njoЙ“di, oon nyalawma sikke alah e gargol mammbo, kono ko Й“uri heewde e yimЙ“e nganndah, ko Й—um waЙ—i Й“e keblorantaaka Й—um golle moЖҙЖҙe.

45:27.text: Ko Alla tan laamu kammuuji e leydi ngoodani, alah potЙ—o reweede e goonga mbo wona Alla, nyande darnga darii Alla ummitini maayЙ“e ngam hasbeede e njoЙ“di nyande heen de meeranteeЙ“e rewatnooЙ“e ko wonah Alla yahatnooЙ“e ngam bonnude goonga cemmbina meere perta.

45:28.text: HaЙ—a yiya - aan nulaaЙ—o- e oon nyalawma kala lenyol na gurfanii e koppi mum na fadi ko waЙ—ate, kala lenyol na nodde e deftere golle mum nde malaykaaji binndooji mbinnduno, nguu Гұallngu ma on njoЙ“e ko ngollatnaЙ—on e aduna fofti ko lobbum wolla ko bonЙ—um.

45:29.text: Ndee ko deftere Amen- nde malaykaaji amen mbinndatno golle mon- honde seedoo e mon goonga njanngee nde, Min ngoniina yamirooЙ“e malaykaaji binndooji nde mbinndata golle mon ka aduna.

45:30.text: Tawi ko Й“een goonЙ—inЙ“e Й“e ngolli golle moЖҙЖҙe Joomi mum en ma O naatnuЙ“e aljana e yurmeende mum, ndiin njoЙ“di ndi Alla tottiЙ“e woni malal laaЙ“ngal ngal mal malal goЙ—ngal waawah Й“adaade.

45:31.text: Tawii ko been yeddube Alla be wi*nee woynude Й“e: Mbele aayeeje Am njanngetanaake e mon mawnakinadon dow iimanaagal, gondon yimЙ“e bonЙ“e, paggitadon heeefeeru e goopi.

45:32.text: SiЙ“e mbi*aama:pellet fodoore Alla fodani jiyaabe mum wonde ma O ummitibe O yobabe ko goonga mbo alah sikke, darnga ko goonga sikke alah heen ngoolonee mbo, mbi*on: Min nganndah o darnga, min cikkiti sikke loodo wonde ma mbo ar, min njananaaka gargol mammba.

45:33.text: FeeГұaniЙ“e boneeji golle mum en nder aduna ummorde e keefaraagu e goopi, lepte Й—eЙ“e njalkitatno tellii e mum en Й—eЙ“e njeertinteno e mum.

45:34.text: Alla daalaniЙ“e: hannde Min acca on e yiite hono no yejjatirЙ—on Гұalngu mon hannde ngu, on keblanaani ngu iimaan e golle lobbe, ko yiite woni ГұiiЙ“irde, on ngalah balla diiwanoowo mon leЙ“te.

45:35.text: LeЙ“te Й—e Й—e lepteЙ—on sabu ko njaggirno Й—on aayeeje Alla Й—e saboote e jalkitde, nguurndam aduna Й—am hodiri mon dakamme e tuuyooji majjam, hannde Й“e heeferЙ“e jalkitatnooЙ“e aayeeje Alla njaltatah yiite, Й“e keddato e henge haa pooma, Й“e nduttetaake e nguurndam aduna haa Й“e ngolla golle lobbe, Joomi mum en weletaake Й“e.

45:36.text: Ko Alla tan woodani jettoode, Jom kammuuji e leydi, Jom denndaangal tagu.

45:37.text: Ina woodani Mbo teddungal e manngu nder kammuuji e leydi, kanko woni poolЙ—o mbo gooto foolatah, nyeenya e tagu makko e hoddira makko e jiilgol makko e sariya makko.

46:1.text: Haa, Miim. Yewtere fii sugu Й—ee kalfe yawtiino ka simoore Al baqarah.

46:2.text: Jippagol Alqur'aana, ko immorde ka Allah, hay foolondirtah e Makko, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e tagu Mun e kattal Mun e toppitagol e sariya Mun.

46:3.text: Men tagiraali kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin e kon ko woni hakkunde majji, fii fijindaaru; ko Men tagiri Й—in fow, ko hoore goonga e ГұeeГұe yottiiЙ—e: wano fii no jeyaaЙ“e Й“en anndira Й—in, woodeede Mo, Й“e rewa Mo Kanko tun, hara Й“e kafidaali Mo e huunde, e no Й“e tottira paandale lontineede Й“e nden ka leydi, haa e caatal happaangal, ngal Allah tun anndi fii mun. YedduЙ“e Allah Й“en non, ko Й“e Й—uurniiЙ“e e kon ko Й“e jertinaara ka Deftere Allah, Й“e haajaaka e Й—um.

46:4.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee sirkooЙ“e Й—uurniiЙ“e e goonga: yeetee lam fii sanamuuji mon Й—i rewoton accon Allah Й—in, ko honЙ—um e geЙ—e Й—i tagi e leydi ndin? Hara ko fello? Kaa ko ilol? Kaa hara hiЙ—i kafidi e Allah ka tagugol kammuuli Й—in? Awa addanee lam Deftere jipporiinde ka Allah, ado ndee Alqur'aanaare, maa batte ganndal ko adinooЙ“e acii, si wonii ko on goonguЙ“e e ko nodditorton, wonnde sanamuuji mon Й—in hino hanndi e reweede!

46:5.text: Alaa Й“urЙ—o majjude, wa on rewuЙ—o ko wanaa Allah, sanamu ko jaabotaako mo haa Darngal daroo! Hara non, Й—in sanamuuji, ko welsindiiЙ—i e ko Й“e rewata Й—in kon, wanaa fii Й—i nafa Й“e maa Й—i lorra Й“e.

46:6.text: E hoore ko sanamuuji Й—in nafataaЙ“e kon aduna, ko non kadi woni si yimЙ“e Й“en mooЙ“oyaama Г‘alnde Darngal, Й—i wontanoyay Й“e ayЙ“e, Й“e daЙ—ndinoo e majji, Й“e wona e yeddugol ko Й“e rewaynooЙ—i kon.

46:7.text: Si Aayeeje Amen jippinaaЙ—e e NulaaЙ—o Amen on janngaama e maЙ“Й“e, yeddunooЙ“e Alqur'aana Й“en tuma nde jippornoo e NulaaЙ—o on wi'a: ЖҠum ko mbilewu Й“anngungu, wanaa wahayu Allah nii.

46:8.text: Kaa Й“ee sirkooЙ“e wi'ay woni: wonnde Muhammadu fefindi ndee Alqur'aanaare, o dammbi Allah? Awa an NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“e: si taw mi fefindi nde, haray doo on duncantaa lam e huunde e lepte Allah Й—en, si wonii O faandanike lam Й—um. Haray ko honno mi yollirta hoore am e lepte, fefindorgol nde? Ko Allah Й“uri anndude on, tuma nde jumpirton e mayre tuuningol nde. O yonii non seedee hakkunde men. Ko Kanko woni Haforoowo junuubi kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e.

46:9.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee sirkooЙ“e fennuЙ“e Annabaaku maa: wanaa min Allah adii nulude, sakko ЕӢalЙ—on e ko mi noddata on e mun kon, Й—uuЙ—uЙ“e adinoke lam. Awa kadi, mi anndaa ko Allah waЙ—atammi, maa ko O waЙ—ata on aduna. Min on jokkaa, si wanaa ko Allah woni wahayinnde kon e am; mi wowlataa mi huuwataa, si wanaa ko yaadi e wahayu. Mi laataaki, si wanaa jertinoowo on e lepte Allah Й—en, Й“annginana on Й—um.

46:10.text: NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee fennooЙ“e: Yeetee lam, si tawii le ndee Alqur'aanaare ko immornde ka Allah, yedduЙ—on Й—um, goЙ—Й—o e geЙ—alЙ“e Israa'iila Й“en seeditii wonde ko non woniri, tippude e ko ari kon ka Tawreeta fii mayre, kanko o gomЙ—ina nde, onon kan townitanoЙ—on gomЙ—ingol nde; haray ontuma wanaa on tooГұuЙ“e? Awa le, pellet, Allah fewnataa yimЙ“e tooГұooЙ“e goonga Й“en.

46:11.text: YedduЙ“e Alqur'aana e ko NulaaЙ“e Й“en addani Й“e kon wi'ani gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en: si tawno ko Muhamaadu addunoo ko goonga fewnoowo e moЖҙЖҙere, Й“ee waasuЙ“e maccuЙ“e lo'inaaЙ“e aditotanooko men e mun. Nde tawnoo non Й“e feewiraali ko NulaaЙ“e Й“en addani Й“e kon, ma Й“e wi'u: ko o addani men ko'o, ko fenaande Й“ooynde, menen non men jokkataa fenaande.

46:12.text: Hino aditii ndee Alqur'aanaare, Deftere Tawreeta jippinaande nden e Annabi Muusaa (yo o his), Й—owornde e goonga, e yurmeende wonannde kala gomЙ—inЙ—o nde o jokki nde e Й“iЙ—Й“e Israa'iila Й“en. Ndee Alqur'aanaare jippinaande e Muhammadu (jom kisiyee) kan, ko Deftere goonginirnde Й—eya Defte adinooЙ—e nde, e Й—emngal aarabu, fii yo jertinir nde, tooГұirЙ“e ko'e mun Й“en sirkugol yedda Allah, e wewlinirgol nde moЖҙЖҙimЙ“e hakkunde mun e taguЙ—o Й“e On e hakkunde maЙ“Й“e e tagu Makko ngun.

46:13.text: Pellet, wi'uЙ“e Й“en: Ko Allah woni Joomi amen, wanaa goЙ—Й—um goo , refti Й“e tabiti e gomЙ—inal e golle moЖҙЖҙe, kulol alanaa Й“en laakara, wanaa kamЙ“e kadi sunoytoo ton, fii ko yawtiЙ“e aduna.

46:14.text: Ko Й“en siforЙ“e Й—in sifaaji, woni yimЙ“e Aljanna Й“en duumotooЙ“e Й“en ton poomaa, njoЙ“di golle maЙ“Й“e moЖҙЖҙe Й—en aduna.

46:15.text: Men yamirii neЙ—Й—anke on jamirgol teeЕӢtungol, wonnde yo o moЖҙЖҙor e jibimЙ“emo Й“en, Й—iggangol Й“e e nguurndam maЙ“Й“e, e Й“aawo maayde maЙ“Й“e, ko lunndaaki sari'a on, teЕӢtinii non jiido makko soworiiЙ—o mo saЙ—teende, o jibiniri mo kadi saЙ—teende; hakkunde soweede mo e enteede mo, ko lebbi cappanЙ—e tati. Haa si wonii o yottike cemmbe makko Й—en ka ЖҙoЖҙugol e ka mawnugol, o timminii duuЙ“i cappanЙ—e nayi, o wi'a: Joomi, longinam yettugol neema Maa mo neeminirЙ—aa mi mi e jibimЙ“e lam Й“en, e ndemi gollata golle moЖҙЖҙuЙ—e weltinyЙ—e Ma, jaЙ“anaa mi Й—um, moЖҙЖҙinanaa lam Й“iЙ—Й“e am Й“en. Min mi tuubanii ma junuubi am Й—in, ko mi jeyaaЙ—o e jeЙ“Й“ilaniiЙ“e Й—oftagol yamaruyeeje Maa.

46:16.text: Ko Й“en woni Й“e Men jaЙ“anta ko Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude e ko Й“e golli kon, Men yawtana Й“e bonЙ—i maЙ“Й“e, hara Й“e nanngitirtaake Й—i, ko Й“e jeyaaЙ“e e yimЙ“e Aljanna Й“en. Ko Й“e fodaa koo, ko fodoore goonga nde Й“e fodanoo, ko pellet, nde hunnete.

46:17.text: Kala non wi'anЙ—o jibimЙ“e mo Й“en: wus mo'on ! kere on foday lam immintineede Й“aawo maayde am, hara gomЙ—ii mofte Й—uuЙ—uЙ—e yawtiino ado lam, Й“en fow maayi, kono le Й“e immintinaaka? Hara ontuma, jibimЙ“e mo Й“en hino Й—aЙ“Й“ira Allah faabo, nde O fewnata Й“iЙ—Й—o laЙ“Й“e on e gomЙ—inal, Й“e wi'ana mo: Ee bone maa ! kori gomЙ—in ummital. Tawde pellet, ko Allah fodi kon fii ummital, laatoto ko sikke alaa e mu'un. O wi'itana Й“e: ko wowletee e fii ummital kon wonaali, si wanaa ko eggaa e defte adinooЙ“e Й“en, Й—um tabitintah e Allah.

46:18.text: Ko Й“en woni Й“e lepte waЙ—Й—i e mun, jeyaaЙ“e e mofte wulinooЙ—e ado maЙ“Й“e, immorde e jinna e yimЙ“e. Pellet, Й“e laatino sooyuЙ“e. Tawde Й“e sooyinirno ko'e-maЙ“Й“e e yimЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en naatugol Yiite.

46:19.text: Hino woodani kala fedde e yimЙ“e Aljanna e Yiite Й“en: darjaaji, yeru golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en. Darjaaji yimЙ“e Aljanna Й“en, ko toowuЙ—i, darjaaji yimЙ“e Yiite Й“en kan, ko joluЙ—i. ЖҠum Й—on, ko fii no Allah hunnira Й“e njoЙ“di golle maЙ“Й“e ndin, e hoore Й“e tooГұiroytaake Г‘alnde Darngal, Й—uytaneede maa Й“eydaneede.

46:20.text: Г‘alnde yedduЙ“e Allah Й“en Й“e fenni NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, weeЙ“itiroytee e Yiite ngen fii lepteede, Й“e feliree wi'aneede: on lanniino fii moЖҙЖҙi mon Й—in ka nguurdam mon aduna, dakmitorЙ—on welii-fotii. Hannde non, on yoЙ“itirte lepte hoynooje on, sabu ko townitoraynoЙ—on kon ka hoore leydi, ko aldaa e goonga, e sabu ko yaltirnoЙ—on kon e Й—oftaare Allah, geddi e keeferaaku.

46:21.text: Janto an NulaaЙ—o, fii Huudi, musiЙ—Й—o AadinkooЙ“e Й“en ka dammbe, tuma nde o jertinirnoo yimЙ“e makko Й“en, e lepte Allah yanooje e maЙ“Й“e, hara hiЙ“e ka cuuЙ—i maЙ“Й“e nder ayЙ—e nano duunde arab nden - gomЙ—ii le NulaaЙ“e jertinooЙ“e goo jertiniino yimЙ“e mun, ado Huudi e Й“aawo makko, wonnde : wata on rewu dey, si wanaa Allah tun. Min mi hulanii on, onon yimЙ“e am, lepte Гұalaande mawnde, woni Г‘alnde Darngal.

46:22.text: YimЙ“e makko Й“en wi'ani mo: E a aru e amen fii no firlitaa men e reweteeЙ—i amen Й—in? ЖҠum gasataa ! Addan men kisan, ko kammbiranЙ—aa men kon e lepte, si wonii ko a jeyeeЙ—o e goonguЙ“e Й“en.

46:23.text: O maaki: Ganndal fii lepte Й—en, ko ka Allah woni, wonaa min anndi fii mun. Min on, mi yottinanay on tun woni, ko mi nulaa kon e mooЙ—on. Ko woni tun, mi yi'ii ko on yimЙ“e majjaaЙ“e ko nafata on, waЙ—i si Й—on sela Й—um, jokkiron lorra mon, sabu majjere mon nden.

46:24.text: Nde lepte Й—e Й“e hawjirnoo Й—en arunoo e maЙ“Й“e, Й“e yi'i duulere no weeЙ“itori ka kammu, senngo ayЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, Й“e wi'i: ndee ko duulere toЙ“anay nde men. Annaba Huudu maakani Й“e: wanaa ko sikkuЙ—on kon ! Ndee duulere, ko lepte Й—e hawjirnoЙ—on Й—en: Й—um non ko henndu jillundu lepte muusuЙ—e.

46:25.text: Hindu muncira kala ko ndu rewi e mun, yamiroore Allah, halkugol Й—um. ЖҒe wonti halkaaЙ“e, tawi huunde yi'etaake si wanaa cuuЙ—i maЙ“Й“e Й—in, ko seeditoo wonnde Й“e woodano Й—on. Ko wano Men yoЙ“itiri non Й“en Й—on lepte muusuЙ—e, Men yoЙ“itirta bonnirooЙ“e geddi e keeferaaku Й“en.

46:26.text: GomЙ—ii Men yeЙ—ii yimЙ“e Huudi Й“en e nooneeji newaare, ko Men yeЙ—aali on. Men waЙ—ani Й“e nanЙ—e, e giiЙ—e e Й“erЙ—e. Kono nanЙ—e maЙ“Й“e, e giiЙ—e maЙ“Й“e e Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e fow duncanaano Й“e goЙ—Й—um, daЙ—ndaali Й“e lepte Allah, tawde Й“e wonuno e yeddugol Allah Й—en, O jippini e maЙ“Й“e, Й—en lepte Й—e Й“e jalkitiraynoo NulaaЙ—o maЙ“Й“e on Huudu, si on jertiniriino Й“e Й—e.

46:27.text: GomЙ—ii Men halkiino ca'e yimЙ“e Makka Й“en wonunooЙ“e takko mon : Men halki Aadi'en, e Samuuda'en, e yimЙ“e Luutu Й“en e wondiiЙ“e Madyana Й“en. Men Й—uЙ—Й—inani Й“e hujjaaji e dallillaaji, jortagol no Й“e yiltora e keeferaaku maЙ“Й“e.

46:28.text: Ko haЙ—no sanamuuji Й—i Й“e jogitornoo Й—in reweteeЙ—i gaanin Allah, Й—i Й“e Й“aЙ—tinoraynoo dewe e kirse, faaboo Й“e? Kono Й—i hunnantaa Й—um. Wurin, Й—in wirnanike Й“e fewndo ka Й“e hatonjini e majji; ko Й—um wonunoo fenaande e fefinannde maЙ“Й“e, nde Й“e aaЖҙoraynoo wonnde Й—in sanamuuji tefanoyay Й“e ka Allah.

46:29.text: Janto an NulaaЙ—o, tuma nde Men imminnoo fedde jinna e maaЙ—a, hiЙ—i heЙ—oo Alqur'aana jippinaande nden e maaЙ—a. Nde Й—i tawanoo kin janngin, yoga e majji wi'ani yoga: DeЖҙЖҙee haa heЙ—oЙ—en nde. Nde NulaaЙ—o (jom kisiyee on) gaynunoo janngugol, Й—i yiltitori ka yimЙ“e majji, jertinirgol Й—e lepte Allah Й—en, si tawii Й—i gomЙ—inaali ndee Alqur'aanaare.

46:30.text: ЖҠi wi'i: Ko onon yo mbatu amen, men nanii Deftere jippinaande Й“aawo Muusaa, goonginnde Й—eya Defte immorЙ—e ka Allah, adiiЙ—e nde. Ndee Deftere nde men nani, ko fewnaynde e goonga, e laawol focciingol, ngool woni laawol lislaamu ngol.

46:31.text: Ko onon yo mbatu amen, nootee Muhammadu, e goonga ka o noddata on e mun kan, gomЙ—inon wonnde ko o NulaaЙ—o Joomi makko. Ontuma, Allah haforanay on junuubi mon Й—in, O hisina on e lepte muusuЙ—e, habbitinooЙ—e on, si on gomЙ—inaano.

46:32.text: Kala mo nootaaki Muhammadu (yo o his) e goonga ka o noddata e mun kan, wanaa doo o laawotooЙ—o Allah ka hoore leydi, o alaa kadi giЙ—o gaanin Allah, ko daЙ—nda mo lepte. Ko Й“en woni e nder majjere Й“anngunde.

46:33.text: E Й“ee sirkooЙ“e fennooЙ“e ummital yi'aali wonnde ko Allah tagi kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, O ronkiraali tagugol e hoore ko Й—i mawni kon fow, wonnde ko O haЙ—tanЙ—o wuurnitugol maayЙ“e Й“en fii hasbeede yoЙ“itee? Pellet, Himo haЙ—tani Й—um. Kanko seniiЙ—o On, ko O haЙ—tanЙ—o kala huunde. O ronkataa wuurnitugol maayЙ“e.

46:34.text: Г‘alnde yedduЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o mun on weeЙ“itoytee e Yiite ngen fii lepteede, Й“e feliree wwi'eede: wanaa goonga reenuЙ—on e Й—ee lepte? Kaa on fenniray wano fenniraynoЙ—on aduna non? ЖҒe wi'a: Ko non tigiri woniri, men woondirii Joomi amen. ЖҒe wi'anee: awa meeЙ—iree lepte Й—en, sabu ko yeddirЙ—on kon Allah.

46:35.text: MuГұГұo an NulaaЙ—o, e ko yimЙ“e maa Й“en fennete kon, wano yimЙ“e pellital Й“en ka NulaaЙ“e muГұГұornoo non: Й“en woni Nuuhu, e Ibraahiima, e Muusaa e Iisaa (yo Й“e his); wata a hawjiramЙ“e lepte. Г‘alnde Й“e yi'oyta lepte Й—e Й“e kambirananoo Й—en laakara, Й“e wa'oyay wa si Й“e ГұiiЙ“aano aduna, si wanaa dumunna-hun Гұalorma, hakke ko lepte Й—en juutanta Й“e. Awa ndee Alqur'aanaare jippinaa-nde e Muhammadu (yo o his) no yoini e yimЙ“e e jinna. Haray non, halkiroytaake lepte, si wanaa yaltirnooЙ“e Й“en e Й—oftaare Allah nden, geddi e keeferaaku.

47:1.text: ЖҒen yedduЙ“e Allah Й“e sakkii yimЙ“e Й“en e diina Makko kan, Allah bonnii fii golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en.

47:2.text: ЖҒen gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah, Й“e golli golle moЖҙЖҙe, Й“e gomЙ—ini ko Allah jippini kon e NulaaЙ—o Makko on Muhammadu (yo o his) - on goonga immorЙ—o e Joomi maЙ“Й“e - O yawtanii Й“e bonЙ—i maЙ“Й“e Й—in, O moЖҙЖҙinii kadi fiyaaku maЙ“Й“e on aduna e laakara.

47:3.text: Ko waЙ—i si Й—in feddeeji Й—iЙ—i yoЙ“itiraa non, ko ko tawi kon yedduЙ“e Allah Й“en jokkii meere nden, gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o mun on kan jokki goonga kan immorde e Jommi maЙ“Й“e. Fedde kala yoЙ“iraa ko haandi kon. Awa ko wano Allah Й“annginiri non Гұaawoore Й—in feddeeji Й—iЙ—i : gomЙ—imЙ“e e heeferЙ“e, woni ko O piyiranta yimЙ“e Й“en, mise maЙ“Й“e Й—en. O humindira huunde kala e nanndo mun.

47:4.text: Onon muumini'en, si on hawrii e yedduЙ“e Й“en ka hare, ko soppugol daaЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, jokkiron non haa Й—uЙ—Й—inon warugol Й“e. Si Й—um waЙ—ii, ko haЙ“Й“ugol koyЙ—e dahaaЙ“e Й“en. Ko onon anndi si on accitiray Й“e nii tun, maa si Й“e yoЙ“ay soktiigu ngun. Fow e mun, jokkee haЙ“ugol Й“e ngol, haa hare nden Й“uuЙ“ira silmugol Й“e ngol maa haldigal mon e maЙ“Й“e. Ko jantaa koo, ko Й—um woni Гұaawoore Allah nden, si Allah muuyuno non, O wallirayno gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en e dow heeferЙ“e Й“en, ko aldaa e hare, ko woni tun, O sar'inir jihaadi, fii jarribagol yoga mon e dow yoga: O ndaarndoo haЙ“ooЙ“e Й“en ka muumini'en e Й“e haЙ“ataa Й“en, O ndaarndora gomЙ—inЙ—o on kadi keefeero on; si gomЙ—inЙ—o on waraama, o naata Aljanna, si ko kanko keefeero on, on naata Yiite. Kala non waraaЙ“e fii Allah Й“en, pellet, Allah yeebataa golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en.

47:5.text: Arma O fewna Й“e goonga, e nguurndam maЙ“Й“e aduna, O moЖҙЖҙina fiyaaku maЙ“Й“e on.

47:6.text: Г‘alnde Darngal, O naadoyay Й“e Aljanna, mo O Й“annginannoo Й“e fii mun.

47:7.text: Ko onon yo gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah,gollirЙ“e ko O sar'ini,si on wallirii Allah, wallugol diina e Annabaajo Makko on haЙ“a heeferЙ“e Й“en,O wallitoray on foolugol Й“e,O tabintina teppe mon Й—en ka haЙ“idugol e maЙ“Й“e.

47:8.text: YedduЙ“e Й“en Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, hayrere e halakuyee woodanii Й“e, Allah bonnii kadi fii golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en.

47:9.text: Ko waЙ—i si on halakuyee yani e maЙ“Й“e, ko tawde Й“e aГұii Alqur'aana nde Allah jippini nden e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, fii hinde nodda e bajjinЙ—ingol Mo. Allah bonni fii golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en, Й“e wonti hayruЙ“e aduna e laakara.

47:10.text: E Й“ee fennooЙ“e yiilaaki e leydi ndin, Й“e teskoo ko honno battane Й“eya fennunooЙ“e ado maЙ“Й“e wa'unoo? ЖҠum wonuno ko kaani. Tawde Allah muncituno cuuЙ—i maЙ“Й“e Й—in e hoore maЙ“Й“e, Й“e halkodii e Й“iЙ—Й“e e jawle maЙ“Й“e. Awae hino woodani yedduЙ“e kala jamaanu e nokku.

47:11.text: Ko waЙ—i sabu ndin njoЙ“di haalaandi e Й—in feddeeji Й—iЙ—i, ko tawde ko Allah woni walloowo gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en; hara non yedduЙ“e Й“en, ballo woo alanaa Й“e.

47:12.text: Pellet, Allah naadoyay Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Й“e golli golle moЖҙЖҙe, Aljannaji Й—i canЙ—i ilata senngo ley kuЙ“eeje e leЙ—Й—e majji. ЖҒen non yedduЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, hiЙ“e dakmitora aduna, jokkugol tuuyooji maЙ“Й“e, Й“e Гұaamira wano neemoraaЙ—i Й—in Гұaamirta: Й“e himmiraa si wanaa deedi e farjuuji maЙ“Й“e; hara non Г‘alndЙ— Darngal, ko Yiite ngen woni jaaЖҙorde maЙ“Й“e.

47:13.text: ЖҠuuЙ—ii e ca'e mofte adinooЙ“e, Й“urnooЙ“e tiiЙ—ude doole e jawle e Й“iЙ—Й“e, e dii ndee saare Makka, nde yimЙ“e mun raЙ—i maa e mun, Men halkuno Й“en fow, ko Й“e fenniri kon NulaaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en. Ballo woo alanaaЙ“e, mo no daЙ—nda Й“e e lepte Allah Й—en, si Й—e aranii Й“e. Awa Men ronkataa halkude yimЙ“e Makko Й“en kadi, si Men faandanike Й—um.

47:14.text: Kere ko on wonЙ—o e hujja Й“anngirЙ—o ka Joomi mun, rewiroowo Mo e ko Й“anngi, wa'i wa Й“en Й“e seytaane cuЙ—inani kuuЙ—e mun bonЙ—e Й—en, Й“e jokki mbeleeЙ—e maЙ“Й“e rewugol sanamu ngol, faggitoo bakkaatu, e fennugol NulaaЙ“e?

47:15.text: Ko woni sifa Aljanna Mo Allah fodi hulooЙ“e Mo Й“en: ko mo canЙ—i ndiyam woni e mun Й—am waylaaki fii neeЙ“de, e canЙ—i Й“ira Й—am waylataa dakamme mun, e canЙ—i konnjam welanЙ—am yarooЙ“e, e canЙ—i njuuri laЙ“Й“inaandi. Hino woodani Й“e kadi ton: noone kala e Й“iЙ—Й“e leЙ—Й—e ko Й“e faaletee, e yawtaneede junuubi immorde ka Allah. Hara Й“en Й—on wa'ay wa Й“e njoЙ“di mun wonoyta luttinoyeede ka Yiite poomaa, Й“e yarnee ton diyam fatinaaЙ—am, Й—am taЖҙa tetekki maЙ“Й“e Й—in, hakkee ko Й—am wuli?

47:16.text: Hino e naafiqi'en, heЙ—itotooЙ“e maa an NulaaЙ—o, Й“e heЙ—itora nanugol ronka jaЙ“ude, wurin Й“e Й—uurnoo ontuma. Haa si wonii Й“e yaltii ka maaЙ—a, Й“e wi'ana Й“en Й“e Allah okki ganndal: ko honЙ—um dee, o wi'unoo naanen? Majjintingol Й—uurnoo. Ko Й“en woni Й“e Allah noti e Й“erЙ—e mun Й“en, moЖҙЖҙere woo hewtataa e majje, Й“e jokki mbeleeЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, Й—e majjini Й“e e goonga kan.

47:17.text: ЖҒen feewirЙ“e laawol goonga Й“en e jokkugol ko NulaaЙ—o (jom kisiyee) on addi kon, Joomi maЙ“Й“e Й“eydu Й“e peewal e sawaaba, O hawrindiniЙ“e kadi gollugol ko daЙ—ndata Й“e Yiite.

47:18.text: Hara Й“ee heeferЙ“e no habbii si nde Darngal ngal ardata Й“e juhal? GomЙ—ii le maandeeji maggal feeГұiino: wano nuleede Annabiijo on (yo o his), e feccagol lewru ndun. Ko honno non Й“e waajitorta si Darngal ngal aroyii?

47:19.text: Fellitu an NulaaЙ—o, wonnde reweteeЙ—o e goonga alaa, si wanaa Allah, Й—aЙ“Й“iraa Mo haforaneede junuubi maa Й—in, e junuubi gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en ka worЙ“e e ka rewЙ“e. Allah no anndi dillanЙ—e mon Й—en Гұalorma, e ГұiiЙ“irЙ—e mon Й—en jemma. Huunde e mun suuЙ—aaki Mo.

47:20.text: GomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“en hino wi'a yeloo nde Allah jippinta cortewol e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, yewtungol fii Гұaawoore hare : hara Allah jippinayno cortewol jantotoongol fi hare. Si wonii non Allah jippinii cortewol ГұeГұaangol e Й“anngugol e Гұaawooje mun, jantiingol fii hare, a tinay an NulaaЙ—o, Й“en naafiqiiЙ“e Й“e sikkitaare woni e Й“erЙ—e mun no ndaare, ndaarЙ—e mo maayde faЙ—Й—ini, hakkee kulol e Й—enЖҙere. Allah kammbirani Й“e wonnde lepte maЙ“Й“e Й—en, ko ko hewti Й“e, sabu ko salori kon hare nden, Й“e huli nde.

47:21.text: ko Й—oftagol Allah, e wowlugol konngol moЖҙЖҙol (Й“uri haanannde Й“e). Si wonii hare nden farlaama, soobee nanngaama, hara nun Й“e gomЙ—inirno Allah goonga, Й“e Й—oftorii Mo non kadi, ko Й—um Й“uraynoo moЖҙЖҙannde Й“e e dii naafiqaaku e yeddugol jamirooje Makko on.

47:22.text: Hino hasii e fiyaaku mon, nde tawata si on Й—uurniima e gomЙ—ingol Allah ngol Й—oftoo Mo, nde bonnirton e leydi ndin geddi e keeferaaku, taЖҙon emЙ—amaaji mon, wano wa'unoЙ—on fewndo majjere mon.

47:23.text: Ko Й“en sifroЙ“e Й—in sifaaji bonnugol ka leydi, taЖҙa enЙ—amaaji mun, woni Й“e Allah woЙ—Й—indini Й“en e yurmeede Makko, O faaЙ—ini noppi maЙ“Й“e Й—in gaay e nanugol jaЙ“a goonga, O wumini kadi giiЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en gaay e yi'ugol taskoo.

47:24.text: Ko haЙ—i Й“ee Й—uurniiЙ“e Alqur'aana taskoo ko woni e mayre? Si Й“e waЙ—uno Й—um, nde Й—owayno Й“e e kala moЖҙЖҙere, nde woЙ—Й—ina Й“e kadi e kala bone. Kaa hara ko e Й“erЙ—e ГұaawiraaЙ—e sokeede Й“ee woni, hara waaju hewtataa Й—e, sakko Й—e nafitora?

47:25.text: Pellet, Й“en yiltiiЙ“e e gomЙ—inal mun ngal faade e keeferaaku e naafiqaaku, Й“aawo nde hujja on ГұiiЙ“ude e dow maЙ“Й“e, goonga Annabiijo on mo jam e kisiyee woni e mun on Й“anngani Й“e, ko seytaane woni ko cuЙ—inani Й“e ngun keeferaaku e naafiqaaku maЙ“Й“e, o hodiri Й“e Й—um ko juuti.

47:26.text: Nde majjineede ko heЙ“i Й“e, ko tawde Й“e suuЙ—ino Й“e wi'ani sirkooЙ“e aГұuЙ“e wahayu mo Allah jippini on e NulaaЙ—o Mun on: Men Й—oftoto on e yoga e piiji, wano salagol hare nden. Allah non hino anndi ko Й“e suuЙ—ata e ko Й“e feГұГұinta. Huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo e Й—um. Himo feГұГұinana NulaaЙ—o Makko on, ko O yiЙ—i e mun.

47:27.text: Ko honno yiiruЙ—aa lepte maЙ“Й“e, e fiyaaku maЙ“Й“e bonЙ—o mo Й“e woni e mun oo, si Malaa'ika'en timminii fiii maЙ“Й“e, hara hiЙ“e bantora geece maЙ“Й“e e dote maЙ“Й“e Й“ole njanЙ—e.

47:28.text: ЖҠen lepte maЙ“Й“e, ko sabu Й“e jokkii kala ko tikkinta Allah kon: immorde e keeraaku, e naafiqaaku e lunndagol Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Й“e aГұi kadi ko Й“aЙ—tinta Й“e kon e Joomi maЙ“Й“e, waЙ—a sabu O weleede Й“e: immorde e gomЙ—ingol Allah, jokka NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Kanko kadi O bonni fii golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en.

47:29.text: Hara Й“en naafiqiiЙ“e Й“e Гұawu sikke woni e Й“erЙ—e mun sikku wonnde Allah yaltintaa ngaynguuji maЙ“Й“e Й—in O feГұГұina? Ko ma Men waЙ—iru Й—um jarribagol ndaarndoo, fii senndindirgol hakkunde gomЙ—inirЙ—o goonga on e fenuЙ—o on, goonguЙ—o on anndee, naafiqiijo on wirtoo.

47:30.text: Sinno Men haajuno anndingol an NulaaЙ—o, Й“ee naafiqiiЙ“e, Men holleteno Й“e. A anndirayno Й“e maandeeji maЙ“Й“e Й—in; a anndirayno Й“e no Й“e wowlirta non. Allah non hino anndi golle mon Й—en. Huunde e mun suuЙ—aaki mo. O yoЙ“itoyay on njoЙ“di golle mon Й—en.

47:31.text: Ma Men jarribor on, onon muumuni'en, jihaadi e haЙ“ugol ayЙ“e Й“en, haa Men annda tiiЙ—norayЙ“e Й“en e laawol Allah ngol fii Allah, e muГұГұotooЙ“e Й“en e mon ka haЙ“idugol e ayЙ“e Makko Й“en. Men jarriboo on kadi, Men annda goonguЙ—o e fenuЙ—o on hakkunde mon.

47:32.text: Pellet, yedduЙ“e Й“en Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Й“e faddii laawol diina Allah kan, Й“e sakki woЙ—Й“e goo e makka, Й“e woni e lunndagol NulaaЙ—o Makko on ayra e makko Й“aawo nde Й“anngani Й“e wonnde pellet, ko o Annabaajo, Й“en lorrataa Allah, ko hoore-maЙ“Й“e Й“e woni e lorde. Ma Allah bonnu golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en.

47:33.text: Ko onon yo gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah, Й“e gollitiri sari'a Makko on! ЖҠoftee Allah, Й—oftoЙ—on NulaaЙ—o on e ko Й“e yamiri on, woЙ—Й—itoЙ—on e kala ko Й“e haЙ—i on, wata on bonnir golle mon Й—en, keeferaaku e yiingo.

47:34.text: Pellet, Й“e yedduЙ“e Allah, Й“e sakkii hoore-maЙ“Й“e Й“e sakki kadi woЙ—Й“e goo e diina Allah kan, refti Й“e maayi e keeferaaku maЙ“Й“e ngun hara Й“e tuubaali, Allah haforanoytaa Й“en, surroygol junuubi maЙ“Й“e Й—in. O nanngitiroyay Й“e Й—i, O loЙ“Й“a Й“e ka Yiite, Й“e lutta ton poomaa.

47:35.text: Onon muumini'en, wata on lo'inkino yeeso ayЙ“e mon Й“en, noddon moЖҙЖҙintingol ado kamЙ“e Й“e noddude on e mun. Ko onon woni fooluЙ“e Й“en, Allah no wonndiri e mon ballal e faabo Makko, O Й—uytantaa on huunde e njondi golle mon Й—en, wurin O Й“eydanay on e Й“ural Makko ngal.

47:36.text: Anndee pellet, nguurndam aduna Й—amko fijindaaru e mbeleeЙ—e. Haqqiloowo non sokolirtaa Й—um gaay e laakara. Hara le si on gomЙ—inii Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, on hulirii Allah Й—oftagol yamiraaЙ—i Makko Й—in woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in, O yeЙ—iray on njoЙ“di golle mon Й—en no timmiri, O lamndotaa- ko on jawle mon Й—en fow, ko yeru ko waЙ—Й—ii kon e Zakka tun O lamndii on.

47:37.text: Si O aru Й—aЙ“Й“irde on jawle mon Й—en fow, haa O doonii e Й—um, wuddiron Й—e, O yaltina non ngayngu ngu Й“erЙ—e mon Й—en soomunoo e fii nafqugol laawol Makko ngol; waЙ—i si O acci Й—on lamndagol on Й—um, ko yumingol on.

47:38.text: Hey mon onon Й—oo, hiЙ—on noddee e fii wintagol seeЙ—a e jawle mon Й—en, fii laawol Allah ngol, wanaa jawle mon Й—en fow Й—aЙ“Й“iraЙ—on e Й—um. Hino e mo'on non, salorayЙ“e Й—um nguddam. Kala non wuddirЙ—o seeЙ—a e jawdi muin ndin fii laawol Allah ngol, haray ko hoore-makko o aГұani baraaji wintagol ngol. Ko Allah woni Galo Mo hatonjinaa e ko wintotoЙ—on, Onon kan wonЙ—on waasuЙ“e hatonjimЙ“e e Makko. Si on yiltike e lislaamu on haa on jokkoyii keeferaaku ngun, O gaynay fii mooЙ—on, O addoyay woЙ—Й“e goo, hara non Й“en wa'oytaa wano mon, Й“en ko Й—oftoytooЙ“e Mo wonata.

48:1.text: Men udditanii ma an NulaaЙ—o, uddital Й“anngungal, Гұannde beldal ngal Hudaybiyyah.

48:2.text: Fii no Allah yawtinrane junuubi maa ado ngal uddital, e ko sakkitii Й“aawo maggal, O timminira neema on e maaЙ—a wallugol ma, O fewne e laawol focciingol; woni laawol lislaamu ngol.

48:3.text: E no Allah wallire ballal tiiЙ—ungal e foolugol ayЙ“e maa Й“en.

48:4.text: Ko Allah woni jippinЙ—o tabital e deeЖҙere e Й“erЙ—e gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, fii no Й“e Й“eydora gomЙ—inal e hoore gomЙ—inal maЙ“Й“e ngal. Ko Allah heerani jeygol koneeli kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, Himo semmbinira Й—i kala Mo O yiЙ—ani e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Allah siforii wonnde AnnduЙ—o ko moЖҙЖҙani jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o ko O dognata e ballal e semmbingol ko O wallitorta kon.

48:5.text: E fii no Allah naadira Й“en worЙ“e gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on e rewЙ“e gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, Aljannaaji Й—i canЙ—i ilata senngo leydi kuЙ“eeje e leЙ—Й—e mun, e no O montirana Й“e bonЙ—i maЙ“Й“e Й—in, hara O nanngitirtaa Й“e Й—i. Kon ko jantaa Й—on wonii hebde ko tora ko Й—uum woni aljanna, e deestaade ko hulaa ko duum woni nanngireede bondi di dum ko ka Allah, ko maloore mawnde, nde sugu alaa.

48:6.text: E no O leptira naafiqiiЙ“e worЙ“e Й“en e naafiqiiЙ“e rewЙ“e Й“en, e sirkooЙ“e worЙ“e Й“en e sirkooЙ“e rewЙ“e Й“en, sikkooЙ“e Й“en woonde Allah wallataa fii diina Makko kan, haa O toowna fii Konngol Makko ngol. Awa yiiloonde lepte wonii e maЙ“Й“e. Allah tikkiranii Й“e sabu yeddugol Й“e ngol sikka Mo ko boni, O woЙ—Й—inii Й“e kadi e yurmeende Makko nden, O hebilanii Jahannama ka laakara, ko Й“e luttata poomaa adabaa. Nge bonii ruttorde!

48:7.text: Ko Allah jeyi koneeli kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin, Himo semmbinira Й—i mo O muuyani e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Allah siforii wonnde FooluЙ—o Mo fooletaake, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e tagu Mun e kattal Mun e toppitagol Mun.

48:8.text: Men nulirii ma an NulaaЙ—o, seedoytooЙ—o e mofte maa Й—en Г‘alnde Darngal, e wewlinoowo gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, ballal poolal ngal Allah marani Й“e ngal aduna, e neema mo O marani Й“e on laakara. Men Nulirmaa kadi hulЙ“inoroowo heeferЙ“e Й“en, koyeera e fooleede ko O fodi kon gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en huuway e maЙ“Й“e aduna, e lepte muusuЙ—e Й—e O hebilani Й“e Й—en laakara, hino habbitiiЙ“e.

48:9.text: Fii no gomЙ—iniron Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, mawninon mo, teddinon, SubbuhinanoЙ—on Allah bimmbi e kiikiiЙ—e.

48:10.text: Pellet, Й“en wonЙ“e ahodude e maaЙ—a an NulaaЙ—o, ka ahodal вҖңBayКҝat al-RiбёҚwДҒnвҖқ, fii haЙ“ugol sirkooЙ“e Й“en, anndu Й“en ko Allah Й“e ahda,dirta tawde ko Kanko yamiri Й“e haЙ“ugol sirkooЙ“e Й“en, ko kanko kadi warjo- tooЙ—oЙ“e. Haray junngo Allah hino senngo dow juuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en fewndo ka ahodal, Himo Жҙellitii e maЙ“Й“e, tawde huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo e fii maЙ“Й“e. Kala non firtuЙ—o ko ahodi kon e Allah wonnde o wallay diina Makko kan, haray lorra mun kan ko e makko yantata; kala kadi hunnuЙ—o ko ahodi kon e Allah wonnde wallay diina Makko kan, aray nde O okkata mo njoЙ“di mawndi, ndiin woni Aljanna.

48:11.text: ЖҒen Й“e Allah tultinnoo Й—owtugol ma ka setagol maaЙ—a Makka, aray nde Й“e wi'ani, si on feloyiiЙ“e: ko jawle amen Й—en e Й“eynguureeji amen Й—in woni ko haЙ—i men Й—owtugol ma. ЖҠaЙ“Й“iran men Allah haforaneede junuubi. Hara hiЙ“e wowlira Й—emЙ—e maЙ“Й“e, ko alaa e Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e; tawde Й“e tuubaali taho. Awa maakan Й“e: Hay gooto waawanaa on huunde ka Allah, si wonii O faandanike on moЖҙЖҙere, maa hara O faandani on bone. Wurin Allah siforii wonnde HumpitiiЙ—o ko golloton kon. Huunde e kuuЙ—e mon Й—en suuЙ—aaki Mo, ko etiЙ—on woo.

48:12.text: Nganto mon wiide ko jawle e Й“iЙ—Й“e mon tultini on yaadugol e makko, wanaa non woniri. Ko woni goonga kon, on sikkuno wonnde NulaaЙ—o on e sahaabaaЙ“e makko Й“en fow maayayno ton, hara Й“e artataa ka Й“eynguureeji maЙ“Й“e Madiina. Seytaane cuЙ—inani on Й—um ka Й“erЙ—e mon;sikkuЙ—on Joomi mon sikke bonЙ—e; wonnde O faabotaako NulaaЙ—o Makko on, laatiЙ—on yimЙ“e halkiraaЙ“e ngol sikkugol mon Allah sikke bonЙ—e e tultugol yaadude e NulaaЙ—o Makko on.

48:13.text: Kala dee mo gomЙ—inaali Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, ko yedduЙ—o. Haray non Men hebilanii yedduЙ“e Й“en Г‘alnde Darngal, Yiite dulbaynge, ke Й“e leptetee heen.

48:14.text: Ko Allah tun heeranii laamagol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin. Himo haforana junuubi mo O muuyani e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, O naada ontigi Aljanna; Himo leptira kadi nunЙ—al Makko ngal, mo O muuyani e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Allah siforii wonnde Haforoowo junuubi kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e.

48:15.text: Aray nde Й“en Й“e Allah tultinnoo wi'a, tuma fokkitanoyton onon gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, konu-honyri ndin Khaybar, ndin ndi Allah fodunoo on Й“aawo ahodal ngal Hudaybiyyah, Й“e wi'a: accee men yaada e mon, fii heЙ“ugol konu-hoyri ndin. ЖҒen tultulЙ“e ko faalaa, ko waЙ—titirgol Й—um Й—on, kon ko Allah fodunoo gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en Й“aawo ahodal ngal Hudaybiyya nde O tottata ganngal ngal tawanoobe wolde Khaybar. Awa NulaaЙ—o maakan Й“ee: on jokkataa men e ndin konu-hoyri Й—on fes. Tawde ko fodi men e ndin, ko fii tawaaЙ“e Hudaybiyya Й“en. Ma Й“e wi'u ontuma: on aГұanay men tun woni. ЖҠum wanaa yamiroore Allah non. Ko non le woniri, wanaa no Й“e aaЖҙorii non. Ko waЙ—i Й—um, ko tawde Й“e faamataano yamirooje e haЙ—aaЙ—i Allah Й—in, si wanaa seeЙ—a. Ko yolli Й“e e yeddugol mo.

48:16.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakiran tultunooЙ“e yaadugol Й“en e maaЙ—a Makkan, jeyaaЙ“e e yimЙ“e ladde Й“en, ndaarndagol Й“e: arma nde noddeteЙ—on e haЙ“ugol joomiraaЙ“e doole tiiЙ—uЙ“e e hare. HaЙ“on Й“e fii laawol Allah ngol, maaЙ—um Й“e naatira lislaamu on jam.
