Si on Й—oftike Allah e kon ko O noddi on e mun Й—on, O okka on mbarjaari moЖҙЖҙundi, woni Aljanna; si on huccitirii non e Й—oftagol Mo ngol, wano huccitirnoЙ—on e mun, fewndo tultulnoЙ—on yaadugol e NulaaЙ—o on Makka, haray O leptiray on lepte muusuЙ—e.

48:17.text: Bakkaatu fawaaki e ngantinorЙ—o mbumЙ—am, maa laЖҙugol maa nawnaare, si o tultirii hare nde fii Й—um. Kala Й—oftiiЙ—o e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, O naadoyay mo Aljannaaji Й—i canЙ—i ilata senngo ley kuЙ“eeje e leЙ—Й—e mun. Kala kadi Й—uurniiЙ—o e Й—oftagol Й“e ngol, O leptiray mo lepte muusuЙ—e.

48:18.text: GomЙ—ii Allah welano gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, tuma Й“e yeeyondiraynoo e maaЙ—a ka ahodal Hudaybiyya e ley leggal. O anndi gomЙ—inal e laaЙ“al e goonga ko woni e Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, O jippini deeЖҙere nden e Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, O warjoriiЙ“e Й—um, uddital Khaybara Й“aЙ—tiingal, ko lonntinana Й“e kon ko laawinooЙ“e naatugol Makka.

48:19.text: O okki Й“e kadi konu-heyri Й—uuЙ—undi e yimЙ“e Khaybara Й“en. Allah siforii wonnde FooluЙ—o Mo fooletaake, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e tagu Mun e kattal Mun e toppitagol Mun.

48:20.text: Allah fodii on, onon muumini'en, konu-heyri Й—uuЙ—undi ndi henndotoЙ—on ka udditoyton liislaamu woo, O yaccinani on konu-hoyri ndin Khaybara, O haЙ—i juuЙ—e Alyahuuda'en hewtugol Й“eynguureeji mon Й—in Й“aawo mon, fewndo Й“e himmirnoo Й—um, haray ko no Й—in konu-hoyriiji yaccinaaЙ—i wonirana on maande ko Allah wallata on kon O semmbina on, O fewnira on kadi e laawol focciingol, ngol ooГұaaki.

48:21.text: Allah fodii on konu-hoyri goo kadi, ndi on haЙ—tanaali henndagol taho, ko Allah tun haЙ—tani Й—um ka ganndal e ka toppitagol Makko. Allah siforii wonnde haЙ—tanЙ—o kala huunde. Huunde ronkintaa Mo.

48:22.text: Hay si yedduЙ“e Й“en Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on haЙ“iino on, onon gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, Й“e huccitirayno laawagol foolaaЙ“e yeeso mon, refti Й“e heЙ“oytaa giЙ—o heftoowo fii maЙ“Й“e, wanaa ballo ko faaboo Й“e e haЙ“ugol on.

48:23.text: Ko gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en foolata kon, heeferЙ“e Й“en foolee, ko tabituЙ—um e kala nokku e jamaanu. Ko sunna Allah non e mofte yawtunooЙ—e Й—en ado Й“ee fennooЙ“e Й—oo. A heЙ“antaa an NulaaЙ—o, sunna Allah on, mbattiigu.

48:24.text: Ko kanko woni haЙ—uЙ—o sirkooЙ“e Й“en hewtugol on, fewndo nde worЙ“e Й“urЙ“e cappanЙ—e jeetato e maЙ“Й“e eЙ“Й“unoo memirde on bone Hudaybiyyah, O haЙ—i Й“e kadi juuЙ—e mon memude Й“e, hara on haЙ“ataa Й“e on lorrataa Й“e, wurin on accituno Й“e, Й“aawo nde waawunoЙ—on Й“e. Allah siforii wonnde ReenuЙ—o ko golloton kon. Huunde e mun suuЙ—aaki Mo.

48:25.text: Ko Й“en woni ko yeddi Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Й“e sakkii on e Juulirde Hormorde nden, Й“e haЙ—i neldaari ndin hewtugol nokku hirsirde nden ka hormorde. Si wanaano sabu worЙ“e e rewЙ“e gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“e on anndataano haa waЙ—tidon Й“e e haЙ“idaaЙ“e Й“en ka heeferЙ“e, bakkaatu e diya (soktorЙ—um) fawora on ko waruЙ—on Й“e kon, ko aldaa e anndugol, si wanaano fii Й—um, Allah duЕӢinanayno on ka udditugol Makko, fii no Allah naadira e yurmeende Makko nden, kala mo O muuyani, wano gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en Makko.Si yedduЙ“e Й“en senndondirno e gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en Makka Й—on, ko pellet, Men leptirayno Й“en yedduЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o on, lepte muusuЙ—e.

48:26.text: Tuma nde yeddunooЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o mun on waЙ—unoo e Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en jinngo majjiyanke, ngo humondiraa e goonga woo si wanaa mbeleeЙ—e. ЖҒe salorii naatugol NulaaЙ—o Allah (jom kisiyee) on Makko, hitaande Hudaybiyyah nden, kulol wata Й“e felire wi'eede o fooliiЙ“e. Allah jippini deeЖҙere Makko nden e dow NulaaЙ—o Makko on e gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, ka tawata Й“e teeЙ—oragol sirkooЙ“e Й“en yeru kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, wanaano ko tikkinta Й“e. O fawi Й“e Konngol goonga ngol wiingol " reweteeЙ—o tanaa Allaahu alaa ", e ГұiiЙ“nugol ngol, Й“e niiЙ“ni ngol. Woniri non, tawi ko gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en Й“uri hanndude e maggol, Й“e laatorii hannduЙ“e e maggol, sabu moЖҙЖҙere wonnde e Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e, nde Allah anndi fii mun. Allah siforii wonnde annduЙ—o kala huunde. Hay huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo.

48:27.text: GomЙ—ii Allah goonginiranii NulaaЙ—o Makko on, koyЙ—ol ngol e hoore goonga, fewndo O hollunoo mo ngol koyЙ—ol, o humpiti ngol sahaaba'en makko, wonnde o naatidoyay e maЙ“Й“e, ko Suudu Allah Hormordu, hara ko Й“e hooliiЙ“e bone ayЙ“e maЙ“Й“e, woЙ—Й“e e maЙ“Й“e femmba salaaji mun, woЙ—Й“e Й“en Й—uyta tun sukundu ndun, fii maandingol lannude golle hajju Й—en. Allah no anndi ko moЖҙЖҙani on, onon muumini'en, huunde nde tawata on anndaa onon. O waЙ—ii non ko wanaa ko koyЙ—ol ngol holli kon, naatugol Makko nden hitaande, uddital Й“adiingal. Ko Й—um woni ko Allah newini fii mun ka ahodal Hudaybiyya e ko jokki Й—on kon ka uddital Khaybara, e juuЙ—e gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en tawanooЙ“e Hudaybiyya.

48:28.text: Ko Kanko woni nulirЙ—o NulaaЙ—o Makko on Muhammad (yo o his) Й“anngannduyee laaЙ“uo e diina goona - woni lislaamu -; fii yo Й“amtu ka e hoore kala ko lunndii ka e diina. Allah no seedii Й—um, Allah yonii seedee.

48:29.text: Muhammadu ko NulaaЙ—o Allah. SahaabaaЙ“e wonduЙ“e e makko Й“en, ko ГұaaЙ—uЙ“e e yedduЙ“e haЙ“idaaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en, yurmondirЙ“e hakkunde maЙ“Й“e yiЙ—indirЙ“e, hiЙ—a yi'a Й“e an ndaaroowo, hiЙ“e ruЖҙЖҙana Allah sujjana Mo, hiЙ“e Й—aЙ“Й“ira Allah yawtaneede e mbarjaari mawnundi e welayee Makko. Maandeeji maЙ“Й“e Й—in hino ka geece maЙ“Й“e batte sujuudu e peewal e annoora julde ko feeГұata e maЙ“Й“e. Ko Й—um woni ko Й“e Tawreeta jippinaande e Muusaa nden sifori Й“e. Si a yilti ka Linjiila jippinaande e Iisaa nden, a taway hinde siforii jogondiral maЙ“Й“e ngal, wano remuru yaltinndu puЙ—i mayru, Й—in mawni Й—i fotondiri, fii no Allah tikkinira Й“e yedduЙ“e Й“en, si Й“e yi'ii cemmbe e jogondiral maЙ“Й“e ngal. Allah fodii sahaabaaЙ“e gomЙ—imЙ“e Mo Й“en Й“e golli golle moЖҙЖҙe, haforaneede junuubi e mbarjaari mawndi ka Makko, woni Aljanna.

49:1.text: Ko onon yo Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah, Й“e jokki sari'a Makko on, wata on aditor yeeso Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko, konngol maa kuugal. Huliron kadi Allah, Гұemtinirgol yamaruyeeji Makko Й—in e woЙ—Й—itagol haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in. Pellet, Allah ko Nanoowo haala mon, AnnduЙ—o golle mon. Huunde e mun laawotaako Mo. Ma O yoЙ“itiroy on Й—i.

49:2.text: Ko onon yo Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah, Й“e jokki sari'a Makko on, ne'anee NulaaЙ—o Makko on, hara on townaali sowtooji mon Й—in e hoore sowto Annabaajo on (yo o his) tuma yewtoton mo, wata on ewnor kadi innde makko nden, wano yoga mon ewnorta yoga; noddiree mo newaare wiide Annabiijo e NulaaЙ—o; fii wata golle mon Й—en bonir sabu Й—um, hara on so'aa-anndude Й—um.

49:3.text: Pellet, Й“en joltinay Й“e sowtooji mun Й—in ka NulaaЙ—o Allah on (yo o his), ko Й“en woni Й“e Allah jariboori Й“erЙ—e mun Й—en hulugol Mo, O laЙ“Й“iniri Й—e Й—um. Hino woodani Й“e haforannede junuubi Й—i Й“e nanngitirtaake, e njoЙ“di mawndi Г‘alnde Darngal, wonnde Allah naadoyay Й“e Aljanna.

49:4.text: Pellet, Й“en yimЙ“e ladde Й“e no noddire an NulaaЙ—o ka Й“aawo cuuЙ—i rewЙ“e maa Й“en, ko Й“uri Й—uuЙ—ude e maЙ“Й“e, wanaa haqqilooЙ“e.

49:5.text: Sinno Й“ee noddiraynooЙ“e ma an NulaaЙ—o, ka Й“aawo cuuЙ—i rewЙ“e maa Й“en muГұГұino haa yawtaa tawaa Й“e, ontuma Й“e yewtire sowtooji joltuЙ—i, ko Й—um Й“uraynoo moЖҙЖҙannde Й“e dii noddirgol maa Й“aawo, tawde ko tintodugol e maa ngol wonndi e teddungal. Allah non ko Haforoowo junuubi kala tuubuЙ—o e maЙ“Й“e e wanaa kamЙ“e sabu majjeede maЙ“Й“e, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e kadi.

49:6.text: Ko onon yo Й“e gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“e golliri sari'a Makko on, si faasiqiijo ardanii on e kabaaru fii yimЙ“e, haray tefee fii mun, haray on hawjiraali goongingol mo, fii wata on heЙ“or e yimЙ“e, sau majjeede huunde nden, waЙ—tiniron kon ko heЙ“iЙ—on e maЙ“Й“e Й—on, ninsuЙ“e, tuma fenaande kumpital ngal laaЙ“ani on.

49:7.text: Anndee wonnde NulaaЙ—o Allah on hino hakkunde mon, onon muumini'en, wahayu on no jippaade e makko, rentoЙ—on e fennugol, sakko wahayu jippoo e makko humpitugol mo ngol fennugol mo, e hino le himo anndi ko moЖҙЖҙanta on. Si o tewtino on e ko holloton mo, on yanayno e tampere nde o faalananooka on. Kono Allah kan, e Й“ural Makko ngal, O yiЙ—ini on gomЙ—inal, O cuЙ—ini ngal e Й“erЙ—e mon haa gomЙ—inЙ—on; O aГұini on keeferaaku, e yaltugol e Й—oftaare Makko, e yeddugol Mo. Ko Й“en siforaaЙ“e Й—in sifaaji Й—on, woni jokkuЙ“e laawol peewal ngol.

49:8.text: Ko heЙ“u Й—on kon e cuЙ—inaneede gomЙ—inal ka Й“erЙ—e mon, e aГұineede bone on, fow ko Й“ural immorde ka Allah, ngal O moЖҙЖҙorii e mon, e neema kadi mo O neeminiri on. Allah ko annduЙ—o jeyaaЙ“e Makko yettooЙ“e Mo Й“en, O fewna Й“e, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o kadi, tawde O waЙ—ay huunde kala ka haani Й—on.

49:9.text: Si feddeeji Й—iЙ—i e gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en haЙ“ii, haray ko yo on moЖҙЖҙintinir hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, onon gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, noddugol Гұaawirgol sari'a Allah on e kon ko waddi Й“e. Si fedde goo e maЙ“Й“e salike nde jaggitii, haЙ“ee nden jaggitunde Й—on, haa nde ruttoo e Гұaawoore Allah nden. Si nde ruttike e Й—um, ko moЖҙЖҙintinirgol hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, nunЙ—al e laaЙ“al. NunЙ—ee ka Гұaawugol hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, tawde pellet, Allah no yiЙ—i nunЙ—ooЙ“e e Гұaawugol maЙ“Й“e ngol.

49:10.text: Anndee gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en ko jeyduЙ“e ka lislaamu. Jeydugol non e lislaamu, hino lamndii moЖҙЖҙingol hakkunde mon, onon gomЙ—imЙ“e pooЙ—ondirayЙ“e Й“en. Huliree Allah Й—oftagol yamaruyeeji Makko, woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko, belajo, on yurminte.

49:11.text: Ko onon yo Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah, Й“e golliri sari'a Makko on ! Wata yimЙ“e goo e mon jalkitu woЙ—Й“e dey: hino gasa hara Й“en jalkitaaЙ“e hino Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude e mun en ka Allah. Wata rewЙ“e kadi jalkitu rewЙ“e : hino gasa ka Й“en jalkitaaЙ“e Й“urata Й“e moЖҙЖҙude ka Allah. Wata on aybin musiЙ—Й“e mon, hiЙ“e wa'i wa mon. Wata on bugondir kadi jammooje Й—e on yiЙ—aa, wano yimЙ“e Madiina anndiranoo ando seenagol NulaaЙ—o Allah on (yo o his). Kala e mo'on waЙ—uЙ—o Й—um, ko yaltuЙ—o e Й—oftaare. Sifa ngun jikku Й—on non bonii baawo goЙ—ingol. Kala mo tuubaali e Й—in geddi, ko Й“en woni tooГұirЙ“e ko'e-mun, unagol e halkaare, sabu Й—in geddi maЙ“Й“e.

49:12.text: Ko onon yo Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“e golliri sari'a Makko on, waЙ—Й—itee e ko Й—uuЙ—i e sikke. Pellet, yoga e sikke ko bakkaatu ; wano sikkugol goЙ—Й—o bone, hara le ko moЖҙЖҙere feeГұi e makko. Wata on wiЙ—o gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en Й“aawo maaЙ“e, wata yoga mon kadi wowlu yoga ko mettata oya ; sabu Й—um no wa'i wa Гұaamugol teewu musiЙ—Й—o mun maay- Й—o. Hara non goЙ—Й—o e mo'on yiЙ—ay Гұaamugol teewu musiЙ—Й—o mun maayЙ—o? Awa aГұiree Гұo'ugol mo ngol wano non. Huliron Allah Й—oftagol yamiraaЙ—i Makko, woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko. Pellet, Allah ko JaЙ“anoowo kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e.

49:13.text: Ko non yo yimЙ“e ! Men tagirii one gorel gootel, on woni baaba mon Aadama, e deyel gootel, on woni neene mon Hawaa; dammbe mon ko gootum, wata woЙ—Й“e e mon wasooro dammbe e hoore woЙ—Й“e. Men waЙ—i on kadi leЖҙЖҙi Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e gori saakitiiЙ—i heen fow, fii yo on anndindir hakkunde mon, wanaa ko mantoree. Ko senndi on, ko gomЙ—al ngal, ko Й—um waЙ—i si O daali: "Pellet, Й“urЙ“e teddude e mon Й“en ka Allah, ko Й“urЙ“e gomЙ—ude Й“en e mon". Awa Allah ko AnnduЙ—o fiyakuuji mon Й—in, HumpitiiЙ—o fii Й—uytaare maa Й“eydaare ko woni e mon. Huunde e mun suuЙ—aaki Mo.

49:14.text: Yoga e yimЙ“e ladde Й“en nde hewtunoo ka Annabiijo on ( yo o his) Й“e wi'i: Men gomЙ—inii Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on. Maakan Й“ee, an NulaaЙ—o: On gomЙ—inaali taho. Wi'ee kan : Men silmii, men jebbilike. GomЙ—inal ngal naataali taho ka Й“erЙ—e mon, hino hasii non ka ngal naatoya. Si onon Й“ee yimЙ“e laddeeЙ“e, on Й—oftike Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on ka gomЙ—inal e ka golle moЖҙЖҙe, e ka woЙ—Й—itagol harminaaЙ—i Й—in, Allah Й—uytantaa on huunde e mbarjaari golle mon Й—en. Pellet, Allah ko Haforanoowo kala tuubuЙ—o e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e.

49:15.text: GomЙ—imЙ“e tigi Й“en, ko Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, refti Й“e jillaani sikke e gomЙ—inal maЙ“Й“e ngal, Й“e tiiЙ—nori kadi jawle e pittaali maЙ“Й“e Й—in fii laawol Allah ngol, hara Й“e wuddiraali huunde e majji. ЖҒen siforaaЙ“e Й—in sifaaji, ko Й“en woni goonguЙ“e e gomЙ—inal mun.

49:16.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee yimЙ“e ladde : kere on anndinay Allah diina mon kan? Hara non Allah no anndi kala woni ka kammuuli e ka leydi. Allah ko AnnduЙ—o kala huunde. Hay huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo. O hatonjinaa e ko humpitoton Mo fii diina mon.

49:17.text: ЖҒee yimЙ“e ladde no wajite an NulaaЙ—o, fii Й“e silmii. Maakan Й“e : wata on wajitam naatuugol mon e diina Allah kan, sabu Й—um ko onon nafata. Si ko woni, ko Allah wajitata on fii O hawrindinii on e gomЙ—ingol Mo, si wonii ko on goonguЙ“e e nodditorgol mon naatugol e diina kan.

49:18.text: Pellet, Allah no anndi wirniiЙ—i kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin. Huunde e mun suuЙ—aaki Mo. Allah ko ReenuЙ—o ko golloton kon. Huunde e golle mon Й—en suuЙ—aaki Mo. O yoЙ“itoyay on ko boni e ko moЖҙЖҙi e majje.

50:1.text: Qaaf : yewtere fii sugu Й—ee kalfe yawtiino ka fuЙ—Й—orde cortewol Al-Baqarah. Allah woondirii Alqur'aanaare teddunde nden, moftunde maanaaji e moЖҙЖҙere e barkeeji Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i, wonnde ko pellet, on immintinoy on Г‘alnde Darngal, fii Гұaaweede yoЙ“itee.

50:2.text: ЖҒe saloraaki sikkitagol Й“e wonnde a fenay, hiЙ“e anndi ko e goonga wonЙ—aa. Si ko woni, Й“e ЕӢalЙ—u ko tawi kon NulaaЙ—o jertinoowo arii Й“e jeyaaЙ—o e maЙ“Й“e, hara wanaa jeyaaЙ—o e Malaa'ika. ЖҒe wi'i: Arugol NulaaЙ—o Й“anndinke on e meeЙ—en, ko huunde haawniinde.

50:3.text: Kere men immintinoyte si men maayii men wontii mbulmbuldi? Ngol immintinegol ruttitoo e nguurndam Й“aawo fii amen gaynude, ko huunde woЙ—Й—iinde, nde laatotaako.

50:4.text: GomЙ—ii MeЙ—en anndi ko leydi ndin Гұaamata kon e Й“alli maЙ“Й“e Й—in, Й“aawo maayde maЙ“Й“e, Й—um suuЙ—aaki Men ; hino ka Amen gaa deftere reenude kala ko Allah eЙ“Й“ani Й“e ka nguurndam e Й“aawo maayde maЙ“Й“e nden.

50:5.text: Si ko woni, Й“ee sirkooЙ“e fennu Alqur'aana, tuma nde NulaaЙ—o on ardannooЙ“e e mayre, hiЙ“e e fiyaaku jilЙ“uЙ—o ; Й“e tabitataa e huunde wootere fii mayre.

50:6.text: E Й“ee fennooЙ“e ummital teskaaki kammu ngun dow maЙ“Й“e, ko honno Men tagiri ngun Men mahi, Men cuЙ—iri ngu koode Й—e Men waЙ—i e maggu; hara perЙ—i woo alanaa ngu ko itta ella e maggu? Awa taguЙ—a Й—in kammuuli On, O ronkataa wuurnitude maayЙ“e.

50:7.text: Leydi ndin kadi, Men weertiri ndi ka hoЙ—ee e mun, Men werlii e mayri pelle ko tabintina ndi, Men fuЙ—ini e mayri kala nooneeji puЙ—i e leЙ—Й—e wooЙ—uЙ—e.

50:8.text: Men tagiri Й—um fow, ko wana teskuya waaju kala jeyaaЙ—o ruttorayЙ—o ka Joomi mun Й—oftaare.

50:9.text: Men jippini kadi ndiyam keewЙ—am barke e moЖҙЖҙere ka kammu, Men fuЙ—iniri Й—am gese e gabbe soГұeteeЙ—e ekw.

50:10.text: Men fuЙ—iniri Й—am kadi leЙ—Й—e tamaro juutuЙ—e toowuЙ—e, wonduЙ—e e piindi fawondirndi.

50:11.text: Men fuЙ—iniri Й—am Й—in Й—on fow: fii arsike jeyaaЙ“e Й“en, ka Й“e wuura. Men wuurnitiri Й—am kadi leydi yoorundi ndi alaa puЙ—i. Ko wano Men wuurnitiri non leydi yoorundi ndin Й—am ndiyam, ko non Men wuurnitirta maayЙ“e Й“en, Й“e yalta e gennale Й—en hiЙ“e wuuri.

50:12.text: Ado Й“ee fennooЙ“e Й“e Й—oo an NulaaЙ—o, hari yimЙ“e goo fenniino AnnabaaЙ“e mun : YimЙ“e Nuuhu Й“en, e yimЙ“e ЖҒunndu Й“en e Samuuda'en fow fennuno.

50:13.text: Aadi'en kadi fenni, e Fir'awna e yimЙ“e Luutu Й“en.

50:14.text: yimЙ“e Su'aybu e YimЙ“e Tubba LaamЙ—o Yaman Й“e fof pennii nulaaЙ“e Alla Й“e O nuli Й“e, tabiti e mum en ko Alla fodani Й“e e lepte.

50:15.text: Kere Men ronkuno tagugol ka arannde, sakko Men ronka fii immintingol on? Ko woni kamЙ“e, hiЙ“e e jiЙ“aare fii tagu hesu, Й“aawo Й“e tageede ka laawol aranol.

50:16.text: GomЙ—ii Men tagii neЙ—Й—anke on, MeЙ—en anndi miijooji ko yiilotoo e wonkii makko. Ko MeЙ—en Й“uri mo Й“adaade e dii Й—aЙ—ol makko daande ngol jogondirgol e Й“ernde nden.

50:17.text: Tuma nde Malaa'ikaaЙ“e Й“en Й—iЙ—o jaЙ“Й“oroytoo golle makko Й—en nano e Гұaamo, hara gooto kala e maЙ“Й“e no jooЙ—orii senngo.

50:18.text: O wowlataa konngol, si wanaa hino takko makko Й—on, Malaa'ikaajo winndoowo ko o wowlata kon, tawaaЙ—o.

50:19.text: FaЙ—Й—ere maayde nden ardi e goonga ka sikke alaa e mu'un : awa ko Й—um wonunoo ko -an neЙ—Й—anke on, welsandiiЙ—a- ko leelatnaЙ—a ana dogaa.

50:20.text: Mala'iikaajo halfinaaЙ—o alaandu ndun wutta e mayru Й—iЙ—aЙ“ol ; ko nden woni Г‘alnde Darngal ; Г‘alaande kammbanaande leptugol heeferЙ“e e yedduЙ“e Й“en.

50:21.text: Wonkii kala ara, hara hiki wonni e Malaa'ikaajo soggoowo ki, e goЙ—Й—o goo ko seeditoo e golle makko Й—en.

50:22.text: On neЙ—Й—o soggaaЙ—o wi'anee : GomЙ—ii a laatinoke welsindiiЙ—o e ndee Г‘alaande, sabu hoomteede maa nden e tuuyooiji maa e dakkemmeeji maa. Men hunci welsindaare maa nden kisan, lepte e wemmbaare ko wonuЙ—aa naЙ“ude kon; awa hannde on, gite maa Й—en hino yi'ude kon ko welsindotonoЙ—aa e mun.

50:23.text: Malaa'ikaajo mo o halfinaa on wi'a: ko Й—um woni ka am Й—oo, e golle makko tawnaaЙ—e ko aldaa e Й—uytugol maa Й“eydugol.

50:24.text: Alla daalana Malaa'ika'en Й—iЙ—o - soggoowo e seedotooЙ—o on - : Bugee ka nder Jahannama, kala yedduЙ—o goonga, salii ka.

50:25.text: Й—uuЙ—uЙ—o haЙ—ugol goonga ka Allah waЙ—Й—ini kan e makko, yawtoowo keeri Allah Й—in, sikkitotooЙ—o kala fodoore maa kammba ko O humpitata fii mun.

50:26.text: On waЙ—iduЙ—o e Allah reweteeЙ—o goo, ko o kafida Mo ka dewal. Haray bugee mo ka nder lepte saЙ—tuЙ—e.

50:27.text: Teekonjo makko seytaniiru ndun e hisnagol e makko wi'ugol : Joomi amen, mi majjinaali oo; si ko woni, ko e majjere woЙ—Й—unoonde goonga o wonunoo e mun.

50:28.text: Allah daala : Wata on yeddondir ka Am Й—oo, nafa woo alaa e mun ! Nde tawnoo Mi addiniino e mon ka aduna, kammbaa saЙ—tuЙ—o mo NulaaЙ“e Am Й“en ardunoo e mun on, e hoore kala yedduЙ—o Lam.

50:29.text: Konngol waЙ—titetaake ka Alla Й—oo, wanaa fodoore Am Mi firtata ; wanaa kadi Mi tooГұiroowo jeyaaЙ“e Й“en, Й—uytugol moЖҙЖҙi maЙ“Й“e Й—in maa Й“eydana Й“e bonЙ—i ; ko yeru golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en Mi yoЙ“ata Й“e.

50:30.text: Г‘alnde Men wi'anoyta Jahannama on : HeeferЙ“e e yedduЙ“e bugaaЙ“e e maaЙ—a Й“en hebbinii ma? Nge jaabora Joomi : Ko Й“eydee hino woodi? Nge Й—aЙ“Й“ira Й—um, fii tikkere nga Joomi magge nden.

50:31.text: Aljanna on Й“aЙ—tinanee hullirЙ“e Joomi mun Й“en Й—oftagol Mo woЙ—Й—itoo haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in, Й“e ceedoo neemaaji makko Й—in, hara wanaa ka woЙ—Й—i Й“e.

50:32.text: ЖҒe wi'anee : ko Й—um Й—oo woni ko Joomi mon fodi on, wonannde kala ruttorЙ—o e Joomi mun tuubugol, reeniiЙ—o e ko O waЙ—Й—ini mo e mun kon.

50:33.text: On huluЙ—o Allah e gunndoo mo tawata ko Allah tun reeni mo, o hawroyi e Allah, wonndude e Й“enrde hisunde laaЙ“ani Allah, Й—uuЙ—unde ruttagol e Makko.

50:34.text: ЖҒe wi'anee ontuma : naatiree Aljanna on hisugol kala ko aГұuЙ—on. Ko nden woni Гұalaande luttaynde, nde wonnde goo artataa Й“aawo mun.

50:35.text: Hino woodani Й“e ton neemaaji kala Й—i lannataa ko Й“e faaletee, hara kadi Й“eydaari mun hino ka Amen ko gite yi'aali, nowru nanaali wanaa sakko Й“ernde neЙ—Й—o miijoo fii mun; Й—um ko wano yi'ugol Allah seniiЙ—o On.

50:36.text: ЖҠuuЙ—ii e mofte Й—en Men halki ado Й“ee yimЙ“e Makka sirkooЙ“e fenna, Й“en yiilorii e leydi ndin, ndaarugol si Й“e heЙ“ay laaworde lepte Й—en, kono Й“e ronki heЙ“ude.

50:37.text: Pellet, wonii e koo ko jantaa e halkugol mofte adinooЙ“e, jantoore e waaju wonannde kala jom Й“ernde haqqilirayЙ—o nde, maa heЙ—torii noppi hara Й“ernde makko nden no tawaa, mo welsindaaki.

50:38.text: Gongii Men tagii kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin e kon ko woni hakkunde majji, nder balЙ—e joogoo, e hoore non MeЙ—en haЙ—tannoo tagugol Й—i nder hinЖҙaango. Tampere woo heЙ“aali Men, wano Alyahuuda'en aaЖҙorta.

50:39.text: Awa an NulaaЙ—o, muГұГұo e ko Alyahuuda e woЙ—Й“e goo wowlete kon, juuliranaa Joomi maa yettugol Mo ka julde fajiri ado puЙ—al naange ngen, juulaa alansaraa on ado mutal ngal.

50:40.text: Jemma on kadi, juulanaa Mo, subbunhinanoЙ—aa Mo Й“aawo farlaaЙ—e Й—en.

50:41.text: HeЙ—o an NulaaЙ—o, Гұalnde Malaa'ikaajo halfinaaЙ—o wuttugol ka allaandu noddiroyta wuttaandu Й—iЙ—aЙ“uru ndun, e nokkuure Й“adiinde.

50:42.text: Г‘alnde tagu ngun naniroyta haacaango ngon e hoore goonga, mo sikke alaa e mu'un. Ko nden Г‘alnde woni yaltugol maayЙ“e Й“en ka genaale maЙ“Й“e, fii Гұaaweede yoЙ“ee.

50:43.text: Pellet, ko Menen wuurnata Men wara, wanaa goЙ—Й—o goo kippi fii Й—um, ko ka Amen tun kadi woni ruttorde jeyaaЙ“e Й“en Г‘alnde Darngal, fii Гұaaweede yoЙ“ee.

50:44.text: Г‘alnde leydi ndin seekotoo, Й“e yaltira heГұagol; ko nden woni mooЙ“irde newaniinde Men.

50:45.text: Ko Menen Й“uri anndude ko Й“ee fennooЙ“e wowlata kon. An NulaaЙ—o, a wonaa saЙ—tinanoowo Й“e fii gomЙ—ingol, golle maa ko yottingol tun ko Allah nulu maa kon. Haray waajor Alqur'aanaare nden, kala huloowo kammbaa Am on hakkunde heeferЙ“e e yedduЙ“e Й“en. Tawde ko huloowo waajitotoo, o jaЙ“a si on waajaama.

51:1.text: Allah woondirii keneeli jarotooЙ—i leydi ndin !

51:2.text: Mi woondirii kadi duule ronndotooЙ—e toЙ“o tiiЙ—ngo !

51:3.text: Mi woondirii kadi laaЙ—e dogirayЙ—e ka maayo Й—en no newori !

51:4.text: E malaykaaji peccooji ko Alla yamiri yo fecce ko e fiyakuuji jiyaaЙ“e.

51:5.text: Ko Alla fodata on ko e hasbeede e yoЙ“eede ko goongo mbo alah jeddi.

51:6.text: Haasbeede ko ko wonat nyande darngo alah e sago.

51:7.text: Allah woondirii kammu labaangu tagu jom Й—ate ngun.

51:8.text: Pellet, onon yimЙ“e Makka Й“ee, hiЙ—on e konngol piyondirngol : nde wonnde wi'on : Alqur'aana ko mbilewu, nde wonnde kadi wi'on : ko nde gimi, ma wi'on kadi nde wonnde: Muhammadu ko mbileejo, e wonnde goo wi'on : ko yimoowo.

51:9.text: Hino yiltee e gomЙ—ingol Alqur'aana e Annabiijo on (yo o his) kala firlitaaЙ—o e anndal Allah, e gomЙ—inal ngal; anndugol Mo wonnde onЙ—on gomЙ—intaa, ko Й—um waЙ—i si O firlitaa.

51:10.text: ЖҒee fenuЙ“e e hoore Alqur'aana e Annabiijo maЙ“Й“e on fow Й“e huЙ—aama.

51:11.text: ЖҒen yooliiЙ“e e majjere, welsindiiЙ“e fii galle laakara Й—en.

51:12.text: HiЙ“e lamndoo : ko honnde woni Г‘alaande njoЙ“di kuuЙ—e? Hara non Й“e alaa gollannde nde !

51:13.text: Allah jaaboo lamndal maЙ“Й“e ngal : ko Г‘alaande nde Й“e leptoytee ka Yiite.

51:14.text: ЖҒe wi'ane : meeЙ—ee non lepte mon Й—en ; ko Й—um woni ko hawjiraynoЙ—on kon, waЙ—ton jalnori, tuma jertintenoЙ—on.

51:15.text: Pellet Й“een hulirЙ“e Joomi mum en Й—oftaade jamirooje Makka, e reenaade kaЙ—aaЙ—e Makka Гұande darngo hoЙ“e e jardeeji e caalli dogooji.

51:16.text: JaggatnooЙ“e ko Alla okkataЙ“e e njoЙ“di teddundi, Й“e pellet ko adii ndii njoЙ“di hoЙ“e moЖҙЖҙinatno golle ka aduna.

51:17.text: HoЙ“e njuulatno jemma, Й“e Й—aanatanooko si wonah setta.

51:18.text: E saanga ndoogu hoЙ“e toro yaafeede bakkatuuji mum en ummorde ka Alla.

51:19.text: Ina e jawle mum en he hakke-hoЙ“e ngattoo heen- yimЙ“e ГұaagatooЙ“e e Й“e Гұaagataako,yimЙ“e haЙ—iraaЙ“e arsuko e kala sabaabu.

51:20.text: E nder leydi ko Alla waЙ—i ko e hendi ummaade e tule haa e maaje e caalli e leЙ—Й—e e puЙ—i e kulle, ko dallillaaji mbaawko Alla wonande yananaaЙ“e wonde ko Alla woni takЙ—o mbaadinЙ—o.

51:21.text: Ina e nder pittaali mon - onon aade en- dallillaaji kollirooji mbaawko Alla, mbela on ndaaratah ngam teska Й—on?

51:22.text: Ina nder kammu arsuko mon aduna, ina e hembo ko podante Й—on e moЖҙЖҙe e bonannde.

51:23.text: Mi woondirii Jom kammu e leydi, pellet ummital ko goongo mbo alah sikke e mum, hono no sikke waasi wonde e haala mon saanga nde kaalaton.

51:24.text: Mbela arii e ma -Aan NulaaЙ—o- yeewtere hoЙ—Й“e Ibraahiima jeyaaЙ“e e malaykaaji, Й“e Alla teddini.

51:25.text: NdeЙ“e naati e makko, Й“e mbi*ni mbo salaaman: Ibraahiima ruttiЙ“e salminaandu, nduun woni salaam, O maaki e fittaandu makko: Й“e ko yimЙ“e Й“e nganndaaka.

51:26.text: O fayi to yimЙ“e makko e mbaadi cuuiindi, o addori toon ngaari payndi, sabu o sikkuno koЙ“e yimЙ“e.

51:27.text: O Й“anni Й“e ngaari ndi, o haaldi e maЙ“Й“e e newuya: mbela on Гұaamatah?

51:28.text: Nede Й“e waasno Гұaamde o so*i e fittaandu makko he kulol, Й“e paami Й—uum, Й“e lelnir Й“ernde makko wiide taa hulu, minen komin nulaaЙ“e ummaade ka Alla, Й“e kabri mbo ko welata mbo, Й—uum woni ma o heЙ“ keewЙ—o ganndal, ko oon woni Ishaaqa.

51:29.text: Nde jom suudu makko nani o wela wela o ari homo wulla ngam weltaare, o hellii yeeso makko, o wii hombo haawa: mbela nayeeja na jibina, te kanko ko o dimara.

51:30.text: Malaykaaji Й—i mbi* imbo ko min kabru ma ko woni ko Joom ma daali, ko O daali ko noon ruttetaake, ko Kanko woni ГұeeГұuЙ—o e tagu Makko e hoddiro Makko, ganndo tagu Makko e ko nafataЙ“e.

51:31.text: Annabi Ibraahiima maaki Malaa'iЙ“e Й“en : ko honЙ—um woni fii mon? E ko faanditiЙ—on?

51:32.text: Malaa'ika'en jaabii mo wonnde : menen, Allah neli men e yimЙ“e bomЙ“e Й“en faggitotooЙ“e kuuЙ—e bonЙ—e.

51:33.text: Fii yo men accitu e maЙ“Й“e, kaaЖҙe iwЙ—e e loope juЙ—aaЙ—e

51:34.text: MaandiniraaЙ—e ka Joomi maa an Ibraahiima, wurtaaЙ—e e yawtooЙ“e keeri Allah Й“en, fantinooЙ“e yeddugol Mo ngol.

51:35.text: Men yaltini taho kala gomЙ—imЙ“e wonunooЙ“e e saare yimЙ“e Luutu Й“en, fii wata lepte bomЙ“e Й“en hawru e maЙ“Й“e.

51:36.text: Men tawaano e nden saare, si wanaa suudu juulЙ“e wooturu, ndun le ko suudu Й“eynguure Luutu nden (yo o his).

51:37.text: men acci e nden saare yimЙ“e Luutu, batteeji lepte Й—en, ko holla wonnde Й—e yanuno e maЙ“Й“e, wona waajitorЙ—um kala huloowo lepte muusuЙ—e Й—en yanunooЙ—e e maЙ“Й“e, ontigi hula waЙ—ugol sugu kuuЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, fii daЙ—ugol Й—en lepte.

51:38.text: Men acci kadi maande e Muusaa, tuma nde Men nulunoo mo e Fir'awna, wonndude e hujjaaji Й“annguЙ—i, wonannde kala huloowo e lepte muusuЙ—e Й—en.

51:39.text: Kono Fir'awna Й—uurni fawaade e cemmbe e konu makko fow salii goonga, o wi'i Muusaa : ko mbilЙ—otooЙ—o yimЙ“e maa hara feetuЙ—o.

51:40.text: Men nanngi mo kanko e koneeli makko Й—in fow, Men weddii Й“e ka maayo, Й“e yoolii Й“e halkii, tawde Fir'awna ko feliraaЙ—o fennugol mo ngol nodditoo reweteeЙ—o.

51:41.text: Men acci kadi maande e 'Adi'en, yimЙ“e Huudu Й“en, wonannde kala huloowo lepte muusuЙ—e Й—en, tuma nde Men wurtunoo e maЙ“Й“e henndu ndu ardaa e toЙ“o, ndu worgintaa leЙ—Й—e ndu aldaa kadi e barke.

51:42.text: Ndu accataa hay wonkii maa jawdi ekw e kon ko ndu arani, si wanaa ndu muncay fii mun, ndu waЙ—ta Й—um wano rappunde sariinde.

51:43.text: Men waЙ—i kadi maande e Samuuda'en, yimЙ“e Annabi Saalih Й“en, wonannde kala huloowo lepte muusuЙ—e Й—en, tuma nde Й“e wi'ananoo : awa dakmitoree nguurndam mon Й—am, ado lajal mon gal timmude.

51:44.text: ЖҒe townitanii yawmiroore Joomi maЙ“Й“e gomЙ—ingol e Й—oftagol Mo ngol, haacaango lepte ngon nanngi Й“e, tawi hiЙ“e Жҙeewa ko Й—um jippotoo kon. Tawde Й“e kammbirano lepte Й—en, balЙ—e tati ado Й—e jippaade.

51:45.text: ЖҒe waawaano duГұugol lepte Й—en gaay e maЙ“Й“e, Й“e heЙ“aano kadi feere faabeede.

51:46.text: GomЙ—ii kadi Men halkiriino yimЙ“e Nuuhu Й“en ado Й“ee jantaaЙ“e Й—oo, yoolagol. Pellet, Й“en ko yimЙ“e yaltunooЙ“e e Й—oftaare Allah, waЙ—i si Й“e hanndi e lepte Makko Й—en.

51:47.text: Kammu ngun, Men mahir ngu doole Amen, Men Й—iggini Й—um. Pellet, ko Men yaanooЙ“e cebe mammba.

51:48.text: Leydi ndin kan, Men weertiranndi hoЙ—ooЙ“e Й“en, wano ndaЙ—Й—undi maЙ“Й“e. Men moЖҙЖҙii weertan Й“e ndi.

51:49.text: E kala huunde, Men tagii noone Й—iЙ—i: wano deyel e gorel, kammu e leydi, njodrndi e maayo; balajo'o on waajitoray gootaagu Allah taguЙ—o Й—in On, teskoЙ—on fii kattal Makko ngal.

51:50.text: Dogee lepte Allah Й—en, yaccoron e mbarjaari Makko ndin, Й—oftaare e anngal yeddugol Mo. Min, wonannde on onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, ko mi jertinoowo e lepte Makko Й—en, Й“annguЙ—o jertinol.

51:51.text: Wata on waЙ—de e Allah reweteeЙ—o goo ko rewon. Min, wonannde on immorde ka Makko, ko mi Й“annguЙ—o jertinol.

51:52.text: nKo wano yimЙ“e Makko Й“en fenniri nii, mofte adinooЙ“e Й“en fennirnoo. NulaaЙ—o Allah araali e Й“en, si wanaa Й“e wi'ay mo : ko mbileejo maa feetuЙ—o!

51:53.text: Hara heeferЙ“e adinooЙ“e Й“en yamondirno e sakkitiiЙ“e Й“en e ngol fennugol NulaaЙ“e? Oo'o woye. Ko woni kon, ko bewre renndiniЙ“e e mum.

51:54.text: An NulaaЙ—o, selu Й“ee fennooЙ“e, a wonaa felniiЙ—o. Ko pellet, a yottinii ko nulaЙ—aa kon e maЙ“Й“e.

51:55.text: HaЙ—ataa si a selii Й“e, waajoraa Й“e anndintinaa Й“e; tawde waajagol anndina ngol, hino nafa gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah Й“en.

51:56.text: Mi tagiraali jinna e yimЙ“e, si wanaa fii yo Й“e rewan Min tun. Wanaa dey fii yo Й“e waddam e goЙ—Й—um goo.

51:57.text: Mi Й—aЙ“Й“iraa Й“e arsike; Mi Й—aЙ“Й“iraa Й“e yo Й“e Гұamminam.

51:58.text: Pellet, ko Allah woni arsikoowo jeyaaЙ“e Й“en, fow no hatonjini e arsike Makko On, Kanko Jom cemmbe tiiЙ—uЙ—e Й—e huunde foolataa. Denndangal jinna e yimЙ“e ko cemmbe Makko Й—en yankinanii.

51:59.text: Haray hino woodani tooГұirЙ“e ko'e mun Й“en fennugol ma, an NulaaЙ—o, geЙ“al e lepte, yeru geЙ“al nanndo maЙ“Й“e'en adinooЙ“e Й“en. ЖҠum no happanaa lajal, wata Й“e Й—aЙ“Й“iram yaccinangol Й“e Й—um ado happu mun on.

51:60.text: Halkaare woodanii Й“en yedduЙ“e Allah, Й“e fenni NulaaЙ—o Makko on, e nden Г‘alaande Darngal nde Й“e kammbiranaa yanugol lepte Й—en e maЙ“Й“e.

52:1.text: Allah woondirii Fello ngo O yewtidi e Annabi Muusaa ngon.

52:2.text: O woondiri kadi Deftere winndannde nden.

52:3.text: E Й—eri fontoriiЙ—i wa Defte jippinaaЙ—e Й—en.

52:4.text: O woondiri kadi Suudu ndu Malaa'ika'en wuurniri ndin rewugol Allah ka kammu.

52:5.text: O woondiri kadi kammu toowungu, wonu ngu kippoodi e leydi ndin.

52:6.text: O woondiri kadi maayo hebbiniraango ndiyam ngon.

52:7.text: Pellet, lepte Joomi maa Й—en an NulaaЙ—o, ko yanooje e heeferЙ“e Й“en, feere mun alaa.

52:8.text: Alaa ko duГұanaЙ“e Й—e, haa Й—e ronka yanude e maЙ“Й“e.

52:9.text: Г‘alnde kammu ngun dillirta dillere, ngu folwo hollirde daragol Darngal ngal.

52:10.text: Pelle Й—en woni e sottugol nokku majje, watta yahugol.

52:11.text: Haray nden Гұalnde, halkaare e hayrere woodanii fennuЙ“e lepte Й—e Allah kammbirani yedduЙ“e Й“en.

52:12.text: ЖҒen wonuЙ“e e jumpugol fija e nder meere, hara Й“e tefaa fii ummital e caakagol.

52:13.text: Г‘alnde Й“e duГұiroytee doole ka Yiite Jahannama duГұannde.

52:14.text: ЖҒe wi'anoyee nde Гұalnde : awa ko ngee Yiite woni ko fennaynoЙ—on, fewndo NulaaЙ“e mon Й“en hulЙ“iniraynoo on nge.

52:15.text: E ko mbilewu woni Й—ee lepte Й—e sutiЙ—on? Kaa hara on alaa e yi'ude?

52:16.text: MeeЙ—ee nguleeki ngee Yiite sumon nge ! MuГұГұiЙ—on Й—um maa hara on muГұГұaaki, fow no fota e mon. On yoЙ“etaake hannde, si wanaa ko geddi e keeferaaku ko gollaynoЙ—on kon aduna.

52:17.text: Pellet, hulirЙ“e Joomi mun Й“en Й—oftagol yamiraaЙ—i Makko woЙ—Й—itoo e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in, hino e Aljannaaji e naamaaji mawЙ—i, Й—i taЖҙondirtaa.

52:18.text: Ko Й“e dakmitorayЙ“e dakammeeji Гұaametee e njaram e desal ko Allah okki Й“e, Joomi maЙ“Й“e daЙ—nda Й“e lepte Jahiimi Й—en. ЖҒe maliree daГұugol dakamme yela maЙ“Й“e on, e daЙ—ndeede lepte.

52:19.text: ЖҒe wi'anee ontuma : Гұaamee yaron kala ko yiЙ—uЙ—on, ko hannduЙ“e e mun, wata on hulu lorra ko Гұaamoton maa ko yaroton kon. ЖҠum ko njoЙ“di mon, e golle mon laaЙ“uЙ—e Й—en aduna.

52:20.text: Hara ko on soЙ“Й“indiiЙ“e e hoore danЙ—e cuЙ—inaaЙ—e weertindiraa. Men resini Й“e kadi rewЙ“e yooЙ—a giteeЙ“e.

52:21.text: ЖҒen gomЙ—imЙ“e, genyngol maЙ“Й“e ngol kadi jokki Й“e e gomЙ—inal ngal, Men tawtindinay Й“e e geyngol maЙ“Й“e ngol, fii no Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й“uuЙ“ira e fee maЙ“Й“e, hay si Й“en golliraano wano maЙ“Й“e. E hoore Men Й—uytanoytaaЙ“e huunde e baraaji golle maЙ“Й“e Й—in; tawde neЙ—Й—o kala ko tiginnde e bonЙ—i Й—i o faggitii Й—in, gooto ronnditantaako mo ko golli kon.

52:22.text: Men Й“eydanii Й“ee yimЙ“e Aljanna, nooneeje e muuyanteeЙ—i e kala ko Й“e tuuyetee e teewu.

52:23.text: HiЙ“e jaaondira ka nder Aljanna ton : ГұedduЙ—e Й—e jillaa njaram wa'uЙ—am wa njaramji goo aduna; woni ko siwrinta adda cona-cana maa ko sabimbinta bakkaatu.

52:24.text: Hara sukaaЙ“e no eltanaaЙ“e hino wanngoo e maЙ“Й“e, wa'uЙ“e wa kaЕӢЕӢe reenaaЙ—e, hakkee ko Й“e jalbi.

52:25.text: WoЙ—Й“e e yimЙ“e Aljanna Й“en fewtita Й“eya, Й“e lamndondira fii fiyaaku maЙ“Й“e on aduna.

52:26.text: ЖҒe jaabora Й“e wiide : pellet, men laatino aduna, ko men hulunooЙ“e lepte Allah Й—en, hakkunde yimЙ“e amen Й“en.

52:27.text: Allah moЖҙЖҙorii e amen, feewugol e lislaamu, O daЙ—andi men lepte norngal Yiite.

52:28.text: Men laatino e nguurndam amen aduna, meЙ—en rewaynoo Mo men toroo Mo daЙ—ndugol men Yiite. Tawde pellet, ko Kanko woni moЖҙЖҙo goonguЙ—o e ko O fodi jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en kon, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e. Hino jeyaa e ko O moЖҙЖҙorii e amen O yurmii men : fewnugol men e gomЙ—inal, naada men Aljanna, woЙ—Й—ina men e Yiite.

52:29.text: An NulaaЙ—o, anndintinir tun Alqur'aanaa, sabu ko neema gomЙ—inal e haqqil ko Allah yeЙ—u maaЙ—a kon, a wonaa ndureejo gollidoowo e jinna, a wonaa kadi feetuЙ—o.

52:30.text: Kaa Й“ee fennooЙ“e wi'au wonnde : Muhammadu wanaa NulaaЙ—o, ko yimoowo ! Mo men habbitanii tun biftagol maayde, men pooftoo e makko.

52:31.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“e : awa habbitee maayde am ! Min kadi miЙ—o habbitii nde lepte Й—en yanata e mon, sabu ko fennuЙ—o lam kon.

52:32.text: Kaa ko haqqille maЙ“Й“e Й—en yamiri Й“e wi'ugol : ko o ndureejo e feetuЙ—o? ЖҒe hawtita ko hawtitaa e neЙ—Й—o. Si ko woni, Й“ee yimЙ“e yawtuЙ“e tun keeri. ЖҒe ruttotaako e sari'a wanaa e haqqil.

52:33.text: Kaa Й“e wi'ay wonnde : Muhammadu tafu nde Alqur'aanaare, huunde wahayinaaka e makko? Oo'owoye... Si ko woni, Й“ee ko townitaniiЙ“e gomЙ—ingol nde, waЙ—i si Й“e wiide o sincu nde.

52:34.text: Awa yo Й“e addii yewtere goo sugu mayre, hay si ko fefindaande, si wonii ko e goonga Й“e woni, wiide ko nde tafaande.

52:35.text: Kaa Й“e tagira Й“aawo tagoowo? Kaa ko kamЙ“e woni taguЙ“e ko'e maЙ“Й“e? Pellet, huunde tagaaka Й“aawo taguЙ—o nde, ko tagaa kadi tagataa. Ko haЙ—i Й“e rewa taguЙ—o Й“e on kisan?

52:36.text: Kaa ko kamЙ“e tagi kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin? Ko woni goonga, Й“ee yananaaka wonnde ko Allah tagi Й“e. Tawde si Й“e yanananoo Й—um, Й“e wootinЙ—inanyno Mo, Й“e gomЙ—ina NulaaЙ—o Makko on.

52:37.text: Kaa Й“e jogiti ngaluuji arsike Joomi maa Й—in, sakko Й“e salanoo Й—i mo Й“e yiЙ—anaa? Maa Annabaaku ngun, sakko Й“e yeЙ—a ngun mo Й“e yiЙ—ani, Й“e salanoo ngu mo Й“e yiЙ—anaa? Kaa ko kamЙ“e woni huЙ“indiiЙ“e e piiji Й—in, hara Й“e hiЙ“e gerdira Й—i no Й“e haajiri?

52:38.text: Kaa Й“e jogiti Жҙawirgal ka kammu, ngal Й“e heЙ—itorta wayahu Allah wi'oowo Й“e ko e goonga Й“e woni? Awa yo heЙ—itiiЙ—o on e maЙ“Й“e addu on wahayu, wonndude e hujja Й“annguЙ—o, goonginoowo ko nodditorЙ—on kon, wonnde ko e goonga wonЙ—on.

52:39.text: Kaa hara ko Й“iЙ—Й“e rewЙ“e Й“e aГұanЙ—on ko'e mon Й“en, woodanta seniiЙ—o On toowuЙ—o On, onon kan woodanii on Й“iЙ—Й“e worЙ“e Й“en?

52:40.text: Kaa a lamndi Й“e njoЙ“di, an NulaaЙ—o, e ko yottinirtaa kon e maЙ“Й“e, immorde ka Joomi maa? Hara non Й—um wontanay Й“e donЕӢgal ngal Й“e townataa?

52:41.text: Kaa Й“e anndu fii wirniiЙ—i Й—in, haa hiЙ“e winndana yimЙ“e Й“en, ko Й“e Жҙellitii e majji, Й“e humpita Й“e kala ko Й“en faalaa e mun?

52:42.text: Kaa Й“ee fennuЙ“e faala fewjannde ma an e diina maa kan? Awa hoolo Allah. Tawde Й“en yedduЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, ko kamЙ“e woni fooleteeЙ“e pewje Й“en, wanaa an.

52:43.text: Kaa hiЙ“e mari reweteeЙ—o goo e goonga, ko wanaa Allah? Allah senike O laaЙ“ii e kon ko Й“e dammbata e Makko, immorde e sirku ! Kala ko yawti kon, wanaa non woniri, jaЙ“irtaake non kadi !

52:44.text: Si Й“e yi'ii taЖҙatine iwrunde ka kammu no yani, Й“e wi'a : ko duule fawondiri Й—oo, wano woowiri non. ЖҒe ronka tasakaade maa Й“e gomЙ—ina.

52:45.text: NulaaЙ—o, accuЙ“e e sattere feere maЙ“Й“e e yeddugol maЙ“Й“e, haa Й“e hawroya e Гұalaande maЙ“Й“e nde Й“e leptoytee e mun. Woni Г‘alnde Darngal.

52:46.text: Г‘alnde nde pewje maЙ“Й“e Й—en duncanoytaa Й“e hay huunde, Й—uuЙ—i fanЙ—i, wanaa kadi Й“e faaboroyteeЙ“e daЙ—ndeede lepte.

52:47.text: Ko pellet, hino woodani tooГұirЙ“e ko'e mun Й“en sirku e geddi, lepte adiiЙ—e lepte laakara Й—en: Й—en woni wareede e daheede, ka genaale kadi Й“e leptee. Kono ko Й“uri Й—uuЙ—ude ko e maЙ“Й“e, Й“e anndaa Й—um. Ko Й—um waЙ—i si Й“e ГұiiЙ“a e keeferaaku maЙ“Й“e.

52:48.text: An NulaaЙ—o, muГұГұo Гұaawoore Joomi maa nden, e ГұenЖҙal sari'a Makko on. Tawde pellet, hiЙ—a e ndenka Amen. Seninaa Joomi maa, tuma Й“aЕӢotoЙ—aa e Й—oyngol maa.

52:49.text: Jemma on kadi, subbunhinanoЙ—aa Joomi maa, Juulanaa Mo, juulaa subaka on, tuma ka koode Й—en mutirta Й—on feeЙ—ugol Гұallal ngal.

53:2.text: NelaaЙ—o-yo o his- ooГұaaki gaa e laawol peewal, o wonaani bewЙ—o, kono ko o peewЙ—o.

53:3.text: O haalatah e o quraana tawa hombo rewi e belaaЙ—e makko.

53:4.text: O quraana mbo wonah si wonah wahyu, mbo Alla wahyato faade e makko ummaade e Jibriil.

53:5.text: Ko malayka jom semmbe oon woni Jibriil anndini Й—um mbo.

53:6.text: E jibriil-yo o his- jom mbaadi njooЙ—ndi, o fotondiri e mu, hombo feenyani annabi-yo o his- e mbaadi ndi Alla tagri mbo.

53:8.text: Refti Jibriir Й“adii o Й“eydi Й“attaade.

53:9.text: O Й“adinoo mbo fotde laanye Й—iЙ—e wolla ko Й“uri Й“adaade.

53:10.text: Jibriir wahyii faade e maccuЙ—o Alla muhamadu-yo o his- ko O wahyii ko.

53:11.text: Й“ernde muhamadu -yo o his- fennaani ko O yi*i ko.

53:12.text: mbela hoЙ—on njeddandira e makko-onon heefareeЙ“e-ko Alla holli mbo ko Гұande jemma israa mbo Alla nawi mbo?

53:13.text: Ko goonga tigi muhamadu-yo o his- yi*ii e mbaadi makko laawol goЙ—ngol e jemma israa he.

53:14.text: ka lekki sidra haaЙ—tirki, kiin ka lekki mawki to kammu jeeЙ—iЙ“o.

53:15.text: ka kiin lekki woni aljanna koЙ—irЙ—o.

53:16.text: Nde naati e sidra-JaaЙ“i- he huunde mawnde ummaade e jamirooje Alla, hay gooto anndah no Й—uum laatarii si wonah Alla.

53:17.text: Yitere NelaaЙ—o-yo o his- ooГұaaki nyaama wolla nana, nde yawtaani keerol.

53:18.text: Muhamadu-yo o his- yi*ii jemma seteede mbo MiiraaJ kaawisaaji Alla mawЙ—i kollirooji kattane Makko, O yi*i aljanna e yiite e goЙ—Й—um.

53:19.text: Mbela on nji*ii-onon heefereeЙ“e- sanamuuji ndewaton Й—i ko aldah e Alla:Laata e Ujjaa.

53:20.text: E manaata tatЙ“iija goЙ—Й—o o e sanamuuji mon. kabree kam mbela hoЙ“e njoganii on nafoore wolla lorla.

53:21.text: Mbela na woodani on-onon heeferЙ“e- gorko ko yiЙ—Й—on ko, na woodani Mboko Joomiraawo demmbo mbo nganГұЙ—on o?

53:22.text: Ndeen fecccoore nde peccirЙ—on belaaЙ—e mon ko nde tooГұnde.

53:23.text: Й—i sanamuuji Й—i ngonah si wonah inЙ—e Й—e ngalah maana, Й—i ngalah hay geЙ—al e sifaaji Alliyankeewal on inniriiЙ—i onon e baabiraave mon ummaade e ko*e mon, Alla jippinaani heen hay daliil, sirkuЙ“e Й“e ndewata si wonah sikke e belaaЙ—e pittaali mum en e ko seytaane suЙ—i e Й“erЙ—e mum en, arii e mum en ummaade e Joom mum en peewal e Й—emngal nelaaЙ—o-yo o his- te Й“e peewaani.

53:24.text: Mbela na woodani neЙ—Й—a ko o wooЙ—a ko e tefnga sanamuuji faade Alla?

53:25.text: Alah, alanah mbo ko o wooЙ—a ko, ko Alla tan woodani ko sakkati e ko adii, O okka heen ko O wela O haЙ—a ko O haaja.

53:26.text: Hono foti malayka nder kammuuji Й—i tefoore majji nafatah hay huunde soЙ—i faalaama tefande gooto si wonah caggal de Alla sakkiti tefnga wonande Mbo O haaja e Й“een, O wele tefnanteeЙ—o o, Alla sakkitantah oon baЙ—anЙ—o Mbo nandadiijo, O weletaake oon tefnanteeЙ—o dewoowo ko wonah Alla.

53:27.text: Й“een Й“e goonЙ—inaani ummital to laakira maЙ“e innir malaykaaji Й—i inЙ—e rewЙ“e sabu sikkude Й“e koЙ“e Й“iЙ“Й“e Alla, Alla toowii e konngi mum en hee toowal manngal.

53:28.text: WoodanaaniЙ“e ganndal tuugnorgal e koЙ“e innirta ko malaykaaji inЙ—e rewЙ“e, alah koЙ“e ndewata e Й—uum si wonah sikke e ko laaЙ“aani, sikke noon nafatah e goonga hay huuunde nyande darnga.

53:29.text: Й—uuna-aan aan nulaaЙ—a- oon duntiiЙ—o innude Alla o faalaako nde, alah ko o faala si wonah nguurndam aduna, o gollanataaka laakara, sabu o goonЙ—inaani mbo.

53:30.text: Ko sirkuЙ“e Й“e kaalata ko, ko faati e innirde malaykaaji inЙ—e rewЙ“e, fotde ganndal mum en ko Й—oon haaЙ—i, sabu koЙ“e majjuЙ“e, Й“e Й“e njottaaki e yananeede, ko joom ma noon Й“uri anndude oon gooГұiiЙ—o acci laawol peewal, ko Kanko Й“uri anndude kadi oon peewЙ—o e laawol makko he, alah fof ko wirnii e Makko hay huunde.

53:31.text: Ko Alla tan woodani ko woni e nder kammuuji, na woodani Mbo ko woni e leydi to bannge jeyal e takgo e jiiloowo, ngam O yoЙ“a bonnuЙ“e e aduna koЙ“e kaandi ko e lepte, O yoЙ“a goonЙ—inЙ“e golluЙ“e ko moЖҙЖҙi aljanna.

53:32.text: ЖҒen woЙ—Й—itotooЙ“e junuubi mawЙ—i Й—in, e geddi kaanuЙ—i Й—in, Й“e faggitotaako si wanaa tokoosi Й—in. ЖҠin no yaaforee accitugol mawnuЙ—i Й—in, e Й—uЙ—Й—inirde dewe. Pellet, Joomi maa an NulaaЙ—o, ko yaajuЙ—o yaafuyee. Himo yaafoo junuubi kala tuubuЙ“e e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Ko Kanko SeniiЙ—o On, Й“uri anndude fii mon gila O tagirnoo ben mon Aadama e leydi, haa nde wonunoЙ—on saawaaЙ“e e deedi neeniraaЙ“e mon; hiЙ—on tagiree sagara naЙ“i sagara. Huunde e Й—um suuЙ—aaki Mo. Haray wata on mantir ko'e hulugol Allah. Ko Kanko Й“uri anndude huluЙ“e Mo Й“en, Й—oftii yamaruyeeji Makko, woЙ—Й—itii haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko.

53:33.text: E a tinaali bonnde fiyaaku Й—uurniiЙ—o lislaamu on, fewndo ka o Й“adinoo mo?

53:34.text: Himo okka seeЙ—a e jawdi, hooti o Й—awa; tawde nguddan ko jikku makko. E hoore Й—um, himo manta hoore-makko.

53:35.text: Kere o jogi ganndal wiirniiЙ—i ngal o ndaarirta o yewta fii mun?

53:36.text: Kaa hara o fefindi o takki e Allha? Hara o humpitaaka fii ko woni kon ka Й—eri arani Й—i Allah jippini Й—in e Muusaa?

53:37.text: E ko woni kon ka Й—eri Ibraahiima hunnoЙ—o kala ko Joomi makko nulunoo mo yo o yottingol kon.

53:38.text: Wonnde neЙ—Й—o woo ronnditotaako bakkaatu goЙ—Й—o goo.

53:39.text: E wonnde alanaa neЙ—Й—anke on, si wanaa yeru baraaji golle makko Й—en.

53:40.text: E wonnde golle makko Й—en, aray ka yi'ee Г‘alnde Darngal.

53:41.text: Refti o yoЙ“iree golle makko Й—en, njoЙ“di timmundi di ustaaki.

53:42.text: E wonnde ko ka Joomi maa an NulaaЙ—o, woni ruttorde jeyaaЙ“e Й“en si Й“e maayii.

53:43.text: E wonnde ko Kanko woni weltinoowo Mo O yiЙ—i, O jalna ontigi, O sunina mo O yiЙ—i, O wullina ontigi.

53:44.text: E wonnde ko Kanko woni Waroowo wuuruooЙ“e aduna Й“en, O wuurnita Й“e Й“aawo mun.

53:45.text: E wonnde O tagii nooneeji Й—in : gorel e deyel.

53:46.text: Immorde e toЙ“Й“ere maniiyu si rufaama e rennga.

53:47.text: E wonnde ko Kanko woodani tagitugol Й—in Й—iЙ—i Й“aawo Й—i maayude.

53:48.text: E wonnde ko Kanko alЙ—iniri jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“e yiЙ—ani jawdi, O yeЙ—i Й“e jawle Й—e yimЙ“e Й—aЙ“Й“ata.

53:49.text: E wonnde ko Kanko woni JeyЙ—o hoodere Si'iraa, nde yoga e sirkooЙ“e rewata kafida nde e Allah.

53:50.text: E wonnde ko Kanko halkunoo Aadi'en adinooЙ“e, Й“en woni yimЙ“e Huudi Й“en, fewndo Й“e haЙ“Й“itinoo e keeferaaku ngun.

53:51.text: O halki kadi Samuuda'en, yimЙ“e Saalih Й“en, O heddinaano hay gooto e maЙ“Й“e.

53:52.text: Ko non kadi O hlkirnoo yimЙ“e Nuuhu Й“en ado Aadi'en e Samuuda'en. Pellet, yimЙ“e Nuuhu Й“en laatino Й“urЙ“e tooГұude e tiiЙ—ude bewre diini Aadi'en e Samuuda'en. Tawde Nuuhu wonnduno e maЙ“Й“e duuЙ“i ujunere ЕӢakkirЙ—um cappanЙ—e jowi, himo nodda Й“e e wootinЙ—ingol Allah, kono Й“e salii nootagol mo.

53:53.text: E ca'e yimЙ“e Luutu Й“en Й“en O wayliti haa ka kammu, refti O wayliti Й“e ka leydi.

53:54.text: O hippiri Й—e kaaЖҙe Й—en Й—e O hippi e maЙ“Й“e Й“aawo O townude Й“e ka kammu, O liЙ“de ka leydi.

53:55.text: Ko honЙ—um e neemaaji Joomi maa tinndinayЙ—i e kattal Makko woni wennjata fii mun, ronkaa waajitorde Й—um, an oo neЙ—Й—anke?

53:56.text: Awa oo NulaaЙ—o immninaaЙ—o e mon, ko jeyaaЙ—o e NulaaЙ“e adinooЙ“e.

53:58.text: DuГұoowo ngal itta, maa ЖҙellitotooЙ—o fii maggal, alaa si wanaa Allah.

53:59.text: E ko ndee yewtere Al*ur'aana janngeteende e dow mon, woni ko haawetoЙ—on wiide ko ka Allah nde iwri?

53:60.text: HiЙ—on jala jalkita nde, on wullataa tuma nanuЙ—on waaju mayre?

53:61.text: Hara ko on weldiiЙ“e, Й“e haajaaka e mayre?

53:62.text: Koni sujjanee Allah, laЙ“Й“inanon Mo dewal.

54:1.text: Darngal ngal hewtii, lewru ndun kadi seekinoke gila fewndo Annabiijo (jom kisiyee on). Seekagol ndu ngol woni maande laaЙ“unde.

54:2.text: Si sirkooЙ“e Й“en yi'ii maande e hujja goonginЙ—o NulaaЙ—o on (yo o his), Й“e Й—uurnoo jaЙ“ugol Й—um, Й“e wi'a: Й—ii hujjaaji e Й“annganduyeeji Й—i men yi'i, ko mbilewu meerente.

54:3.text: ЖҒe fenni goonga ka o addani Й“e kan, Й“e jokki mbeleeЙ—e maЙ“Й“e fennugol ngol. Hara le fiyaaku kala - moЖҙЖҙi maa boni - ko waЙ—ayЙ—um no haaniri non Г‘alande Darngal.

54:4.text: GomЙ—ii kumpite mofte Й—e Alllah halkirnoo yeddugol tooГұa arii e maЙ“Й“e, yeru ko Й“e haЙ—itora yeddugol tooГұa.

54:5.text: Kon ko ari e maЙ“Й“e, ko ГұeГұЖҙal timmungal, fii no wonira hujja e maЙ“Й“e. Kono jertingol nafataa yimЙ“e Й“e gomЙ—intaa Allah e Г‘alaande sakkitiinde.

54:6.text: Si Й“e salanike ma an NulaaЙ—o, selu Й“e Й—uurnoЙ—aa Й“e, habbitoЙ—aa Гұalnde noddoowo halfinaaЙ—o wuttoygol ngol ka allaandu noddoyta e huunde aГұiniinde, nde tawata tageefo anndaano sugu mayre ko adii.

54:7.text: JaasuЙ“e e ndaarЙ—e, hiЙ“e yaltira e genaale Й—en faade ka Гұaawirde, wano kanuuji carotooЙ—i, hakkee hawjere.

54:8.text: HeГұaniiЙ“e noddoowo on ka Гұaawirde. HeeferЙ“e Й“en wi'a: ndee Й—oo ko Гұalaande sattunde. Tawde hinde wonnde e caЙ—eele e kulhuli.

54:9.text: Ado Й“ee yedduЙ“e ma Й—oo an NulaaЙ—o, hari yimЙ“e Nuuhu Й“en yeddiino. ЖҒe fenni ko Men nuli kon jeyaaЙ—o Amen on Nuuhu e maЙ“Й“e, Й“e wi'i woo: ko jinnaaЙ—o ! Й“e purii mo noone fow wiide si o accaali noddugol Й“e.

54:10.text: O torii Joomi makko, wonnde : yimЙ“e am Й“en foolii lam, Й“e jaЙ“anaali lam. Faaboram jippinirgol leopte e dow maЙ“Й“e.

54:11.text: Men udditiri dammbuЙ—e kammu ngun, ndiyam saaЖҙayЙ—am jokkondira.

54:12.text: Men tuЙ“Й“iniri leydi ndin Й“ulli ndiyam. Ndiyam Й—am ka kammu e Й—am ka leydi fottiri yamiroore Allah hoddiranoonde ko Й“ooyi. ЖҠam yooli fow, si wanna Й“e Allah daЙ—nunoo Й“e.

54:13.text: Men roondorii Nuuhu e laana lesaaka marka alluwe e peЕӢe. Men daЙ—ndi mo kanko e wondunooЙ“e e maЙ“Й“e Й“en yoolagol.

54:14.text: Ka laana no dogira e mororonje maayo e ngon, ndenka Amen. ЖҠum ko faabo Nuuhu ngon non e ko yimЙ“e makko Й“en fenni mo kon, Й“e yeddi ko o addani Й“e kon immorde ka Allah.

54:15.text: GomЙ—ii Men fillitorii kon ko Men leptirnoo Й“e, waaju e tasakuyee. Taw non si woodi waajitryЙ—o Й—um?

54:16.text: Taskii ko honno lepte Am Й—en wa'unoo? E ko honno jertinol Am halkugol Й“e ngol wa'unoo?

54:17.text: GomЙ—ii Men newinirii Alquur'aanaare nden waajitorgol. Hara no woodi waajitorayЙ—o tasakuyeeji mayre.

54:18.text: Aadi'en fennuno Annabaajo maЙ“Й“e on Huudu. Onon yimЙ“e Makka, teskee ko honno lepte Am Й—en wa'unoo e maЙ“Й“e? TaskoЙ—on kadi ko honno Mi jertinirnoo Й—e woЙ—Й“e goo?

54:19.text: Men wurtu e maЙ“Й“e henndu tiiЙ—undu Й“uuЙ“ol, e Гұalaande Й“aleere, duumodaynde e maЙ“Й“e haa ka Jahiimi.

54:20.text: Hindu wippitira yimЙ“e Й“en e leydi ndin, ndu bugora Й“e ko'e maЙ“Й“e Й—en, wa si tawii ko Й“e daЖҙЖҙe Й—oofaade e jayru.

54:21.text: Taskee onon yimЙ“e Makka Й“en, ko honno lepte Am Й—en wa'unoo e maЙ“Й“e? TaskoЙ—on kadi ko honno Mi jertinirnoo Й—e woЙ—Й“e goo?

54:22.text: GomЙ—ii Men newinirii Alquur'aanaare nden waajitorgol. Hara no woodi waajitorayЙ—o tasakuyeeji mayre.

54:23.text: Samuuda'en fennuno waaju NulaaЙ—o maЙ“Й“e on Saalih (yo o his).

54:24.text: ЖҒe wi'i hiЙ“e yedda : kere ko neЙ—Й—o gooto e amen woni ko men jokkata? Si men waЙ—ii Й—um, haray ontuma men wonii woopuЙ“e sari'a ooГұiini e mun, woni kadi e tampere.

54:25.text: Hara ko e makko wahayu on jippinaa hakkunde amen? O heertora Й—um hakkunde amen? Si ko woni, ko fenoowo nii, townitiiЙ—o.

54:26.text: Aray Й“e annda Г‘alnde Janngo, ko hommbo woni fenoowo townitiiЙ—o on? Anndon si Saalih kaa ko kamЙ“e?

54:27.text: Ko Men yaltinirooЙ“e ngelooba ndewa mbam ka fetere, Men wurtira mba e maЙ“Й“e, jarribagol Й“e. AynituЙ“e Й“e an Saalih, tinaa ko Й“e waЙ—ata mba e ko Й“e huuwetee ontuma, muГұГұoЙ—aa lorra maЙ“Й“e.

54:28.text: HumituЙ“e wonnde ndiyam woyndu maЙ“Й“e ndun, ko senndaaЙ—am hakkunde e maЙ“Й“e e ngelooba mbam: mba yara Гұallal, Й“e yara Гұallal. Kala maЙ“Й“e yara geЙ“al mun kaГұum tun, e Гұalaande mun nden.

54:29.text: ЖҒe noddiri wonndiiЙ—o maЙ“Й“e on, fii warugol mba. O jonni kaafa kan, o wari mba e yamaruyee yimЙ“e makko Й“en.

54:30.text: Taskee onon yimЙ“e Makka Й“en, ko honno lepte Am Й—en wa'unoo e maЙ“Й“e? TaskoЙ—on kadi ko honno Mi jertinirnoo Й—um e woЙ—Й“e goo?

54:31.text: Ko haacaango wooturu tun Men wurtunoo e maЙ“Й“e, ngo halki Й“e, Й“e wa'i leЙ—Й—e caЕӢe yooruЙ—e Й—e gaynaako wallitorta dammi mun.

54:32.text: GomЙ—ii Men newinirii Alquur'aanaare nden waajitorgol. Hara no woodi waajitorayЙ—o tasakuyeeji mayre.

54:33.text: YumЙ“e Luutu Й“en fennuno waaju NulaaЙ—o maЙ“Й“e on Luutu (yo o his).

54:34.text: Men wurtuno henndu kaaЖҙe e maЙ“Й“e, si wanaa e Й“eynguure Luutu nden (yo o his) lepte Й—en hewtaano Й“e, tawde Men daЙ—nuno Й“e fewndo o yaltidunoo e maЙ“Й“e ka wenndoogo, ado lepte Й—en yanude e Й“eya.

54:35.text: Men daЙ—niri Й“e lepte Й—en, moЖҙЖҙere Amen e maЙ“Й“e. Ko wano Men yoЙ“itiri non Luutu, Men yoЙ“itirta kala yettuЙ—o neema Allah on e makko.

54:36.text: GomЙ—ii le Luutu hulЙ“inirno Й“e lepte Amen Й—en. Kono Й“e yeddondiri e jertinol makko gol, Й“e fenni mo.

54:37.text: GomЙ—ii Й“e Й—aЙ“Й“irno Luutu accidugol Й“e e hoЙ—Й“e makko Й“en, fii no Й“e huuwira paЕӢnkare e maЙ“Й“e. Laatii Men mahi gite maЙ“Й“e Й—en, Й“e acci yi'ude, Й“e wi'ani Й“e: meeЙ—ee non lepte Й—en e bone salagol jertinol Am ngol.

54:38.text: GomЙ—ii lepte duumiiЙ—e dawiranno Й“e bimmbi law, ko heddoda e maЙ“Й“e haa laakara, lepte Й—en ton kadi heЙ“a Й“e.

54:39.text: ЖҒe wi'aee ontuma: MeeЙ—ee lepte Am Й—e Mi liЙ“i e mon Й—en, e salagol mon jertiaango Luutu ngol.

54:40.text: GomЙ—ii Men newinirii Alquur'aanaare nden waajitorgol. Hara no woodi waajitorayЙ—o tesakuyeeji mayre.

54:41.text: GomЙ—ii jertinaango Amen ngon arii e yimЙ“e Fir'awna Й“en, e dow Й—emngal Muusaa e Haaruuna, yo Й“e his.

54:42.text: ЖҒe fenni kala hujja e Й“anngannduyeeji immorЙ—i e Amen. Men yagginiri Й“e fennugol Й“e ngol, lepte FooluЙ—o Mo fooletaake, HattanЙ—o Mo ronkataa hay huunde.

54:43.text: Kere ko heeferЙ“e mon Й“en onon yimЙ“e Makkah Й“en, Й“uri moЖҙЖҙude e dii Й“eya heeferЙ“e jantaaЙ“e (YimЙ“e Nuuhu, e Aadi'en, e Samuuda'en, e YimЙ“e Luutu Й“en e Fir'awna e yimЙ“e mun?) Kaa ko daЙ—ugol e lepte Allah Й—en woni maandinanaa on e Defte jippiiЙ—e Й—en?

54:44.text: Kaa hara Й“ee heeferЙ“e Maakkah wi'ay: menen ko men dental wallindirooЙ“e e hoore kala faandaniiЙ—o men bone, eЙ“Й“uЙ—o senndugol men?

54:45.text: Aray nden dental Й“ee heeferЙ“e foolee, Й“e huccintina Й“abbe, yeeso gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en. ЖҠum waЙ—uno Гұalnde hare nde Badri.

54:46.text: Wurin ko Darngal ngal Й“e fennunoo ngal, woni fodoore leptugol Й“e ngol. Ko Darngal non Й“uri mawnude e saЙ—tude lepte dii ko Й“e leptanoo kon aduna ka Badri.

54:47.text: pellet, bonnirЙ“e geddi e keeferaaku Й“en, wonii e majjere woЙ—Й—iinde goonga, e lepte e tampere kadi.

54:48.text: Г‘alnde Й“e daasiroytee geece maЙ“Й“e Й—en ka nder Yiite, Й“e wi'anee : meeЙ—ee non lepte Yiite ngen.

54:49.text: Men tagir huunde kala e eЙ“Й“oore Amen yawtunde, tippude e anndal e muyЙ—e Amen, wonndude e ko Men winndunoo ka Alluwal reenaangal.

54:50.text: Si Men faandanike huunde, yamiroore Amen e mayre wonataa, si wanaa konngol gootol pet, woni wiide : laato, nde laatora no Men faaliraa, yaawira wa hinЖҙaango yiitere.

54:51.text: GomЙ—ii Men halkiino goreeЙ“e mon heeferЙ“e mofte adinooЙ“e. Hara wooday waajitorayЙ—o Й—um, o Й“ooroo e keeferaaku makko?

54:52.text: Kala huunde nden jeyaaЙ“e Й“en huuwi, hino maandinaa ka nder Й—eri Malaa'ika'en halfinaaЙ“e Й—um Й“en, Й“e winnday fow.

54:53.text: Kala ko fanЙ—i e kuugal maa haala, e ko mawni e mun, hino winndaa e Й—eri golle Й—in, maraa ka Alluwal reenaanagl. Aray nde Й“e yoЙ“itoyee Й—um.

54:54.text: Pellet, hulirЙ“e Joomi mun siinuЙ“e yamiraaЙ—i Makko woЙ—Й—itoo e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in, hino e Aljannaaji Й—i Й“e neeminotoo e mun, canЙ—i ialyЙ—i.

54:55.text: E toolorde goonga, nde alaa haala meere wanaa bakkaatu, ka LaamЙ—o jogitiiЙ—o kala huunde On, HattanЙ—o Mo huunde ronkintaa. wota a lamda fii neemaaji maЙ“Й“e duumotooЙ—i ton Й—in.

55:1.text: Jom HinaraЕӢke On, Jom yurmeende yaajunde On.

55:2.text: O anndinirii yimЙ“e Й“en Alqur'aana, newingol hunjagol nde, newo faamugol nde.

55:3.text: O tagi neЙ—Й—aЕӢke O fotindir, O labini mbaadi makko.

55:4.text: A anndini mo Й“annginirgol ko woni e fonndo makko, haalugol e winndugol.

55:5.text: Naange ngen e lewru ndun, O eЙ“Й“anii Й—i, dogugol yeru eЙ“Й“oore ГұeГұaande, no yimЙ“e Й“en anndira limoore kitaale e limre.

55:6.text: Delbi Й—in e leЙ—Й—e Й—en kadi, hino sujjannde Allah seniiЙ—o On, yankinoo jebbilanoo Mo.

55:7.text: Kammu ngun, O toownu ngu dow leydi ndin O waЙ—i kippoodi mun. O Гұinni nunЙ—al ngal ka leydi, O yamiri Й—um jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

55:8.text: O Гұinniri nunЙ—al ngal, fii wata on bewu on yimЙ“e Й“en, hodon ka peesuugol maa ka betugol.

55:9.text: Г‘inniron etugol ngol no nunЙ—iri. Wata on Й—utu etirЙ—e Й—en e mandakke Й—en tuma etoton maa mandikoton.

55:10.text: Leydi ndin, O weЖҙЖҙitirnde ka tagoore nden ГұiiЙ“a e mun.

55:11.text: LeЙ—Й—e rimayЙ—e muuyanteeЙ—o hino e mayri, e leЙ—Й—e tamaro marЙ—e poЖҙЖҙi.

55:12.text: Hino ton gabbe marЙ—e Гұaande: wano muutiri e mahe, hino ton kadi puЙ—i Й—i uurngol mun welanto on.

55:13.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e?.

55:14.text: O tagirii Aadama (yo o his) immorde e loopal yoorungal, ngal senlaango mun nanorta wa loope juЙ—aaЙ—e.

55:15.text: O tagiri jinnaaji Й—in, immorde e lew lewndu yiite, ki jillaa curki.

55:16.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:17.text: JeyЙ—o fuЙ—irЙ—e naange ngen e lewru ndun e mutirЙ—e majje Й—e, dabbunde e ceeЙ—u.

55:18.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:19.text: Allah tuppindirii maaje Й—en Й—iЙ—i, ngo lamЙ—am e deeЖҙungo, fottirayЙ—e no gite yiirata.

55:20.text: Heedo hino hakkunde kala majje, fii wata maayo goo jillondir e ngoya, hara maayo heddoday e ko heerori.

55:21.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:22.text: Hino yalta e Й—en e Й—en maaje kala : kaЕӢЕӢe "Lu'lu'u" e "Marjaan", njane e togoose.

55:23.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:24.text: Ko Kanko SeniiЙ—o ToowuЙ—o On tun, woni ko yiilata laaЙ—e dogooje Й—en ka maaje, wa'itayЙ—e wa pelle.

55:25.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:26.text: Kala tagoore ko woni e hoore leydi ndin, ko re'ayЙ—um feere mun alaa.

55:27.text: Heddoo Jaati Joomi maa Kin, an NulaaЙ—o, Jom mawngu e moЖҙЖҙere, e Й“ural e dow hoore jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Ko Kanko tun woni fii lannataa poomaa.

55:28.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:29.text: Kala Malaa'ika ko woni ka kammuuli, e jinna e yimЙ“e ko woni ka leydi fow no toroo Mo haaju mun. Г‘alnde woo, Kanko Himo e fii fiyakuuji jiyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, immorde e wuurnitugol, e warugol, e arsikugol ekn.

55:30.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:31.text: Aray nde Men faandii hasbude on, onon yimЙ“e e jinna, Men yoЙ“a kala mon ko hanndi kon, immorde e baraaje maa lepte.

55:32.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:33.text: Si Allah mooЙ“oyii jinna e yimЙ“e Г‘alnde Darngal, O daalana Й“e : ko onon yo dental jinna e yimЙ“e ! Si on hattanii heЙ“ugol yaltirgal teleren ka kammuuli e ka leydi, haray yehee. Si wanaa tun, on hattantaa waЙ—ugol Й—um, si wanaa e doole e Й“anngannduyee. Ko honno non heЙ“irton feere Й—um?

55:34.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:35.text: Hino wurtee e mon, onon jinna e yimЙ“e, Й—emngal yiite nge jillaa curki, e curki ki jillaa yiite. On waawaa haЙ—itaade e Й—um.

55:36.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:37.text: Si wonii kammu ngun seekorii jippagol Malaa'ika'en iwa e maggu, ngu wojjira wa pentiir boЙ—e.

55:38.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:39.text: Nde Гұalaande mawnde, wanaa neЙ—Й—o maa jinna, woni ko lamnditoytee fii junuubi mun, tawde Allah no humpitii fii golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en.

55:40.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:41.text: BomЙ“e Й“en hino annditiroyee Г‘alnde Darngal, maandeeji maЙ“Й“e Й—in : Й—in woni Й“awlugol geece e mbuliЙ—ugl gite. TiiЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en humindiree e teppe Й—en, Й“e bugee ka Yiite Jahnnama.

55:42.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:43.text: ЖҒe wi'anee fureede ontuma : awa ko ngee woni Jahannama nge bomЙ“e Й“en fennnaynoo fii mun aduna, e hino nge yeeso maaЙ“e, Й“e waawaa yeddude nge Й—oo.

55:44.text: Hara hiЙ“e denngi denngina hakkunde magge e ndiyam wulЙ—am hattuЙ—am wulde.

55:45.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:46.text: Hino woodani hulЙ—o daragol yeeso Joomi mun laakara, o gomЙ—ini o golli golle moЖҙЖҙe, aljannaaji Й—iЙ—i.

55:47.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:48.text: ЖҠin aljannaaji hino mari calЙ—i Й—iЙ— dukke mawЙ—, kecci, rimayЙ—.

55:49.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:50.text: Hino e Й—in aljannaaji Й—iЙ—i, Й“ulli Й—iЙ—i kadi ilayЙ—i ndiyam.

55:51.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:52.text: Hino e nder majji kala muuyanteeЙ—i Й—in, noone mun Й—iЙ—i.

55:53.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:54.text: Hara ko Й“e soЙ“Й“indiiЙ“e e ndaЙ—Й—ule tekkiniraaЙ—e nder majje hariiri, dimЙ—e e muuyanteeЙ—i heЙ“otooЙ—i ton Й—in ko Й“adiiЙ—e, hewtay dariiЙ—o, jooЙ—iiЙ—o e soЙ“Й“indiiЙ—o fow.

55:55.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:56.text: RewЙ“e hino ton, raЙ“Й“indinayЙ“e ndaarЙ—e mun e genndiraaЙ“e Й“e mun Й“en tun, Й“e neЙ—Й—o woo memaali ado genndiraaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en, wanaa kadi jinna.

55:57.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:58.text: LabiraaЙ“e jalbiri wa kaЕӢЕӢe yaaЕӢuutu e marjaan.

55:59.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:60.text: Ko wonata njoЙ“di moЖҙЖҙinЙ—o Й—oftagol Joomi mun, si wanaa nde Allah moЖҙЖҙinta e makko njoЙ“di?

55:61.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:62.text: Hino gaanin Й—in aljannaaji Й—iЙ—i jantaaЙ—i, aljannaaji Й—iЙ—i goo kadi.

55:63.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:67.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:71.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:72.text: Huurul'ayniiЙ“e, maraaЙ“e e tillisooji fii ko reena Й“e.

55:73.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:74.text: NeЙ—Й—o memaali Й“en rewЙ“e, ado genndiraaЙ“e maЙ“Й“e Й“en, wanaa kadi jinna.

55:75.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:76.text: Ko Й“e soЙ“Й“indotooЙ“e e hoore ngawluuji muuriraaЙ—i haako, e ndaЙ—Й—ule labaaЙ—e.

55:77.text: Ko honЙ—i e neemaaji Allah Й—uuЙ—uЙ—i e mo'on, woni ko fennaton onon denndaangal jinneeji e yimЙ“e ?.

55:78.text: Innde Joomi maa nden mawnii nde Й—uuЙ—ii moЖҙЖҙere, Jom Mawngu e MoЖҙЖҙere, e ЖҒural e dow hoore jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

56:1.text: Si Darngal ngal darorii ko feere mun alaa.

56:2.text: Alanaa wonkii woo fennugol ngal, wano Й“e fenniraynoo ngal ka aduna.

56:3.text: HoyfinЙ—inirayngal heeferЙ“e bomЙ“e Й“en naadeede Yiite, ngal Й“amtira fii gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en naadugol Aljanna.

56:4.text: Si leydi ndin dilliniroyaama dillannde mawnde.

56:6.text: Й—e wontira nden muncannde Й—on, collaari sariindi ndi tabitataa.

56:8.text: Ko wontirooЙ“e Гұaamo Й“en henndorayЙ“e talki mun Й—in ka Гұaamo. Iskin toowal e mawngu martaba maЙ“Й“e !

56:9.text: E wontirooЙ“e nano Й“en henndorayЙ“e talki mun Й—in ka nano. Bone bis e Й“en yimЙ“e nano !

56:10.text: Ko adondiraynooЙ“e Й“en e golle moЖҙЖҙe ka aduna, woni ko adoytee naadeede Aljanna ka laakara.

56:11.text: Ko Й“en woni Й“adnitaaЙ“e Й“en ka Allah.

56:12.text: HiЙ“e e nder Aljannaaji neeminiiЙ—i, ka Й“e dakmitora kala noone neema.

56:13.text: Dental jeyaangal e Й—ee mofte, e mofte adinooЙ“e Й“en.

56:14.text: E yimЙ“e seeЙ—aaЙ“e, jeyaaЙ“e e mofte sakkitiiЙ“e Й“en, Й“en kadi ko adinooЙ“e Й“allinaaЙ“e.

56:15.text: HiЙ“e e hoore danЙ—e yuЙ“Й“iraaЙ—e kaЕӢЕӢe.

56:16.text: Hara hiЙ“e soЙ“Й“indii e Й—en danЙ—e, Й“e fewtondiri, tawa Й“e runtandirtaa.

56:17.text: SukaaЙ“e duuminaaЙ“e hino wanngoo hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, ko ligganoo Й“e, Й“en nawyataa Й“e lannataa.

56:18.text: Hara hiЙ“e jinndida ton e ГұedduЙ—e Й—e alaa uddooЙ—e, e caltale uddotooЙ—e, e koroy hebbiniraakoy beere ilaynde nder Aljanna nde taЖҙondirtaa.

56:19.text: Nden wa'aa wa beere aduna nden, tawde mo yarii nde o muusetaake hoore o haangataake.

56:20.text: ЖҒen sukaaЙ“e wanngodato hakkunde maЙ“Й“e ton kadi e muuyanteeЙ—i Й—i Й“e suЙ“otoo.

56:21.text: ЖҒe jinndida ton kadi e teewu colli ngu Й“e tuuyatee.

56:22.text: Hino woodani Й“e ka Aljanna ton kadi, rewЙ“e labaaЙ“e yooЙ—a e yaaja giteeЙ“e

56:23.text: Wa'uЙ“e wa kaЕӢЕӢe lu'ulu'u reenaaЙ—e nder oogirЙ—e.

56:24.text: ЖҠum ko njoЙ“di golle maЙ“Й“e moЖҙЖҙe Й—en aduna.

56:25.text: ЖҒe nanataa ka nder Aljanna ton, haala bonuka, wanaa ko fawata jom mun bakkaat.

56:26.text: ЖҒe nanataa ton si wanaa ko Malaa'ika'en saЙ—nata Й“e kon, e ko Й“e salmondirta hakkonde maЙ“Й“e kon.

56:27.text: E joman en Гұaame tottirteeЙ“e Й—eri mum en juuЙ—e Гұaame, alah ko Й“uri mawnude Й“e daraja e ngonko ka Alla.

56:28.text: ЖҒe wonoyay e leЙ—Й—e Й—e alaa bulle-gi*e-, Й—e lorrataa.

56:29.text: E banaanaaje sukuЙ—e, weertiraaЙ—e yoga e dow yoga.

56:32.text: E Й“iЙ—Й“e leЙ—Й—e Й—uuЙ—uЙ—e ko limotaako.

56:33.text: ЖҠe taЖҙondirantaaЙ“e fes, Й—e alaa yonta, huunde kadi toЕӢataa Й—e.

56:34.text: ЖҒe wonay e leecee toownaaЙ—e e hoore danЙ—e.

56:35.text: Ko Menen woni ko tagi Й“en huurul'ayniiЙ“e fuЙ—Й—i Й“e.

56:36.text: Men waЙ—i Й“e curbaaЙ“e Й“e yiidaali e gorko.

56:38.text: Men tagir Й“en, fii yimЙ“e Гұaamo Й“en, maande maloore maЙ“Й“e nden.

56:39.text: ЖҒen ko dental jeyaaЙ“e e mofte AnnabaaЙ“e adinooЙ“e Й“en.

56:40.text: E seeЙ—aaЙ“e jeyaaЙ“e e mofte Annabiijo Muhammadu Й—en (yo o his) mofte sakkitiiЙ“e Й“en.

56:41.text: E jom en nane tottirteeЙ“e Й—eri mum en e nane mum en ndaw ko boni alhaaleeji e battane.

56:42.text: ЖҒen no e henndu tiiЙ—undu nguleeki, e ndiyam tiiЙ—uЙ—am fatugol.

56:43.text: E Й—owdi iwndi e curki Й“awluki.

56:44.text: Wanaa henndu Й“uuЙ“undu, wanaa labaandu yi*annde.

56:45.text: Ado Й“e wonnde e Й—ee lepte maЙ“Й“e, hari ko Й“e neeminanooЙ“e aduna, Й“e alaano himme si wanaa tuuyooji maЙ“Й“e.

56:46.text: ЖҒe laatino hiЙ“e haЙ“Й“itoo e yeddugol Allah, rewa sanamu ko woori Mo.

56:47.text: Hari hiЙ“e yeddaynoo ummital, Й“e jalkita fii maggal Й“e wi'a: Enee, hara si men maayii, men wontii mbullaari e Жҙi'e kiЙ—Й—e, hara men wuurnitete Й“aawo Й—um?

56:48.text: Hay baabiraaЙ“e amen adinooЙ“e men kadi Й“en maayude immintinoyte?

56:49.text: An NulaaЙ—o, maakan Й“ee fennuЙ“e fii ummital : Pellet, yimЙ“e adinooЙ“e e sakkitiiЙ“e fow e mun.

56:50.text: Ko on mooЙ“oyteeЙ“e Г‘alnde Darngal feere mun alaa, fii Гұaaweede yoЙ“itee.

56:51.text: Refti onon fennooЙ“e ummital majjuЙ“e laawol poocingol ko ГұaamooЙ“e Гұande darnga e Й“esnaaЙ—e lekki Jaqquum ko kiin Й“uri bonde e soЙ“de Й“esnaaЙ—e.

56:53.text: Leggal ngal hebbiiroyton dimЙ—e mun haaЙ—uЙ—e, deedi mon yeewuЙ—i.

56:54.text: Surkoron ngal ndiyam wulЙ—am haa fati.

56:55.text: On Й—uЙ—Й—iniroyay yarugol e maggal, wano ngelooba Й—uЙ—Й—inirta yarugol si Гұawii.

56:56.text: Ko on Гұaametee mettuЙ—o e ndiyam haaЙ—uЙ—o, woni ko Й“e jaЙ“Й“ortee Гұalnde njoЙ“di kuuЙ—e mon.

56:57.text: Ko Menen tagi on, onon yo fennuЙ“e ummital, hari on woodaaka. Ko haЙ—i on goonginnde wonnde Men wuurnitay on si on maayii?

56:58.text: Onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, on yi'ii maniiyu mo rufoton on e rennga rewЙ“e Й“en?

56:59.text: Ko onon tagata on maniiyu? Kaa ko Menen woni tagooЙ“e mo?

56:60.text: Ko Menen woni ko hoddiri maayde nden hakkunde mon; gooto kala e lajal, aditotaako wattintaako. Men wonaali ronkiteeЙ“e.

56:61.text: E wattitugol honooЙ“e mon e tagudu e mbaadi mon, Men fuЙ—Й—ira on e ko on anndaano e tagudu e mbaadi.

56:62.text: GomЙ—ii hiЙ—on anndi no Men tagiri on non ka aranun. E on taskotaako anndon wonnde taguЙ—o On aranun Й—um, hino hattani immintingol on si on maayii?

56:63.text: On yi'ii gabbe Й—e sankoton Й—en ka leydi?

56:64.text: Ko onon fuЙ—inta Й—en gabbe? Kaa ko Menen?

56:65.text: Si Men haajuno waЙ—ugol ndun remuru foron, ko pellet, Men wattayno mo Й—um, fewndo ka Й“adini ЖҙoЖҙugol. Wattinon Й“aawo Й—um, hiЙ—on ЕӢalЙ—a e ko heЙ“u ngu.

56:66.text: Wi'on : Menen ko men leptiraaЙ“e hayrugol ko men nafqi kon.

56:68.text: On yi'ii ndiyam Й—am yaroton Й—am si on Й—omЙ—aama?

56:69.text: E ko onon saaЖҙiniri Й—am ka kammu? Kaa ko Menen saaЖҙini Й—am?

56:70.text: Si Men haajuno waЙ—ugol Й—am ndiyam Й—uuЙ—uЙ—am lamЙ—am, hara Й—am nafataa yarugol wanaa yarnirgol, ko pellet, Men waЙ—ayno Й—um. Ko haЙ—i on yettugol Allah e ko O jippiniri yurmeende Makko nden kon, ndiyam welЙ—am?

56:71.text: On yi'ii yiite nge huЙ“Й“irton haajuuji mon Й—in?

56:72.text: E ko onon tagi leЙ—Й—e huЙ“Й“irteeЙ—e ngen yiite? Kaa ko Menen tagiri Й—e yurmegol on?

56:73.text: Men waЙ—ir ngee yiite ko waajitoron Yiite laakara ngen, e nafitor nge setotooЙ“e mon.

56:74.text: Subbunhinor an NulaaЙ—o, Joomi maa, MawnuЙ—o e ko O hanndaa e mun.

56:76.text: Ko pellet, woondirgol mutirЙ—e Й—ee koode, ko mawЙ—um, si Й—on anndunoo. Tawde maandeeji e tasakuyeeji no ton ko lannataa.

56:77.text: Ndee Alqur'aanaare wonaande janngeede e mon, ko Alqur'aanaare teddunde. Tawde hinde Й—uuЙ—i nafooje mawЙ—e.

56:78.text: Wonnde e deftere reenaande e gite yimЙ“e, nden woni Alluwal reenaangal ngal.

56:79.text: Meemataa nden, si wanaa Malaa'ika'en laЙ“Й“inaa e bakkatuuji e ayiibe.

56:80.text: Ko jippiniraande ka JeyЙ—o tageefo ngon, e dow Annabiijo Muhammadu jom kisiyee.

56:81.text: E ko ndee yewtere woni ko fennoton, onon Й“ee sirkooЙ“e fennoobe?

56:82.text: HiЙ—on waЙ—ira yettirgol mon Allah ngol e ko O arsikiri on neema, fennugol on Й—um? Wonon e dammbirgol toЙ“o ngon battinorgol hoodere (naw`u) nden? Wi'on: Men toЙ“inorii hoodere naw'u kaariiree e kaariire?

56:83.text: Ko haЙ—ata si ruuhu on yottike ka lookoЖҙere,

56:84.text: Hara onon hiЙ—on ndaara ngirЙ“oowo on fewndo yeeso mon on tuma.

56:85.text: Hara non ko Menen e ganndal e kattal Amen, wonndude e Malaa'ka'en Amen, Й“uri on Й“adaade maayoowo mon on, ko woni tun, on yi'ataa Й“en Malaa'ikaaЙ“e.

56:86.text: Ko haЙ—ata on, si tawiino hara ko no aaЖҙoriЙ—on non, wonnde on immintintaake fii warjeede golle mon,

56:87.text: Rutton kin wonkii wonuki yaltude e maayoowo mon on, si tawii ko on goonguЙ“e? On hattanaa Й—um.

56:88.text: Si tawii on maayЙ—o ko jeyaaЙ—o e adondirtenooЙ“e e moЖҙЖҙuЙ—i.

56:89.text: Haray ko fowtere nde jokkondirtaa e ronkere alah caggal mum, e arsike laaЙ“uЙ—o, e yurmeende, e Aljanna mo o neeminotoo e mun kala ko wonkii makko faaletee, woni ko woodani mo.

56:90.text: Si tawii maayЙ—o on ko jeyaaЙ—o e yimЙ“e Гұaamo Й“en, haray wata fii makko sunin; tawde ko kisal e hoolaare woodani Й“en.

56:92.text: Si tawii non maayЙ—o on ko jeyanooЙ—o e fennunooЙ“e ko NulaaЙ—o on mo jam e kisiyee woni e mun on, majjunooЙ“e laawol focciingol ngol.

56:93.text: Haray jipporde makko nde o jaЙ“Й“etee e mun nden, ko ndiyam fatayЙ—am.

56:95.text: Pellet, ko Men fillani maa kon an NulaaЙ—o, ko goonga yananaaЙ—o, mo sikke alaa e mu'un.

56:96.text: Senin innde Joomi maa MawЙ—o On, mawninaa Mo e kala ustaare!

57:1.text: Kala tagoore Allah wonnde ka kammuuli e ka leydi seninii Mo laЙ“Й“inii Mo. Ko Kanko woni FooluЙ—o Mo fooletaake, Г‘eeГұuЙ—o e tagu Mun, e eЙ“Й“oore Mun.

57:2.text: Ko Kanko tun heeranii laamagol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin. Himo wuurna Mo O muuyani nguurndam, O wara Mo O muuyani maayde. Kanko ko O hattanЙ—o kala huunde. Fii huunde ronkintaa Mo.

57:3.text: Ko Kanko woni Arano Mo goЙ—Й—um aditaaki, SakkitiiЙ—o Mo goЙ—Й—um arataa Й“aawo Mun, FeeГұuЙ—o Mo goЙ—Й—um alaa dow Mun, WirniiЙ—o Mo goЙ—Й—um alaa senngo ley Mun. Kanko ko O annduЙ—o kala huunde. Huunde laawotaako Mo.

57:4.text: Ko Kanko tagiri kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin nder balЙ—e jeegoo, Гұalnde Й—um fuЙ—Й—ornoo e Alet, lanniri e Jumaare, e hoore non Himo waawunoo tagude Й—in ko Й“uri Й—um famЙ—irde yeru hinЖҙaango. Refti O toowi O fotondiri ka dow "Arsi" no O hanndiri. Himo Anndi kala ko naatata e leydi ndin; immorde e ndiyam, e puЙ—i ekw, e kala ko yaltata e mayri; immorde e puЙ—i, e oogirЙ—e ekw, e kala ko jipporta ka kammu; immorde e toЙ“o, e wahayu ekw, e kala ko Жҙawata e maggu; immorde e Malaa'ika, e golle jeyaaЙ“e Й“en e pittaali maЙ“Й“e Й—in. Himo wonndiri e mon anndal Makko, nokku kala ka wonЙ—on, onon Й“ee yimЙ“e. Huunde e fii mon suuЙ—aaki Mo. Allah no reeni ko golloton ko. Huunde e mun wirnanaaki Mo. O yoЙ“itoyay on Й—um.

57:5.text: Ko Kanko tun heeranii laamagol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin. Ko ka Makko tun kadi woni ko fiyakuuji Й—in ruttetee, O Гұaawa tagoore nden Г‘alnde Darngal, O warjooЙ“e golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en.

57:6.text: Himo naada jemma on e nder Гұalorma on fii no niЙ“Й“itira yimЙ“e Й“en Й—aanoo, O naadira kadi Гұalorma on e nder jemma on fii no ndaygira yimЙ“e Й“en yalta golle. Kanko ko O annduЙ—o ko woni e Й“erЙ—e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Huunde suuЙ—aaki Mo e Й—um.

57:7.text: GomЙ—inee Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko On, nafqon jawdi ndi Allah waЙ—iri on ndin lomtinaaЙ“e e mun, hiЙ—on yiilira ndi no Allah sar'inirani on. GomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en Allah e mo'on, Й“e wintii jawle maЙ“Й“e Й—en e laawol Allah, hino woodani Й“en mbarjaari mawnundi ka Makko, ndin le ko Aljanna.

57:8.text: E ko haЙ—i on gomЙ—ingol Allah? E hino NulaaЙ—o on hino nodda on e Allah, jortagol nde gomЙ—inton Joomi mon seniiЙ—o On. GomЙ—ii le Allah Жҙetti e mon ahadi, nde gomЙ—inton Mo, fewndo O yaltinirnoo on e keeci baabiraaЙ“e mon, si on laatike gomЙ—imЙ“e.

57:9.text: Ko Kanko woni jippinoowo e jeyaaЙ—o Makko on Muhammadu (yo o his) Aayeeje Й“annguЙ—e, fii no o yaltinira on e niЙ“e keeferaaku e majjere faade e ndaygu gomЙ—inal e ganndal. Pellet, Allah ko Yurminoowo on, HinnotooЙ—o On. Tawde O nulii Annabaajo Makko on e mon, ko fewna on wewlina.

57:10.text: E ko haЙ—ata on sakkagol fii laawol Allah ngol? E hino le ko Allah heeranii ronugol kammuuli Й—in e leydi ndin. Fotataa e mon, onon muumini'en, Й“en sakkinooЙ“e jawle mun fii laawol Allah ngol Й—aЙ“Й“irgol welayee Makko ado uddital Makkah ngal Й“e haЙ“idi e heeferЙ“e Й“en fii Й“amtugol Lislaamu, Й“en fotataa e sakkiiЙ“e Й“en Й“aawo uddital ngal Й“e haЙ“idi e heeferЙ“e Й“en. Ko sakkinooЙ“e Й“en ado uddital ngal Й“e haЙ“idaa fii Й“amtugol laawol Allah ngol, Й“uri mawnude maqaama ka Allah, Й“uri kadi darja e dii sakkiiЙ“e jawle mun Й“en Й“aawo mun Й“e haЙ“idaa. ЖҒe fow maЙ“Й“e non, Allah fodii Й“e Aljanna. Allah no humpitii ko golloton kon. Huunde e mun suuЙ—aaki Mo. O yoЙ“itoyay on Й—um.

57:11.text: ko hommbo tottirta jawdi laЙ“undi ndin fii Allah, Allah warjora mo Й—um jawdi sowaandi, hara kadi hino woodani mbarjaari mawndi Г‘alnde Darngal, woni Aljanna?

57:12.text: Г‘alnde yi'oytaa gomЙ—imЙ“e worЙ“e Й“en e gomЙ—imЙ“e rewЙ“e Й“en, hara annoora maЙ“Й“e on no yaara yeeso maЙ“Й“e e Гұaamo maЙ“Й“e, Й“e wi'anee nden Гұalnde : weltaare mon nden hannde, ko Aljannaaji Й—i canЙ—i ilata senngo ley kuЙ“eeje mun e leЙ—Й—e mun, ko on duumotooЙ“e nder ton poomaa. Ko ndin njoЙ“di Й—on woni maloore mawnde nde sugu mun alaa.

57:13.text: Г‘alnde naafiqiiЙ“e worЙ“e Й“en e naafiqiiЙ“e rewЙ“e Й“en wi'anoyta gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en : habbee men, men ndayginora annoora mon on fii lummbugol siraate. ЖҒe wi'anee jalkiteede : Yiltoree Й“aawo mon, Й—aЙ“Й“iroyon ton ko ndayginoron. Heedo waЙ—ee hakkunde maЙ“Й“e, hara ko jogiingo damal, tawa nder maggal on no fewtiri gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en yurmeende, Й“aawo on fewtiri naafiqiiЙ“e Й“en lepte.

57:14.text: NaafiqiiЙ“e Й“en noddoya muumini en, Й“e wi'a Й“e :E men wondaano e mon ka lislaamu e ka Й—oftaare? JuulЙ“e Й“en jaaboo Й“e : Ko non woniri, hari ko enen. Ko woni tun, on fitinirno ko'e mon naafiqaaku, Й—um bonni fii mon, habbitaniЙ—on gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en fooleede fii no feГұГұiniron keefee- ru mon, sikkitiЙ—on si Allah wallay gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en, sikkitiЙ—on kadi fii ummital caggal maayde, yelaaji penaale hodi on haa maayde juhi on e mun. Seytaane hodi e moЖҙЖҙere Allah nden.

57:15.text: Hannde on, onon Й“ee naafiqiiЙ“e on jaЙ“antaake soktorЙ—um lepte Allah Й—en, wanaa feГұГұimЙ“e keeferaaku Й“en kadi jaЙ“antee Й—um. Depporde mon nden onon e maЙ“Й“e, ko ka Yiite : ko ngen hanndi e mon. Nge bonii ruttorde.

57:16.text: Hara yontaali gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, nde Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en hecciЙ—ira jantoore Allah nden e kon ko jippinaa ka Alqur'aanaare immorde e fodooje e kammba? Hara Й“e wa'aali wa Alyahuuda okkanooЙ“e Tawreeta Й“en e Annasaare okkanooЙ“e Linnjiila Й“en e yoorugol Й“erЙ—e. Dumunna juuti hakkunde maЙ“Й“e e nuleede Annabiijo maЙ“Й“e on, Й“erЙ—e maЙ“Й“e Й—en yoori sabu Й—um, ko Й—uuЙ—unoo e maЙ“Й“e kon, hari ko yaltuЙ“e e Й—oftaare Allah, unii e yeddugol Mo.

57:17.text: Anndee pellet, Allah wuurnitay leydi ndin fuЙ—ingol ndi si ndi yoorii. GomЙ—ii Men Й“annginiranii on onon Й“ee yimЙ“e, dalilaaji e hujjaaji fii kattal Allah e gootaagu Makko ngun, fii no haqqiliron, anndon wonnde wuurnituЙ—o ndin leydi On, ko hattanЙ—o wuurnitugol on si on maayii, ko non kadi O waawiri haccinde Й“erЙ—e mon Й—en si Й—e yoorii.

57:18.text: Pellet, sakkotooЙ“e yoga e jawle mun Й“en ka worЙ“e e ka rewЙ“e, wintorayЙ“e Й—e Й“ernde laaЙ“unde hara wanaa fii feere alaa, Й“en sowanoyte mbarjaari golle maЙ“Й“e Й—en : sappo kala yeru mun, haa hewtoya teemeЙ—Й—e jeeЙ—iЙ—i cowanЙ—e Й—uuЙ—uЙ—e, hara hino woodani Й“e mbarjaari mawndi ka Allah, woni Aljanna.

57:19.text: ЖҒen gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko nn Й“e senndaali Й—um, ko Й“en woni siforЙ“e goonguugol. SahimbinaaЙ“e Й“en ka Joomi mun, hino woodani Й“en mbarjaari maЙ“Й“e maranaaЙ“e ndi Й“en e annoora ndaygiroyaЙ—o yeeso e Гұaame maЙ“Й“e Г‘alnde Darngal. ЖҒen non yedduЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ—o Makko on, Й“e woni e fennugol Aayeeje jippinaaЙ—e Й—en e NulaaЙ“e Amen Й“en, ko Й“en woni yimЙ“e Jahiimi ngen. ЖҒe naatoyat e magge Г‘alnde Darngal, ko Й“e luttata poomaa.

57:20.text: Anndee wonnde Й—am nguurndam aduna ko fijindaaru Й“alli e welo-welo Й“erЙ—e, e cuЙ—aari mon, e mantagol hakkunde mon fii laamu e dakamme, Й“urodira Й—uuЙ—ugol jawle e Й“iЙ—Й“e. ЖҠum no wa'i wa toЙ“o haawnayngo remooЙ“e Й“en e puЙ—i mun, refti Й—in puЙ—i kecci yoora ko yaawi, yi'aa Й—um an ndaaroowo on, hino wonta ko soyЙ—i, refti Allah muncita fii mun wonta kelon kelon. Hino ka laakara, lette saЙ—tuЙ—e wonannde heeferЙ“e Й“en e naafiqi'en, e yaafuyee immmorde ka Allah wonannde bakkatuuji jeyaaЙ“e Makko gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en e welayee Makko. Awa Й—am nguurdam aduna wonaali, si wanaa dakamme lannoowo. Kala suЙ“iiЙ—o on dakamme lannoowo e hoore neema laakara on, haray on Й—on ko sooyuЙ—o koomtaaЙ—o.

57:21.text: Ko onon yo yimЙ“e, adondiree e golle moЖҙЖҙe Й—e daГұirton yaafaneede junuubi ka Joomi mon: immorde e tuubugol maa kala golle Й“aЙ—torЙ—e Allah ekw, e no heЙ“iron Allah mo yaajeendi mun wa'i wa yaajeendi kammu ngun e leydi ndin, on maranaama Й“en gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah e NulaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Ngal keЙ“al ko Й“ural Allah ngal O okkata mo O muuyani e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Allah ko Jom Й“ural mawnungal e dow jeyaaЙ“e Makko gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en.

57:22.text: Bone woo heЙ“ataa yimЙ“e Й“en ka leydi immorde e kokke m. kw. wanaa ko memata Й“e e wonkiiji maЙ“Й“e, si wanaa Й—um tabitananooma ka Alluwal reenaanagl, ado Men tagude ndee tagoore. Pellet, Й—um ko ko newanii Allah.

57:23.text: ЖҠum ko fii wata onon Й“ee yimЙ“e wata on suno e ko laawii on kon, hara kadi on weltoraali neema ko O neemini e mon kon fantinon. Pellet, Alla yiЙ—aa kala ГұaaЖҙoroowo mantoro ko Allah okki mo kon e hoore yimЙ“e Й“en.

57:24.text: ЖҒen wuddirooЙ“e ko Й“e haani okkude kon, Й“e yamira kadi yimЙ“e Й“en nguddam, ko hayruЙ“e. Kala Й—uurniiЙ—o e Й—oftagol Allah, Й—um ko kanko lorrata, wanaa doo Allah. Pellet, Allah kan ko Galo Mo hatonjinaa e Й—oftaare jeyaaЙ“e Makko, YettiniiЙ—o e kala fiyaaku.

57:25.text: Sellii Men nulirii NulaaЙ“e Amen Й“en hujjaaji Й“annguЙ—i, Men jippindinani Й“e Defte e sariyaare, fii no yimЙ“e Й“en ГұiiЙ“ira e nunЙ—al. Men jippini kadi njamndi ndin, ndi doole tiiЙ—uЙ—e woni e mun; ko kayri tafirЙ—e jogaaji, ko non kadi nafooje wonirani yimЙ“e Й“en e majje ka mecce maЙ“Й“e, e fii kadi no Allah anndira anndal feГұГұinirangol jeyaaЙ“e Й“en, Й“en wallooЙ“e Mo e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en ka wirnii. Pelelt, Allah ko Jom cemmbe, FooluЙ—o Mo fooletaake. Fii huunde ronkinЕӢtaa Mo.

57:26.text: GomЙ—ii Men nulii Nuuhu e Ibraahiima (yo Й“e his), Men waЙ—i e geyngol maЙ“Й“e ngol Annabaaku e Defte tellinaaЙ—e. Hino jeyanoo e geyngol maЙ“Й“e ngol feewuЙ“e e laawol foccingol ngol, hawri e peewal, ko Й—uuЙ—unoo kon e maЙ“Й“e ko yaltunooЙ“e e Й—fotaare Allah.

57:27.text: Refti Men jokkintini Й“e NulaaЙ“e Amen Й“en, Men nuliri Й“e kala e mofte mun. Men jokkintiniri Й“e Iisaa geЙ—al Maryama on, Men okki mo Linjiila, Men waЙ—i e Й“erЙ—e gomЙ—imЙ“e mo Й“en jokki mo : yurmeende e giggol, Й“e yiЙ—indiri Й“e yurmondiri. ЖҒe sincoyi fantingol ka diina maЙ“Й“e, Й“e acci yoga e ko Allah daginannoo Й“e immorde e desal e dakamme, e hoore Men Й—aЙ“Й“iraa Й“e Й—um, ko kamЙ“e fawitii Й—um sincugol ka diina. Ko Men Й—aЙ“Й“irnoo Й“e Menen, ko jokkugol welayee Allah on, kono Й“e waЙ—aali Й—um. Men okki mbarjaari gomЙ—imЙ“e Й“en e maЙ“Й“e. Ko Й—uuЙ—unoo kon e maЙ“Й“e, ko yaltirnooЙ“e e Й—oftaare Allah fennugol ko NulaaЙ—o Muhammadu addunoo kon.

57:28.text: Ko onon yo gomЙ—imЙ“e Allah gollitiri sari'a Makko on ! Huliree Allah Й—oftagol yamaruyeeji Makko Й—in, woЙ—Й—itoo e haЙ—aaЙ—i Makko Й—in, gomЙ—inon NulaaЙ—o Makko on; O okkay on geЙ“e Й—iЙ—i e mbarjaari gomЙ—ingol mon ngol Muhammadu e NulaaЙ“e adinooЙ“e Й“en, O waЙ—ana on kadi annoora Й“e ndayginorton ka aduna mon e ka lummboygol Siraate Г‘alnde Darngal, O haforana on kadi bakkatuuji mon Й—in hara O nanngitirtaa on Й—i. Pellet, Allah seniiЙ—o On, ko Haforanoowo jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en, HinnotooЙ—o Й“e.

57:29.text: Ko Men Й“annginirani on Й“ural Amen mawngal ngal e kon ko Men marani on onon muumuni'en, immorde e mbrajaari sowaandi, ko fii no Alyahhuda e Annasaara ka yimЙ“e Defte anndira wonnde Й“e hattanaa hay huunde e Й“ural Allah ngal, sakko Й“e yeЙ—a mo Й“e yiЙ—ani, Й“e Й—awa ngal mo Й“e yiЙ—i Й—awude, Й“e annda kadi pellet, Й“ural ngal ko e juuЙ—e Allah woni, Himo yeЙ—a ngal mo O muuyani e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en. Pellet, Allah ko Jom Й“ural mawngal ngal O heertinanta mo O muuyani e jeyaaЙ“e Makko Й“en.

58:1.text: Ko goonga Alla nanii haala debba-khawlata bintu saalabata-duttandiratЙ—o e ma haala-aan nelaaЙ—o- ko faati e jom galle makko-awsu ibnu saabit- nde o nanndidini mbo e neene makko; hombo wullito faade e Alla ko oon golli mbo ko; Alla na nana ko kaaldaton ko; hay ndiga wirnaaki mbo; pellet Alla na nana konnguЙ—i jiyaaЙ“e; hombo yi*a golle mum en hay ndiga wirnataako Mbo.
